name: Brian Burch
subject: Dodgers re-invite fake “sisters”, so we're fighting back.
body:
[Unsubscribe](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=eb7927f91d9d4247b39b6907d8336a21&_t=ZLUmUezrccHs7uDjW_71gKTkvdkXWwvsOKdxd06w2TEH-WaQCt0l4dl7VV3uca40UG0HZSCFC1wsz_uDPReGqzly8xS6kJFztwqSnmhZVqM%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=eb7927f91d9d4247b39b6907d8336a21&_t=ZLUmUezrccHs7uDjW_71gKTkvdkXWwvsOKdxd06w2TEH-WaQCt0l4dl7VV3uca40UG0HZSCFC1wsz_uDPReGqzly8xS6kJFztwqSnmhZVqM%3D)

I need your urgent help to expose the LA Dodgers baseball team for blatantly supporting an anti-Christian hate group. | | | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=eb7927f91d9d4247b39b6907d8336a21&_e=157UqK8N-4wvFDsrXloJ_iBScLO_4cr9UoY0QHY-xrapA5Bfylu0gX1QjhNkpQAGAxmGihpaC858deCx2Jupfm3Vl4G9kGdNEPdmcN_D031qbkBJjF1x7R7g4oN2Q-i0NFm7wVOFDIXdJgaV8NG35Ah8Jz9rSux8TIssNjAQKwmGJdXL9NQQ-PIP417zg52S8eJ6IETrEPDmex7o0Cdy86W7k-2LKTnPe7-OWFDZV7ZppC-dVIGz9yJ0BmVgUza7-EaZcdS-0Hx_vbPDOqeK3f7znpW0RGU8WxXt8EurMHO9TjWRGT7qjz5W0N83C6ei)
---
| | **I need your urgent help to expose the LA Dodgers baseball team for blatantly supporting an anti-Christian hate group.** The group calls itself the “Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence.” And their motto is “go forth and sin some more.” **The “sisters” are a bunch of men who dress up in sexually explicit and rainbow-colored “nun” clothing with one purpose: ** _To mock Christians. _ Then they perform stunts designed to be as shocking and offensive as possible.
* A “condom savior mass”
* An annual “Jesus in drag” competition
* Pole dancing on a cross
* And much more.

_They even tricked an archbishop into giving them communion, then defiled the Eucharist._ **And the Dodgers are choosing to honor this anti-Christian hate group with their “Community Hero Award” during so-called “Pride month.”**
---
[FIGHT BACK](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=eb7927f91d9d4247b39b6907d8336a21&_e=157UqK8N-4wvFDsrXloJ_iBScLO_4cr9UoY0QHY-xrapA5Bfylu0gX1QjhNkpQAGAxmGihpaC858deCx2Jupfm3Vl4G9kGdNEPdmcN_D031qbkBJjF1x7R7g4oN2Q-i0NFm7wVOFDIXdJgaV8NG35Ah8Jz9rSux8TIssNjAQKwlF5YQizuffEkIgYy08Vh0iELxlDp5PQ-PaumCX9hOPK_6yVsJAIBLYiVveq2dJ8rsGo6HMnpZ693OYrgh50nBLMSgbTqXUiD0FsRCWTICd2-kaFSZet9Om5rWMadu_RYZklpApkqcARfGWVy4ibchl)
---
It’s vile. It’s disgusting. It’s a blatant attack by a major American corporation on our Lord. _And faithful Christians like you and I must not tolerate this kind of hatred._ ** ****That’s why CatholicVote is raising $1 million to run ads on every Dodgers-linked radio station and TV channel to send a clear message:**** ****Any business that promotes anti-Catholic bigotry WILL suffer the consequences.**
---
[FLOOD THE AIRWAYS!](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=eb7927f91d9d4247b39b6907d8336a21&_e=157UqK8N-4wvFDsrXloJ_iBScLO_4cr9UoY0QHY-xrapA5Bfylu0gX1QjhNkpQAGAxmGihpaC858deCx2Jupfm3Vl4G9kGdNEPdmcN_D031qbkBJjF1x7R7g4oN2Q-i0NFm7wVOFDIXdJgaV8NG35Ah8Jz9rSux8TIssNjAQKwm-zexYl92HwI3nB7tMYVxcepQ9b6okwBCPlFWAzVtQZ1OAEc98kuZOa86yt42Dkq6uh_dHdzEUgCrJr8UuLyXCfIQ8LkbZUSQgZr3cDQ8UTA78KxvVcACzvCxCl1CuBwtQ7DzekUbZaiLouwX5bQ9O)
---
If you’ve been following the news closely, you may have read about CatholicVote’s campaign to ask the Dodgers to remove this anti-Catholic group of fake “sisters” from their celebration. Thanks to our public pressure campaign, thousands of CatholicVote supporters FLOODED Dodger stadium with phone calls. _Within minutes, we filled up their voicemail inboxes._ The Dodgers almost immediately disinvited the “sisters.” A HUGE thank-you to everyone who made those calls! I’m incredibly proud of our CatholicVote family for taking action right away. **But unfortunately****Patriot,****the story doesn’t end there.** As soon as the Dodgers disinvited the “sisters,” the leftwing LGBT movement went crazy. Other gay and transgender groups began to pressure and threaten the Dodgers for daring to cross the LGBT agenda. **Then, the Dodgers**** _re-invited_****the Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence back and decided to honor them with the baseball team’s “Community Hero Award.”** They also offered their “sincerest apologies to the Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence, members of the LGBTQ+ community and their friends and families.” And they made the decision without even consulting any faithful Christians – people like you and me. _The Christians who the “Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence” target with their hatred in the first place._ It’s shocking, but not surprising. Patriot, this is the state of American culture today. If anyone dares to call a “transgender” person by their biological name or pronoun, they risk being fired by woke corporations. **_But those same woke businesses heap honor on bigots who insult Christians, hate our biblical values, and mock our Lord and Savior._**
---
[DEFEND CHRIST!](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=eb7927f91d9d4247b39b6907d8336a21&_e=157UqK8N-4wvFDsrXloJ_iBScLO_4cr9UoY0QHY-xrapA5Bfylu0gX1QjhNkpQAGAxmGihpaC858deCx2Jupfm3Vl4G9kGdNEPdmcN_D031qbkBJjF1x7R7g4oN2Q-i0NFm7wVOFDIXdJgaV8NG35Ah8Jz9rSux8TIssNjAQKwlW1NI-z6o0V00wvaLXPX76YZrXa8dOvYpbV0eVnFxsETyWZCBvFDwz5JqSUg4jJpEL01leXlCJL8qrH0AUz9OY_O16_KbBM3kzvYG1JLpYCrJJHEn4tIPW3iFcCt-3tJQ-sFszFfx-8Ol2Y8PYgWvN)
---
As Senator Marco Rubio said last night after the news broke, “Today our great country is controlled by socio-political ruling elites who don’t just tolerate anti-Christian bigotry, they encourage & celebrate it.” He’s spot on, Patriot. One thing is absolutely clear today: **_Hate has a home at Dodger stadium._** **And it’s our job to stand up for the majesty of our Lord and our Church.** For God and for country, Brian BurchPresident, CatholicVote

\------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ P.S. Like I mentioned earlier, we’ve set a goal to raise $1 million to run ads exposing the anti-Christian bigotry of the LA Dodgers and the “Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence.” [**Please click here to donate anything you can spare today.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=eb7927f91d9d4247b39b6907d8336a21&_e=157UqK8N-4wvFDsrXloJ_iBScLO_4cr9UoY0QHY-xrapA5Bfylu0gX1QjhNkpQAGAxmGihpaC858deCx2Jupfm3Vl4G9kGdNEPdmcN_D031qbkBJjF1x7R7g4oN2Q-i0NFm7wVOFDIXdJgaV8NG35Ah8Jz9rSux8TIssNjAQKwm3wfe31ykhGs56KOIKovtsgW1zEmMdcJjT6mxy0iLVF25liYIciotvZT-kUKYHOFJq6EdHWUvP5vtkErtcNtZDV6-b2iiy3O3YV_ZQlWjcKHBzWJvmNVMxvUUaIys5CQ0TImT92owsoHM0xGrXgInu) We didn’t have this in our budget, and we need to raise the money in the next few days. So no matter what you can afford to chip in – please don’t hesitate. The most important thing is time. Thank you in advance, and please keep our work in your prayers.
---
| |
---

There’s no sugarcoating this, Fellow Conservative:

If Republicans don’t win back control of the Senate in the 2024 election, it’s quite possible we will be locked out of the majority for the rest of this DECADE due to the Senate map in play.

It’s no exaggeration to say that this upcoming election will change the course of our nation - **which is why I entered this fight to take back the Senate.**

**If you have not heard from me, I am Jim Justice, the two-term West Virginia Governor challenging Democrat Joe Manchin for his current Senate seat.** I recently launched my campaign, and I’m looking for grassroots conservatives like yourself to join my team.

[_Official West Virginia Battleground Fund_ _
Join Team Justice-> _](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b80d9bf9f7af4ccfa9f7f0eaca2d26f0&_e=UaM5NNnkReniXLaeMOgkKa6nmwSaXWFA9gmbpTLbpWI2ZMMchBNLrUO8FgISB6U--jWz7i-3eraBUcXaeEooDpIgCeef0wZuyF8JA7HRh2ytnLJ-vKfeTwIg38mJk7gJ8cMKcKJOIui9g7XaXrA_BTFEByZt-cuogQUwatHBf0650NXE6ABwEMI0yhRHScekFVWXC4Zmts0k8pZyfkBnzPl0quWcKu8CrZKLH8kXKc4GVw7JAYM_wWhBf0DGqDiFtNPv_1vx5daKROm5SjyRjzHiLA7Amgh1DcHYxaTzm3GnAexFoRzLRbb7ftoy3URVHB2215097RdxZ7gVKx7LNsjOjvNzfpqUcghgVNs-i43XEQOIOmiYtOb18moLggO69TFm3X0RtDa_WtgR1M6tKiY6DFB71aDBPdRVAGn34tG6rjmJq7l0B5Fh2jkmoM6d)
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b80d9bf9f7af4ccfa9f7f0eaca2d26f0&_e=UaM5NNnkReniXLaeMOgkKa6nmwSaXWFA9gmbpTLbpWI2ZMMchBNLrUO8FgISB6U--jWz7i-3eraBUcXaeEooDpIgCeef0wZuyF8JA7HRh2ytnLJ-vKfeTwIg38mJk7gJ8cMKcKJOIui9g7XaXrA_BTFEByZt-cuogQUwatHBf0650NXE6ABwEMI0yhRHScekFVWXC4Zmts0k8pZyfkBnzPl0quWcKu8CrZKLH8kXKc4GVw7JAYM_wWhBf0DGqDiFtNPv_1vx5daKROm5SjyRjzHiLA7Amgh1DcHYxaTzm3Fdi8wsnzLMHTLsN34XugtSriWPg6LtzI_MLByahop5PTHrCCm9Q7L7GTFJBxdZcCqHOHMGtSksINgid-pqArA1M8T0QAwLoNjqefll9ktiDEID6NaJFedywqbQKajk7Y-5g5y-L5a5mLaSSyjbsz7b)
I’m under no illusions that you will invest in this fight the first time you hear from me, but **I’m willing to work for your support**. I hope once you see that winning my race is a critical component in securing a Republican Senate Majority, you will feel inclined to help.

_Take a look at the math, Fellow Conservative:_

Republicans are only TWO seats away from a Senate majority, and there are THREE Democrat incumbents up for re-election in ruby-red states. If we win in Montana, Ohio, and right here in West Virginia, we will win back the Republican majority in 2024.
_
**This West Virginia race is a TOP PRIORITY INVESTMENT for all conservatives, no matter where you live**_.

[** JOIN TEAM JUSTICE **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b80d9bf9f7af4ccfa9f7f0eaca2d26f0&_e=UaM5NNnkReniXLaeMOgkKa6nmwSaXWFA9gmbpTLbpWI2ZMMchBNLrUO8FgISB6U--jWz7i-3eraBUcXaeEooDpIgCeef0wZuyF8JA7HRh2ytnLJ-vKfeTwIg38mJk7gJ8cMKcKJOIui9g7XaXrA_BTFEByZt-cuogQUwatHBf0650NXE6ABwEMI0yhRHScekFVWXC4Zmts0k8pZyfkBnzPl0quWcKu8CrZKLH8kXKc4GVw7JAYM_wWhBf0DGqDiFtNPv_1vx5daKROm5SjyRjzHiLA7Amgh1DcHYxaTzm3HXJnrzyKmjJa7nE9_p_2uxeHmaTEkPi7BzQTqMZN75sL-Z3MxnwdXx5P_0UzjG5y2RuJ80HG-_WL8kvwqksdVrLQvSLWPyDJOV2m9RfuMJQVoFhe53lEwEHwTR6mJCRBt1hTgu56Qs0SHpOmkrar-n)

**My opponent is one of the most vulnerable Democrats in the Senate, with an abysmal 40% approval rating**. Plus, Republicans have won in six-straight presidential elections here in West Virginia!

Then this should be an easy win for Republicans here in 2024, right? **Not in the slightest,_Fellow Conservative_. **

Democrats like Joe Manchin have continually outraised Republican candidates in the past years, allowing him to win elections and hold on to this Senate seat. In 2018, Manchin won his race by three points, despite Republicans adding two seats to their majority at the time.

**Joe Manchin is sitting atop a $9.7 MILLION war chest, which he will use to buy this Senate seat, and with it, the Democrats’ Majority in 2024.**

**We won’t stand a chance of winning back our Senate majority if we can’t fight back against all this Democrat cash.**

I’m urgently calling for grassroots Republicans to **[join my team and pitch into our West Virginia Battle Fund today](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b80d9bf9f7af4ccfa9f7f0eaca2d26f0&_e=UaM5NNnkReniXLaeMOgkKa6nmwSaXWFA9gmbpTLbpWI2ZMMchBNLrUO8FgISB6U--jWz7i-3eraBUcXaeEooDpIgCeef0wZuyF8JA7HRh2ytnLJ-vKfeTwIg38mJk7gJ8cMKcKJOIui9g7XaXrA_BTFEByZt-cuogQUwatHBf0650NXE6ABwEMI0yhRHScekFVWXC4Zmts0k8pZyfkBnzPl0quWcKu8CrZKLH8kXKc4GVw7JAYM_wWhBf0DGqDiFtNPv_1vx5daKROm5SjyRjzHiLA7Amgh1DcHYxaTzm3FFuiyd1Pp-wVh-zmhjjzAo9aQg0-UFa5kWa5SoEcaSm5aXq1VjPU2i-4w58ij2PUZsmGipidp7LwywLqvoPwCwT9e_T9M3O6OfGNwrqFEsmGwnGIXhZqHszIZKbg8Gb4Qvn1P2ifCRFFSXdyvb-rlv)**.

[_Official West Virginia Battleground Fund_ _
Join Team Justice-> _](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b80d9bf9f7af4ccfa9f7f0eaca2d26f0&_e=UaM5NNnkReniXLaeMOgkKa6nmwSaXWFA9gmbpTLbpWI2ZMMchBNLrUO8FgISB6U--jWz7i-3eraBUcXaeEooDpIgCeef0wZuyF8JA7HRh2ytnLJ-vKfeTwIg38mJk7gJ8cMKcKJOIui9g7XaXrA_BTFEByZt-cuogQUwatHBf0650NXE6ABwEMI0yhRHScekFVWXC4Zmts0k8pZyfkBnzPl0quWcKu8CrZKLH8kXKc4GVw7JAYM_wWhBf0DGqDiFtNPv_1vx5daKROm5SjyRjzHiLA7Amgh1DcHYxaTzm3EBWMrJh0-WLkV-8bBCWg_WoF-GI3q3X9e3hWQG-8Ia0m_dRWv-PlrogH82ZsdUOd2HEsF0aeqymgxg9ZVUaQRyJeCeqvP0Pv_A_QFJXroH--0lMYZNLLtcWHkp17c9hxagY8AlWNjBZ2gfVOo2VTvo)
Regardless of the amount, your contribution will directly fund our grassroots efforts, allowing us to reach more voters, amplify our message, and counter Manchin and his Democrat fundraising machine.

The implications of falling short here in West Virginia are grave—we risk locking Republicans out of the Senate majority for the rest of this decade and leaving America’s future in the hands of radical Democrats.

Remember, the stakes are high, and **[every contribution counts](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b80d9bf9f7af4ccfa9f7f0eaca2d26f0&_e=UaM5NNnkReniXLaeMOgkKa6nmwSaXWFA9gmbpTLbpWI2ZMMchBNLrUO8FgISB6U--jWz7i-3eraBUcXaeEooDpIgCeef0wZuyF8JA7HRh2ytnLJ-vKfeTwIg38mJk7gJ8cMKcKJOIui9g7XaXrA_BTFEByZt-cuogQUwatHBf0650NXE6ABwEMI0yhRHScekFVWXC4Zmts0k8pZyfkBnzPl0quWcKu8CrZKLH8kXKc4GVw7JAYM_wWhBf0DGqDiFtNPv_1vx5daKROm5SjyRjzHiLA7Amgh1DcHYxaTzm3EtZNQCWuNCAYhOHXju36gXzzNJBAlbQKjQeeu-kZqj1BEja2A3eGSp3Mi3VEJYtXH2cUN13qhCKmV442pM8wIfQ7dcRHDnkzr0Y1U2ui4odSY6a9kDYLa7evyu0_dZ25NaqCeyoJRiE1uIVypd4LTE)**.

Sincerely,
Gov. Jim Justice
Republican for U.S. Senate

| **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

clean_body: If Republicans don’t win back control of the Senate in the 2024 election, it’s quite possible we will be locked out of the majority for the rest of this DECADE due to the Senate map in play. | | There’s no sugarcoating this, Fellow Conservative: If Republicans don’t win back control of the Senate in the 2024 election, it’s quite possible we will be locked out of the majority for the rest of this DECADE due to the Senate map in play. It’s no exaggeration to say that this upcoming election will change the course of our nation - which is why I entered this fight to take back the Senate. If you have not heard from me, I am Jim Justice, the two-term West Virginia Governor challenging Democrat Joe Manchin for his current Senate seat. I recently launched my campaign, and I’m looking for grassroots conservatives like yourself to join my team. I’m under no illusions that you will invest in this fight the first time you hear from me, but I’m willing to work for your support. I hope once you see that winning my race is a critical component in securing a Republican Senate Majority, you will feel inclined to help. Take a look at the math, Fellow Conservative: Republicans are only TWO seats away from a Senate majority, and there are THREE Democrat incumbents up for re-election in ruby-red states. If we win in Montana, Ohio, and right here in West Virginia, we will win back the Republican majority in 2024. This West Virginia race is a TOP PRIORITY INVESTMENT for all conservatives, no matter where you live. My opponent is one of the most vulnerable Democrats in the Senate, with an abysmal 40% approval rating. Plus, Republicans have won in six-straight presidential elections here in West Virginia! Then this should be an easy win for Republicans here in 2024, right? Not in the slightest,Fellow Conservative. Democrats like Joe Manchin have continually outraised Republican candidates in the past years, allowing him to win elections and hold on to this Senate seat. In 2018, Manchin won his race by three points, despite Republicans adding two seats to their majority at the time. Joe Manchin is sitting atop a $9.7 MILLION war chest, which he will use to buy this Senate seat, and with it, the Democrats’ Majority in 2024. We won’t stand a chance of winning back our Senate majority if we can’t fight back against all this Democrat cash. I’m urgently calling for grassroots Republicans to . Regardless of the amount, your contribution will directly fund our grassroots efforts, allowing us to reach more voters, amplify our message, and counter Manchin and his Democrat fundraising machine. The implications of falling short here in West Virginia are grave—we risk locking Republicans out of the Senate majority for the rest of this decade and leaving America’s future in the hands of radical Democrats. Remember, the stakes are high, and . Sincerely, Gov. Jim Justice Republican for U.S. Senate | MEET JIM Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs. Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team. Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. Hi there, Peter.

Before I announced my candidacy, I made it my personal commitment to build a campaign that reflects the hopes and priorities of everyone in the 41st Congressional District. We're only three weeks in, and we've already been on the road speaking to hundreds of new supporters about their concerns.

I know I can’t meet everyone personally, but I still want to make sure there’s an avenue to hear from as many people as possible. **That’s why today, I’m asking you to fill out our strategy and issues survey to let me know what you're thinking about heading into the coming election.**

**We have an important election ahead of us with the House, Senate and White House all on the line. The good news is that we're in a strong position to flip this seat, and it's critical that we do so in order for Democrats to retake the House in 2024.**

What you share with us on this survey will inform our decisions throughout our campaign. We're hoping to get A LOT of responses because the more people that weigh in, the better we can understand what's top of mind for folks across our district and beyond.

I look forward to hearing from you,

Will

That’s Lucas Kunce. That’s Missouri. That’s our movement.
#
Peter — not long after Lucas Kunce launched his campaign to replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate, top election watchers started paying attention to the movement we’re building here in Missouri.
**Here’s what _National Journal_ said about Lucas Kunce + our race:**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33710?refcode=em20230606-3227&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3227%2E614464%2E6cBnTu)

And they’re right. From the moment Lucas got into this race, he’s relentlessly called out Hawley for being a fraud + a coward — and it’s paying off.
GOP insiders like Tucker Carlson are rushing in to defend Hawley and his actions on January 6th. And a recent report showed Hawley facing “intensely negative sentiment” among voters in Missouri.
**So we have a real opportunity to defeat Hawley and flip this seat in 2024... but that doesn’t mean it’ll be easy.** Groups like the National Republican Senatorial Committee have already launched a series of desperate attacks at Lucas + our movement because they know Hawley is vulnerable.
That’s why it’s so critical we start preparing our campaign right now for whatever shady attacks they throw our way.
We need the resources to continue fighting back, holding Hawley accountable, and getting Lucas’ positive vision for Missouri in front of as many voters as possible early in this race — and support from real people like you _right now_ is the best way we’ll be able to get it done. **So Peter:**

**FIRST:** Voters across the country approved ballot measures protecting reproductive freedom and rejected measures restricting abortion access – making it clear that the GOP can’t win by running on their extreme, anti-choice agenda.

**THEN:** Instead of trying to persuade voters, Republicans from Ohio, to Missouri, to Florida are working to make it harder to pass citizen-led ballot initiatives.

**AND NOW:** Ohio Republicans are going _even further_ in their efforts to upend democracy by attempting to suppress turnout and deceive voters.

**These anti-democratic tactics are reckless – and they’re also a consequence of gerrymandering. Will you donate today to help the NDRC fight for fairness across the country so we can hand power back to the people?**

Since 1912, the people of Ohio have used ballot initiatives to have a say in Ohio politics and make changes – and now, the GOP-gerrymandered Ohio legislature is trying to threaten that. To help their proposal pass, they’ve scheduled what they hope will be a low-turnout special election, and they’ve omitted key information from the ballot language.

**Simply put, Ohio Republicans are upending decades of democratic norms so they can diminish voters’ power and enforce minority rule. Or, as A.G. Holder put it, “Republicans are making it clear that they will do whatever it takes – even if it means eroding our federalist system as we know it – to circumvent the will of the people so they can lock in their own power.”**
[**_The NDRC is fighting back against GOP efforts to undermine our democracy in priority states across the country. clean_body: Ohio Republicans are at it again | | = = FIRST: Voters across the country approved ballot measures protecting reproductive freedom and rejected measures restricting abortion access – making it clear that the GOP can’t win by running on their extreme, anti-choice agenda. THEN: Instead of trying to persuade voters, Republicans from Ohio, to Missouri, to Florida are working to make it harder to pass citizen-led ballot initiatives. AND NOW: Ohio Republicans are going even further in their efforts to upend democracy by attempting to suppress turnout and deceive voters. These anti-democratic tactics are reckless – and they’re also a consequence of gerrymandering. Will you donate today to help the NDRC fight for fairness across the country so we can hand power back to the people? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Since 1912, the people of Ohio have used ballot initiatives to have a say in Ohio politics and make changes – and now, the GOP-gerrymandered Ohio legislature is trying to threaten that. To help their proposal pass, they’ve scheduled what they hope will be a low-turnout special election, and they’ve omitted key information from the ballot language. Simply put, Ohio Republicans are upending decades of democratic norms so they can diminish voters’ power and enforce minority rule. Or, as A.G. Holder put it, “Republicans are making it clear that they will do whatever it takes – even if it means eroding our federalist system as we know it – to circumvent the will of the people so they can lock in their own power.” = – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 1015 18th Street NW, Suite 1000 Washington, DC 20036 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

Last night I confronted the CRIMINAL former FBI Director James Comey about the recent John Durham Report findings at Comey's book signing/book tour for his new crime novel titled "Central Park West".
[](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/cf1f78ed-6870-40e4-967b-45295fe00089?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
I asked Comey why a criminal like himself is now writing crime novels, and when he plans on writing a crime book about himself.
LOOMER UNLEASHED is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..FlbF5Bfvo1ENJYc-yl_I1JD7seThTPbFBCbfowksRtU?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=126490654)
I was illegally detained by the Naperville, Illinois police after I LOOMERED Comey and he ran away from my questions. This is now the second time I have confronted James Comey. In 2018, on the first day of disgraced former FBI DirectorJames Comey's "A Higher Loyalty" book tour at Barnes & Noble in New York City, I DESTROYED Comey with a list of questions about some of the former FBI Director's unethical behavior. When I asked him whether or not it was "ethical leadership" to brief President Donald Trump about the unverifiable and salacious Steele dossier that was funded by Hillary Clinton and her associates, Comey was dumbfounded and I was promptly shouted down by the audience and escorted out by security.
Five years later, and it's LOOMER V. COMEY Round 2.

## Why Chris Christie:

Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America.

name: Team Kennedy
subject: We're updating our privacy policy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
As part of our data protection policy commitments, we are sharing our recent updates to our data terms and conditions.

| [ ](http://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=privacy_policy_split1&n=1)
---
Dear Team Kennedy Supporters, As part of our **data protection policy commitments** , we are sharing our recent updates to our data terms and conditions: 1) **Team Kennedy incorporated new language in** [our policy](https://www.kennedy24.com/privacy?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=privacy_policy_split1&n=2) that confirms we will not be sharing supporter data with any business partners or affiliates. 2) **We have changed our website domain information** from [teamkennedy.com](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=gtW5WgNSDzb2vfx76fQpiD9OI4QgSsolLJLga7bNjdU&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=privacy_policy_split1&n=3) to [kennedy24.com](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=PWsynw72KdR9Cp_NDTL7PZ5fdohdTNs6F5il0eeNY98&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=privacy_policy_split1&n=4). 3) **We are now storing data you consensually provide** for your [Team Kennedy Profile pages](https://www.kennedy24.com/jointeamkennedy?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=privacy_policy_split1&n=5). If you have any questions about our terms and conditions or policy updates, please reach out to [policy@teamkennedy.com](mailto:policy@teamkennedy.com). With our very best regards, Team Kennedy
[](http://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=privacy_policy_split1&n=6)[](http://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=privacy_policy_split1&n=7)[](http://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=privacy_policy_split1&n=8)[http://www.kennedy24.com/](http://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=privacy_policy_split1&n=9)
* * *

name: =?utf-8?Q?Supervisor=20David=20Canepa?=
subject: Wanted you to be the first to know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Canepa for Supervisor 2024, ID# 1399463
body:
| | | | [ ](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=e7b618173c&e=c0babbc643)
---
| | | I wanted you to be the first to know that I am officially running for re-election to the San Mateo County Board of Supervisors and my brand new website is live [here](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=6749540b13&e=c0babbc643). I’m so proud of the work my team and I have done with you and countless members of the community over the last six years, but our work is far from done – we’ve made so much progress, but in some ways, the challenges the county faces are bigger than ever. As a fourth-generation son of San Mateo County and graduate of Skyline College, I care deeply about the residents of San Mateo County, as I have lived in this community and worked in this community my entire life. My priorities are:
* Preparing for climate change by making investments to combat wildfires, flooding and sea level rise
* Improving health care, including greater access to mental health services and interventions
* Housing homeless individuals and families and providing intensive wraparound services such as job training

As you undoubtedly know, campaigns are not cheap, and mine is funded by grassroots donations from people like you. Early donations are by far the most valuable, as it shows how much support we have right out of the gate. Could you chip in to get us off to a strong start? Any amount you can give will help, from $5 up to $2000! [](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=17c7ce8f0d&e=c0babbc643) Down the road, we hope we can also rely on you to help join the campaign in other ways like door-knocking, sending texts to voters and holding coffees so I can meet your neighbors. As always for me, this is a people-powered campaign, and I absolutely couldn’t do it without you! Best, David Canepa, San Mateo County Supervisor, District 5 P.S. No matter the size of your contribution, donating today helps us show strength in the early days of the campaign – I would be so grateful if you could pitch in now at [DAVIDCANEPA.COM](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=6de43c99df&e=c0babbc643)

Paid for by David Canepa for Supervisor 2024, ID# 1399463
---
|
---
| | |

name: Senate Conservatives
subject: Rick Scott vs. Mitch McConnell
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
Fellow Conservative:

The Senate Conservatives Fund is proud to support for Senator Rick Scott as he runs for re-election to the U.S. Senate in Florida.We decided to support Senator Scott after conducting a thorough review process that included a detailed candidate survey, an hour-long interview
where the Senator answered questions about his positions and record, and a membership-wide survey where 90% of our supporters voted in favor of our endorsement.While we did not support Senator Scott when he first ran for the Senate in 2018, his courage over the past year has made him one of the
strongest conservative voices in Washington.

▶︎ He led the way by outlining major policy reforms prior to the 2022 elections and urged other Republicans to join him so voters would have a reason to vote FOR their candidates.

▶︎ He showed tremendous courage in challenging Senator Mitch McConnell (R-KY) in the race for Republican Leader.

▶︎ He has worked with the leadership of the House Freedom Caucus to win key policy fights by proposing bold, conservative reforms that define the important debates on our terms.
Rick Scott has become a powerful voice for freedom in the Senate, and conservatives across the nation should support him.Please donate to his campaign through SCF today.

We will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your donation directly to his campaign. It's the best way to support him. Not only will he get to spend more of your contribution on voter contact, but he will know it's coming from conservatives who support his principled
leadership.Senator Scott is running to continue his fight to:
✓ Stop the reckless spending and devastating inflation;

✓ Hold the government accountable from the FBI to the IRS;

✓ Combat the danger posed by Communist China;

✓ Secure our border and stop the flow of drugs and illegal immigration;

✓ Refocus our military on lethal defense instead of woke nonsense; and

✓ Provide new, principled leadership for Senate Republicans.So, if you are tired of Mitch McConnell's weak leadership that has made Senate Republicans little more than a speed bump on the road to Socialism, then join us in supporting the one man who has the courage to
challenge him.Click here to support Rick Scott for U.S. Senate.

It doesn't matter if you live outside of Florida. The outcome of this race affects every American, irrespective of where you live.Thank you for considering this request and for doing so much to fight for America's future

Sincerely,

Mary Vought
Executive Director
Senate Conservatives Fund

 

END OF THE MONTH
COUNTDOWN

 

 

DONATE

Senate Conservatives Fund300 Independence Ave SEWashington, DC 20003

 

Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change Washington.

Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not permitted. Federal law requires us to report the name, mailing address, occupation and
employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year. Not paid for at taxpayer expense.

 

PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. SENATECONSERVATIVES.COM

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Exposing the Great Reset
body:
This is one of my biggest fights yet.

| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25898%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9GGHj8d4JdyYhFAi%2bYBEdA&sysid=1)
---
Fellow Patriot, This is one of my biggest fights yet. Turning Point USA is LEADING THE CHARGE against the World Economic Forum and its radical Great Reset agenda -- and I want to make sure America-loving patriots like YOU know how you can help STOP this dangerous scheme.
---
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25898%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9GGHj8d4JdyYhFAi%2bYBEdA&sysid=1)
---
I wrote a new book, _The American Response to the Great Reset_ , for YOU, and I want to send it to you RIGHT NOW. [**Please claim YOUR COPY of _The American Response to the Great Reset_. All I'm asking for in an exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT (even just five dollars!) to help Turning Point USA cover the shipping.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25899%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=frkDZ69UgBm6RCZjJcOfig&sysid=1)
---
[Get your book now](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25890%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=16socnTnQ5mU9NaKrrVetA&sysid=1)
---
I know what it takes to FIGHT and WIN against Leftist "Elites" who hate our country, our freedom, and everything that makes America great. I've dedicated my life to inspiring MILLIONS of young people to love America again and to WIN the American Culture War. **Now Turning Point USA and I are taking on the secretive World Economic Forum (WEF) and their dangerous GREAT RESET agenda ... and I want to reach as many Americans AS POSSIBLE with our important plan to DEFEAT the Great Reset.** [**Because this fight is so important, I am GIVING AWAY my new book,_The American Response to the Great Reset,_ for a gift of ANY AMOUNT to Turning Point USA. Please make your gift and claim your book right now.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25891%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Q%2bWTPKnoYMWFuzE90%2ffTlQ&sysid=1)
---
[Get your book now](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25890%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=16socnTnQ5mU9NaKrrVetA&sysid=1)
---
Whether you've heard of the WEF's Great Reset agenda before, or you're just learning of it now ... you must read this book. If you're trying to understand the MASSIVE challenges in America today, from skyrocketing inflation to wide-open national borders to medical tyranny ... you must read this book. If you want to make a difference and preserve FREEDOM, PROSPERITY, and AMERICAN GREATNESS for your kids and your grandkids ... you must read this book. [**And I want to send you a copy of _The American Response to the Great Reset_ RIGHT AWAY. Please claim your book right now with a gift to Turning Point USA of ANY AMOUNT, even just five dollars.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25892%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bac0LgwhFeOM1ZKhNgHOSQ&sysid=1) Thank you for helping Turning Point USA expose and DEFEAT the Great Reset agenda. For America,
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---
---
[Get your book now](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25890%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=16socnTnQ5mU9NaKrrVetA&sysid=1)

name: Lawrence W. Reed
subject: What I saw in Michigan…
body:
The Foundation for Economic Education (FEE) recently visited schools in Michigan.

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu9g7u5njendbn1rmpbp0t13sn86if7l59ot8230_rp22sh2s8i66o73chj64o36clh2bs)

Friend,

The Foundation for Economic Education (FEE) recently visited schools in Michigan. -- and do you know what we found?

A majority of kids are eager for REAL education in schools. They are hungry for the truth. They want solutions for the problems that impact their peers. But they don't have anyone to give them direction.

**That 's why FEE is teaching students how to create the change they want to see and empowering them to take action.**

Through FEE's Revolution of One initiative, we teach students that entrepreneurship and limited government can radically improve their lives and communities.

At Revolution of One workshops, students engage with entrepreneurs, artists, and influencers who bring a rich background of expertise to the classroom while demonstrating that voluntary economic opportunity and fewer barriers to entry are the keys to prosperity.

I want to reach more students with this exciting program. That's why I've set a goal to raise $25,000 by the end of the week to support FEE's Revolution of One. [Will you empower the next generation by sending a gift of $10, $35, $50, or even 100 today? Click here >>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrn7haehpfei7tmq29eu0em9fg4h8qrial1g0uhg_rp22sh2s8i66o73chj64o36clh2bs)

Tunji Adebayo at FEE was invited to talk about economic empowerment for six schools in Michigan.

You'd be surprised how just one speaker can influence the next generation. Just look at how many students Tunji reached during his tour.

Davis Jr. High School - 465 students
Heritage Jr. High School - 429 students
Jeannette Jr. High School - 533 students
Eppler Jr. High School - 578 students
Malow Jr. High School - 1,050 students
Federal Reserve - 150 students

**Tunji connected deeply with 3,205 students about how free markets and individual liberty lift society out of poverty! That 's a massive impact in just one state.**

And here's what one of the teachers at Eppler Jr. High School had to say,
_" Thank you so very much for being with us at Eppler yesterday! We are so very grateful to you for sharing your message with our students! It was very well received. As I talked to our students through the day, they all said it was "fun," "great," and "cool." But **one young man summed it up by saying, "Mr. P., that man has me really thinking!" Isn't that what we truly want?!** We'd love to have you visit again next year!"_
[Just one donation](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7eooqgn0s6dfslt6a2d8p0rk6ct319ifvf82ht0_rp22sh2s8i66o73chj64o36clh2bs) can change the lives of so many young Americans, as proven above.

[Your generous gift helps FEE inspire a love of liberty in the hearts and minds of students across the country. Please consider donating today >>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztfb5m6hkde0m8qoe29dkh35ti6oset11jjbrts8_rp22sh2s8i66o73chj64o36clh2bs)

Will you join me as we empower the next generation to embrace the ideas of liberty? **Click below to send your urgent support.**

name: =?UTF-8?B?SGlsbHNkYWxlIENvbGxlZ2UgdmlhIOKYhkNJ?=
subject: "The Genesis Story" Online Course Now on DVD
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsY9zBPDNA

Explore the beauty of the first book of the Bible with your new
DVD set

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osY9zBPDNA

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear Fellow American,

I hope you're having a good day. I'm writing
with some exciting news.

Hillsdale College's popular online course,
"The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," is available on
DVD.

In this six-lecture course, you'll explore
some of the major themes of Genesis, including the complex
relationship between God and man, and what it reveals about
divine and human nature.

"The Genesis Story" is taught by Hillsdale
College professor of English Justin Jackson, who has taught the
subject to undergraduate students here at the College for 15
years. This course aims to deepen a student's theological
understanding of the Old Testament by revealing the literary
beauty and complexity of the text.

The course begins with a lecture and
introduction by the President of Hillsdale College, Dr. Larry P.
Arnn, in which he explains why we teach the Book of Genesis at
Hillsdale College and why it's important to both faith and higher
education.

Then, Dr. Jackson explains the four
relationships that dominate the Book of Genesis: God and
creation, God and man, man and man, and man and creation.

These relationships are explored in the
narratives of Adam and Eve, Abraham and Sarah, Abraham and Isaac,
Jacob and Esau, and finally, Joseph.

This course on DVD is perfect for viewing in
your home with your family or for use in small groups such as
Bible studies and book clubs.

For your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more
in support of Hillsdale College, you'll receive the DVD as our
thank you.

To receive your Genesis DVD box set or to
give it as a gift, please use the secure link here:
https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-genesis

As you know, Hillsdale College refuses EVERY
PENNY of state and federal government funding-even indirectly
through student loans and grants. That's why your support is so
crucial.

Your gift helps expand Hillsdale College's
national educational outreach efforts to educate millions of
Americans nationwide, including our nation's youth. Your gift
will also help to:

Increase the number of students taking
free online courses, such as "Genesis."
Expand the readership of Imprimis,
Hillsdale's digest of liberty.
Establish and guide classical K-12
schools nationwide and provide, free of charge, Hillsdale's
American classical K-12 curriculum to thousands of American
educators and homeschoolers.
Promote the principles of American
constitutionalism through social media and the radio.

Friend, please use the secure link above to
make a $100 contribution in support of Hillsdale's educational
outreach, and explore the beauty of the first book of the Bible
with your new DVD set of "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical
Narratives."

Warm regards,

Bill Gray
Class of 2001
Vice President
National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/isY9zBPDNA

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osY9zBPDNA

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Team DeSantis
subject: Friend, did you hear? WE’RE BUILDING A WALL
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
Since we’re still waiting on the other wall to get finished...
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._cNFCVQd8GFw)
---

Friend,

It’s official: we’re building a wall!

Today, it’s a wall of appreciation for donors who have donated ANY amount.

On January 21, 2025, it will be a wall that finally secures our borders.

Until we elect Governor Ron DeSantis as President, we have to focus our efforts closer to home, which is why we are looking at the very walls of our headquarters, Friend. This is where your name belongs.

You heard us! You’re on our team, so we want you right alongside us. We are putting each and every name of the donors who make **ANY SIZE CONTRIBUTION** to our fundraising efforts this month up in our office.

Our campaign is run transparently**.** That’s why we’ll be providing weekly updates on the progress of building our donor wall!

We appreciate each and every dollar that is contributed, Friend. Your donation isn't a number: it's a commitment—a commitment to be in this fight each and every day.

We’re not just ready to run, Friend. **We’re ready to WIN.** That’s why we’re committed to making sure you know how much your donation means to us.

Become a donor today, and leave your mark on history. **You belong here.**
---
| | [DONATE $75](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-Mt_ig)
---
| | [DONATE $47](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
| | [DONATE $20.24](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
| | [DONATE ANY AMOUNT](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._CpXQ)
---

In Freedom,
Team DeSantis

---

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom – even when it wasn’t popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn’t stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican – as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind – when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue – Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.”

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state’s infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities: Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates, Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities, Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT, Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable, Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency, Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation, Turning Florida into a model for election integrity, Protecting the unborn, Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state, Expanding education freedom, Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities, Lowering prescription drug costs, Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable, Creating a universal school choice program, Delivering record-breaking tax relief, Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership, Supporting law enforcement and our veterans, Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders, Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court, ...and so much more. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn’t stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican – as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind – when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue – Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.” Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state’s infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. name: Team Nina for Philly
subject: Thank You! (And the Work Continues!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for Philly |
body:
Friend,

I hope everyone had a peaceful Memorial Day as we honored the ultimate sacrifice of those serving in our Military, who defended democracy and kept us safe at home.

As the Chair of the Nina for Philly campaign, a hearty THANK YOU to all for supporting Nina’s journey! I am excited that she was elected on Tuesday, May 16th to become a Democratic nominee for Philadelphia City Council at Large! I am proud of the coalition she built, proving that Philadelphians do their homework and cast their votes for those with a proven track record of service and who have a vision of progress for all.

As we pivot toward the general election in November, I hope that we can continue to count on your support. Nina will, as always, be hard at work to ensure that she crosses the finish line and wins the race. You can count on her to keep you up to date, informed, and on the team as her work continues!

Thank you!

Ambassador Osman Siddique

-------------------------------------
| Paid for by Nina for Philly |
-------------------------------------

Nina for Philly
PO Box 27339
Philadelphia PA 19118 United States

name: Larry Elder
subject: The Black Face of White Supremacy
body:
We've had enough.
| | | **Show Your Support**
---
| [CHIP IN TODAY](http://mail.elderforpresident.com/rd/9z4z6cmg8c7jm3m2sfclmvnr6s1rnodjc8ati1c2h08_rp22sh2s8i61o30c5jm6p324no)
---
| | [](http://mail.elderforpresident.com/rd/9z4z37aoapooj01avmqj4fvimltf553dj8q14ra7dco_rp22sh2s8i61o30c5jm6p324no)
---
| |
# **Rejecting the Racist Myth About Black Republicans**
---
Friend, When I spoke last week at Sen. Joni Ernst’s “Roast and Ride” celebration in Iowa, I joked that I was the [“black face of ‘white supremacy.’”](http://mail.elderforpresident.com/rd/9z4z5ob3moe4rr58pbreri0bn0f92f0dem3roiga7vo_rp22sh2s8i61o30c5jm6p324no) But a _Los Angeles Times_ writer wasn’t joking when she called me this [horrific smear](http://mail.elderforpresident.com/rd/9z4ze3404d26ra8lk6mtcmi8kqj0tg5uvk7iesq6h5g_rp22sh2s8i61o30c5jm6p324no) in an August 2021 column. You see, radical leftists and their media allies think it’s impossible for black Americans to be Republicans. They mock and demean us, claiming we don’t know what’s best for our families and our futures. They disregard decades of prominent black Republicans, from Thomas Sowell to Herman Cain, who have shaped our party and the conservative movement. Now, a [new report](http://mail.elderforpresident.com/rd/9z4z1225rrkljo6lnrf0qrvifh58dtg2hr94olj158o_rp22sh2s8i61o30c5jm6p324no) from Fox News details how the media insisted the Democrats’ 2020 primary contest was the most diverse field of candidates ever, yet in 2024, they remain strangely silent about how diverse the Republican Party’s presidential candidates are. **It raises the question: what are they afraid of?** [**We’ve had enough. With your donation of any amount, you can help secure my spot in the GOP presidential primary debate. Together, we can tell the radical left and their media allies that we’re done with their bigotry and condescension.**](http://mail.elderforpresident.com/rd/9z4zg5f7cgqoqqa7eio0ff1qkvtc1s077fkui2a5isg_rp22sh2s8i61o30c5jm6p324no)
---
[DONATE NOW](http://mail.elderforpresident.com/rd/9z4zjv6erplrrhii65ri807blfbgebto2n9u5hflv1g_rp22sh2s8i61o30c5jm6p324no)
---
Thank you for your support,Larry ElderGOP Candidate for President
---
[**P.S. We need common sense conservative values to get this country back on track. I’m ready, but I can’t do it without your help. Can you spare just $5 today to bring us one step closer to that pivotal debate stage?**](http://mail.elderforpresident.com/rd/9z4z0pqjurd70vib6v09epsdh88qsn9qbci3bokp2k8_rp22sh2s8i61o30c5jm6p324no)
---
| | |
---
# Meet Larry:
---
| | Larry Elder—the Sage from South Central—is a _New York Times_ best-selling author, award-winning documentary filmmaker, and one of the best-known media figures in America today. His flagship daily radio program, “The Larry Elder Show,” was heard every weekday in all 50 states and on more than 300 stations. Larry’s unique style, personal background, and professional experience combine to inspire, inform, and persuade his listeners, readers, and viewers to embrace the timeless American principles of personal responsibility and public accountability. In his words: _“The question is not which party has my back, but which party can get government off our backs—so that we might all realize our God-given capabilities.”_ Larry was born and raised in South Central Los Angeles, and his family’s story represents every bit of the American Dream. His father was born in Athens, Georgia, served in the U.S. Marine Corps during World War II, and moved to California to open his own restaurant—Elder’s Snack Bar. Larry’s mother, originally from Huntsville, Alabama, was a clerical worker for the U.S. Department of War (now the U.S. Department of Defense) and raised three boys as a stay-at-home mom. After running for Governor of California in 2021 and securing millions of votes, Larry is now ready for the next step in his journey: Winning the Republican nomination for President of the United States in 2024.
---
[**SHOW YOUR SUPPORT**](http://mail.elderforpresident.com/rd/9z4z5akuksn1s3q8tf8oute9tdrni9arn7tuh7a5c70_rp22sh2s8i61o30c5jm6p324no)

body:

Friend,

Did you hear the news?

Doug Burgum is running to be the 47th PRESIDENT OF THE
UNITED STATES.

There are already several Republican candidates in the
race, not to mention Joe Biden. Fortunately, Doug Burgum has
something that all of these candidates don't… he's the
only governor AND business leader.

He knows what it takes to do the job because he's DONE
the job. North Dakota has been thriving under his leadership, and
we're ready to bring his outsider knowledge to Washington.

We know the election is still a year and a half away, yet
your dedicated support NOW is what will keep our movement going
full steam ahead. Can you take a few seconds to answer the urgent
poll below?

You'll see other campaigns using their emails to brag
about what they're going to do with your donation - will they

Well, we think those folks are focused on the WRONG
things. Right now, all our emails will focus on is connecting
with YOU, the best of America, and winning in 2024.

Doug Burgum is ready to take on the Washington and
political elites in order to create a better, stronger America,
yet we can't do it alone. We need YOUR help, Friend.

We're going to send Doug every single response to this

think.

Thank you,

Doug Burgum for America

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Sign the petition: Members of Congress should not be allowed to own or trade individual stock
body:
Add your name
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T62ea057f-37ac-4f08-8e25-75219468a243/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, [**Sign the petition: Members of Congress should not be allowed to own or trade individual stock**.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T947dfffe-71ee-4f71-9da9-9359f3cc61ea/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) It seems like a given that members of Congress shouldn't be allowed to invest in the very industries they oversee. Yet, they do just that. In 2021, 54 members of Congress and at least 182 top staff members [violated the STOCK Act](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3ead6303-d2bd-45fd-9cf4-393e428749e4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), which requires that members disclose financial trades within 90 days. In 2020, 75 lawmakers held stocks in vaccine producers Moderna, Johnson & Johnson, or Pfizer. Most of those trades happened in the early weeks of the pandemic. Fifteen Congress members that have a hand in molding defense policy invest in military contractors. Over a dozen members in key roles shaping energy policy invest in fossil fuel corporations. The [list](https://default.salsalabs.org/T84358913-2438-4eea-912c-3c0a1c51cdc1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) goes on. The [Ending Trading and Holdings in Congressional Stocks (ETHICS) Act](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1c69c9dd-a872-4586-a150-1191f7bb6f9a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) would prohibit members of Congress, their spouses, and dependent minors from owning or trading stocks, commodities, or futures. The Senate version of the bill is sponsored by Sen. Jeff Merkley (D-Ore.) and has the support of over 20 lawmakers, while companion legislation is sponsored by Reps. Raja Krishnamoorthi (D-Ill.) and Michael Cloud (R-Texas) in the House. [Three in four voters agree that members of Congress should be banned from trading stock](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td955cdcd-c231-460f-8efa-0f139801c74b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). Lawmakers are in Congress to serve, not to gain an unfair advantage in the stock market. [**Sign the petition: Members of Congress should not be allowed to own or trade individual stock**.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T11721eb4-5817-437c-a3b0-3f881c2cf155/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Cliff
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---

---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T65a35fa2-42a8-4b93-843c-813b08a82eba/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

DOUG BURGUM ANNOUNCES CANDIDACY FOR PRESIDENT OF THE
UNITED STATES

Friend,

Hey, Doug Burgum here. We just announced our campaign for
President of the United States.

We're eager to share our vision for America - we need new
leadership for our changing economy. As we launch our campaign,
we first want to introduce our story:

Now, we're ready to take our conservative business
leader's perspective to Washington and fight for the best of
America.

This race won't be easy. In addition to outperforming my
fellow Republican candidates, we are also going up against Joe
Biden and the media.

The first debate is coming up very soon, and we're going
to need a surge in support to make it onto that stage. We hope we
can count on you, Friend, which is why we're asking YOU to do us
the honor of becoming an Inaugural Member of this campaign.

We have a long road ahead of us, and it will not be easy.
Yet, with you on the team, we know we can do this and deliver new
leadership for our changing economy.

We would be grateful for a contribution of ANY AMOUNT
TODAY to stand with us and become an Official Inaugural Member of
our campaign. >>

Doug Burgum

[VA rescinds COVID-19 delay to disability claims](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zp72dkrdv02m49jjf2vgtl3m75nsvlk9073au850_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t46mqj4t5m6gpr2d9j6kprct9jmkrncst66uqrf8j0c9j6f833cug6ept3egqq4t9meoqb7c9memj3fcrkm4qq8p75k4qj3d1kumgnfdd16ir78chkm6qb2t7lkoor8d5lmprq48d245p25oh4cdge6p31cdgmcpr24no)
In March 2020, a national emergency was declared due to the Novel Coronavirus Disease (COVID-19) outbreak. In response to this emergency, VA adjusted how it processed claims, acknowledging how the pandemic affected certain aspects of the claim process, such as claim exams or hearings. Since many claimants were unable to attend scheduled exams or hearings due to these COVID-19 concerns, VA held these claims until claimants could attend their appointments.
[See It Here](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztd8fcfenmgmja2jop9jc1ck44f5b6ed7s6372ig_rp22sh2s8i66o73chgm6ob6cth238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kui3bd9ieir38cth6kpjactmekpradrmeej3fddnk9g64pj7k1hmf837cuhn8dd2ekr7cd5jm4r7b9hnmdqb2dd4cjiq2d9hmgqfb8bnmmgj9djk68qb3d5hejqqccdk6iqrctt24no)

name: Our Time To Run Team
subject: Listening is key to winning... let's show you how!
body:
Being an active, compassionate listener is a great way to win over constituents - and it can be easy!
| |
---
Hello ! Are you ready to take your campaign skills to the next level? [Our Time To Run](https://nje015.keap-link001.com/v2/click/506c948cf9163b5cd6054fad78774fca/eJyNkMsKwkAMRf8la-nL-qC7UqQMrS5E11LagKNtZphmLCL9d8cHrhTcJueecHMDRqqIRQMJ0AmDcAYTMFhLLZE4U8RV_dzG02geTKCVdM6NshqS29fsB3iMw4WL8FWjI3bbNCvEJj-UYlM4UFfGXfhPEwfxMvqYVutUlDCOP9XYSV5dnL2HhI3FR6NGula8N63jj8y6T3x_GAZPWcOyQ1bGklerzj8pSc5RaY3UvB9Q4PVlGu_yZmOx) is thrilled to invite you to join our exclusive community and embark on a transformative journey towards becoming an exceptional political candidate. [Sign up now for our free 20-day trial membership ](https://nje015.keap-link001.com/v2/click/4a0d368d3c984cb7469fa3fb0892d064/eJyNkE0LgkAQhv_LnMWv7ANvIhKidYg6h-hAazq7bGMi4X9vrfBU0HXmeZ_hnQcwUkGcVhAC1eh6S7BAYymUQOJYEhflaxss_JVrQSPoutWyUxA-vmZnYBp768ACHhQa4niI4izdb895us8MqAptLvynCdxg48-mZBelOYzjTzW2gpO7sd8gZN3h1KgSphWfdGP4C7O6hY7T970tO82iRZa6I7uUrVNLQcZRKIVUfR6Q4fA2jU_1pmO1)and gain access to invaluable resources and expert guidance.
---
One of the essential skills we emphasize at [Our Time To Run](https://nje015.keap-link001.com/v2/click/1b88f7914345e6fe51ddfb67a2c40770/eJyNkMEKgkAQht9lzpJaVuItQkQ0D1HnEB1oS2eXdUxEfPfWCk8FXWe-_xv-GYCRcuK4hADoho67Bgs0FkIJJN5L4rx4bb3VcuNYUAm6R1q2CoLha3YGprG79S3gXqEhTsfdPomz6JLGWWJAlWtz4T-N53j-cjaFh12cwjj-VGMtOHwYewMB6xanRqUwrfisK8NfmVUT2HbXdQvZahY1stQtLQpZ2zcpyDhypZDKzwMS7N-m8Qn45mO5) is the art of active listening. Understanding and connecting with your constituents, even those with opposing views, is key to running a successful campaign. Here are a few tips to help you become an active listener and build stronger relationships with your community:
---
1. **Be fully present:** When engaging in conversations with constituents, give them your undivided attention. Put away distractions, maintain eye contact, and show genuine interest in what they have to say. This simple act of being present makes a world of difference.
2. **Practice empathy:** Try to see things from the perspective of your constituents. Empathy allows you to better understand their concerns, hopes, and fears. By putting yourself in their shoes, you can develop policies and messages that resonate with their needs.
3. **Suspend judgment:** It's natural to have your own beliefs and opinions, but when actively listening, it's important to set aside judgment. Give individuals the space to express themselves freely without fear of immediate criticism. This fosters open dialogue and trust.
4. **Ask thoughtful questions:** Dig deeper to uncover the underlying reasons behind constituents' viewpoints. Ask open-ended questions that encourage them to elaborate and share their experiences. This demonstrates your genuine interest and shows that you value their input.
5. **Reflect and paraphrase:** After listening to someone, summarize what you've heard to ensure you've understood their perspective correctly. Reflecting and paraphrasing not only validate their thoughts but also show that you genuinely care about their concerns.

---
[Our Time To Run](https://nje015.keap-link001.com/v2/click/593c60eed378ba7555d95435f5cf69a8/eJyNkE0LgkAQhv_LnMWPsoi9iYSI1SHqHIsOtKWzyzYmIf731oroUNB15nmf4Z0eGEkS5xUIoBOG0Qw8sFgqo5A41cSyfGzj6WQeelArOmdWtwZE_zX7BsZxtJh4wDeDjthtk7TIN9lhlW8KBxpp3YX_NHEYf5iW6yRfwTD8VGOjeHl19gsIti2OjSrlWvHe1o4_MpuLCIKu63zdWlYNsrYt-aVugpNW5BzSGKTq9YACb0_TcAf012O0) is dedicated to providing you with the tools and resources to excel as a candidate. From expert guidance on campaign strategies to practical tips on connecting with constituents, our platform equips you with the knowledge and skills necessary to run a successful campaign.
---
To claim your free 20-day trial membership, [simply visit our website and sign up today.](https://nje015.keap-link001.com/v2/click/3718e8da8449de7a584d61024e9c5728/eJyNkMEKgkAQht9lzqJWFuJNQkQ0D1HnEB1oTWeXdUxEfPfWik4FXWe-_xv-mYCRCuKkggCoRne1BQs0lkIJJN5L4qJ8br3Neuda0Ai6xVr2CoLpa_YDLOOV71nAo0JDnI7hPk3y-JIleWpAVWhz4T-N53r--mOKDmGSwTz_VGMrOLobewcB6x6XRpUwrfisG8NfmVUXOM4wDLbsNYsWWeqe7FK2Ti0FGUehFFL1fkCK48s0PwD2d2O2) Join our community of passionate individuals and start honing your active listening skills to better understand your constituents and their diverse perspectives.
---
Remember, being an effective leader starts with being a compassionate and attentive listener. Together, we can build stronger connections with our communities and make a lasting impact through political leadership.
---
Best regards,
---
**Our Time To Run Team**
info@ourtimetorun.com
---
