name: Bill Hagerty
subject: A Call from President Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Hagerty
body:
Help us get back on track, Friend

| |
---
| | |
During the monumental 2016 elections, I was proud to support President Trump.

**I volunteered full-time as Donald Trump 's Tennessee Victory Chair, where President Trump won 92 Tennessee counties.** After Trump resoundingly won the presidency, I was honored to serve as a senior leader of the Trump transition team.

---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c52ce2c7836f4145ab4c1278885747f3&_e=NvqEthVYvaQZtQcwWQDIP5z58RNju3yq5uGrpBLiG1eHgey8IW85QtnlF4oQeHLYmTRfExu7azW4F9wjYuMaANhRAPwBC_Ifozp5d2CqrjnsjXXaVhM29cwriNGYEXFtIQPfseVcbDzD9KqCXtNQqkTGEgJOVrVTtrkLUUvfIbzD9HMRx73R-S7CU8auy9Zvs-NWLZkdA5jqtkwUGNYpqnaVedkCvUStcf8go-9b3c2Kamw7C74luWiHwXnXUAPpSx1cGRfHYqzQwaKaFzm8w4Q6-ipvHbdCEiWzeLSgkZm4CxeQixI2SAYSpApuVM5QL9t5gT8GTkvBS7xXXrZSCJUcxDZygvFU780Y0W44Rty3mTn6HWVcpHqc0qE4OBkYswr--yFABoI8CYzbPIDOEratoC1gIVbrwa_DMi-ecn8XPo6fEW2v88KhoCsJdyWTrP38JzQAWyxk8lKuDkrGfQ%3D%3D)
---

Then I got the ask from President Trump to serve as his Ambassador to Japan, the third-largest economy in the world and one of America's strongest allies.

As Ambassador, I worked tirelessly to protect American lives from aggressive regimes in Communist China, North Korea, and Russia.

Under the Trump Administration, Japan became America's most strategic partner in the Indo-Pacific region. The United States has more military stationed in Japan than any other nation outside America.

As the President's representative in Japan, I worked extensively to strengthen our military and strategic posture in this critical region. I was especially proud to help President Trump secure an important U.S.-Japan trade deal. With this deal, Japan lowered and removed tariffs on American agricultural exports, providing a significant boost to American farmers and ranchers.

---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c52ce2c7836f4145ab4c1278885747f3&_e=NvqEthVYvaQZtQcwWQDIP5z58RNju3yq5uGrpBLiG1eHgey8IW85QtnlF4oQeHLYmTRfExu7azW4F9wjYuMaANhRAPwBC_Ifozp5d2CqrjnsjXXaVhM29cwriNGYEXFtIQPfseVcbDzD9KqCXtNQqkTGEgJOVrVTtrkLUUvfIbzD9HMRx73R-S7CU8auy9Zvs-NWLZkdA5jqtkwUGNYpqnaVedkCvUStcf8go-9b3c2Kamw7C74luWiHwXnXUAPpSx1cGRfHYqzQwaKaFzm8w4Q6-ipvHbdCEiWzeLSgkZm4CxeQixI2SAYSpApuVM5QRekHetqr9HVPpqaz1pBDnJgkUR4z6IuLaXj9HHzjXKGC5iBz2DmPnS198Irr15C9-Db7AwKuDiQrezb1mJ6Np7BfDehbmhHe3mzuphv-TR0quS-x7SgyME4WuNTjs-ZF8tf8K7R6mwI-1OQ8C5VV1g%3D%3D)
---

I also worked tirelessly to encourage Japanese companies to invest in America. During my time as Ambassador, Japan committed more capital and created more new jobs in the United States than any other nation in the world.

It was an absolute honor to serve in the Trump Administration and to do my part to deliver real victories for the America First agenda.

It's incredibly frustrating to look across the world now and see all the damage Joe Biden and Kamala Harris have done to undo the good work we accomplished in the Trump Administration.

From Afghanistan to China to Russia to Iran to North Korea, our enemies are emboldened and our allies are no longer sure we have their backs. It's disgraceful.

Thankfully, in 2024, we have the chance to get things back on the right track. I've already endorsed President Trump, and I'm committed to doing everything I can to make sure he and all our Republicans win BIG!

_**[But I need your help. Can you spare $25 right now to help make sure Republicans have the money and resources to defeat the Democrats?](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c52ce2c7836f4145ab4c1278885747f3&_e=NvqEthVYvaQZtQcwWQDIP5z58RNju3yq5uGrpBLiG1eHgey8IW85QtnlF4oQeHLYmTRfExu7azW4F9wjYuMaANhRAPwBC_Ifozp5d2CqrjnsjXXaVhM29cwriNGYEXFtIQPfseVcbDzD9KqCXtNQqkTGEgJOVrVTtrkLUUvfIbzD9HMRx73R-S7CU8auy9Zvs-NWLZkdA5jqtkwUGNYpqnaVedkCvUStcf8go-9b3c2Kamw7C74luWiHwXnXUAPpSx1cGRfHYqzQwaKaFzm8w4Q6-ipvHbdCEiWzeLSgkZm4CxeQixI2SAYSpApuVM5QS2mSazFTQoffvZBXRnsTwP7Sw6f15LOIPQEUwoxm7ZWwbX2d0rCF6WMbXLxxAp_AHIq-epMMcXxF9wFbQobqqL9FOw0b5PwX372wAjbR_GQcUF5Q5fqDL-4kudnpn9JvW-xy7CeCga8klfi9C4FkUQ%3D%3D "But I need your help. Can you spare $25 right now to help make sure Republicans have the money and resources to defeat the Democrats?")**_

---
| | | [DONATE NOW](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c52ce2c7836f4145ab4c1278885747f3&_e=NvqEthVYvaQZtQcwWQDIP5z58RNju3yq5uGrpBLiG1eHgey8IW85QtnlF4oQeHLYmTRfExu7azW4F9wjYuMaANhRAPwBC_Ifozp5d2CqrjnsjXXaVhM29cwriNGYEXFtIQPfseVcbDzD9KqCXtNQqkTGEgJOVrVTtrkLUUvfIbzD9HMRx73R-S7CU8auy9Zvs-NWLZkdA5jqtkwUGNYpqnaVedkCvUStcf8go-9b3c2Kamw7C74luWiHwXnXUAPpSx1cGRfHYqzQwaKaFzm8w4Q6-ipvHbdCEiWzeLSgkZm4CxeQixI2SAYSpApuVM5QVmL1FBaHD6pMI5ikECV3goywzCYbCJkH4sQIKkpbzawjGTkieh4VxhmDGsHakEx6BbJmvAPQwrqBdhcI4VOyeW7teP45iC-yYZAZQgWJyeM8n9OEh6hAEzNkMcD8u35JA81SvlvKi7uJ1DvmOVMHYw%3D%3D "DONATE NOW")
---

We cannot afford to let Joe Biden and the Democrats continue to weaken our country on the world stage.

I answered the call when President Trump asked me to serve. Now, I'm asking you to answer the call. We're counting on you!

clean_body: Help us get back on track, Friend | | | | | During the monumental 2016 elections, I was proud to support President Trump. I volunteered full-time as Donald Trump 's Tennessee Victory Chair, where President Trump won 92 Tennessee counties. After Trump resoundingly won the presidency, I was honored to serve as a senior leader of the Trump transition team. | Then I got the ask from President Trump to serve as his Ambassador to Japan, the third-largest economy in the world and one of America's strongest allies. As Ambassador, I worked tirelessly to protect American lives from aggressive regimes in Communist China, North Korea, and Russia. Under the Trump Administration, Japan became America's most strategic partner in the Indo-Pacific region. The United States has more military stationed in Japan than any other nation outside America. As the President's representative in Japan, I worked extensively to strengthen our military and strategic posture in this critical region. I was especially proud to help President Trump secure an important U.S.-Japan trade deal. With this deal, Japan lowered and removed tariffs on American agricultural exports, providing a significant boost to American farmers and ranchers. | I also worked tirelessly to encourage Japanese companies to invest in America. During my time as Ambassador, Japan committed more capital and created more new jobs in the United States than any other nation in the world. It was an absolute honor to serve in the Trump Administration and to do my part to deliver real victories for the America First agenda. It's incredibly frustrating to look across the world now and see all the damage Joe Biden and Kamala Harris have done to undo the good work we accomplished in the Trump Administration. From Afghanistan to China to Russia to Iran to North Korea, our enemies are emboldened and our allies are no longer sure we have their backs. It's disgraceful. Thankfully, in 2024, we have the chance to get things back on the right track. I've already endorsed President Trump, and I'm committed to doing everything I can to make sure he and all our Republicans win BIG! "But I need your help. Can you spare $25 right now to help make sure Republicans have the money and resources to defeat the Democrats?" | | | "DONATE NOW" We cannot afford to let Joe Biden and the Democrats continue to weaken our country on the world stage. I answered the call when President Trump asked me to serve. Now, I'm asking you to answer the call. We're counting on you! Thanks in advance, | Bill Hagerty | | Friend, it's Bill Hagerty. I am not a career politician. I am someone who spent his life in business, creating jobs, and I know how to make a real difference for the American People. Since coming to Washington to fight for YOU , I have seen the Democrats attempt to ruin and DESTROY the successful policies of the Trump Administration. We must STAND TOGETHER to ensure the Democrats don't destroy America as we know it. Stand with me TODAY, Friend. | ****** | Paid for by Team Hagerty PO Box 50430 Nashville, TN 37205 Conservative Liberty Wire 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

subject: The MVP is not for Me!

body:
let's stand together against this dangerous pipeline.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gLNIRnOiYQVzj7skDSdiidXDxEKsZIFnZSnEVN3QS670KjidwDpDe0W7r6blLWZh2MayoANeaviXWnH3Ni9B-xJn4llgmbLmxzVWJlGLSKBJevitN-6zKdWe9mXd9lc3oDxtD0rDzmpkH_tdmPlGXVyIyrMlhdAW6tOoZdFYlV0=&c=68peYulOv1_Fe3lk6ABJw5AnlhUmGNiea6iBVuqdYiTGXiLdrLcXnA==&ch=oo49rzgiLwfDHbkzCWDTGMppH7L1lyAj4CD1NA0IjkvRU8NCg3TAlQ==)
---
| Hi Peter,
I have some bad news. Unfortunately, Senator Joe Manchin got an insider deal to force the Mountain Valley Pipeline's approval into the bill to raise the debt ceiling last week. Despite the outcry of the countless Virginians this would affect, as well as the opposition of Senators Kaine, Warner, and members of our Congressional delegation the provision was signed into law. This blatant end run around Virginians, the courts, and regulatory agencies isn't how our government is supposed to work!
We know the MVP is already destroying our environment, and causing harmful pollution. The pipeline is so bad it's already been cited over 350 times for water quality violations and halted by courts for violating environmental laws to the point where it's years late and millions of dollars over budget.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gLNIRnOiYQVzj7skDSdiidXDxEKsZIFnZSnEVN3QS670KjidwDpDezBulMtsZp_50uYFmVwtM5UYdHyhCcXQuwsBLiOfWqJAggL-xXfnU3EjZXX4uV-4-aoblPa3c49VIlezTJEJcCiHjLHgo93wWGm2LZ9ovZFBxqPphwg41vOYxUjH7QFkLuRcc5gjHIM62Xqj7bVYa78=&c=68peYulOv1_Fe3lk6ABJw5AnlhUmGNiea6iBVuqdYiTGXiLdrLcXnA==&ch=oo49rzgiLwfDHbkzCWDTGMppH7L1lyAj4CD1NA0IjkvRU8NCg3TAlQ==)
---
| I was proud to speak out against the MVP this past week at a protest with community members. Nobody should have their private property seized, their environment destroyed, and their water polluted to benefit a few greedy companies.
Even though things look grim I'm going to keep fighting the Mountain Valley Pipeline to protect our property, land and water.
[I hope you can help me ensure we win this November. Our fundraising deadline is tomorrow June 8th. Please contribute so we can keep up the good fight together!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gLNIRnOiYQVzj7skDSdiidXDxEKsZIFnZSnEVN3QS670KjidwDpDezBulMtsZp_50uYFmVwtM5UYdHyhCcXQuwsBLiOfWqJAggL-xXfnU3EjZXX4uV-4-aoblPa3c49VIlezTJEJcCiHjLHgo93wWGm2LZ9ovZFBxqPphwg41vOYxUjH7QFkLuRcc5gjHIM62Xqj7bVYa78=&c=68peYulOv1_Fe3lk6ABJw5AnlhUmGNiea6iBVuqdYiTGXiLdrLcXnA==&ch=oo49rzgiLwfDHbkzCWDTGMppH7L1lyAj4CD1NA0IjkvRU8NCg3TAlQ==)
---
| My very best,

## GOP Conservatives Hit McCarthy with Protest
Blowback against House Speaker Kevin McCarthy hit the gas as a [dozen conservative Republicans](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGOpDAQRL_GZI1MM5gjIJgEXbKXXohs0x68azByN8Pt359m4o2qpJJKeu_vx_xhY4r744_daJSQZ-slPmnWBnQP2M5YLWMgQmorGhvzyzTt0Om2WkfUGnvfD4terDOETecw-FswuLS6C1TFETW22ui-0Z3Wph6sCx59j43rXDMEddO0RMml_sxxl5VC-s5PKrXPW5XGVeRg1d4VTgqn67rqjffXpnCiHU5WOO10veLIKUr0r_qwDCz5SXCULOQl5h1cTImBzxCowGY_cwEmcdZ_gWVY88kEhY7TpejtzkD_jkLMEMrJUuz744qywua9LbJ-K5xsgfu98Yv_-l2VcTmumFJk06ubfmw2pjeF_Cz1fwAAAP__1LV9cw) joined with Democrats to derail bills meant to block bans on gas stoves. The unusual protest caught House leaders by surprise. clean_body: Blowback against House Speaker Kevin McCarthy hit the gas as a dozen conservative Republicans joined with Democrats to derail bills meant to block bans on gas stoves. Blowback against House Speaker Kevin McCarthy hit the gas as a dozen conservative Republicans joined with Democrats to derail bills meant to block bans on gas stoves. | | | | | | Wednesday, June 7, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! Today in 1776, Richard Henry Lee proposed the first congressional proposal for independence from Britain. The Lee Resolution led directly to the Declaration of Independence and a new nation. Today we’re talking about angry GOP House members striking back for last week’s debt deal, the shocking merger between two golf leagues at each other’s throats, and a new Father’s Day TV spot from Bud Light showcasing family values. Think we could improve something? mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback for The Flyover If this is your first time reading The Flyover , and make sure you catch every edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? . Enjoying the Flyover? Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, . | GOP Conservatives Hit McCarthy with Protest Blowback against House Speaker Kevin McCarthy hit the gas as a joined with Democrats to derail bills meant to block bans on gas stoves. The unusual protest caught House leaders by surprise. T supports the anti-regulation legislation they voted against but wanted to send McCarthy a message about their unhappiness with the debt ceiling compromise. The protesting Republicans said they whether to call a vote to oust the speaker altogether, but tension remained. "I think we have some unresolved issues from last week," said Rep. Scott Perry. Migrant Issue Spreads Coast-to-Coast From coast to coast, tensions over migrants pouring over the border are heating up. In New York, is offering to pay city residents directly for housing migrants with nowhere to stay. In California, blamed Fla. Gov. Ron DeSantis for flying migrants into the state. Newsom tweeted, "Kidnapping charges?" while California officials investigate the possibility of criminal charges. DeSantis, meanwhile, in federal court when judges refused to allow the Biden administration to release migrants into the U.S. on an unsupervised "parole" basis. The White House is considering an emergency appeal to the Supreme Court. PGA Shocks Sports World with LIV Golf Merger The PGA Tour LIV Golf into a new for-profit company, shocking professional golfers, who learned the news via Twitter Tuesday morning, and ending all litigation between the two tours. Saudi-backed LIV the winner in the merger, with a key Saudi executive taking over as chairman of the new entity when the merger is complete. PGA leaders immediately came under fire for the agreement, with many -- who gave up literal fortunes to remain with the PGA -- accusing them of hypocrisy, given how vigorously they criticized the Saudi involvement in LIV. name: Rand Paul
subject: Politicians will not save us
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
[](http://trk.readactnews.-apJbGLGnSwYQ)
Fellow American,

I came to Washington, D.C. just over a decade ago with one overarching mission: to support and defend our Constitution and the political and personal freedoms it upholds. **Do you want to know something important I’ve learned? **

Politicians will not save us.

The Swamp will not save the economy, abide by our Constitution, nor will they restore our Republic. _Politics is downstream from culture_. Restoring our Republic requires a citizenry who understands the principles of the Founding Fathers, capitalism, and our Constitution.

**Which is why I am supporting the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE):** FEE is educating both high school and college students about the true principles of free markets, entrepreneurship, individual liberties, and personal responsibility.

In fact, the Foundation for Economic Education has launched “FEE In the Classroom.”

It is a unique program held in brick-and-mortar and virtual classrooms across the country that teach young Americans the principles of free markets, individual liberty, and limited government.

As thousands of young Americans come to understand the positive impact freedom has on their lives, their communities, and our country through FEE in the Classroom workshops, their most frequently asked question afterwards is : “ _why haven’t I heard these ideas before_?”

You and I both know why these students have never heard the ideas of liberty before: _America’s public schools don’t teach our nation’s founding principles anymore_. But FEE is changing this--and they are doing it in classrooms and virtual classrooms across the country.

[_**I am PERSONALLY supporting FEE In the Classroom and am asking all of my supporters to contribute or even sponsor a FEE In the Classroom program. Please click here to contribute $1,000, $500, $250, $100, $50, or even $10. **_](http://trk.readactnews.)
[_**Help more high school and college students learn about free markets, entrepreneurship, and our Founding Principles by supporting FEE In the Classroom!**_](http://trk.readactnews.-crQ) [](http://trk.readactnews._Yy9HezaEi4iCzgM9Hq9g)
**_Let me tell you more about FEE In the Classroom and why you should support this essential program and FEE’s efforts to defeat socialism in the classroom_.**

It’s no secret the Radical Left, Cancel Culture, and big government have teamed up to indoctrinate our nation’s youth into embracing socialism.

The sad truth is that free market capitalism, the history of our Founding Fathers, entrepreneurship, and are NOT being taught in high schools or college campuses across the country.

FEE’s President, Zilvinas Silenas, knows this more than anyone... Zilvinas once lived under the Soviet Union’s Communist rule in Lithuania. He’s now made it his life’s mission to educate young people about the dangers of socialism and how free markets and free people solve problems.

Trust me... if some of my colleagues in the U.S. Senate attended a FEE In the Classroom teaching, we would not be the same mess we are in today.

**Here is our goal:** I am trying to help FEE raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours to help fund FEE In the Classroom workshops for over 1,000 students. I hope you will consider making a donation of ANY size by using one of the links below:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://trk.readactnews.-31zCc-fMLkAn3GQ)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://trk.readactnews.-w)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://trk.readactnews._ZKI4L6sA)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://trk.readactnews._KcggdGW3wA8Wq-9C6w)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://trk.readactnews.)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://trk.readactnews.-6JlNl4pQ)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://trk.readactnews._SR4m_Q)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>> **_](http://trk.readactnews.)

Fellow American, I’m sure you share my frustration with the direction of our country. We cannot count on our government for fiscal restraint, nor our schools or universities for any fair argument for free-market ideas.

[_**Today I invite you to join me, and thousands of other committed Americans, in supporting FEE and contributing to the economic education of the young men and women who will lead our nation tomorrow.**_](http://trk.readactnews.)

I hope I can count on your support and see your name on the list of FEE’s newest supporters.

Thank you for everything,

Senator Rand Paul

---
Read/Act News PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.readactnews.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMxNTgtNmZiMzNhYjIwOThiNDdlYjk0YmU3OTdiMmRhY2RiMGMiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2V9/27nBpyl9mFkaZCkVVxWEfw) to unsubscribe.

---|---|---
Crossings were significant in Biblical history, and they are significant now since we are still in Biblical times. The Israelites had to cross the Red Sea that God parted. Even after all He had done, they wanted to go back to Egypt to slavery and their sin. Why? It seemed easier. It was the first great obstacle of the Israelites.
The second great obstacle of the Israelites was the parting of the Jordan River. This time, it was not a reminder of their sin as the first crossing had been. They were crossing the river now with full confidence and victory! God, yet again, was showing his power and authority and deliverance of His people.
The Priests had to put their feet in the water first. _Part the waters, Lord. _
The Pilgrims had to make their crossing. When they realized the treachery, the hardship, and when they faced death and significant suffering, they were given multiple options to turn back. They refused because they knew freedom in Christ was worth more than safety and security hidden behind the lies of the state church.
The Pilgrim Fathers put their feet in the water first. _Part the waters, Lord. _
When Washington had to make the frozen, painful crossing of the Delaware on Christmas night in 1776, there was no earthly probable way they would defeat the Hessians. It was brutally cold with ice chunks floating in rivers, men bloodied with ripped and torn skin, and many quite sick and ill-clothed. Despite hemorrhaging proper weaponry and supplies, they put their boats in the water. They did not look back.
Washington put his proverbial feet in the water countless times. He oversaw each man as they, too, put theirs in at that physical crossing. _Part the waters, Lord._
The Israelites stacked twelve stones from the Jordan River as a remembrance of the Twelve Tribes of Israel and all God had done for them. _They remembered_.
The Pilgrims finally landed at Plymouth and Jamestown and were able learn from their successes and failures of braving a new world. They were able to establish the first peace treaty lasting 50 years with the Indians. They shared the Gospel with many. _They remembered._
Washington, with Divine Help, was able to defeat the Hessian army and that victory was a major turning point in the American Revolutionary War. He had that one, pivotal victory. It was all he needed. He gave thanks and praise to God and was simply obedient for over 45 years to the Lord. _He remembered. _
You, too, will have a Crossing. The waters are here. Will you put your feet in? Will you serve as called? The Lord will part the waters, but we must obey. We must remember what God has done for us personally, nationally, and as a whole world. The key to reformation is found in remembering what God has done and repenting of our sins personally and nationally. We can find restoration through this.
We must offer ourselves as a consecrated people and remember that God is faithful to every promise. Let's step in together. _Part the waters, Lord._

Sign up here!

Meet Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=e23b804229160a028cde40cb069f0499755a77cbc1f4227713f3328447d099d30cd4cca9a9a6f986c8c403c472481aa7fe9141855f0a895bece9ea2fd64bd897

A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.

Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom – even when it wasn’t popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
-
Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,
-
Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,
-
Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,
-
Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,
-
Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,
-
Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,
-
Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,
-
Protecting the unborn,
-
Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,
-
Expanding education freedom,
-
Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,
-
Lowering prescription drug costs,
-
Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,
-
Creating a universal school choice program,
-
Delivering record-breaking tax relief,
-
Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,
-
Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,
-
Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,
-
Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,
-
...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn’t stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican – as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind – when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue – Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.”

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
-
Record tax relief
-
ESG prohibitions
-
Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP
-
The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.
-
Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency
-
Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI
-
Improvements to our state’s infrastructure
-
Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists
-
The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis
-
Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions
-
Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida
No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed: - Record tax relief - ESG prohibitions - Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP - The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. - Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency - Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI - Improvements to our state’s infrastructure - Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists - The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis - Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions - Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules - I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). - This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. - I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. - I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: Take Action Against Ranked Choice Voting NOW!
body:
The Heritage Foundation is working to understand the impact of Ranked Choice Voting

| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668904%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fltpKlstD5ky2FN8fdVO2Q&sysid=1)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

The Heritage Foundation is working to understand the impact of Ranked Choice Voting on our democratic process, and we value your input.

**Will you take a few moments to share your thoughts on Ranked Choice Voting and complete the survey by clicking the link below?**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/national-ranked-choice-voting-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668915%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4pkzGK0soyUNuc6IFkF2LQ&sysid=1)**

By participating, you'll help contribute to an informed discussion on RCV and its potential effects on our elections. Once you complete the survey, you'll also receive a copy of our RCV fact sheet, which provides valuable insights into this controversial voting system.

Thank you for your time and for helping us create a better-informed America.

Best regards,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

name: Karen Greenhalgh
subject: We're hitting another crucial deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Greenhalgh for Delegate
body:
| | |
---
| | Friend- What if I told you that my most important fundraising deadline this month isn’t June 15 or June 30, but **Thursday, June 8**? Strange, right? A little known fact about running for public office is that candidates have to file quarterly reports with the Department of Elections, and my next report will cover all activity from April 1 to June 8. I’d LOVE to be able to report a sizable fundraising haul from as many supporters as possible! It’s the single best way to gauge support for my campaign, and goodness knows state Democrats and members of the media will be pouring over the report looking for any signs of weakness. So I have to ask:****[**Can you chip in $20 before this deadline tomorrow?**** **](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/f5b38de4a4cd85a1/e27cd5dca6360728c3d6b838967d376c/37923) Not only will strong numbers prove I have broad support in the district, but it will also play a huge role in the future of my campaign. Any donation I get will be used to:
* Host events in the district
* ID and turn out prospective voters
* Hire and pay key staff
* Print campaign literature
* Advertise my message and ward off challengers

Can I count on you to chip in before I have to file this quarterly campaign finance report? The June 8 report will eventually be public, so let’s give the naysayers something to really talk about! I can’t thank you enough for the support!
---
---
| | [**Chip in!**](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/f5b38de4a4cd85a1/e36611a374809ccac3d6b838967d376c/37923)

subject: Politics as Usual in Mississippi

---
| Mississippi politics can be summed up easily: it’s a bunch of politicians who seek to pass as few actual conservative pieces of legislation as possible, while continuing to call themselves conservatives, and hoping that voters won’t notice. All the while, they’ll kill true conservative legislation by some of our Legislature’s most conservative members and then call them “ineffective.”Sure, politicians will campaign saying how conservative they are because they passed a handful of conservative bills but fail to mention that the American Conservative Union rates our Mississippi Legislature as a moderate PURPLE, with an average score of 56% ([Mississippi | ACU Ratings (conservative.org)](http://ratings.conservative.org/states/MS)). The top three spots in the ACU ratings go to MS Freedom Caucus members Dana Criswell, Steve Hopkins, and Joel Bomgar, who all have a lifetime A-rating.But we have a supermajority of Republicans in both the House and the Senate, so how could the American CONSERVATIVE Union rate our state legislature as a whole with a 56% conservative voting record? Because while your MS politicians will campaign on how conservative they are, the truth is, they pass just enough “red meat” conservative bills to have something to talk about on the campaign trail when they are running for reelection.In the last 4 years, leadership in both the House and the Senate have failed to pass any substantial Educational Freedom bills, they’ve failed to pass a complete income tax elimination, they’ve failed to pass any substantial reforms to our certificate of need laws (anti-free market laws in our healthcare field). They haven’t passed any substantial election integrity bills or bills to stop government investments in ESGs. They failed to pass the Parents’ Bill of Rights this year. They failed to pass a medical freedom bill.They also won’t mention all the liberal bills they’ve passed. They’ve passed anti-free market protectionist bills. They passed over 60 tax increases through local and private bills in the last 4 years. They passed a partial Medicaid expansion bill. They passed a 250-million-dollar corporate welfare package, hurting small local businesses, for an out-of-state woke company. And every year they pass an earmark bill for politicians’ pet projects, historically around $500 Million to $600 Million. This year the “member” projects bill was over $700 Million.Don’t let your Mississippi politicians, especially those in leadership positions, tell you how conservative they are without looking at their true record. The record of the overwhelming majority of incumbent politicians in MS tells a much different story. There are only a few true conservatives running for office this year, and we hope you’ll support them.
---
|
---
|

name: Tim Scott
subject: It’s time to go on offense
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR AMERICA
body:
I’m going to tell the TRUTH. Will you join me and become a messenger for the power of our conservative ideas?

| |
---
| | | The radical Left is attacking the values that make America exceptional. But I know from experience that the principles of our conservative message prevail everywhere we take them.

That's why I've come to a conclusion: **_It 's time to go on offense!_**

**_[Will you help me share my conservative message with every American and STOP the radical Left from ruining our country?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1bd0t3ge22ao3u5sv91rhmnah6e5p8khp911hm8_rp22sh2s8i66o73chimeoj6cph2bs "Will you help me share my conservative message with every American and STOP the radical Left from ruining our country?")_**

---
| | | [GO ON OFFENSE: BEAT THE LEFT](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zc5naktaa88ajh7asssnvcg7hqoul4e3pg0rllu0_rp22sh2s8i66o73chimeoj6cph2bs "GO ON OFFENSE: BEAT THE LEFT")
---

The playbook is simple:
* I'll gladly talk face-to-face with those who disagree with me. I'll never back down in sharing my experience that America is the land of opportunity, not oppression.
* When the ladies of The View made some ignorant comments about me, I didn't hide. I went on set the very next week to have a constructive conversation.
* If we want to win back the White House in 2024 and lead America in the right direction, it's time for conservatives to go on offense with a winning message.
* I'm running for President because my life story and message give me the unique ability to win new converts to our cause.

**_[It's time to go on offense! Will you help me share my message and win over every American? Even as little as $7 will make a huge difference.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z424se9p2jmgpfd2t5dplu5eu57an4cev34fkttg_rp22sh2s8i66o73chimeoj6cph2bs "It’s time to go on offense! Will you help me share my message and win over every American? Even as little as $7 will make a huge difference.")_**

---
| | | [GO ON OFFENSE: BEAT THE LEFT](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z826ouvq6denhfev24l3v72p81bd7m7aij5d7bao_rp22sh2s8i66o73chimeoj6cph2bs "GO ON OFFENSE: BEAT THE LEFT")
---

I won't back down. You see, I was a running back in high school and college football. I only know how to go in one direction, **_forward!_**

I don't follow the rules of political correctness, but I can promise you one thing: I'm going to tell the TRUTH, **_that with freedom, hope, and opportunity, anything is possible in America._**

Let's go!

Tim Scott

---
| | | [GO ON OFFENSE: BEAT THE LEFT](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zke8hdi1347iblaqh80lgto7ce2fmetmaaldn0g0_rp22sh2s8i66o73chimeoj6cph2bs "GO ON OFFENSE: BEAT THE LEFT")
---

---
* * *
---
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zf8206b6ll9fau2k6n0b4hd9ce4m5d58m14mjf2o_rp22sh2s8i66o73chimeoj6cph2bs "TIM SCOTT IS RUNNING FOR PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES - TELL TIM HE'S GOT YOUR SUPPORT!")
---

Friend, I believe our country is hungry for positive, conservative leadership.

It is time for us to restore hope, create opportunities, and protect America. **It is time for us to be proud to be Americans and proud of our president.**

**_[That's why I announced I am running for President of the United States.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zobe1sevr3gujgupbhp4p1b6eb56bqc7vvgsfjc8_rp22sh2s8i66o73chimeoj6cph2bs "That’s why I announced I am running for President of the United States.")_**

---
| | [SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN HERE](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9p7gq2aes1ool9bj61eeacgavvjnrop9r652ai8_rp22sh2s8i66o73chimeoj6cph2bs "SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN HERE")
---

The Democrats have chosen a culture of grievance over greatness. Here's the thing though - I know the power of the American Dream _because I have lived it._ My family went from cotton to congress in a **single lifetime.**

**This isn 't going to be easy.** I'll need your help to win.

---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2p6su24n0fi31fk6ra0tjruon355dffrnmjnlo0_rp22sh2s8i66o73chimeoj6cph2bs "I NEED YOUR HELP TO WIN!")
---

**_[Can you chip in $5, $10 or even $15 to help me win?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpuqi1u19uuscrrvh15auqv48ejjonmsl4u902bg_rp22sh2s8i66o73chimeoj6cph2bs "Can you chip in $5, $10 or even $15 to help me win?")_**

This campaign relies on very generous gifts from people just like you. Trust me, I know that times are tough in Joe Biden's America, so even if it's just $5 I would be so grateful.

Thank you for your support!

-Tim

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Virginia abortion rights are at risk, even though it seems like Democrats have a lock on state government right now.
body:
June 20th primary
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T57d7deba-bf75-42b3-be0b-915112414e5b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **It’s getting close. June 20th is our chance to ensure abortion remains legal in Virginia next year.**_ _ _We only have a slim one vote pro-choice majority in the State Senate because_ _ __one of 2 Democrats who make up our majority, Joe Morrissey, is a "pro-life" Democrat who'll sign any awful anti-choice Republican garbage._ [**_But we have the perfect solution!__ __If you join us, in less than two weeks we'll replace the anti-choicer with progressive champion & former State Delegate. Laschrecse Aird, who's challenging Morrissey in the June 20th primary._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te30f0a59-ca6c-47fc-8829-952fab76e508/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Aird is exactly the kind of candidate we must get behind. She grew up impoverished to a teenage mother and father who worked multiple jobs to get by. This motivated Aird to run for the VA House of Delegates. _ _In 2021, she was named Legislator of the Year by the Virginia Education Association. Aird was also lauded by the Virginia Chamber of Commerce for job creation. Two very different groups--both seeing Aird's __accomplishment and integrity. Now that's someone who can bring people together._ _Not surprisingly, when comparing Aird to Morrissey, this was the result:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T09244b74-ee85-4be4-94ea-2a34e00152e1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Aird has made abortion rights the centerpiece of her campaign, running for "Roe Not Joe." She'll be taking that fight all the way to June 20th, but early voting has begun, so we must **SUPPORT AIRD** **NOW** or risk an anti-choice majority! _ [**_Will you join Blue Amp Action's own "Roe Not Joe," fundraiser, and support Lashrecse Aird with $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb95fb386-bb8f-477d-b9f8-f58bbfa47045/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you! name: Don Huffines
subject: Huffines in Dallas Morning News: This is why Texas should eliminate school property taxes
body:
All eyes are now on the Texas Senate. Will Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick take the first step on the path to eliminating school property taxes for all Texans?
No images? [Click here](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-e-zjdmut-yuddtktydi-p/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zjdmut-yuddtktydi-r/) **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** Press Manager
Contact: [Press@HuffinesLiberty.com](mailto:Press@HuffinesLiberty.com)
## **Huffines in Dallas Morning News: This is why Texas should eliminate school property taxes**
## _" All eyes are now on the Texas Senate. Will Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick take the first step on the path to eliminating school property taxes for all Texans?"_
[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zjdmut-yuddtktydi-y/) DALLAS, TX, June 6, 2023 -- Don Huffines published a timely [op-ed in the Dallas Morning News](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zjdmut-yuddtktydi-j/) this evening on the tax fight in the Texas Legislature. The stakes could not be higher.Huffines details how and why Texas should work towards eliminating the school M&O property tax. He encourages his former colleagues in the Senate to get behind this monumental policy and tax cut! [Read Here](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zjdmut-yuddtktydi-t/) The Huffines Liberty Foundation is a 501(c)(3) non-profit, non-partisan research institute. name: Mayor Staggs
subject: I'm challenging Mitt Romney for US Senate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TRENT STAGGS FOR UTAH
body:
I love our state - but we need a representative who understands what it means to be a Utahn.
| | | |
---
|
---
| Hi Peter,
I'm pleased to announce that I am challenging Mitt Romney and running for the US Senate!
When Mitt Romney announced his run for Senate, I was happy to support him - especially when he promised he would "[fight for us](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001p_OeI-6UFdKmHRgvMHD7N5Yazbh04SZMtz8ZSageMqYqxUCOk4PHBd_2_LkcuRTTlJwYxMLprMfR09X9xMI2Tv4QMtTVhk2NDH6hfSHMTcamFXrM7mH_q-LtUra7InmF1f5xQeU0y1Gt78mr6g4JWdXAdEMtiatVq3pNPcFE_WJaIFKxhQ13sQ==&c=eSSPN1Wxod3SYXj92Uzr5rCaoGzvUBgVR3jhHNiWETtoqFX1-Je8cg==&ch=HPo8sBkJYcPgN246Izb8Wz4E1sdheXo1TCJFsSAVHOiKYS5xc9WFjA==)" on issues like a balanced budget, ending illegal immigration, and appointing conservative judges. But we all know now there's a big difference between what he promised and what he's done.
Since taking office, he has:
* Fought President Trump's efforts to [protect our borders](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001p_OeI-6UFdKmHRgvMHD7N5Yazbh04SZMtz8ZSageMqYqxUCOk4PHBd_2_LkcuRTTz2fqpQ7bEO1BRYRIeazQofg916IHc0EZFmdAvCs16v9tmIMCQHcMwp2G2wTpwXfubFWOA-ItdWAULdDHz8XlTjFBygwnB2oGur7gW8LrZUnG-ZowN0zS966Hn7fsdYqC7GZ24Y3D50hFDg71P36Nd8D5eWi82RmvUTbm31HluTJQVQTo1GqtiT1uCV1x5Rp_J4Q_D963PoI3rnT7RKxlM-9bc5629FntnJmnTNpfO2s=&c=eSSPN1Wxod3SYXj92Uzr5rCaoGzvUBgVR3jhHNiWETtoqFX1-Je8cg==&ch=HPo8sBkJYcPgN246Izb8Wz4E1sdheXo1TCJFsSAVHOiKYS5xc9WFjA==).
* Voted for Biden's incompetent DHS Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas.
* Supported trillions in additional spending.
* Refused to join Sen. Mike Lee's effort to enact substantial spending and budget reforms.
* Voted with Biden's agenda nearly 60[ percent](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001p_OeI-6UFdKmHRgvMHD7N5Yazbh04SZMtz8ZSageMqYqxUCOk4PHBd_2_LkcuRTTNF_-rlEX25NCtS_sHH5JDyElusZLGIbeqY50pHcQRuMKI3Ym_usg5S3xWawcVxeX6S-IsO9yX3ZJMGyIX8oaFh_FZKag7lcCxs5NvN-WIaOU_2XxXV8xm5yvn9ePDYLS4kcHzNmMQba_SNyFQVqwHg==&c=eSSPN1Wxod3SYXj92Uzr5rCaoGzvUBgVR3jhHNiWETtoqFX1-Je8cg==&ch=HPo8sBkJYcPgN246Izb8Wz4E1sdheXo1TCJFsSAVHOiKYS5xc9WFjA==) of the time.
* Marched with BLM terrorists.
* Called us "[morons](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001p_OeI-6UFdKmHRgvMHD7N5Yazbh04SZMtz8ZSageMqYqxUCOk4PHBd_2_LkcuRTTMZ-f16NsERsZwRLkIIcp_Nv7Cnj6sBtNEW0E3-MbECRhyRi4Dqp8NFUXeCFe7FbLx0SOeBE1zY-HsJT5GvtygfUm81JPHANz4eqyc-a5uoKBDgLXSbNNGRwaSUiTsdYwS6UxtH9dFSExhoPZlvBOWoNstzGFtd_8f5JaxVfCm5pEjjYhGYBr0Q==&c=eSSPN1Wxod3SYXj92Uzr5rCaoGzvUBgVR3jhHNiWETtoqFX1-Je8cg==&ch=HPo8sBkJYcPgN246Izb8Wz4E1sdheXo1TCJFsSAVHOiKYS5xc9WFjA==)" if we didn't trust Big Pharma with endless vaccines.
* Defected to support radical Supreme Court Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson!

I'm not a career politician. I'm a lifelong Utahn, husband, and father. I was raised here - from elementary school to graduate school - in a family of 10 children by great parents who taught me the importance of hard work and honesty. I've been blessed as an entrepreneur and even helped take a company public on the NASDAQ in 2022.
While I never aspired to be a full-time politician, I have served the city of Riverton for the last 10 years, six of them as mayor. My track record shows I've been consistently conservative, [lowering taxes](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001p_OeI-6UFdKmHRgvMHD7N5Yazbh04SZMtz8ZSageMqYqxUCOk4PHBd_2_LkcuRTTgkg-aRRD8js1ebj1v8hX0aBktaZqMZRIHwTSeRyQ2rjlBGxuY45PPtLG8A37O29E_BJ9dAZYmnAojkimOESTiuPFq3Rwj8ZlMRLd5E5eNbZQhG2W3Oxcj8i3xNHmrHtw0muc0thEX8tGHJ8ciN5zET9sjTedVa36IGy4uIpeXPZpYM3WpQuogA==&c=eSSPN1Wxod3SYXj92Uzr5rCaoGzvUBgVR3jhHNiWETtoqFX1-Je8cg==&ch=HPo8sBkJYcPgN246Izb8Wz4E1sdheXo1TCJFsSAVHOiKYS5xc9WFjA==) while improving services, growing the economy, protecting the unborn, and keeping [filth out of our schools](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001p_OeI-6UFdKmHRgvMHD7N5Yazbh04SZMtz8ZSageMqYqxUCOk4PHBd_2_LkcuRTTHzqNqPdt3GtW_AceouA8s_YZ9jv4py0Pda1FBjsBNi-OEO34x5I7XIunyRMza2_X_seKpnvWk5LkeTbSD10YRsCsVG0gWTebJEeTgHVHHcadAPgvsZV60A==&c=eSSPN1Wxod3SYXj92Uzr5rCaoGzvUBgVR3jhHNiWETtoqFX1-Je8cg==&ch=HPo8sBkJYcPgN246Izb8Wz4E1sdheXo1TCJFsSAVHOiKYS5xc9WFjA==). In 2020 when we were told to shut down businesses, schools, and churches, [I said no](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001p_OeI-6UFdKmHRgvMHD7N5Yazbh04SZMtz8ZSageMqYqxUCOk4PHBd_2_LkcuRTTqZOPtNpdW7GzuQ07hUXqtRbbFGx4yM3ZFpngsXyGMSkYVsqLGyxp7reLjY6ibXylr9oQ0BX_ePe3yfV1kczMPXc_3ZNa2XKvS7E1EC-TPZw0c4ruU6vjAr2amZnhdbfL-y_SVZPWI5WMjQru4xrs0sfe-mDw_iBgiqv9wz9yEfld1TbZkLk0mmQlRPdQPPJE5L1Nf0Y8dpw=&c=eSSPN1Wxod3SYXj92Uzr5rCaoGzvUBgVR3jhHNiWETtoqFX1-Je8cg==&ch=HPo8sBkJYcPgN246Izb8Wz4E1sdheXo1TCJFsSAVHOiKYS5xc9WFjA==).
I've fought big government at home and I'm ready to take that fight to Washington. To clean up a city as broken as Washington, DC, it's time to send a mayor to the Senate.
[Running against a wealthy incumbent like Mitt Romney is challenging and I need your financial support, please consider making a contribution today.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001p_OeI-6UFdKmHRgvMHD7N5Yazbh04SZMtz8ZSageMqYqxUCOk4PHBd_2_LkcuRTT6OAxZVVug5qXRZlHm-iuyKgspVg3xm9Ls8lXU15AYO-HSCJzu04btU2F_9pSmpZ4NOf9xZP3u5k0smZMmKIgPD-pFYpME7IvEhJioVev8Pv3l9BcTHvZwHX7_4doVp-l&c=eSSPN1Wxod3SYXj92Uzr5rCaoGzvUBgVR3jhHNiWETtoqFX1-Je8cg==&ch=HPo8sBkJYcPgN246Izb8Wz4E1sdheXo1TCJFsSAVHOiKYS5xc9WFjA==)
-Trent

subject: Campaign sign up
body:
Hello Peter,
We are running again and would love for you to come on board with our campaign. Please let us know the best time to reach you, and one of our team members will contact you.
Thank you Peter for your support, and we look forward to hearing from you soon.

Sincerely,
The Shoemaker Campaign Team

subject: MAJOR news | AFL-CIO backs Lucas Kunce

body:
Missouri’s election-winning labor movement is united behind Lucas Kunce for U.S. Senate
#
We just got some MAJOR news, Peter.
**Missouri’s election-winning labor movement is uniting behind Lucas Kunce!**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33748?refcode=em20230607-3230&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3230%2E614464%2E1p8MpH)
**[CHIP IN TO ELECT LUCAS KUNCE →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33748?refcode=em20230607-3230&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3230%2E614464%2E1p8MpH)**
The Missouri AFL-CIO knows Lucas Kunce is the fighter workers need in the U.S. Senate — and they’re all-in to help him take this seat back for everyday people.
**This kind of labor support has moved the needle on critical issues for the last three election cycles,** like rejecting anti-union “Right-to-Work” scams, raising the minimum wage well above the federal level, and expanding health care under the Affordable Care Act. And now, we’re thrilled that they have our back in the fight to replace Josh Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat.
**[Will you stand with Missouri’s election-winning labor movement and help our campaign keep up this incredible momentum by chipping in $10 or more today? The only way we’ll be able to elect a warrior for working people to this U.S. Senate seat is with support from real people just like you.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33748?refcode=em20230607-3230&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3230%2E614464%2E1p8MpH)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33749?refcode=em20230607-3230&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=3230%2E614464%2E1p8MpH) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33749?refcode=em20230607-3230&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=3230%2E614464%2E1p8MpH) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33749?refcode=em20230607-3230&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=3230%2E614464%2E1p8MpH) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33749?refcode=em20230607-3230&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=3230%2E614464%2E1p8MpH) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33749?refcode=em20230607-3230&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=3230%2E614464%2E1p8MpH) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33749?refcode=em20230607-3230&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=3230%2E614464%2E1p8MpH) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33748?refcode=em20230607-3230&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=3230%2E614464%2E1p8MpH)

Team Lucas Kunce

President Biden has made INCREDIBLE progress for our country — from creating thousands of jobs to confirming a progressive Supreme Court Justice and so much more.

But now, the MAGA mob is launching all-out ATTACKS to destroy Biden’s reelection chances...** _and polls show it’s working!_**

[So we need YOU to take the pledge TODAY to show massive grassroots support for President Biden! Add your name before midnight and pledge to vote in 2024 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/pledge-to-vote-2024/source=VPP_20230607_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS?t=9&akid=8183%2E878179%2EL3UHP5)

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=8183%2E878179%2EL3UHP5). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=8183%2E878179%2EL3UHP5).**

body:
Please read this important message
#

Here is the absolutely unvarnished truth, Peter.
We need to file a huge FEC report for three reasons:
1\. A big number with lots of donations will mean more endorsements, which is important in unifying Democrats, which we need to do in order to win.
2\. A big number with lots of donations -- especially if we out-raise Senator Sinema again -- will make it less likely rich folks donate to her in the future, because she won't be able to catch up to us in fundraising and because she has no path to victory.
3\. Reaching our goals each quarter is what we need to raise to WIN this race. Which is important for all the issues we care about.
Remember: what we raise will be PUBLIC for all to see. That's why this is so important. And bluntly, right now we're behind on our goals. We have a long way to go.
So we're hoping for a HUGE day to catch up. Please:

subject: AM 560 Host Mark Vargas Resigns After Racist, Hate-Filled Segment
body:
Vargas: "I cannot in good conscience continue hosting my radio show, sharing a microphone with an individual that’s so full of anger."

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/536379e3d3ea/am-560-host-mark-vargas-resigns-after-racist-hate-filled-segment?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ccdd70df3c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_07_03_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ccdd70df3c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Illinois Review eBlast Powered By
https://kasparlaw.co/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ccdd70df3c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_07_03_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ccdd70df3c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

AM 560 Radio Host Mark Vargas Resigns in Disgust after Weekday Host Shaun Thompson's Vile Rant Calling "Black and Right" Co-Host a "Moron with the Taffy Apple Head," in Racist, Hate-Filled Segment Saturday Night (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/06/am-560-radio-host-mark-vargas-resigns-in-disgust-after-weekday-host-shaun-thompsons-vile-rant-calling-black-and-right-co-host-a-moron-with-the-taffy-apple-head-in-racist-h.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ccdd70df3c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_07_03_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ccdd70df3c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
AM 560 radio show host Shaun Thompson.

Mark Vargas, host of "Mark My Words" on AM 560 The Answer, resigned late Tuesday afternoon after weekday host Shaun Thompson went on a vile, racist rant after calling-into "Black and Right" this past Saturday evening, calling co-host Verlon Galloway, an African American, a “moron with the taffy apple head,” as the two sparred over the US debt-ceiling deal, which President Joe Biden signed into law earlier in the day on Saturday.
https://youtu.be/zHh6oFi9JeE?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ccdd70df3c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_07_03_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ccdd70df3c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
AM 560 radio host Shaun Thompson angrily calls "Black and Right" co-host Verlon Galloway, left, a “moron with the taffy apple head” during Saturday’s show.

In his resignation letter addressed to the station, Vargas wrote,

“As a minority, I was shocked to hear Shaun Thompson, host of The Shaun Thompson Show, call into Black and Right Radio this past Saturday evening and spew despicable and racist rhetoric aimed at co-host Verlon Galloway – referring to him as a “moron with the taffy apple head.

This vile and disgusting behavior does not represent my values. The phone calls and texts that I have received over the last few days only echo the shock and disgust that I felt while listening to Saturday’s show. It’s hard to listen too – and for very good reason.”

Moments before Thompson phoned into Saturday’s show, Galloway stated that it’s too risky to not pass the debt ceiling, given the state of the economy and all the global debt.
A copy of Mark Vargas' resignation letter.

Galloway then gave a number for the debt that included US national debt and private debt – triggering Thompson to go on a hate-filled, vile rant.

Rather than having a conversation like an adult to discuss serious issues facing our country like the debt, Thompson, instead, tore into Galloway – leveling personal attacks and repeatedly calling him “stupid” and a “moron.”

Thompson continued his hate-filled rant aimed directly at Galloway, telling the co-host, “you’re a disgrace, you shouldn’t go near a microphone, you’re too stupid.”
https://youtu.be/4Ht2hw4PnsI?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ccdd70df3c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_07_03_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ccdd70df3c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
AM 560 radio host Shaun Thompson tells "Black and Right" co-host Verlon Galloway, left, he’s a “disgrace” and he’s too “stupid” for radio during Saturday’s show.

But Thompson wasn’t done attacking Galloway live on air, even going a step further and telling the black co-host, “80 percent of you people are morons; 80 percent of you idiots who pretend to be Republican.”

https://youtu.be/WomvsWO-6YI?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ccdd70df3c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_07_03_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ccdd70df3c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

AM 560 radio host Shaun Thompson tells "Black and Right" co-host Verlon Galloway, left, “80 percent of you people are morons” during Saturday’s show.

Even telling Galloway at one point during the segment, “Do me a favor, go back to the Democrats where you belong...go back to the Democrats moron...”
https://youtu.be/Cd0V5yjN9iA?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ccdd70df3c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_07_03_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ccdd70df3c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
AM 560 radio host Shaun Thompson tells "Black and Right" co-host Verlon Galloway, left, to “go back to the Democrats where you belong” during Saturday’s show.

The attack prompted Galloway to shout back, “Never been a Democrat...I’ve never been one!”

As Vargas pointed out in his resignation letter,

“It’s one thing to create a brand insulting people – it can, if done right, result in entertaining radio – but Shaun’s behavior crossed every line. A spirited debate and disagreement on the issues can be spirited and entertaining – but never hateful. But Shaun was anything but spirited. In fact, he was vile.”

Vargas then concluded his letter by saying,

“And while Shaun continues to be one of the most promoted and celebrated on-air radio personalities at the station, I cannot in good conscience continue hosting my radio show, sharing a microphone and a studio with an individual that’s so full of anger – and can say such terrible things. Therefore, I resign, effective immediately.”

Vargas’ resignation was immediately accepted by station management who stated, “Thank you for sharing your concerns with us. Thank you for your contributions you made to the station over the past two years.”

As an American of Mexican descent, Vargas has experienced and witnessed racism firsthand. And his father, who is a truck driver, still experiences it – even today.

Over the past two years, Vargas has welcomed a string of high-profile guests to his Sunday evening radio show, including former New York City Mayor Rudy Giuliani; former New York City Police Commissioner Bernard Kerik – who was in charge of the NYPD on September 11, 2001; Newsmax host Eric Bolling; Dinesh D’Souza; famed lawyer Alan Dershowitz; President Trump senior advisor Jason Miller; longtime Trump confidante Roger Stone; Civil Rights leader Alveda King, niece of the late Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr.; former US Gen. David Petraeus; and Hollywood actor Terrence Howard.

Michael Reagan, son of former US President Ronald Reagan joined Vargas on the anniversary of D-Day, calling into the show from Normandy where they were commemorating his father’s address at Pointe du Hoc.

Reagan also
called into Vargas’ show (https://youtu.be/gBqxtOg-UDQ?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ccdd70df3c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_07_03_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ccdd70df3c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) from the Reagan Presidential Library in Simi Valley, California, where they were celebrating President Reagan’s 111th birthday.

Thompson was live on air on Monday just two days after his hate-filled weekend rant, hosting his Chicago-based show from Naples, Florida, where he lives a majority of the time. Both Thompson and Chicago Morning Answer host Dan Proft share the Naples studio, where Proft now lives full time after selling his downtown Chicago condo and purchasing a home close to the beach in southwest Florida.

When he’s not on Chicagoland airwaves during the weekdays, Thompson, a Florida-based realtor, runs his Naples
real estate firm (https://www.homes.com/real-estate-agents/shaun-thompson/l1zkxzg/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ccdd70df3c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_07_03_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ccdd70df3c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .
Shaun Thompson’s Naples, Florida-based real estate firm. During the weekdays, Thompson hosts a Chicago-based radio show from a Naples studio that he shares with "Chicago Morning Answer" host Dan Proft, a full-time Florida resident and voter.

In addition to his role as Editor-in-Chief of Illinois Review (https://illinoisreview.com?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ccdd70df3c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_07_03_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ccdd70df3c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , Vargas will continue to make appearances on Newsmax TV, and he’ll continue to write for his Newsmax (https://www.newsmax.com/insiders/MarkVargas/id-664/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ccdd70df3c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_07_03_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ccdd70df3c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) column called "The Potomac Perspective."
https://kasparlaw.co/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ccdd70df3c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_07_03_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ccdd70df3c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

subject: An important settlement

body:
Friend, The opioid epidemic has ripped through our country, rattling the lives of so many. As Minnesota’s Attorney General, it’s my job to make sure people are getting the help they need. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64458904/410143016/-1440972144?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS85MDI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjZjMjc0NC0zYjA1LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pqDpc6qllzFEhxdVQ8uei0YhyoVcUIFIrervAa71QF8=)
---
Friend,
The opioid epidemic has ripped through our country, rattling the lives of so many. As Minnesota’s Attorney General, it’s my job to make sure people are getting the help they need.
Nothing is more important than our health, so I stepped in and joined a lawsuit against pharmaceutical company Indivior for delaying the release of a cheaper, generic version of opioid addiction treatment.
**After filing this lawsuit, I am happy to announce we have reached a settlement with Indivior in the best interest of Minnesotans. **
When I was re-elected in November, I promised that I would always stand up to powerful special interests who put their own profits over lives. **This outcome is another example of how I’m keeping that promise.** Your support truly powers the work I do that makes victories like this possible.

clean_body: Friend, The opioid epidemic has ripped through our country, rattling the lives of so many. As Minnesota’s Attorney General, it’s my job to make sure people are getting the help they need. | = Friend, The opioid epidemic has ripped through our country, rattling the lives of so many. As Minnesota’s Attorney General, it’s my job to make sure people are getting the help they need. Nothing is more important than our health, so I stepped in and joined a lawsuit against pharmaceutical company Indivior for delaying the release of a cheaper, generic version of opioid addiction treatment. After filing this lawsuit, I am happy to announce we have reached a settlement with Indivior in the best interest of Minnesotans. When I was re-elected in November, I promised that I would always stand up to powerful special interests who put their own profits over lives. This outcome is another example of how I’m keeping that promise. subject: The GOP is distracting you from their plans to gut Social Security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64459657/410144980/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2U0ODJhNi0zYjA1LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e4029oZPp4Zzf4FRETNgEzgjTA24xpEnVJleOaasX-k=&emci=cbd96776-8004-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=57e482a6-3b05-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | Peter,

The GOP is peddling dangerous conspiracy theories and hate against vulnerable communities to distract you from their brazen attempts to slash Medicare and Social Security. [_**Click here to fight back.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64459660/410144985/710125701?refcode=20230607.1_GADems_6I&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2U0ODJhNi0zYjA1LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e4029oZPp4Zzf4FRETNgEzgjTA24xpEnVJleOaasX-k=)

You may have noticed recently that the GOP is ramping up their attacks on anything not exactly in line with their extreme beliefs. Their evil attacks on the LGBTQ community, rampant school censorship campaigns, and bans on life-saving reproductive and gender-affirming health care are dominating the news. Instead of tackling real issues that matter to working families, Republicans are attacking everyone from doctors to teachers to transgender children who just want to play sports.

These attacks aren’t just dangerous – they’re also a distraction. _**The GOP’s main goal is to cut access to Medicare and Social Security!**_

Republicans know that their policies aren’t popular. They know that if people see them try to cut Medicare and Social Security, they’ll lose in 2024. And they know they’ll have to run against Joe Biden’s record of historic economic growth and delivering for working families. So their plan is to distract us while they try to slash funding for the programs Americans depend on. The GOP will keep trying, whether it makes the news or not. **So we need to remove them from power in 2024!**

[**_There is only one way to stop MAGA GOP extremism and save Medicare and Social Security, and that’s to defeat the GOP in 2024 in swing states like Georgia. Rush a donation now to help us do just that!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64459664/410144987/710125701?refcode=20230607.1_GADems_6I&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2U0ODJhNi0zYjA1LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e4029oZPp4Zzf4FRETNgEzgjTA24xpEnVJleOaasX-k=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

body:
A bunch of men got dressed up in bikinis and high heels...

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zk36oafi2rcfk0kvmlh4nrucu9ed4kjpn0pimc6g_rp22sh2s8i66o73chhm0o72cth2bs)

| | Patriot, have you seen this insane video yet?

A bunch of men got dressed up in bikinis and high heels...

Pole danced on a cross...
---
[WATCH THE VIDEO](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z066eoo56829ajad6khcje4cf1r929n9b5m6nlr0_rp22sh2s8i66o73chhm0o72cth2bs)
---
I just found out from a friend that the people in this video call themselves the “Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence.” But they’re really a bunch of radical leftwing activists who've made their
names by mocking Christians in the most vile ways possible.
**Disgusting.**
Every Patriotic American who believes in God should take one look at these vile leftwing activists and agree that **any corporation supporting them is endorsing an anti-Christian**
**hate group.**
---
[FIGHT BACK](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zim08fho04041dkv5djuutu8ou57vluoood0gbqo_rp22sh2s8i66o73chhm0o72cth2bs)
---
Sadly, not everyone thinks like you and me, Patriot. Get this: **The LA Dodgers actually had the gall to invite these radicals into Dodger Stadium in just a few days to hand them a COMMUNITY HERO AWARD.** _Because these fake “nuns” who mock Christians, supposedly do “charity work.”_ Anyone with a brain knows that’s a load of you know what. Guess what “charity” these “sisters” ACTUALLY do: **> Pay for doctors to surgically sterilize KIDS in the name of so-called “gender-affirming care.”** **> Mock Christians and people of faith** That’s not charity. And these radicals aren’t heroes. The Dodgers are honoring an anti-Christian hate group that spends the bulk of it’s time mocking religion and pushing minors to get sex changes. It’s simply wrong. **IT’S TIME TO STAND UP AND FIGHT BACK.
** My friends at CatholicVote are leading the charge on a nationwide boycott campaign. **Even better, they’re running a $1 million ad campaign to tell the LA Dodgers and every other woke corporation in the country to BACK OFF ... or else LOSE THE BUSINESS OF EVERY CHRISTIAN IN THIS COUNTRY.** They’ve raised almost $1 million already – but they need your help to get over the line. **[_Will you help this ad campaign blow past $1 million in the next 48 hours?_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4hh1ltlphbq0b8buepndu6skahbip69eqardkf0_rp22sh2s8i66o73chhm0o72cth2bs)**
---
[CHIP IN $25](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo95nhlp8tgh021bc00h4ie1c2gcea886es6lef0_rp22sh2s8i66o73chhm0o72cth2bs)
---
Make no mistake. This isn’t just the LA Dodgers or a bunch of fake nuns. This is where our whole country is headed unless we take action **_NOW_** That’s exactly what I’m doing today. And I hope you will too. **Please join me in backing their boycott and ad campaign today!** Thanks,
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgaqi7n51nkctsf6damn1ava6t89r459fu6k49r8_rp22sh2s8i66o73chhm0o72cth2bs)
---
Donald Trump Jr.

\------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ P.S. Let me tell you, this isn’t just about Catholics. **Every Christian in this country should join in the boycott – whether you watch baseball or not.** Can you imagine an American business that has millions of kids in their audience, honoring a bunch of radical leftwing Drag Queens? Of course not. **_Why do these radical leftists think its ok to mock Christians and indoctrinate our kids?_** We’ve got to STOP this insanity before it’s too late. [**If you can spare even $5 or $10, please chip in HERE.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zne1mccl8g20vb1s5gn80gbiveu39gvjdtida8sg_rp22sh2s8i66o73chhm0o72cth2bs)

clean_body: A bunch of men got dressed up in bikinis and high heels... | | | | | Patriot, have you seen this insane video yet? A bunch of men got dressed up in bikinis and high heels... Pole danced on a cross... I just found out from a friend that the people in this video call themselves the “Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence.” But they’re really a bunch of radical leftwing activists who've made their names by mocking Christians in the most vile ways possible. Disgusting. Every Patriotic American who believes in God should take one look at these vile leftwing activists and agree that any corporation supporting them is endorsing an anti-Christian hate group. Sadly, not everyone thinks like you and me, Patriot. Get this: The LA Dodgers actually had the gall to invite these radicals into Dodger Stadium in just a few days to hand them a COMMUNITY HERO AWARD. Because these fake “nuns” who mock Christians, supposedly do “charity work.” Anyone with a brain knows that’s a load of you know what. Guess what “charity” these “sisters” ACTUALLY do: > Pay for doctors to surgically sterilize KIDS in the name of so-called “gender-affirming care.” > Mock Christians and people of faith That’s not charity. And these radicals aren’t heroes. The Dodgers are honoring an anti-Christian hate group that spends the bulk of it’s time mocking religion and pushing minors to get sex changes. It’s simply wrong. IT’S TIME TO STAND UP AND FIGHT BACK. My friends at CatholicVote are leading the charge on a nationwide boycott campaign. Even better, they’re running a $1 million ad campaign to tell the LA Dodgers and every other woke corporation in the country to BACK OFF ... or else LOSE THE BUSINESS OF EVERY CHRISTIAN IN THIS COUNTRY. Why do these radical leftists think its ok to mock Christians and indoctrinate our kids?
