name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Get your free copy
body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time.

| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25812%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vWNlsk3ch3GPCm7X1GLXJw&sysid=1)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25813%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SEkMnEIeCjqgLIUMj0%2fngA&sysid=1)
---
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25812%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vWNlsk3ch3GPCm7X1GLXJw&sysid=1)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25814%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1K1DyE%2fF0y2aJX2DxJFtqw&sysid=1)
---
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25812%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vWNlsk3ch3GPCm7X1GLXJw&sysid=1)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know \-- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25825%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qMTNybM7lbcSzLclKgcbOg&sysid=1) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25826%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=H70H0kz2E%2fU2oaFuE5LD8Q&sysid=1)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25827%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HdkNHu18vj9HwHhrdtL2dA&sysid=1) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

Your America News

clean_body: | | | We're making incredible strides in our race to defeat Ted Cruz, and now, friend, I am personally asking for your support to help us keep up this incredible momentum. = Since we launched this campaign one month ago, the Cook Political Report and Roll Call both upgraded our chances of winning. FiveThirtyEight now says Texas could be Democrats' best chance to flip a red seat blue. And a brand new poll shows us just 5 points behind Ted Cruz, with 14% of voters undecided. This is a testament to the powerful grassroots movement we're building, friend, and I'm so thrilled that you're a part of it. But the more national attention this race gets, the more wealthy Republicans will be lining up to fill Ted Cruz's war chest.I'm counting on your immediate support to help me keep up our momentum from now until Election Day. = Thank you so much, Colin = | | | | ---|---|---|--- If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . | Paid for by Serve America PAC Serve America PAC PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States

_Here’s the truth:_ McCarthy is forming a “commission” to look into cutting Social Security and Medicare so he can cut taxes for wealthy Americans and corporations.

The only thing standing between Kevin McCarthy and these attacks on Social Security? Our Senate Majority.

subject: We will NEVER back down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
| | | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=29ed766b01&e=84ee529f47)
---

Friend,

Our team is used to attacks from legacy media and the woke Left. When Gov. Ron DeSantis tells you he won't back down, that's a **PROMISE**.

_Did you see how they tried to shout him down in South Carolina?_
---
| [](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=0034474ef2&e=84ee529f47)
---
| | [TAKE A STAND - FIGHT BACK TODAY!](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=f55c856f3a&e=84ee529f47)
---
Governor DeSantis is standing up for the protection of our children. Our team will **ALWAYS** fight against those who seek to rob them of their innocence. On that point, there will be **no compromise.** We will never surrender to woke ideology, friend. **[Join Governor Ron DeSantis and our team today—let's show them our strength and stand up for our kids.](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=140ff18ff8&e=84ee529f47 "Join Governor Ron DeSantis and our team today—let's show them our strength and stand up for our kids.")**

In Freedom,
Team DeSantis

---
**⬇️Get your name on the wall at HQ⬇️**

---
| [](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=7f3c6fbd93&e=84ee529f47)
---

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=14346bf616&e=84ee529f47)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom – even when it wasn’t popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn’t stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican – as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind – when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue – Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.”

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state’s infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

Peter, This summer, we’re excited for another year of partnership with two amazing organizations that help train the future leaders of Indiana. [Hoosier Women Forward](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64463016/410153279/1772549238?refcode=230607-TrainingEmail&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODI5NjA0YS0zZTA1LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UKiRG7Fy0k8-Uo-KdPmQUbFK8Lja12hHNL57T2KNTn4=&emci=6f285776-3205-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=0829604a-3e05-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) and the [Emerging Leaders Project](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64463017/410153280/-1934519303?refcode=230607-TrainingEmail&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODI5NjA0YS0zZTA1LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UKiRG7Fy0k8-Uo-KdPmQUbFK8Lja12hHNL57T2KNTn4=&emci=6f285776-3205-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=0829604a-3e05-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) provide multi-month programs to help passionate Hoosiers take the next step in their journey to better their communities. [**Hoosier Women Forward – Apply by June 21!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64463018/410153281/-625691167?refcode=230607-TrainingEmail&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODI5NjA0YS0zZTA1LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UKiRG7Fy0k8-Uo-KdPmQUbFK8Lja12hHNL57T2KNTn4=&emci=6f285776-3205-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=0829604a-3e05-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535)
Applications are open for Hoosier Women Forward’s sixth class of leaders! Democratic women with a demonstrated ability to take initiative in their communities or places of work are encouraged to apply. Women selected for HWF must demonstrate an interest in public policy, political advocacy, and advancing Indiana forward with progressive policies and ideas. HWF is not a candidate training program, and you do not need to be interested in running for office to be selected for our program. If you want to be part of the next Hoosier Women Forward class, apply by June 21st. Applications and additional information can be found at www.hoosierwomenforward.org/apply. [**Emerging Leaders Project - Apply by July 15!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64463019/410153282/1184560282?refcode=230607-TrainingEmail&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODI5NjA0YS0zZTA1LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UKiRG7Fy0k8-Uo-KdPmQUbFK8Lja12hHNL57T2KNTn4=&emci=6f285776-3205-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=0829604a-3e05-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535)
You can now apply to join the 2023-24 class of the Emerging Leaders Project! Founded in 2011 by party activists Jeff Harris and Carmen Darland, the Emerging Leaders Project was created to bring more young people into the Democratic Party and into public service. This program is open to Hoosier Democrats between the ages of 21-40 looking to get more involved! The program has been a success, training over 300 Indiana Democrats in the areas of campaigning, policy, and politics. Over 25 Emerging Leaders Project graduates have gone on to serve in elected office. Application information and more details can be accessed by visiting https://www.emergingleadersproject.org/apply Thanks, Indiana Dems | | | [Chip in! ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64463020/410153283/405560545?refcode=230607-TrainingEmail&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODI5NjA0YS0zZTA1LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UKiRG7Fy0k8-Uo-KdPmQUbFK8Lja12hHNL57T2KNTn4=)

There’s only one way for us to make America spend within its means: _**ELECT STRONG REPUBLICANS.**_

name: Team DeSantis
subject: FWD: Official Ron DeSantis for President Listening Survey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=ada8a0f9e756eed80fe309d1afcbe54bc61a4890f638166f8ee77891068cf17c4aeb0f8005eb3f54237f0b6446ccf9976ef5b36a5f71bfe4898e796cf5cbd9d211f60a18421e014c4769aae9c59e34a7

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=86d36c3c3e814e6f800798490913d51492c5b365fdbffaeed7647d89b8b3b5c07d94a0e782799ca91fae06270b9497da0f3d20cda950926afba94dc3b76588ab

Friend,

Governor DeSantis asked us to reach out to you. Did you see our earlier message? We’ve released a listening survey and we want your input.

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

----------- Forwarded message -----------

From:
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=86d36c3c3e814e6f800798490913d51492c5b365fdbffaeed7647d89b8b3b5c07d94a0e782799ca91fae06270b9497da0f3d20cda950926afba94dc3b76588ab
Team DeSantis

Date: June 5, 2023 at 1:31 PM EDT

Subject: Official RDFP Listening Survey

Friend,

The first step of any conversation? Listening.

We’re contacting all of our top GOP grassroots activists for a strategy session about how we win the White House back from Joe Biden.

We’re asking you to fill out our Official Ron DeSantis for President Listening Survey
SURVEY ID:
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=86d36c3c3e814e6fb2fc2b2d60aad07bfd79ef1874b25d8dff945a8675962cf03680f5d18c5ccada83cc22b1d880690c01129308dc0d260b0a7fc5d82cb79a08
dpwillis67@gmail.com

SURVEY STATUS: INCOMPLETE

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=86d36c3c3e814e6f800798490913d51492c5b365fdbffaeed7647d89b8b3b5c07d94a0e782799ca91fae06270b9497da0f3d20cda950926afba94dc3b76588ab
COMPLETE SURVEY NOW

Thank you for your time. Let’s win this, together.

Team DeSantis

Meet Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=86d36c3c3e814e6f800798490913d51492c5b365fdbffaeed7647d89b8b3b5c07d94a0e782799ca91fae06270b9497da0f3d20cda950926afba94dc3b76588ab

A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.

Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom – even when it wasn’t popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
-
Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,
-
Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,
-
Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,
-
Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,
-
Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,
-
Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,
-
Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,
-
Protecting the unborn,
-
Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,
-
Expanding education freedom,
-
Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,
-
Lowering prescription drug costs,
-
Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,
-
Creating a universal school choice program,
-
Delivering record-breaking tax relief,
-
Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,
-
Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,
-
Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,
-
Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,
-
...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn’t stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican – as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind – when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue – Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.”

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
-
Record tax relief
-
ESG prohibitions
-
Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP
-
The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.
-
Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency
-
Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI
-
Improvements to our state’s infrastructure
-
Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists
-
The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis
-
Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions
-
Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida
No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

Tallahassee, FL 32315

| Hi there Friend
We just wanted to let you know that your support of Kat's mission has NOT gone unnoticed here at Team Cammack.
We're incredibly grateful to have such dedicated supporters like you on this team - in fact, it is precisely that support that has helped Kat use her time in Congress to get the TRUTH out about the extreme, left-wing America Last Agenda that is tearing our country apart!
You helped Kat sound the alarm when Biden's Open Border led to homeless veterans being kicked back out onto the streets and single adult migrants crowding elementary school gymnasiums.
You helped her call out the Woke progressives who tried to gaslight black Americans into somehow thinking Florida was a "hostile" state.
Every step of the way, Friend supporters like you have helped Kat unmask the Democrats' record of lies and failures!
There's just one problem... The Left isn't running on their record. They KNOW that doing so would mean the American People seeing right through their schemes!
So instead, they try to win through other means - like raising MILLIONS from mega-donors like Soros so they can put out attack ads and defeat top conservatives like Kat.
The only way we compete with this strategy? By making sure we meet our goals and pool the resources we need to fight back with messaging of our own.
That's why reaching our $50K Goal before the end of the Q2 Fundraising Deadline this month is so important. Especially since these numbers will go PUBLIC when we file with the FEC... Soon, the whole country will know whether or not we have what it takes to compete with the Democrat mega-donors!
So with that in mind, we have a favor to ask - [will you consider DOUBLING your impact and making another donation to support Kat's fight? Even just another $5 donation would truly make a major impact if everyone reading this took action!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ab4AHVBMVB0h5KeBs8gAVbOuVQ8fHsDaBxiPc8CPRkbUs0zH7UZ0D37gydxeocCK4Lc-FV6NrpOXla6vhWX5seJcFkju9UzHqlt7qQaT2vAnGEtjOeyLuBMhBv3Wr29c_zvLYk74ZlCYFKlOcZhX4qAHRgER8h3QywWeodPcTlQjAh5IKIPTVe2UA0ok6OK7e6bFVG1DFn4=&c=CknMB05B-kOW5Dod3tkoX7SocfRgHGXBXRHfgcaBOtPHSdLvpzxyEQ==&ch=CbEFR9Jzlwj-FVRchVWbHD2ejmgOFpGm2OQlNAvNCmWDxtMJqZZQEQ==)
---
| | [STAND WITH KAT! We're incredibly grateful to have such dedicated supporters like you on this team - in fact, it is precisely that support that has helped Kat use her time in Congress to get the TRUTH out about the extreme, left-wing America Last Agenda that is tearing our country apart! You helped Kat sound the alarm when Biden's Open Border led to homeless veterans being kicked back out onto the streets and single adult migrants crowding elementary school gymnasiums. You helped her call out the Woke progressives who tried to gaslight black Americans into somehow thinking Florida was a "hostile" state. Every step of the way, Friend supporters like you have helped Kat unmask the Democrats' record of lies and failures! There's just one problem... The Left isn't running on their record. They KNOW that doing so would mean the American People seeing right through their schemes! So instead, they try to win through other means - like raising MILLIONS from mega-donors like Soros so they can put out attack ads and defeat top conservatives like Kat. The only way we compete with this strategy? By making sure we meet our goals and pool the resources we need to fight back with messaging of our own. That's why reaching our $50K Goal before the end of the Q2 Fundraising Deadline this month is so important. Especially since these numbers will go PUBLIC when we file with the FEC... Soon, the whole country will know whether or not we have what it takes to compete with the Democrat mega-donors! name: Team Ro
subject: Yes to the Khanna Plan. No to student debt.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

Right now, 45 million Americans are anxiously awaiting clarity on their student loan payments due to a condition in the debt-ceiling negotiations that will end the student loan payment pause on August 30 and the looming Supreme Court case on student loan forgiveness. Resuming these payments in the middle of an affordability crisis will be crushing.

Americans deserve more financial freedom, not less. They deserve the freedom to buy homes and build wealth. They deserve the freedom to pursue their dreams.

The student debt pause is one of the reasons Ro didn’t vote for the McCarthy Debt Deal. We need something better, something bolder.

We need the Khanna Plan—and President Biden must follow it.

Sign the petition: President Biden must follow the Khanna Plan. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/khanna-plan-student-debt-petition?contactdata=BGU09FRSFE7kRYy+lyf9qC0rdZfmeriJN4wx16L9IWffcIHlVsT5bfQLysd5klmzfTyd7z/d07nvqscUgP1N0gJotz4Qd/mJ4V4fsm1L3kAi8EKYMHTaI0/51/hLBNqQxrvhUNhgxhvdgMKVFasSFw==]

Under the Khanna Plan, we will

* Extend the moratorium on student debt payments.
* Forgive student debt up to $50,000.
* Expand relief programs.

Sign if you agree: The Khanna Plan will revitalize the American Dream. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/khanna-plan-student-debt-petition?contactdata=BGU09FRSFE7kRYy+lyf9qC0rdZfmeriJN4wx16L9IWffcIHlVsT5bfQLysd5klmzfTyd7z/d07nvqscUgP1N0gJotz4Qd/mJ4V4fsm1L3kAi8EKYMHTaI0/51/hLBNqQxrvhUNhgxhvdgMKVFasSFw==]

President Biden’s promise to cancel student debt helped land him the White House in 2020. He must now invoke his authority and stay true to his promise. He must stand and deliver for hardworking Americans by taking executive action and following the Khanna Plan.

In solidarity,
Team Ro

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ngp-email-footer?refcode=20230607-khanna-plan-student-debt]

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: I am one of the countless survivors of gun violence in our nation
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
It is my greatest hope to see a future where lives are no longer altered by gun violence.
#

Friends -
This Gun Violence Awareness Month, I’m thinking about the survivors of gun violence in our country. Countless individuals will forever live with the trauma of being impacted by a shooting.
As many of you know, I am a survivor of gun violence myself. Twelve years ago, a gunman shot me in the head while I was holding a public forum with constituents outside of a supermarket in Tucson. Since then, I have made a lot of progress in my recovery journey, but it has been far from easy. My story is just one example of how a bullet can change someone’s life forever.
It is my greatest hope to see a future where lives are no longer altered by gun violence. Everyone deserves to live in a country where they feel safe in their communities. Our children deserve to feel safe when they walk into school each day.
Every day, I recommit myself to the work to end gun violence in America. I know that a future free from gun violence is possible, but change can’t happen overnight. That’s why I need you with me today and this month especially.
[**Will you make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today to help us keep up our work to change our nation’s gun laws and keep our communities safe from gun violence?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jun23.dfqeaL&refcode=em230607-1-15&t=1&akid=5916%2E3935704%2E4WPfph)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-jun23.PeWyti&refcode=em230607-1-15&t=22&akid=5916%2E3935704%2E4WPfph)**

| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-jun23.IMSWLY&refcode=em230607-1-15&t=23&akid=5916%2E3935704%2E4WPfph)**

| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-jun23.LOY28E&refcode=em230607-1-15&t=24&akid=5916%2E3935704%2E4WPfph)**

| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-jun23.jpif6I&refcode=em230607-1-15&t=25&akid=5916%2E3935704%2E4WPfph)**
---
****
Thank you for standing with me and the many survivors of gun violence in America. Your support means so much to me.
With courage,
Gabby Giffords

Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Tennessee Voter Project
subject: Tennessee Voter Project Endorses Justin J. Pearson for TN House District 86
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TN Voter Project; Isaac Kimes, Esq
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/94287/images/TVP%20Endorsement%20Banner%20%281%29.png]
June 7, 2023
Dear friend,
TVP is pleased to endorse Justin J. Pearson for TN State House District 86.
Justin has long been an advocate for our community before he was ever elected to office. When he was just a sophomore at Mitchell High School, he advocated to provide his fellow students with textbooks. Within the last few years, Justin led the movement to stop a pipeline from going through historically Black neighborhoods in South Memphis and to pass legislation to prevent pipelines from contaminating Memphis' water source.
Just recently, Justin stood with parents and youth to protest the inaction of our state legislature following the Covenant School shooting in Nashville that killed three children and three staff. The GOP-led legislature voted to expel him. He was swiftly re-appointed to office but he now has to run for re-election, just months after he was first sworn in.
There's no question that Justin will fight for our community and continue to keep the pressure up on Republican extremism in Tennessee.
Now it's time for us to fight for Justin. Can you help TVP support his re-election campaign with a contribution today? [https://bit.ly/tvpforpearson]
SUPPORT JUSTIN J. PEARSON FOR TN HOUSE DISTRICT 86 [https://bit.ly/tvpforpearson]
We know that Justin won't let this moment pass us by. We need Justin J. Pearson in office to continue to build the movement to turn Tennessee blue. Early voting is happening NOW and the primary election is June 15. If you're in Downtown, South Memphis, or North Memphis--we encourage you to get out and VOTE.
Will you help TVP support Justin's campaign and help TVP elect more folks like Justin into office? [https://bit.ly/tvpforpearson] Half of what you contribute will go directly to Justin's campaign and the other half will go to turning out voters in the election this Fall.
You can read more about Justin's campaign at www.votejustinj.com [votejustinj.com] .
Thanks for your support,
Tennessee Voter Project Staff

If you're in Downtown, South Memphis, or North Memphis--we encourage you to get out and VOTE. Will you help TVP support Justin's campaign and help TVP elect more folks like Justin into office? [] Half of what you contribute will go directly to Justin's campaign and the other half will go to turning out voters in the election this Fall. You can read more about Justin's campaign at www.votejustinj.com [votejustinj.com] . name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: Discover How to Win the New Cold War - Download Our Special Report Today!
body:
As President of The Heritage Foundation, I want to share with you our latest Special Report

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zstbnq7gkmk7gnl0m6p78a32ouqs4hvoon9qg7po_rp22sh2s8i66o73chhm2ob2c5h2bs)
---

Dear Fellow Patriot,

As President of The Heritage Foundation, I want to share with you our latest Special Report, **["Winning the New Cold War: A Plan for Countering China."**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zi7g7c1hmrtpo5v5f323cjt2je1512dr61itu93o_rp22sh2s8i66o73chhm2ob2c5h2bs) This groundbreaking report is a must-read for anyone concerned about the Chinese Communist Party's (CCP) growing influence and its threat to America's security and prosperity.

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6r0m4ns846c5g54qrh9a518rk78stvtrlpipmt0_rp22sh2s8i66o73chhm2ob2c5h2bs)
China has emerged as the most formidable foreign adversary the U.S. has faced since World War II. The CCP's quest for global dominance poses significant challenges to our economy, national security, and democratic values. That's why it's essential to develop a strategic plan to counter their aggressive ambitions.

Our report provides a comprehensive and transparent plan to help the United States and its allies resist the CCP's growing influence. Here are just a few reasons why you should download and read our report:

* **In-depth analysis:** Our report offers a detailed examination of the threats posed by the CCP, including its economic, military, and technological capabilities.

* **Tailored strategy:** We outline a strategy that leverages the strengths of the U.S. government, state and local authorities, the private sector, and international allies to protect America's interests and confront Beijing's aggressive tactics.

* **Actionable recommendations:** Our report includes practical recommendations for implementing a winning strategy against China, from drafting model legislation to expanding open-source intelligence efforts.

* **Future-proofing:** Our plan doesn't just address current challenges, but also anticipates the CCP's future moves and provides guidance on how to adapt and operationalize the U.S. strategy in response.

By downloading our report, you'll gain valuable insights into the most pressing external challenge of our time and become part of the conversation on safeguarding America's future.

**We hope our report will inspire you to join us in our mission to win the New Cold War against China.** [**Please use this link to instantly access your free copy of this special report now >>**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zso92osladase39741emrrlu3ct7fi0hj997c8tg_rp22sh2s8i66o73chhm2ob2c5h2bs)

Best regards,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: Is Florida a terrorist state?
body:
| | | Peter,
---
_I can’t believe it._

**A far-Left radical on MSNBC claimed Florida is a “terrorist state” because of our strong conservative leadership.**

**Let me tell you, I know what terrorism looks like - and it’s not Florida freedom.**

I’ve been shot at on the battlefields of Afghanistan. I’ve taken on the Taliban. And I know that the people forced to live under their rule would give _anything_ to live in a place like Florida.

[**Far-Left extremists are trying to sink our state because they KNOW our conservative leadership works - and that absolutely INFURIATES them. Now, it’s time to fight back and defend our way of life. Join me today and KEEP FLORIDA RED!**](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=5e9ace7c7c184fe3829b253e68c76ba4&_e=gxMbJHQ-bUPbCZfNqeqd5EcL35SAH19WoMEM_cZ4V3S_tRqC91MIgIf7xhJCE3wbFSVsRuG7AM72al_kB0XEowX0kubsfuBtVwjGxEOzdrCtKdZKuYMhBkzIuaEyOH5g1Fv_81ZEiuh2TCLKKzHfQhmjjE3sDxgiN9Au1pb0tqJAik4YhFL7zpfFmnAp7yCMH2RslzMTODkt93xMEUHNvrir3IuZgG12FxhX2pgVpo2aC6IQ9LH5LK1As4MPNNBg9uLJbMAQiWqTPrDZoxtRix6pfxvc2iYop1oLSm-eHKByfinf5Belgk-tm20PYY4jCxIYCjGXJjarRQiPTIpes5pw39_7Jab-HS0IK4l_UzLTcrwMI3UEFpx07OiuKD0p)

As a Green Beret veteran, I don’t take claims of “terrorism” lightly.

I saw too many great Americans give their lives to keep the world from real terrorists.

_I wasn’t afraid when I went toe to toe with the Taliban, and I’m certainly not afraid of the socialists trying to take us down._

[**It’s time to defend Florida. Pitch in NOW to defend our conservative state!**](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=5e9ace7c7c184fe3829b253e68c76ba4&_e=gxMbJHQ-bUPbCZfNqeqd5EcL35SAH19WoMEM_cZ4V3S_tRqC91MIgIf7xhJCE3wbFSVsRuG7AM72al_kB0XEowX0kubsfuBtVwjGxEOzdrCtKdZKuYMhBkzIuaEyOH5g1Fv_81ZEiuh2TCLKKzHfQhmjjE3sDxgiN9Au1pb0tqJAik4YhFL7zpfFmnAp7yCMH2RslzMTODkt93xMEUHNvgDnklkjBVT4wANvZd-LA0GiPi14iMPk_wPih2hgz_IP3gxLOhZRLkjdJE7rd5Pwdm90ETeZspS4pV6VNTG34jXun8iNNcYoyEmBt__rfOdXUuuO6Zm6bvp7EI9k2vQID6p8WtIf5zWjgbeTrh3NhUoFjS-_4UWyUBUNMcoFOjFG)

Peter,

My mom was a schoolteacher growing up. Every single day she got up and went to educate the next generation of leaders... and she always told me, _**"Nothing will work unless you do".**_

And it is exactly what I’ve been doing since I was 17 when I dropped out of high school and started waitressing at the local Waffle House to put food on the table.

Like a lot of Americans, I struggled to make ends meet, living paycheck to paycheck as I also earned my high school diploma by taking classes at a technical college. I got by without government handouts or radical socialist policies – and I am a better woman because of it.

**Well, Peter, I took those same ideals I learned as a Waffle House waitress to Congress. I refuse to waiver to what anyone wants other than the constituents I was elected by,_even if it means pissing off some party members along the way._**

[** ****SEND A HARD-WORKING WOMAN TO CONGRESS » **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=66034b80d34849a192ccd75ea4177c2c&_e=OJvHOIL7Jkx3JGHL0fsJeOg1hHNgUAmx9c9wFeALvrBCpaNXG0LmZk4_XljJayxSYzdC9o0SLvDG6Kpnh0tQAUo-vTHJJYek71hd02ndrtvVwa8S1C8i5WXbkcKfjqhsN7Fqi-XaWptDJR6OJAlOM_bQfFtNT09v6klh9vaQxSbUnZuGpxLVXuXmf2d7s3dbzDXlnw33qXm6v-jcuak008ZxY1vVoyvdCQkzlwbwfveq3lxgnmh2TCyJmGWzyAGoWSzRS365KeglTn7nOj8skClFF8WD8Tc2gvKJIZfrCVXK8WIgRynn1TzA3F5flmt-Ycmiw52ED7biCRuKfy-xf3faiwYjGRhm84yqOYjHsqQOpH29tY3q_80Q3GGrO1jN)

[**Congress needs more people like me**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=66034b80d34849a192ccd75ea4177c2c&_e=OJvHOIL7Jkx3JGHL0fsJeOg1hHNgUAmx9c9wFeALvrBCpaNXG0LmZk4_XljJayxSYzdC9o0SLvDG6Kpnh0tQAUo-vTHJJYek71hd02ndrtvVwa8S1C8i5WXbkcKfjqhsN7Fqi-XaWptDJR6OJAlOM_bQfFtNT09v6klh9vaQxSbUnZuGpxLVXuXmf2d7s3dbzDXlnw33qXm6v-jcuak008ZxY1vVoyvdCQkzlwbwfvdHd-ThuIxsD7TVcdrn__slx37rKZ0UA0anVqIA9h5JCav2vKXq_rZx5ic8JzfAw7wRlBPrtDeLktp7JtQYJPFiqgW9EmZhjkYipUpIhsPOTRb9IOnqbdRN1tA0oIiR-fDJTLRAFrNoPJLxh7HGfJLK) - someone who understands having to make the choice between gas or groceries because you only have enough dollar bills in your wallet to cover one or the other. _Someone who knows what it’s like to earn a living and make sacrifices._

I desperately need the help of grassroots supporters just like you to keep this campaign running. In return, I promise to always vote for you, not the hoity-toity, Washington elite who try and buy my votes. [**Will you make a donation to my campaign to send a hard-working, everyday American back to Washington?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=66034b80d34849a192ccd75ea4177c2c&_e=OJvHOIL7Jkx3JGHL0fsJeOg1hHNgUAmx9c9wFeALvrBCpaNXG0LmZk4_XljJayxSYzdC9o0SLvDG6Kpnh0tQAUo-vTHJJYek71hd02ndrtvVwa8S1C8i5WXbkcKfjqhsN7Fqi-XaWptDJR6OJAlOM_bQfFtNT09v6klh9vaQxSbUnZuGpxLVXuXmf2d7s3dbzDXlnw33qXm6v-jcuak008ZxY1vVoyvdCQkzlwbwfvfcsk2VuK-LY5-U8Dz61UCyhVJ_T-gAVENK27x8XidVXA8yolNgaRAGZnlzyHFI3_5_sjY1O26N4N9PTABlq46C_PPryBw512WhQlKypMisT_jmkJ5sFc6M0-RxOqmZg0VzgeWRn_Z5k_oCCZK7nBqD)

# About Nancy
---
Congresswoman Nancy Mace grew up in the Lowcountry. She is the daughter of a retired Army General and retired school teacher. She is a proud mother of two, the first female to graduate from The Citadel's Corps of Cadets, and a tough conservative who wants to save our country from the radicals who hate America! In 2020, she took SC-01 back from the Democrats and now, is fighting tooth and nail to keep it Red. [**JOIN NANCY**](go.txting.io/mEWDMy)

body:
This summer, it’ll be six months since Kevin McCarthy and his Republican allies assumed control of the House of Representatives.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64468826/410174291/-4707655?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzE3NDRjMS00ODA1LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oJ4hbuiWSVOVlfNBuezZFOIDy8mX5PyzWNsKpH4jDB8=&emci=5b69c464-4005-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=bc1744c1-4805-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19954364) Hey friend, This summer, it’ll be six months since Kevin McCarthy and his Republican allies assumed control of the House of Representatives. In that time, right-wing extremists have attempted to further limit abortion rights, attacked the LGBTQ+ community, proposed gutting Social Security and Medicare, and attempted to undo much of the progress we’ve made fighting climate change. But despite having to stand against all this extremism, Brittany has continued to fight for the priorities she promised she would fight for when she was elected: building an economy where regular families can get ahead, addressing our nation’s opioid crisis, and creating more affordable housing. **[In short, friend, it’s been an eventful few months, and we want to hear from you about how things are going. Will you please take a moment to complete our Mid-Year Review Survey and send along your feedback?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64468827/410174346/-2002425283?refcode=email_060723_survey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzE3NDRjMS00ODA1LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oJ4hbuiWSVOVlfNBuezZFOIDy8mX5PyzWNsKpH4jDB8=&emci=5b69c464-4005-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=bc1744c1-4805-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19954364)** | | [TAKE THE SURVEY →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64468828/410174347/-2002425283?refcode=email_060723_survey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzE3NDRjMS00ODA1LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oJ4hbuiWSVOVlfNBuezZFOIDy8mX5PyzWNsKpH4jDB8=&emci=5b69c464-4005-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=bc1744c1-4805-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19954364)

This is a grassroots-powered campaign, friend. Brittany could never have gotten this far without this team, and we’re going to keep your priorities and your feedback in mind every step of the way — so we’re relying on you to share your views with us, and to be as direct as possible.
Thanks so much for your time!
-Team Brittany Pettersen

| Hi Peter,

Today is our Mom, Susan Wild’s, birthday! We couldn’t be more excited to celebrate with her today and we’re hoping you’ll help us.

Every day, she works hard for the people of PA-07 and to improve the lives of every working family across the country. We’re so grateful for her leadership in Congress!

body:
This month, especially, we need to talk about our gun laws.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64469303/410176354/746452426?refcode=EM_FR_230606GunViolence_N_SB4C_90DO_6_NG_TESTA_logo&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmY2MTQ0Zi00YTA1LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SKiAigyaZJQjZunnryzyVMhHT1dXeWy5mfAd8M2-Yaw=) It's National Gun Violence Awareness Month, and, Peter, we need to talk about our gun laws.

Passing common-sense gun violence prevention measures is long overdue. A majority of Americans support stricter gun laws. **Yet, House Republicans continue blocking common-sense gun violence prevention measures like:**
* **Passing federal red flag laws** to keep firearms out of the hands of potentially dangerous people.
* **Raising the minimum age** to buy semi-automatic rifles.
* **Tightening loopholes** on gun purchases, background checks, and more.

But there is hope, Peter. Last year, Shontel and the Democratic majority in Congress passed the first gun violence prevention measures in nearly 20 years.

Now, to continue their progress, we must expand our Democratic majority and oust obstructionist Republicans who refuse to take action tragedy after tragedy.

body:

# [Tax Dollars For Child Sex Changes??](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1424602&post_id=126428395&utm_source=post-email-title&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTI2NDI4Mzk1LCJpYXQiOjE2ODYxNTI4MjYsImV4cCI6MTY4ODc0NDgyNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0MjQ2MDIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.yv-lNfdK1_cDdzC39nSMZFqIi7FHllrMwzNucajF_ZU)
### Not On The Pennsylvania Freedom Caucus' Watch.
| | [Andy Roth](https://substack.com/redirect/6678345c-bb40-461e-9702-6c8947a6233e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| Jun 7
---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6678345c-bb40-461e-9702-6c8947a6233e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack..rcfEb1KOAoUZzq-w2Gd9bvC8sNS-wq72xt9S7bDNgS0?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
Friends,
As you all know, one of the most important issues that our state freedom caucuses fight for is protecting the innocence of children. That fight is about to come to Pennsylvania in a BIG way.
In 2019, Penn State University Health established a pediatric "gender-affirming care" clinic, aka, a place kids with gender dysphoria go to receive life-altering and irreversible medical services. With budget debates coming up in the PA House, PA Freedom Caucus member Rep. Aaron Bernstine gave Penn State - as well as Temple University and the University of Pittsburg - a deadline of June 2 to provide data on the services being provided to kids by their university health systems.
Penn State got back to them and their data shows they have given puberty blockers and other disgusting "gender-affirming" services to hundreds of minors, some as young as five.
In response, the PA Freedom Caucus announced they are going to oppose the $882 million in funding the hospitals are set to receive in the 2023-24 state budget unless these policies change.
You can read their letter here:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/52eec0e7-0c09-4180-8df7-c364a115121b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**South Dakota:**
One of the biggest attacks on private property rights in American history has come to South Dakota and most of their "Republican" elected officials are doing nothing to stop it. Over 80 landowners are facing eminent domain lawsuits from a company looking to build a "carbon capture" pipeline that runs through their state for ethanol plants in Iowa.
The company, Summit Carbon Solutions, has massive ties to influential figures and donors in the Republican Party and were platinum sponsors of Gov. Kristi Noem's inauguration back in January. Unfortunately, multiple bills championed by the South Dakota Freedom Caucus to protect landowners from eminent domain failed in the last legislative session. But the SD Freedom Caucus hasn't stopped fighting.
Read SFCN Comms Director Greg Price's [full story](https://substack.com/redirect/3cf7a5f4-d19f-4fd3-90fa-ec4a5d4b2f6c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) about the situation and sign the SDFC's [petition](https://substack.com/redirect/62066727-c3b9-4517-9f53-edc0df9a62aa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to stop the steal of private property for this green energy boondoggle.
**Louisiana:**
Last week, RINO Louisiana State Sen. Fred Mills made headlines by [voting with Democrats](https://substack.com/redirect/9135ee65-35d6-47e6-9189-95d4d61d2546?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in the Health & Welfare Committee to kill the bill to ban transgender procedures for minors. Despite this shocking betrayal to Republicans in the state, a motion to recommit the bill to the Judiciary Committee succeeded in the Senate, and the bill passed on a 29-10 vote.
In addition, LA Freedom Caucus member Rep. Kathy Edmonston's bill to ban COVID vaccine mandates at all public and private K-12 schools and colleges made it through the full legislature.
It was an extremely productive week for conservatives in the Bayou State.
**Wyoming:**
Speaking of tax dollars funding mutilations of children, the same thing is happening in Wyoming. Yes, not California, but Wyoming.
We have written at length about how in the last legislative session, RINO Wyoming House Speaker Albert Sommers singlehandedly [blocked](https://substack.com/redirect/1339c2f8-6759-4176-95f7-d4158ad85abe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the bill to ban pediatric gender mutilations from coming to the floor. Well, the WY Department of Health recently removed those types of procedures from the list of treatments not covered by Medicaid.
The WYFC is demanding answers. Here's their letter:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3e672257-46c0-49d3-a3f7-683457c858c3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
We rely on your generous donations so that we can continue to support our patriotic State Freedom Caucuses. Please consider making a recurring donation of as little as [$10, $50, or even $100 a month](https://substack.com/redirect/10335379-0ff9-422f-8e4a-01e7e8979e33?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) so that they get the support they so desperately need. We can't fight without you, so please act now.
**Keep fighting,**

**Andy Roth**
_President
State Freedom Caucus Network_
[DONATE](https://substack.com/redirect/10335379-0ff9-422f-8e4a-01e7e8979e33?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
P.S. Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation's state capitols and in your home state. Please consider a [contribution](https://substack.com/redirect/b64619b0-d72d-412b-ad25-bf6c471b597e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and join us as we work to advance the cause of liberty.
State Freedom Caucus Network is free today. But if you enjoyed this post, you can tell State Freedom Caucus Network that their writing is valuable by pledging a future subscription. You won't be charged unless they enable payments.
[Pledge your support](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZmNuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wb3N0IiwicCI6MTI2NDI4Mzk1LCJzIjoxNDI0NjAyLCJmIjp0cnVlLCJ1Ijo5MDUwMTE5MiwiaWF0IjoxNjg2MTUyODI2LCJleHAiOjE2ODg3NDQ4MjYsImlzcyI6InB1Yi0wIiwic3ViIjoibGluay1yZWRpcmVjdCJ9.hP4tf5FyUg83VqP1XbAYkpLlvfGI9o4DffnCVSrzSaQ?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=postcta)

Not On The Pennsylvania Freedom Caucus' Watch. | | | Jun 7 | | | | Friends, As you all know, one of the most important issues that our state freedom caucuses fight for is protecting the innocence of children. That fight is about to come to Pennsylvania in a BIG way. In 2019, Penn State University Health established a pediatric "gender-affirming care" clinic, aka, a place kids with gender dysphoria go to receive life-altering and irreversible medical services. With budget debates coming up in the PA House, PA Freedom Caucus member Rep. Aaron Bernstine gave Penn State - as well as Temple University and the University of Pittsburg - a deadline of June 2 to provide data on the services being provided to kids by their university health systems. Penn State got back to them and their data shows they have given puberty blockers and other disgusting "gender-affirming" services to hundreds of minors, some as young as five. In response, the PA Freedom Caucus announced they are going to oppose the $882 million in funding the hospitals are set to receive in the 2023-24 state budget unless these policies change. You can read their letter here: | | ---|---|--- South Dakota: One of the biggest attacks on private property rights in American history has come to South Dakota and most of their "Republican" elected officials are doing nothing to stop it. Over 80 landowners are facing eminent domain lawsuits from a company looking to build a "carbon capture" pipeline that runs through their state for ethanol plants in Iowa. The company, Summit Carbon Solutions, has massive ties to influential figures and donors in the Republican Party and were platinum sponsors of Gov. Kristi Noem's inauguration back in January. Unfortunately, multiple bills championed by the South Dakota Freedom Caucus to protect landowners from eminent domain failed in the last legislative session. But the SD Freedom Caucus hasn't stopped fighting. Read SFCN Comms Director Greg Price's about the situation and sign the SDFC's to stop the steal of private property for this green energy boondoggle. Louisiana: Last week, RINO Louisiana State Sen. Fred Mills made headlines by in the Health & Welfare Committee to kill the bill to ban transgender procedures for minors. Despite this shocking betrayal to Republicans in the state, a motion to recommit the bill to the Judiciary Committee succeeded in the Senate, and the bill passed on a 29-10 vote. In addition, LA Freedom Caucus member Rep. Kathy Edmonston's bill to ban COVID vaccine mandates at all public and private K-12 schools and colleges made it through the full legislature. It was an extremely productive week for conservatives in the Bayou State. Wyoming: Speaking of tax dollars funding mutilations of children, the same thing is happening in Wyoming. Yes, not California, but Wyoming. We have written at length about how in the last legislative session, RINO Wyoming House Speaker Albert Sommers singlehandedly the bill to ban pediatric gender mutilations from coming to the floor. Well, the WY Department of Health recently removed those types of procedures from the list of treatments not covered by Medicaid. The WYFC is demanding answers. Here's their letter: | | ---|---|--- We rely on your generous donations so that we can continue to support our patriotic State Freedom Caucuses. Please consider making a recurring donation of as little as so that they get the support they so desperately need. We can't fight without you, so please act now. Keep fighting, Andy Roth President State Freedom Caucus Network P.S. Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation's state capitols and in your home state. Please consider a and join us as we work to advance the cause of liberty. State Freedom Caucus Network is free today. But if you enjoyed this post, you can tell State Freedom Caucus Network that their writing is valuable by pledging a future subscription. You won't be charged unless they enable payments. | | | (C) 2023 State Freedom Caucus Network 300 Independence Ave SE, Washington, DC 20003 ? ?

subject: They’re supporting Cinde, are you?

body:
Hey,

First and foremost, thank you for all of your support as we launched our campaign and faced our first filing deadline.

We hit our goals for our deadline and, because of that and the endorsement of over 100 Granite Staters, we’ve got the wind at our backs.

At the bottom of this email is the full list of the local leaders who’ve endorsed our campaign so far, but we don’t have your endorsement yet. Will you click here to personally endorse Cinde’s campaign for Governor? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/QJWyIB_3e0qBPhbrowL03g2]

Cinde is running for Governor because after being the only check and balance to Chris Sununu’s power, she’s ready to undo the damage he’s done.

Here’s what some of the endorsers have to say about why they stand with Cinde:

Now, it’s your turn. Click here to instantly add your name and personally endorse Cinde’s campaign. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/QJWyIB_3e0qBPhbrowL03g2]

Thanks,

name: Dick Durbin
subject: We have a crucial mission ahead of us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
We must re-elect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris
#
Peter, in the face of growing threats from far-right extremists seeking to gain control over the Senate and the White House, we have a crucial mission ahead of us: Re-electing President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris.
In just a moment, I’m going to ask if you can make a contribution to help re-elect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. **[But, if you already know how important it is that President Biden defeats whichever far-right extremist the Republicans choose to be their nominee, pitch in now>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64469399/410176614/-1883533368?refcode=dd_em_230607_1_t1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWRiYzBjYS00YTA1LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=epdS5PaIBI0XMiY22uGyyu3CxTxt-w5UcEUPsGqa1_w=)**
The extremist Republican Party, led by Donald Trump and Ron DeSantis, continues to embrace anti-democracy ideologies: They’re making it harder for people to exercise their right to vote, opposing common sense gun safety measures, and spreading hate throughout our country.
As Governor, Ron DeSantis has banned abortion in Florida before many women even know they’re pregnant, forcing victims of rape or incest to show proof in order to access health care; made it easier for criminals to carry guns; and signed laws allowing books to be banned from schools and attacking LGBTQ+ youth. And we all know Donald Trump’s record as President – right down to his Big Lie of a rigged election.
**Meanwhile, Joe and Kamala are tirelessly fighting for the well-being of hardworking Americans and enacting policies that make our country stronger.**
Over the past two years, they have created an astounding 12 million jobs, spearheaded a historic investment in our country's infrastructure, and taken unprecedented strides towards addressing the urgent climate crisis we face. But there is still work to be done, and they cannot do it alone.
To prevail over the Republican nominee and their well-oiled fundraising machine, we need this grassroots movement to step up – we can’t afford to wait until next year.
**[Help us get a strong start: Contribute now to help us prevent another MAGA extremist president and preserve all of the progress we have made under the Biden Administration.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64469400/410176621/-1883533368?refcode=dd_em_230607_1_t1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWRiYzBjYS00YTA1LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=epdS5PaIBI0XMiY22uGyyu3CxTxt-w5UcEUPsGqa1_w=)**
Thank you for being a part of our grassroots movement.
My best,
Dick Durbin

The corporate news media wants your attention, and they'll do unscrupulous things to get it.

We don't work for them. We work for you (for free*).

^ more on that in a minute

**First, Ask yourself:**
1. | Wouldn't it be nice to trust the news I'm reading?
---|---
2. | Wouldn't it be even better if trustworthy news came straight to me instead of sifting the internet for a nugget or two of un-biased information??
3. | How much time have I wasted digging through an avalanche of stories across the Internet to figure out what's true and important?

[There is a better way!](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=6405300bf9bd49d1ab3ec48d4510481d&_e=lNRz0Gy1PUz9nAk4SCq0XKn_-o_xPWfKbu6L7Keam2ABuIUy8ZMbtTTgw10Du6t3h3-l7sQENjfvWBe0TpJK3zVcnQ_TS4yD6GnNVWQgOmmN8B1AqeUdNqNAsvranRLOhTpuL8ufq3cKc5CuZjHi_lyL2qNl9-DASNCYgjSW8eE_Q9gOgBt4i_1GVcTzCqwzRqfkxNb53xNYsay-jKjmGQ%3D%3D)

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: Take Action Against Ranked Choice Voting NOW!
body:
We need your voice and input to tackle this dangerous reform

| | | [](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c70628%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TH1dUzq9S2YXYGYAXMwI%2fw&sysid=1)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

As the President of The Heritage Foundation, I must urgently ask for your help in fighting against Ranked Choice Voting (RCV). This chaotic and confusing election "reform" is being pushed by mega-liberal donors and activists, threatening to disenfranchise voters and potentially elect marginal candidates without the support of a majority.

It's time to take a stand! We need your voice and input to tackle this dangerous reform that could wreak havoc on our electoral process.

**Please, take just a few minutes to complete our RCV survey by clicking the link below:**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/national-ranked-choice-voting-survey](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c70629%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nes6TBcOIFV3GQTPao7Inw&sysid=1)**

By participating, you'll be joining the battle to protect our democracy and ensure the integrity of our elections. After completing the survey, you'll receive a copy of our exclusive RCV fact sheet that lays out the shocking truth behind this controversial system.

Together, we can make a difference and preserve the democratic process that defines our great nation.

**[Let's take action against Ranked Choice Voting today!](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c70620%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ucOFxwSbOW7Flw1aPM03BA&sysid=1)**

Thank you for your passion for preserving our democracy.

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

Great America Update
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_

name: Jazmin at United We Dream Action
subject: My worst fear
body:
I’m fighting for permanent protections so that I can participate in American life as a community member, business owner, homeowner and voter. | | | Hi Peter, I’m Jazmin. I’m a junior at Colorado State University. Like all of my peers, I’m interested in summer jobs, internships, and study abroad programs in the field I’m studying. But there’s one difference between us: I can’t apply to any of them — **all because of my status.** I was brought to the US when I was 4 years old. I’m undocumented, which means I can’t legally work here or re-enter the country if I travel abroad. I’m eligible for DACA — but because of Judge Hanen’s decision to close DACA to new applicants, I’m shut out of the program. That means no work permit or protections from deportation. With Judge Hanen soon deciding _another_ case on DACA, hundreds of thousands of DACA recipients could join millions of immigrant youth like me in being left without permanent protections. **That’s why UWDA is leading the charge to secure permanent protections from Congress and the White House. Will you chip in to help us scale up our advocacy work and secure a pathway to citizenship for immigrant youth and all undocumented people?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y62hYNn9HaFt_zHKvI4OP8mx_5ABkFHmeFViL7NEeBD_AogMf18kAB-piHwjkW8FEBhHrZ8aK6vbtg0aUjz2Lq3ZmJ7ZHD1Vji8RCNFIu5aMb7J9r_GHE094MErsiez9HUas6dI70pQ9IulUron9sdEyFvaV8hNtslCcTRXd2dusQGXgstFxb2wiBNj-SIc18uN9ZnQINXKUxZx5N6V4y2GczOr695raWfh3euNlDWAqAfmR23XPynRonsg7ewVrPDaXtfZj16dDGTYALkQAEKnc7Vd_FbzSlMXJilmGRkYu-54AXY7cf6nW0x7ZAzbbFT6pR8kl-voJgrUTL_MWN8G1BzFnwVsh3wdCj-e9hWI0W-ZSrMeHhRpShWaIvmGIk/3wu/bB5n1DP0TbysCj_Flt73Tw/h0/gaSiiBVY4AYVbbEDiUo0T0dt4YHaXCQlZNyd0jH6s1M)

As a part of a mixed status family, I see the differences that come with immigration status in my own home.
My 15-year-old younger brother was born here and is a U.S. citizen. He’ll be able to get a part-time job to earn spending money and travel to foreign countries that I could only dream of. He’ll be able to get an internship to gain practical experience in his field.
He also won’t have to worry about breaking minor laws. My worst fear is landing in detention for something as simple as jaywalking. _I can’t imagine what that would do to my parents._
I also can’t really imagine a future in which I graduate with this amazing degree and am unable to do the work I’ve been trained to do. Someday, I even want to start my own business.
**But until we win permanent protections, my life and the lives of millions more will be put on pause — at the mercy of court case after court case.**
I’m fighting for permanent protections so that I can participate in American life as a community member, business owner, homeowner and voter. Not just after graduation — but permanently.
Congress has an opportunity to deliver, and with the future of DACA up in the air, it’s urgent that they act now.
**Peter, add a donation to help UWDA fight for permanent protections before it’s too late. Our communities deserve more.**

ICYMI: Truth from President Donald J. Trump
How many times did Chris Christie use the word SMALL? Does he have a psychological problem with SIZE? Actually, his speech was SMALL, and not very good. It rambled all over the place, and nobody had a clue of what he was talking about. Hard to watch, boring, but that’s what you get from a failed Governor (New Jersey) who left office with a 7% approval rating and then got run out of New Hampshire. This time, it won’t be any different!

Donald J. Trump June 6th, 2023
**Mar-a-Lago, FL—** In a new Agenda47 video, President Donald J. Trump announced his plan to address the sharp rise in chronic illnesses and health problems, especially among children.
“Every year, we spend hundreds of billions of dollars to treat these chronic problems rather than looking at what is causing them in the first place,” President Trump said. “Too often, our public health establishment is too close to Big Pharma—they make a lot of money, Big Pharma—big corporations, and other special interests, and does not want to ask the tough questions about what is happening to our children’s health.”

“If Big Pharma defrauds American patients and taxpayers or puts profits above people, they must be investigated and held accountable.”
Once President Trump returns to the Oval Office, he will establish a special Presidential Commission charged with investigating what is causing the decades-long increase in chronic illnesses.
President Trump will order the commission to then publish recommendations for how every American child can have a safe and healthy childhood.
**TRANSCRIPT**
In recent decades, there has been an unexplained and alarming growth in the prevalence of chronic illnesses and health problems, especially in children. We’ve seen a stunning rise in autism, auto-immune disorders, obesity, infertility, serious allergies, and respiratory challenges.
It is time to ask: What is going on?
Is it the food that they eat? The environment that we live in? The over-prescription of certain medications? Is it the toxins and chemicals that are present in our homes?
Every year, we spend hundreds of billions of dollars to treat these chronic problems rather than looking at what is causing them in the first place. Too often, our public health establishment is too close to Big Pharma—they make a lot of money, Big Pharma—big corporations, and other special interests, and does not want to ask the tough questions about what is happening to our children’s health. If Big Pharma defrauds American patients and taxpayers or puts profits above people, they must be investigated and held accountable.
When I am back in the White House, I will establish a special Presidential Commission of independent minds who are not bought and paid for by Big Pharma, and I will charge them with investigating what is causing the decades-long increase in chronic illnesses. I understand Big Pharma, I believe better than anyone else. I know where they’re coming from. And then, I will ask them to publish recommendations for how every American child can have a safe and healthy childhood.
This is a conversation that is long overdue—and it’s a conversation that American families deserve. American families must have this conversation, and they must have a leader—a president—who can do something about this problem. And I will do that.
Thank you.
