Meet Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c1c64625232c0b09b0682ba1b563ebe96052786a0b73ce0d51db5469968d29fa2faae2afabea3e59d4206771b20820c9773c6b834561ea197e68c018a6a4150e

A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.

Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom – even when it wasn’t popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
-
Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,
-
Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,
-
Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,
-
Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,
-
Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,
-
Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,
-
Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,
-
Protecting the unborn,
-
Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,
-
Expanding education freedom,
-
Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,
-
Lowering prescription drug costs,
-
Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,
-
Creating a universal school choice program,
-
Delivering record-breaking tax relief,
-
Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,
-
Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,
-
Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,
-
Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,
-
...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn’t stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican – as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind – when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue – Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.”

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
-
Record tax relief
-
ESG prohibitions
-
Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP
-
The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.
-
Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency
-
Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI
-
Improvements to our state’s infrastructure
-
Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists
-
The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis
-
Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions
-
Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida
No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

Today is the perfect day for you to join Team DeSantis. Make it official with a brand new DeSantis Republican shirt! We're ready for you to be loud and proud with us, friend. Are you? JOIN TEAM DESANTIS TODAY ORDER OUR GREATEST MERCH YET In Freedom, Team DeSantis ----------- Forwarded message ----------- From: Team DeSantis Date: June 7, 2023 at 1:51 PM EDT Subject: Now's the time to join Team DeSantis Friend, Ready to join Team DeSantis? We hope our latest merch may convince you. Here on Team DeSantis, we ask exactly what our donors want to see in the store—and we deliver. Whether out campaigning for Ron DeSantis for President or streaming campaign events from home, we've got our team covered with our latest merch release. We've got the message. We've got the mission. We've got the man. We've got the merch. Now we just need you, friend. Ready to join Team DeSantis? Visit our store! DONATE $15—GRAB YOUR WHITE KOOZIE! DONATE $15—GRAB YOUR NAVY KOOZIE! DONATE $34.47—GRAB YOUR SHIRT! In Freedom, Team DeSantis ⬇️ GET YOUR NAME ON THE WALL AT HQ ⬇️ Volunteer! We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today! Sign up here! Meet Ron DeSantis A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment. In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health. In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom – even when it wasn’t popular. Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities: - Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates, - Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities, - Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT, - Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable, - Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency, - Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation, - Turning Florida into a model for election integrity, - Protecting the unborn, - Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state, - Expanding education freedom, - Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities, - Lowering prescription drug costs, - Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable, - Creating a universal school choice program, - Delivering record-breaking tax relief, - Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership, - Supporting law enforcement and our veterans, - Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders, - Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court, - ...and so much more. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn’t stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican – as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind – when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue – Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.” Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: - Record tax relief - ESG prohibitions - Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP - The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. - Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency - Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI - Improvements to our state’s infrastructure - Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists - The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis - Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions - Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. Peter

I have a quick message for you today.

You know by now who my Mamaw is. She raised me to be the man I am today, and I wouldn't be anywhere near the United States Senate without her tough love and guidance.

**One thing I want you to know about Mamaw?**

_She didn 't exactly beat around the bush._

**You 'd know EXACTLY how she felt about the good, the bad, and the ugly.**

I'm carrying on that tradition, and friend, I promise I'll **NEVER** beat around the bush with you. There are too many folks who get to Washington and decide they're better than their constituents and that they're happy to sit back, relax, and collect a paycheck on the taxpayer dime.

That's not me, and you know why you can trust me?

**Because Mamaw would NEVER stand for anything less.**

I'd never lie to her, and I'll never lie to you; that is a promise.

clean_body: you heard it here first! | Peter I have a quick message for you today. You know by now who my Mamaw is. She raised me to be the man I am today, and I wouldn't be anywhere near the United States Senate without her tough love and guidance. One thing I want you to know about Mamaw? She didn 't exactly beat around the bush. You 'd know EXACTLY how she felt about the good, the bad, and the ugly. I'm carrying on that tradition, and friend, I promise I'll NEVER beat around the bush with you. There are too many folks who get to Washington and decide they're better than their constituents and that they're happy to sit back, relax, and collect a paycheck on the taxpayer dime. That's not me, and you know why you can trust me? Because Mamaw would NEVER stand for anything less. I'd never lie to her, and I'll never lie to you; that is a promise. Thank you, JD Vance Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: We Need Your Input on Ranked Choice Voting
body:
We need your voice and input to tackle this dangerous reform

| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zh38kbss82aqucnsrk0evu95a3ti2qnv18c1s5l0_rp22sh2s8i66o73chhm1p71cdh2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

As the President of The Heritage Foundation, I must urgently ask for your help in fighting against Ranked Choice Voting (RCV). This chaotic and confusing election "reform" is being pushed by mega-liberal donors and activists, threatening to disenfranchise voters and potentially elect marginal candidates without the support of a majority.

It's time to take a stand! We need your voice and input to tackle this dangerous reform that could wreak havoc on our electoral process.

**Please, take just a few minutes to complete our RCV survey by clicking the link below:**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/national-ranked-choice-voting-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zar2hma2m4kibpnksiurc0samrk4098k7t8k6h6g_rp22sh2s8i66o73chhm1p71cdh2bs)**

By participating, you'll be joining the battle to protect our democracy and ensure the integrity of our elections. After completing the survey, you'll receive a copy of our exclusive RCV fact sheet that lays out the shocking truth behind this controversial system.

Together, we can make a difference and preserve the democratic process that defines our great nation.

**[Let's take action against Ranked Choice Voting today!](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfmsb26sf00vgdleo02shdfa41qlbnvckfpqorl8_rp22sh2s8i66o73chhm1p71cdh2bs)**

Thank you for your passion for preserving our democracy.

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

American Defense News

name: Tennessee Three Alert (via DLCC.org)
subject: You, and two of the Tennessee Three
body:
Special elections are critical for chipping away at Republican power and flipping chambers nationwide – and you're a key part of how we win. | | |
---
| | **Here's why we're so focused on the upcoming special elections in Tennessee _right now:_** Earlier this year, Representatives Justin Jones and Justin Pearson of the Tennessee Three stood firmly against Republican inaction in the face of gun violence in the state – and in response, Republicans _expelled them from the House._ **Now, Reps. Pearson and Jones are running for their old seats, and they need our help to ensure Republicans don't stop them from rejoining the statehouse.** Not just that –
* Losing these races would show Republicans they can simply expel anyone who dares to speak out against them – a dangerous precedent some Republicans are already embracing!
* In states like New Hampshire, we've seen how Democrats in Republican-controlled states are stopping the worst of the GOP’s agenda, like abortion bans, anti-LGBTQ+ legislation, and more.
* We've won 18 special elections this year alone – and we can win these, too! But these victories only happened because people like _you_ chipped in $7, $25, or more at a time.**That's why it's so critical we have you on this team now.**

[Pitch in today to win upcoming special elections and elect state Democrats nationwide. clean_body: Special elections are critical for chipping away at Republican power and flipping chambers nationwide – and you're a key part of how we win. | | | | | Here's why we're so focused on the upcoming special elections in Tennessee right now: Earlier this year, Representatives Justin Jones and Justin Pearson of the Tennessee Three stood firmly against Republican inaction in the face of gun violence in the state – and in response, Republicans expelled them from the House. Now, Reps. Pearson and Jones are running for their old seats, and they need our help to ensure Republicans don't stop them from rejoining the statehouse. Not just that – Losing these races would show Republicans they can simply expel anyone who dares to speak out against them – a dangerous precedent some Republicans are already embracing! In states like New Hampshire, we've seen how Democrats in Republican-controlled states are stopping the worst of the GOP’s agenda, like abortion bans, anti-LGBTQ+ legislation, and more. We've won 18 special elections this year alone – and we can win these, too! But these victories only happened because people like you chipped in $7, $25, or more at a time.That's why it's so critical we have you on this team now. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | We'll only do this together – so thank you so much for all you do. name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: We Need Your Input on Ranked Choice Voting
body:
The Heritage Foundation is working to understand the impact of Ranked Choice Voting

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9dbd094c01334f5d94cbd342d7e3a3e5&_e=PIiYVFz0T9zPG1OgM6aY8AX-ln1C_GX-md5hDIc9e3Ybmq4q233n3NYuanlDMkJECMwCY630WcHVW4nL_vhbkJm7o7N0_h94xhTmdlanCGRBSyuL1L-jTBQaumdGYmCWEGiH52l2TXKmOsDXN7T076lW5cjyU5lCT6qfNQmRVsEpDh1RzP6xQFQXP0OmGWoV4lZABjVyLeM6P-RgCwygU3LBJpPXDnltVQs8giIbBW1Z44XoMHUgnzzHGgC-bQfMCwJX3m7WC31O5tFamECJxzTm-Q9Ghq-wg95Jg-TRL09y7tHxhCw_P0LrX1WYjTk4h6rxF7pDiSYgVB9t6ImHu7qykFo9F48X7O823tABUo-SLjFbD5a96jWraZUP3hn9)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

The Heritage Foundation is working to understand the impact of Ranked Choice Voting on our democratic process, and we value your input.

**Will you take a few moments to share your thoughts on Ranked Choice Voting and complete the survey by clicking the link below?**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/national-ranked-choice-voting-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9dbd094c01334f5d94cbd342d7e3a3e5&_e=PIiYVFz0T9zPG1OgM6aY8AX-ln1C_GX-md5hDIc9e3Ybmq4q233n3NYuanlDMkJECMwCY630WcHVW4nL_vhbkJm7o7N0_h94xhTmdlanCGRBSyuL1L-jTBQaumdGYmCWEGiH52l2TXKmOsDXN7T076lW5cjyU5lCT6qfNQmRVsEpDh1RzP6xQFQXP0OmGWoV4lZABjVyLeM6P-RgCwygU3LBJpPXDnltVQs8giIbBW0avpb9hTHm1FnUEK73thjCtkiyuhx-T7mTAVOIH1IBPxTJlNWKhwW3kMrZALBjVz68ICxkM92b3MP40gWmBq6g4akcKo2z1YWkhHoheh25tUAzGA9jfuaOn0tvbplQGqkDXLFfNnFS4UTyIfFEUtk9)**

By participating, you'll help contribute to an informed discussion on RCV and its potential effects on our elections. Once you complete the survey, you'll also receive a copy of our RCV fact sheet, which provides valuable insights into this controversial voting system.

Thank you for your time and for helping us create a better-informed America.

Best regards,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

Will you take a few moments to share your thoughts on Ranked Choice Voting and complete the survey by clicking the link below? By participating, you'll help contribute to an informed discussion on RCV and its potential effects on our elections. Once you complete the survey, you'll also receive a copy of our RCV fact sheet, which provides valuable insights into this controversial voting system. Thank you for your time and for helping us create a better-informed America. Best regards, Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D. President, The Heritage Foundation | | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002 Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

body:
It doesn't mean what you might think it means.
#
Derek —
There is a concerted effort to subvert the will of the voters and get Trump re-elected. But where it’s coming from might surprise you.
A few groups are organizing to promote an “independent” candidate for president, and the biggest one is “No Labels.” But a funny thing is happening here: If you look at their funding, a ton of it comes from right-wing sources — including Harlan Crow, who is Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas’ billionaire benefactor. And an “independent” candidate? It doesn’t mean what you might think it means.
All a third-party candidate will do is split the ticket between people who are voting against Trump — against authoritarian rule and abuse of power — and clear a path for him to retake the White House. That’s it.
We can’t let that happen. VoteVets is pushing back because we know the stakes. Four years of Trump was more than enough, and we are doing everything we can to prevent him from coming back.
But we need your help.
**[So, if you can afford it, $3 would go a long way. If that’s not the right amount for you, anything helps. We’ll put it to good use. VoteVets knows how to beat Trump — we made sure he lost in 2020 and we’ll do it again in 2024.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-june23.FJK9fc&refcode=em230607-1-15&t=1&akid=9816%2E3013755%2Eg8lyyk)**

name: Greta Kemp Martin
subject: Introducing myself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greta Martin for AG
body:
Peter,

My name is Greta Kemp Martin. I’m a nonprofit lawyer advocating for disability rights, a lifelong Mississippian, and I’m running to be Mississippi’s next Attorney General.

I was born and raised in Belmont, Mississippi, the daughter of a nurse and a police officer. My parents demonstrated the value of always giving back, and I knew before I even finished high school that I wanted to be there for those who needed a helping hand.

That’s why I pursued a career in law, and why I continue to choose to represent everyday people, not the corporations and special interests who have excelled off the backs of my neighbors. Now, I serve on the Mississippi Access to Justice Commission – a task force focused on bringing legal services to underserved communities in Mississippi.

I’ve dedicated my life and career to fighting for equity and growth for all Mississippians. And as Attorney General, I will champion progress and move Mississippi forward. Right now, the problems of everyday Mississippians are left to the wayside because our current Attorney General is out of touch with the lives we lead, and the solutions we desperately need. I’m running so that Mississippians have someone on their side in the Attorney General’s office.

I believe in Mississippi, and I will keep fighting for a better home for all Mississippians – but I can’t get to the Attorney General’s office to take on this work without your help. Will you join our team today?

CONTRIBUTE: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gkm-fr?refcode=EM_FR_230607SWOnboard_GKM_8_PT

Thanks so much for your support,

Greta

--

Greta Kemp Martin was born, raised, and educated in Mississippi. She is an active member of the Mississippi Bar, and currently works as the Litigation Director for Disability Rights Mississippi, the protection and advocacy agency for the state. As Attorney General, Greta will fight for the rights of everyday Mississippians, and stand up for the working people of this state.

DONATE TODAY: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gkm-fr?refcode=EM_FR_230607SWOnboard_GKM_8_PTbiobox&amount=25

Paid for by Greta Martin for AG
Greta Kemp Martin for Attorney General
PO BOX 16402
Jackson, MS 39236
United States

name: Firearms Policy Coalition
subject: How we’re stopping Biden’s most chilling gun grab yet >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Firearms Policy Coalition
body:
He’s coming for your guns, Friend...
---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://secure.firearmspolicy.org/om_don_fpc_base_20230605?utm_source=pistolbrace1&utm_medium=om&utm_campaign=om&utm_term=ftd&amount=25)
---
|
Friend,
The ATF and the Biden Administration’s most CHILLING attack on the Second Amendment yet? Making it a **_federal crime_** to have an “unregistered” pistol brace.
Something you’ve been able to have for over a decade...something that is protected by the Second Amendment...is about to **become a FELONY, Friend.**
**We stood up to stop them.**
**Firearms Policy Coalition (FPC)_took the ATF to court_...**and the Judge has issued an injunction that covers FPC members while we wage a full fight against this tyrannical agency and administration.
But **[we’ve got a long, expensive, and turbulent legal battle ahead of us](https://secure.firearmspolicy.org/om_don_fpc_base_20230605?utm_source=pistolbrace1&utm_medium=om&utm_campaign=om&utm_term=ftd&amount=25)** to defeat the ATF’s gun grabbing for good.
That’s why **[I’m hoping you’ll become a member of FPC](https://secure.firearmspolicy.org/om_don_fpc_base_20230605?utm_source=pistolbrace1&utm_medium=om&utm_campaign=om&utm_term=ftd&amount=25)** and strengthen our efforts to protect our Right to Keep and Bear Arms from Biden’s regime.
**[Here’s how you can become part of the strongest Second Amendment defense coalition fighting in America today>>](https://secure.firearmspolicy.org/om_don_fpc_base_20230605?utm_source=pistolbrace1&utm_medium=om&utm_campaign=om&utm_term=ftd&amount=25)** | | | | [HOW TO JOIN](https://secure.firearmspolicy.org/om_don_fpc_base_20230605?utm_source=pistolbrace1&utm_medium=om&utm_campaign=om&utm_term=ftd&amount=25)
---
The Biden White House, radicals in Congress, and the ATF **will not stop until they destroy the Second Amendment.**

They want you and your family **DEFENSELESS** against their radical expansion of tyranny.

FPC is the last thing standing in their way...but **we risk _losing the entire battle_ to save our fundamental and constitutional rights if we can’t count on your support right now.**

**[Please—join FPC as a member, and help be part of the organization that’s FINALLY making real progress to secure the Second Amendment.](https://secure.firearmspolicy.org/om_don_fpc_base_20230605?utm_source=pistolbrace1&utm_medium=om&utm_campaign=om&utm_term=ftd&amount=25)**
| | | [I’M IN](https://secure.firearmspolicy.org/om_don_fpc_base_20230605?utm_source=pistolbrace1&utm_medium=om&utm_campaign=om&utm_term=ftd&amount=25)
---
For years, **the Pro-2A movement has been under attack...**
* Anti-2A groups are **starting to come after everyday people...gun owners** like you and me,

* The corporate media **beams Anti-Firearm propaganda** directly into our homes,

* And radical politicians have become **increasingly emboldened to grab our guns...ALL of our guns.**

They didn’t count on FPC...on facing a Pro-2A coalition that actually fights BACK.

Like I said, **FPC is bankrolling this entire lawsuit to stop the relentless attacks on the Second Amendment and fundamental rights.** We’re stepping up because _no one else has and no one else will._

This injunction is **one of the biggest early victories we could have ever hoped for.** It’s a clear sign that we are on the right path to win this fight and finally turn the tide on the Anti-Rights tyrants.

But look: the ATF (and the federal government) has unlimited resources and they’ll throw everything they’ve got at this fight.

They’re hoping they can drag this costly lawsuit on for years...and force us to give up the fight altogether. **[Becoming a member of FPC _ensures_ we have the resources we need to see this fight all the way through to victory.](https://secure.firearmspolicy.org/om_don_fpc_base_20230605?utm_source=pistolbrace1&utm_medium=om&utm_campaign=om&utm_term=ftd&amount=25)**

Your fundamental right to self-defense and the Second Amendment hang in the balance. Do NOT stand on the sidelines, or you might as well just surrender your weapons to the ATF right now.

**[Are you with me...or with the gun grabbers? Prove you’re willing to FIGHT by joining FPC>>](https://secure.firearmspolicy.org/om_don_fpc_base_20230605?utm_source=pistolbrace1&utm_medium=om&utm_campaign=om&utm_term=ftd&amount=25)**
| | | [JOIN FPC](https://secure.firearmspolicy.org/om_don_fpc_base_20230605?utm_source=pistolbrace1&utm_medium=om&utm_campaign=om&utm_term=ftd&amount=25)
---
Thanks,
Firearms Policy Coalition

Paid for by the Firearms Policy Coalition.
Not Authorized By Any Candidate Or Candidate's Committee.

https://www.firearmspolicy.org/

---

[View this email in your browser](https://odb.nucleusemail.com/amplify/v/vak4RWFxbZ?hids=AyecDqlz)

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **Free Thinker Daily**

108 S Washington St. Suite 300 Alexandria, VA 22314

[**Unsubscribe**](https://odb.nucleusemail.com/amplify/subscriptions/unsubscribe?hids=AyecDqlz)

They’re hoping they can drag this costly lawsuit on for years...and force us to give up the fight altogether. Your fundamental right to self-defense and the Second Amendment hang in the balance. Do NOT stand on the sidelines, or you might as well just surrender your weapons to the ATF right now. | | | Thanks, Firearms Policy Coalition Paid for by the Firearms Policy Coalition. Not Authorized By Any Candidate Or Candidate's Committee.

name: News Alert via Courier Newsroom
subject: Tucker Carlson
body:
We watched so you don’t have to.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1076%2E120351%2EHIIhSE)
**Tucker Carlson is back, Peter.**
Yesterday, Tucker’s new show premiered on Twitter and it was everything you’d expect from him — chock full of misinformation, hateful language about transgender women, and talk of UFOs (yes, seriously).
Still, within hours of its release, the episode had over **_11 million views_**.
[**Tucker’s taking his powerful bad information campaign to Twitter — where our online-focused news teams are ready to fight back. If you believe in our mission to hold bad actors like Tucker Carlson accountable, will you chip in $5 now to support our work?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230607?refcode=em20230607&refcode2=1076_120351_HIIhSE&akid=1076%2E120351%2EHIIhSE)
**Peter, we watched Tucker’s show so you don’t have to. Here’s the gist:**
While his new show isn’t as splashy as his old Fox News segment, the bad information he spread was just as malicious.
Between racist dog-whistling and conspiracy theories, Tucker doubled down on the same kind of ‘news’ that made him famous at Fox. Except this time, he’s doing it on Twitter, a platform that has failed to rein in misinformation.
In Tucker’s own words,**‘We’re told there are no gatekeepers here.’**
That leaves us to hold bad actors like Tucker Carlson accountable, debunk the misinformation he spreads, and ensure we reach people all across the internet. But to do that, we rely on grassroots supporters like you to chip in what they can when they can.
[**Please help us keep up this important work by contributing $5 today:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230607?refcode=em20230607&refcode2=1076_120351_HIIhSE&akid=1076%2E120351%2EHIIhSE)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230607?refcode=em20230607&refcode2=1076_120351_HIIhSE&akid=1076%2E120351%2EHIIhSE)** Thank you,
Courier Newsroom
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=2&refcode2=1076_120351_HIIhSE&akid=1076%2E120351%2EHIIhSE)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1076%2E120351%2EHIIhSE)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

But to do that, we rely on grassroots supporters like you to chip in what they can when they can. Thank you, Courier Newsroom Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

name: Mike Pence
subject: I’m running for President of the United States
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Pence For President
body:
I believe that God and the Constitution must return to the forefront of our families, our communities and our government.

| |
---
| | | Friend, this is Mike Pence. Let me be the first to tell you I've officially launched my campaign for President of the United States. You can watch our full launch video here:
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z74am6act1j226418slcq6l7k8im7jcnd1e9btao_rp22sh2s8i66o73chjm0pr2c5h2bs)
---
| | | [JOIN TEAM PENCE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdt11q9bcq946sh4dc9gkbohv176vt5o0keadn78_rp22sh2s8i66o73chjm0pr2c5h2bs)
---
This is not a decision I came to overnight, Friend. It has taken years of prayerful consideration with my wife Karen and our family.

After many long nights and longer conversations, we came to this conclusion: Our nation is at a crossroads, and the decisions we make next will chart our nation's course for decades to come.

**I believe that God and the Constitution must return to the forefront of our families, our communities and our government.**
---
| | | [JOIN TEAM PENCE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo01n0ti0gjn1mv9905c2mkrdvfqo8t68e6ba8sg_rp22sh2s8i66o73chjm0pr2c5h2bs)
---
Growing up in Indiana, surrounded by God-fearing, hardworking Hoosiers, I always knew that I wanted to give back to the state and the country that had given me so much. During the Trump-Pence administration, I was able to take steps toward achieving that goal with conservative policies that put American families FIRST.

**But our work is far from over. **

Our values have never been under attack like they are today: from our schools, to our police departments, all the way to the car sitting in your driveway, Biden's White House and their far-left elitists have never been less connected to Americans' day-to-day lives, yet they have more say over what we do than ever before.

**Bottom line: America is in dire need of common sense leadership. From one God-fearing conservative to another, I 'm asking YOU to be a leading voice in our campaign to bring our country back to what it once was.**
---
| | | [JOIN TEAM PENCE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo6atbuqo9n0o1hchf4grlbi0d8rguhd6qc4sh8o_rp22sh2s8i66o73chjm0pr2c5h2bs)
---
_**[If you want to return to common sense, God-fearing leadership, then I ask that you make a $15 gift to our campaign today.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbqpeji9d2rdbss2gpg67b09da19gta2i09b3498_rp22sh2s8i66o73chjm0pr2c5h2bs "If you want to return to common sense, God-fearing leadership, then I ask that you make a $15 gift to our campaign today.")**_

If Bidenflation is hurting you too much to get involved financially, that's perfectly ok. I simply ask that you keep our campaign and everyone involved in your prayers - we're going to need it.

Thank you for your time, Friend, you'll be hearing a lot more from me soon.

God bless you and God bless America,
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjmdmn1u1s00orj5uiq5bgmuhpnkfgm4n2s5g8fo_rp22sh2s8i66o73chjm0pr2c5h2bs)
---
Mike Pence

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR AMERICA
body:
I'm going to tell the TRUTH. Will you join me and become a messenger for the power of our conservative ideas?

| |
---
| | | The radical Left is attacking the values that make America exceptional. But I know from experience that the principles of our conservative message prevail everywhere we take them.

That's why I've come to a conclusion: **_It 's time to go on offense!_**

**_[Will you help me share my conservative message with every American and STOP the radical Left from ruining our country?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cbb9989bac9b4a3381c9e6e15e6d71dc&_e=_APEscakaCWHu6WqxuTgeWP6uP9oZZiCMqbpLvN6sZu75T-KGIcc5MlfKm-dkdj3995MXrzhgQXxnk3yvJ950RvPUjWP_SW38eXeBnYImwxeVgxNEAbghKF7v_2Or3Tj2uM6sFXCflV8Ed5Dw175Bw5sj5gKxSnPmFSwNeRyJ8M5ZImmXh1eTgOyDbPMYAbrJSiqnpZmUz_rT3rlMCmWZjBHwvfvIP_KYzKGWMtjqF5uXbEqoajSwn5BFb94mPVESmCkCncRRlg1-LntGGY7kTAhvXZZJz3LoCsSGbJk89_mk89v7xEYruwK_nt5jshvxPCVH1FvVe6bIGikkJNKL4SgI8YBc5R_edbibCJM7gQYtiXnLNC44528PBjCW0yxLoS72-PJAb0556OI-L2m3aaNNxwJyP2mx4XuWhZiteG7rJFwBgVIEvPtAYbzzfk0VR-S-c48dwHFblMnSVEcSQ%3D%3D "Will you help me share my conservative message with every American and STOP the radical Left from ruining our country?")_**

---

---

The playbook is simple:
* I'll gladly talk face-to-face with those who disagree with me. I'll never back down in sharing my experience that America is the land of opportunity, not oppression.
* When the ladies of The View made some ignorant comments about me, I didn't hide. I went on set the very next week to have a constructive conversation.
* If we want to win back the White House in 2024 and lead America in the right direction, it's time for conservatives to go on offense with a winning message.
* I'm running for President because my life story and message give me the unique ability to win new converts to our cause.

**_[It's time to go on offense! Will you help me share my message and win over every American? Even as little as $7 will make a huge difference.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cbb9989bac9b4a3381c9e6e15e6d71dc&_e=_APEscakaCWHu6WqxuTgeWP6uP9oZZiCMqbpLvN6sZu75T-KGIcc5MlfKm-dkdj3995MXrzhgQXxnk3yvJ950RvPUjWP_SW38eXeBnYImwxeVgxNEAbghKF7v_2Or3Tj2uM6sFXCflV8Ed5Dw175Bw5sj5gKxSnPmFSwNeRyJ8M5ZImmXh1eTgOyDbPMYAbrJSiqnpZmUz_rT3rlMCmWZjBHwvfvIP_KYzKGWMtjqF5uXbEqoajSwn5BFb94mPVESmCkCncRRlg1-LntGGY7kTAhvXZZJz3LoCsSGbJk89_KyCut9kZ50x0rHxG4DWQn664pdcV7bqfktMbLgUopphxTkN3aiicpDIC0kIwE9Jbp3kL1H83hqei61e-clZcKFXGk76Ha_lFtvRMugFz0Q7iL-J9IAVpIkFRurFL0PGiiS53gtUKsJTz9a3htjDYBdP0XaUYkdeu9fjWeTJdmew%3D%3D "It’s time to go on offense! Will you help me share my message and win over every American? Even as little as $7 will make a huge difference.")_**

---
| | | [GO ON OFFENSE: BEAT THE LEFT](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cbb9989bac9b4a3381c9e6e15e6d71dc&_e=_APEscakaCWHu6WqxuTgeWP6uP9oZZiCMqbpLvN6sZu75T-KGIcc5MlfKm-dkdj3995MXrzhgQXxnk3yvJ950RvPUjWP_SW38eXeBnYImwxeVgxNEAbghKF7v_2Or3Tj2uM6sFXCflV8Ed5Dw175Bw5sj5gKxSnPmFSwNeRyJ8M5ZImmXh1eTgOyDbPMYAbrJSiqnpZmUz_rT3rlMCmWZjBHwvfvIP_KYzKGWMtjqF5uXbEqoajSwn5BFb94mPVESmCkCncRRlg1-LntGGY7kTAhvXZZJz3LoCsSGbJk89_uf1_Lpd_HceAVy4mhytNc_pwwe5fhwUiM_g4AEQ-7mpmL95Q0gBsDKMx6nNRR5q2MxO0zvOs5CtI_XfsaTnw22ahUXLH6bmwAH50zI1XE6VGzrIQcYDHwSCQKu8zq2JEILFXoGc_AEOFyMyKCE82_4FW9iFRHB7pQh0yKbur-dA%3D%3D "GO ON OFFENSE: BEAT THE LEFT")
---

I won't back down. You see, I was a running back in high school and college football. I only know how to go in one direction, **_forward!_**

I don't follow the rules of political correctness, but I can promise you one thing: I'm going to tell the TRUTH, **_that with freedom, hope, and opportunity, anything is possible in America._**

Let's go!

Fellow American, you may have heard other candidates promising to “drain the swamp,” but they never do.

_That's why I am different._

I am talking about America First 2.0 - taking America First further by doing it with first principles. **[Here are the policy commitments I would make on day ONE.](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=d06c138c2acc4ab7bd0c0d9b136f0575&_e=ClIkbrcvTx-GIH2zNJY3F25HDMA2rtRAnGkslouAl1zL2LU2LbXvSKnCOsvOWZZjoyHghH5YtPXW3qMujjKMXFJ8c1Ox_bc1WfrSBmdXTDB6LQNHtCDOK1FsMwxagjf2DXtJ2MwrujlZO83MW-Z14uLosnYwPDJR65osw3n3ryOu5XvwhaiRHxhYiYq5wHpDKkqwypqbL0cIA5V1Bav1dBaKwm6NGbSsVN3Di1IGHoA578HWhjkOTugCBTdyWxnZRzVS2NhD614yCM4_J3aUrAb8wFo3p7_9RCIXvnx4XXrNUe4C5YCe9_nsbr7rMJw8aqm4H9aBzZC-Xo_CQrfpMGDtGkQsihixNbun4UhjU6GGeVabPTght_emuqNi5cg4oE7ovnq7XHpXqnS5P3B1KQ%3D%3D)**

| [** JOIN THE AMERICA FIRST 2.0 MOVEMENT ->**](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=d06c138c2acc4ab7bd0c0d9b136f0575&_e=ClIkbrcvTx-GIH2zNJY3F25HDMA2rtRAnGkslouAl1zL2LU2LbXvSKnCOsvOWZZjoyHghH5YtPXW3qMujjKMXFJ8c1Ox_bc1WfrSBmdXTDB6LQNHtCDOK1FsMwxagjf2DXtJ2MwrujlZO83MW-Z14uLosnYwPDJR65osw3n3ryOu5XvwhaiRHxhYiYq5wHpDKkqwypqbL0cIA5V1Bav1dBaKwm6NGbSsVN3Di1IGHoB-9mgMN4cbUKWluY3Rru7yo4PO9tUpziH3VcdwnI1uoFcMQrAw5HWQOyoyp89INACCL2EooZojtYFkj4A_iRo9F3WMjis5xppGIhYiORAs8hYOFFjcQmVYQCXGtk-qE-OWCMiwrhU3K5rJEUMPag90xfn0twpzG0bjt73K-zhJvw%3D%3D)

America First didn't start in 2016. It started in 1776. Putting America First requires moral authority, not just vengeance and grievance. I am promising:

* **Reviving American national identity.** From securing our borders to ending cultural extremism, we need to recognize that our country is better when we identify as Americans - not by artificial labels
* **Revitalize the American economy again.** Bring back American energy independence, American jobs for American citizens, and stabilize the dollar.
* **Holding China accountable for their American intellectual property theft and awful human rights violations.** The China-Russia alliance is the #1 threat to American security.
* **Truly dismantle the bureaucracy in DC.** Reform and rebuild governmental agencies and transform waste into a balanced budget.
* **Finally end the weaponization of the Federal Government.** From the DOJ to the FBI, taxpayers should not be funding politically motivated attacks on individuals and undermine the entire political process.

[** FIGHT FOR THE FUTURE OF OUR COUNTRY ->**](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=d06c138c2acc4ab7bd0c0d9b136f0575&_e=ClIkbrcvTx-GIH2zNJY3F25HDMA2rtRAnGkslouAl1zL2LU2LbXvSKnCOsvOWZZjoyHghH5YtPXW3qMujjKMXFJ8c1Ox_bc1WfrSBmdXTDB6LQNHtCDOK1FsMwxagjf2DXtJ2MwrujlZO83MW-Z14uLosnYwPDJR65osw3n3ryOu5XvwhaiRHxhYiYq5wHpDKkqwypqbL0cIA5V1Bav1dBaKwm6NGbSsVN3Di1IGHoAu4pqcsGz8uA856ntay33u7YW4QaxlTaT4hUZjoo8WWyp5jOMwUO0vellT2NdeESTgE2IofZwjkBKw1On_i5F6thS47XtuqFGANMb3yI23gEHKQnpflUCWDJminqdvEMWGnbjrDJBeOw1QIKSUQbdfnGARlubgFpgFWB5exIWXlA%3D%3D)
---

Fellow American, I cannot emphasize enough how important a return to American values will correct the course our country is heading in. America First wasn't my idea - it was our founding fathers.

Years of inaction and unfulfilled promises from the liberal left have changed the landscape of the country - **[but with your support, we will take the vision back. Whether it's $1, $5 or $25, help continue to bring home the America First ideals we cherish.](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=d06c138c2acc4ab7bd0c0d9b136f0575&_e=ClIkbrcvTx-GIH2zNJY3F25HDMA2rtRAnGkslouAl1zL2LU2LbXvSKnCOsvOWZZjoyHghH5YtPXW3qMujjKMXFJ8c1Ox_bc1WfrSBmdXTDB6LQNHtCDOK1FsMwxagjf2DXtJ2MwrujlZO83MW-Z14uLosnYwPDJR65osw3n3ryOu5XvwhaiRHxhYiYq5wHpDKkqwypqbL0cIA5V1Bav1dBaKwm6NGbSsVN3Di1IGHoBw4m1XoyXhVxqkXbzvaZvLv-wNLwHvEsDtT-YoaVGGyL07sLEINkMaLw-ODkATnHn0XJRk4t2unlF52cy1Gr46NsSQ3hidp2-A6UJxGi7T1Fu9tLcAAvGSDGsUjQ1AU_tBdN4Kh0NQT_2JKceozC3wnWJogcM4DoDG0cmytNnAGw%3D%3D)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: I am the outsider Washington DC hates. They know I will bring meaningful change and dismantle the system that has brought this country down. | | Fellow American, you may have heard other candidates promising to “drain the swamp,” but they never do. Putting America First requires moral authority, not just vengeance and grievance. I am promising: Reviving American national identity. From securing our borders to ending cultural extremism, we need to recognize that our country is better when we identify as Americans - not by artificial labels Revitalize the American economy again. Bring back American energy independence, American jobs for American citizens, and stabilize the dollar. Holding China accountable for their American intellectual property theft and awful human rights violations. The China-Russia alliance is the #1 threat to American security. Truly dismantle the bureaucracy in DC. Reform and rebuild governmental agencies and transform waste into a balanced budget. Finally end the weaponization of the Federal Government. From the DOJ to the FBI, taxpayers should not be funding politically motivated attacks on individuals and undermine the entire political process. Fellow American, I cannot emphasize enough how important a return to American values will correct the course our country is heading in. America First wasn't my idea - it was our founding fathers. name: Sign the petition (Left Action)
subject: Sign: Tell CNN to stop letting Republicans get away with lies — including Pence tonight!
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Tell CNN: "Don't let Mike Pence get away with lies tonight”](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7080881b-3f80-4d44-9c6a-2dbb170e5896/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T07d0312a-9b10-4655-87ee-328d679d5a33/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | CNN is holding a presidential town hall **tonight** with Mike Pence, who will answer questions and no doubt tell bald-faced lies. As he has been for years, in spite of his fake folksy facade. **[CNN needs to call him out on these lies in real time.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9be6cfa1-db75-45d1-8aeb-4a0ffc95e0bb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) To his face. In plain words that he understands. They've done a lousy job with other Republican candidates so far, and we need to demand they do better.** CNN shouldn't be holding this event at all, given all the damage that Pence helped enable Trump to do. But if they're going to do it, and give Pence air time, they need to push back hard on his lies -- and call them lies. Not weasel words ("difference of opinion", "disagreement", etc). And they need to do it in real time. [**Add your name, and tell CNN: "Don't let Mike Pence get away with lies tonight!" **](https://default.salsalabs.org/T84389c54-f692-48e4-ade9-56407e16854b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0e93f993-98f7-4730-ad8f-48061fa98fa3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action _[P. S. - if you no longer wish to receive updates, use the unsubscribe link below]_

| Peter,

We hope this email finds you well. I am reaching out to express our gratitude for your incredible support of Fight for Progress.

Thanks to donors like you, we have fueled the campaigns of dedicated Democrats in key battleground states across the nation. Your generosity makes a tangible difference in our mission to reclaim the House from Kevin McCarthy's control and safeguard our Democratic majority in the Senate.

What's truly remarkable is that we are achieving all of this with an average donation of just $13. This is a testament to the power of grassroots movements and the unwavering dedication of individuals like you.

Your commitment to our cause inspires us every day, and we are immensely grateful to have you on our team. Together, we drive positive change and shape a future that reflects our shared values.

**Finally, I want to remind you that June marks the last month before our crucial FEC public fundraising deadline.[_Even a small contribution of $5 can help us send a strong message to Republicans and demonstrate our unwavering determination. Will you join us once again and donate $5 today?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64475000/410197779/-316521012?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230607-2-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZkZTQ1ODJkLTU3MDUtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=scnSRZcaD44KW4QwMZxImvgp7nUTMmKcyBu16MiNq1E=)**

Dear Peter, Today’s Democratic Party is the party of **human trafficking and cartels.** This is a result of **open border policies** that **Tim Kaine has fought so hard** to keep in place. Hillary Clinton spent her **entire corrupt career pushing this disastrous open border agenda,** and Tim Kaine was **right there beside her** every step of the way. That’s why**Hillary chose Tim Kaine** to be her running mate. They’re in **lockstep** on every issue. Meanwhile, **fentanyl is killing Americans** in the hundreds of thousands and **cartels maintain operational control** of the border. **_We have an actual crisis on our hands._** Tim Kaine has been in Washington for **nearly 30 years** , and this is the result.

clean_body: | | | Dear Peter, Today’s Democratic Party is the party of human trafficking and cartels. This is a result of open border policies that Tim Kaine has fought so hard to keep in place. Hillary Clinton spent her entire corrupt career pushing this disastrous open border agenda, and Tim Kaine was right there beside her every step of the way. That’s whyHillary chose Tim Kaine to be her running mate. They’re in lockstep on every issue. Meanwhile, fentanyl is killing Americans in the hundreds of thousands and cartels maintain operational control of the border. We have an actual crisis on our hands. Tim Kaine has been in Washington for nearly 30 years , and this is the result. Title 42’s expiration has opened the floodgates at the border like we’ve never seen before. Biden and Mayorkas – with the help of Tim Kaine’s assistance in the Senate – have brought us to the brink of this disaster. We need to stop the cartels, finish the border wall and protect our sovereign land. All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=416651210f184b67accb3cef9cb1e8ec&_e=dhYsBEMVqolsFoYFaMSr9sQYW0RznowiOXtDrsUtVAFrxje5SjwXBC488r_N9ZzeBHacJEUz-gCrAQs28DCj4jUt8lk70LGNqJj7oocl6CIqzV2KieYy6N7fanGBRI6RW9XGqBaqz5GvJ7a07W32bjawTi8dXBpD4VNCbshSQazg7ICgnSKlQJXAAbxelAgIp1jCnHS7NulwQWogCo7RiqJE9Y3vk3CUL3asXZNdt2t1UBJcu7OhHhrOmIpIVzoqJ3SOBYTcpNZ2-jOdHuD2t64QRbItf3SLLa8JAo2dLyqzWuBbjP6PL-7E3lV6vkn6)

_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=416651210f184b67accb3cef9cb1e8ec&_e=dhYsBEMVqolsFoYFaMSr9sQYW0RznowiOXtDrsUtVAFrxje5SjwXBC488r_N9ZzeBHacJEUz-gCrAQs28DCj4jUt8lk70LGNqJj7oocl6CIqzV2KieYy6N7fanGBRI6RW9XGqBaqz5GvJ7a07W32bjuBx_UDrv_ZCg6l5kxV7ltRuHz0AwVLqAkPYHnseF4bQRuMqDfLH125j2pW2-wmit3G7_pWw3nKDF1pJX4RaUohkz-yx3b36uCOQHNrfvVZtXWeziqIi1lGbU__ciqiVw5jqN0TLLmA2jxEhWhUfSBZ__IN38PaR2CEbySNvPwF)
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=416651210f184b67accb3cef9cb1e8ec&_e=dhYsBEMVqolsFoYFaMSr9sQYW0RznowiOXtDrsUtVAFrxje5SjwXBC488r_N9ZzeBHacJEUz-gCrAQs28DCj4jUt8lk70LGNqJj7oocl6CIqzV2KieYy6N7fanGBRI6RW9XGqBaqz5GvJ7a07W32bkc6EkokUUt_e2R4eIhjFBz4c-EKSyehphbh8M9pa6p5aufZ0rGz_vpcEeaBKqT2BpXkNwaRPcVbAs49zek1d_fc1JT-f1CcdldcAR9Q_162nGfuCyIdLXqQ61YFB446nCDtb2E7RW09bvEdBAitTbZIqUFIn3AfdnEDndk5LO2A)

I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=416651210f184b67accb3cef9cb1e8ec&_e=dhYsBEMVqolsFoYFaMSr9sQYW0RznowiOXtDrsUtVAFrxje5SjwXBC488r_N9ZzeBHacJEUz-gCrAQs28DCj4jUt8lk70LGNqJj7oocl6CIqzV2KieYy6N7fanGBRI6RW9XGqBaqz5GvJ7a07W32bvfypbbhTe0o4hsXyu0kY1nwAwWVbXXMKXqy1NiHSzboa5pcGK_WbqfMXFDCP4OHIk96OVn5Wl1dKxRmaSpmBN2mxT6aFqis8VH4fdKRTPn7bfGholr-J-z7QR7ZSpr6cxLNAdBPe0aMit6WJlZEfmGMUVAN0BtWfr8qk6MbjSZY) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left's college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=416651210f184b67accb3cef9cb1e8ec&_e=dhYsBEMVqolsFoYFaMSr9sQYW0RznowiOXtDrsUtVAFrxje5SjwXBC488r_N9ZzeBHacJEUz-gCrAQs28DCj4jUt8lk70LGNqJj7oocl6CIqzV2KieYy6N7fanGBRI6RW9XGqBaqz5GvJ7a07W32bhXjDuYlkcK4UCWHxIavi8VJzXza1b2QQ0ILO_wJqwUTh9OI74xONk_C1qkzfQ2K22hI1vJqL9t9Qra-Q-vOTHEiVKfRNJafbnlGbkEBu-HS0jl73F6JgkmwszkkMj2kA7kLS3i5JWJGhnYI4ZJrY3_kFZFahfMmqjPdZcNR6g74)

body:

And in America, we’ve made some of the greatest tech advancements in the world. _But while some technology saves lives, today our major corporations are using technology to silence conservatives like you and me._ A select group of CEO’s shouldn’t be patrolling what we can say and who we can talk about, Fellow American. _That’s why it’s time to take a stand._ [**Do YOU think big tech has gotten too powerful in America?**](http://links.electsalazar.com/u/click?_t=efb87ae1dcc34914b1524d5a4e324c41&_m=45ffb8ecfe7b469ca55bf15fdbee1855&_e=o6pnZXQ05JKHYUhr1JuZap9Hqb7MQUoQ0QRHafks2S5S38djbwFgjScCvqvjPZ3YEKZ7BVu0SnLOGaOCtYpSnT0Usk-KJa4DwHfJzFgMLn7eIas5fQgrlZIvrlyA-vBjW2gaU0vbjIhqBaCc0C61r6KSvFhVh7_zJVH3bxOicAKExWzIEPPYJxrivD8e6rEIFI5lvmdKGtcJI4-Hksofeqh9KeNwGywUNQJqZfjvImk3lvLkbtjJ9QeKlsk-Nh7mJHet1Ig230bsDqHDURzIjBrD2wH6Orn_w8604ZqxHR17-l9Q-n5uFeppb1f0LmKe_AgKaP2pbuw890Iibz4T4vAfqCmP_PIqj5g-QfALjiIy41YEi_UTABZD1wi03hbF)

Team – June is National Gun Violence Awareness Month, and we’re honoring it by fighting for legislative change to end gun violence.

The American people _overwhelmingly_ support gun violence prevention measures like universal background checks, red flag laws, and safe storage requirements. It’s time for Congress to pass what Americans want.

**These weapons of war must get off our streets and out of our communities. It’s just common sense.**

[**That’s why Greg is leading the charge in Congress to pass these desperately needed measures. If you are able, will you chip in to power Greg’s efforts in Washington?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64475607/410199641/1921099384?refcode=em_fr_2023.06.07_b1_tl_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTI0OWU2Ny01OTA1LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rRaM5776f_4IE9UfRByTay-81e30nIgL4doHSHRnMdc=)

When Greg heard about the children murdered in the elementary school shooting in Nashville, he had one gut response: **“Ban these f---ing weapons.”**

He knows it’s time for policy and change, not just thoughts and prayers.

But as we know all too well, hundreds of Republican lawmakers disagree.

**To pass meaningful gun safety legislation and protect our children, it’s critical that we elect lawmakers committed to ending gun violence.**

[**But to do that, we need to re-elect every gun safety advocate in Congress – including Greg. name: American Update
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.

This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668912%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=07OozmSPqKxoxWnZ3S3K8g&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668913%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3PgPzjogzKNGlqjySBqgnA&sysid=1) For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668913%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3PgPzjogzKNGlqjySBqgnA&sysid=1) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

American Update
---

clean_body: It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;” Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 American Update 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Team DeSantis
subject: We will NEVER back down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
We're too strong for their attacks

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4ecs7j1ak7ch7qksgugovn04tjlkin1chjcsvfo_rp22sh2s8i66o73chjmcob2clh2bs)
---

Friend,

Our team is used to attacks from legacy media and the woke Left. When Gov. Ron DeSantis tells you he won't back down, that's a **PROMISE**.

_Did you see how they tried to shout him down in South Carolina?_
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8qv7e4dr0csf4hu6rrg1agru64nakmd74jav6ng_rp22sh2s8i66o73chjmcob2clh2bs)
---
| | [TAKE A STAND - FIGHT BACK TODAY!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z20i77mjhqnh1n0f727c50raf2cu6evsrugkv1so_rp22sh2s8i66o73chjmcob2clh2bs)
---
Governor DeSantis is standing up for the protection of our children. Our team will **ALWAYS** fight against those who seek to rob them of their innocence. On that point, there will be **no compromise.** We will never surrender to woke ideology, Friend. **[Join Governor Ron DeSantis and our team today--let's show them our strength and stand up for our kids.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoff1ia8bngiteo8pl10r1odps7iq9jnp3pr31r0_rp22sh2s8i66o73chjmcob2clh2bs "Join Governor Ron DeSantis and our team today—let's show them our strength and stand up for our kids.")**

In Freedom,
Team DeSantis

---
**⬇️Get your name on the wall at HQ⬇️**

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zru0fugvac7cpq9m2l6n6p6pb4offet2ou0bpm50_rp22sh2s8i66o73chjmcob2clh2bs)
---

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvl3ihscq87ud1g5kieudvld7c7k712a6g0svfqo_rp22sh2s8i66o73chjmcob2clh2bs)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
