name: Derek Kilmer
subject: I stand in solidarity with the LGBTQ+ community
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
There is still work to be done:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64476106/410201262/-2027002553?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjM2NGM0MTMtNWIwNS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tsayQgput5wG4K3YlfanAjrWBeIeUdrzugCz-C2UGbY=&emci=fcdabec2-cd03-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=6364c413-5b05-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)

Happy Pride Month, Peter!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64476110/410201264/-2117006263?ms=em23_230605_pride_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&refcode=em23_230605_pride_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&source=em23_230605_pride_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230605_pride_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=VNQAh3/8OId5i0/EuaoqGp5vyjv5IF9WA8ZhLdNOn9bErZVtbPwF4kTIGuy8PHU09UdeXfiEz60HxAGhwNbdRBn7WjFSkech13vjs5nyX3EjwPElgN52XONmFeYYhwxEBVDAG4vuwhxp1pfyxrHEfAYVfV23K9mYS32vhVUbR7g=&refcode2=6364c413-5b05-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjM2NGM0MTMtNWIwNS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tsayQgput5wG4K3YlfanAjrWBeIeUdrzugCz-C2UGbY=&emci=fcdabec2-cd03-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=6364c413-5b05-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)
Together, we are working toward creating a society where everyone is treated with dignity, respect, and equality — no matter their identity or who they love. And in the spirit of this Pride Month, it's crucial we recommit ourselves to defending the rights of all LGBTQ+ Americans.

Since a Republican-led state legislature in Florida passed a discriminatory "Don't Say Gay'' bill last year, many new copy-cat bills have followed, **including state legislatures introducing a record 540+ anti-LGBTQ+ bills — with over 220 bills specifically targeting transgender and non-binary people. Already, 45 anti-LGBTQ+ laws have been enacted so far this year.**

I want to make one thing perfectly clear, Peter: I stand firmly against these hateful and terrible laws and actions, and I know that you share my conviction. These attempts to silence and marginalize the LGBTQ+ community are not isolated incidents; they are attacks on the progress we have fought so hard to achieve.

We need to call attention to these ongoing attacks on the LGBTQ+ community. We can't allow bigotry and discrimination to tarnish the principles of equality and justice that our nation was built upon.

This Pride Month, I am honored to continue fighting alongside the LGBTQ+ community and allies, not only in June — _but every single day._ It is our collective responsibility to ensure that the rights and safety of ALL Americans are protected, regardless of their sexual orientation or gender identity.

**[I hope you'll join me in demonstrating your solidarity with the LGBTQ+ community by sending a powerful message to those who seek to undermine the progress we have made. Sign our petition today. Together, we will amplify our voices and push for meaningful change.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64476113/410201267/-2117006263?ms=em23_230605_pride_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&refcode=em23_230605_pride_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&source=em23_230605_pride_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230605_pride_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=VNQAh3/8OId5i0/EuaoqGp5vyjv5IF9WA8ZhLdNOn9bErZVtbPwF4kTIGuy8PHU09UdeXfiEz60HxAGhwNbdRBn7WjFSkech13vjs5nyX3EjwPElgN52XONmFeYYhwxEBVDAG4vuwhxp1pfyxrHEfAYVfV23K9mYS32vhVUbR7g=&refcode2=6364c413-5b05-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjM2NGM0MTMtNWIwNS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tsayQgput5wG4K3YlfanAjrWBeIeUdrzugCz-C2UGbY=&emci=fcdabec2-cd03-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=6364c413-5b05-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64476118/410201269/-2117006263?ms=em23_230605_pride_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&refcode=em23_230605_pride_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&source=em23_230605_pride_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230605_pride_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=VNQAh3/8OId5i0/EuaoqGp5vyjv5IF9WA8ZhLdNOn9bErZVtbPwF4kTIGuy8PHU09UdeXfiEz60HxAGhwNbdRBn7WjFSkech13vjs5nyX3EjwPElgN52XONmFeYYhwxEBVDAG4vuwhxp1pfyxrHEfAYVfV23K9mYS32vhVUbR7g=&refcode2=6364c413-5b05-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjM2NGM0MTMtNWIwNS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tsayQgput5wG4K3YlfanAjrWBeIeUdrzugCz-C2UGbY=&emci=fcdabec2-cd03-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=6364c413-5b05-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)
---

I know with your voice in this movement, we can build a future where love, acceptance, and equality are not only celebrated but **protected.**

With gratitude and determination,

Derek

Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.

Derek,
Did you know that a donation of just $3 could help change the state of this race?
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230607-1?amount=3&refcode=EMAI07_1_THR_20230607_V1_F&refcode2=24340_3422442_DQ8_jB&akid=24340%2E3422442%2EDQ8_jB)

Three recent polls show Katie with a slight lead among voters. She’s also the only candidate in this race who doesn’t accept corporate PAC or federal lobbyist money.
**This puts our campaign at a disadvantage,** and to be honest, we’re falling behind financially to those in this race who _have_ accepted corporate PAC and federal lobbyist money.
As a grassroots campaign, we rely on individual donors like you chipping in what you can afford. And even if it feels like $3 can’t make a difference, we promise you it all adds up.
Katie has won tough elections before with this grassroots team, and we know we can do it again with your help.
**Just imagine if every person reading this email contributed just $3—we’d easily catch up to our opponents financially, if not surpass them.**
**[So what do you say—can you chip in just $3 today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230607-1?amount=3&refcode=EMAI07_1_THR_20230607_V1_F&refcode2=24340_3422442_DQ8_jB&akid=24340%2E3422442%2EDQ8_jB)**

name: David Trone
subject: I want to talk to you on the phone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Trone for Maryland
body:
Hi there,

My priority as a Member of Congress and as a candidate for the Senate is hearing from YOU.

And as you know friends, I’ve been sending you lots of issue surveys because your perspective is the most important to me.
I know a lot of politicians say that, but I genuinely mean this.

That’s why I’m wondering if I can give you a call. There’s nothing quite like a person-to-person conversation about the challenges Marylanders face, so if you share your phone number, I may just give you a quick buzz. I want to hear directly from YOU. >> https://secure.ngpvan.com/YH5djIGK1kyJI48LM8xw8Q2

SIGN UP >> https://secure.ngpvan.com/YH5djIGK1kyJI48LM8xw8Q2

Your opinion and perspective on issues is invaluable in shaping effective policies. So, thank you!

– David Trone

name: AdamSchiff.com
subject: Re: Republicans may vote to censure me tonight…and might have the votes to pass it
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2433%2E5257348%2EpryudG ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, Adam just
shared a critically important message about Republican attempts to censure
him — the vote could be coming as soon as tonight and we need to be ready
to respond.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jun2023_abs_em.FUvtzW&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC30_20230607_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2433%2E5257348%2EpryudG ]Rush a $10 donation to support Adam before the Republican majority
votes to censure and fine him millions of dollars for standing up to
Donald Trump’s egregious abuses of power.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

This is breaking news,
Derek:

MAGA Republican Anna Paulina Luna just announced on former Trump advisor
Steve Bannon’s podcast that her resolution to censure and potentially fine
me $16 million could come to a vote tonight in the House of
Representatives — with the support of House Speaker Kevin McCarthy.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jun2023_abs_em.FUvtzW&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC30_20230607_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=2433%2E5257348%2EpryudG ]MAGA Rep. Anna Paulina Luna sitting beside Steve Bannon on his show

Luna: “Tomorrow we will be taking the vote to censure him and potentially fine
him.”

Bannon: “And that has the backing of leadership.”

Luna: “Yes, we’re working on the bill right now.”

Bannon: “Great work. Fantastic...The Shifty Schiff thing tomorrow is gonna be
historic.”

Luna: “Yeah, he’s gonna go down as a liar. As he should.”

I need this team’s support to help us fight back immediately against this
false and defamatory effort to punish me for investigating Donald Trump’s
egregious abuses of power and impeaching him. Please chip in $10 or
whatever you can spare:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

If this vote proceeds and Republicans succeed in censuring me, it will be
one of the most blatantly authoritarian measures that they have taken yet,
meant to crack down on any dissent.

I took on Trump and impeached him, obtaining the first bipartisan vote to
remove a president in history. Now, MAGA Republicans are exacting
political revenge by trying to censure and fine me millions of dollars —
because they believe I have been too effective in exposing their
corruption.

The authors of the Big Lie seek to condemn me for telling the truth. And
the precedent this would set for the House of Representatives and
constitutional representation would be disastrous: That the majority party
can intimidate and silence any member that’s willing to stand up to a
corrupt president and defend our democracy.

back and respond ahead of tonight’s likely vote.

Defending our democracy is a big part of the reason I’m running for the
U.S. Senate — and why they want to stop me. They hope Donald Trump is
again our president and they can run roughshod over anyone who gets in the
way. We are going to make sure that never happens.

| | Save Virginia, Save America Weekly Roundup
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| | The campaign to save Virginia and save America continued this past week with an overwhelming Team Emord victory in the first test of the primary season, the LCRC Straw Poll for the U.S. Senate race; with an interview on the Robert Scott Bell Show; with an article for Townhall.com entitled, “Brace for Impact: DOE Is About to Unleash Sexual Assault on Girls and Women;” and with a Team Emord appearance at the Mason Community Arts Academy’s AFYP Advanced Acting Showcase production of Beauty and the Beast at George Mason University in Fairfax, Virginia.
---
| | |
---
| | Straw Poll Results
---
| |
---
| |
---
|
---
| | On June 2, at the Loudoun County Summer Jamboree in Purcellville, the first U.S. Senate Straw Poll for Virginia was conducted by the Loudoun County Republican Committee. Team Emord prevailed, winning by triple digits, over a field of 8 candidates. Team Emord won the straw poll with over 61% of the vote!
---
| |
---
| | Jonathan Emord received 144 votes. The party next in line received only 41 votes and all others were in the low double or single digits. That resounding victory is a testament to the grassroots strength of Team Emord and to its commitment to save Virginia and save America from the ravages of socialism, woke indoctrination, insecure borders, and rampant inflation. We are determined to overcome all obstacles to freedom and progress. Team Emord lieutenants Cheri, Larry, Brett, Jennifer, and Jolie Fox; Marilyn and Ron Heiner; Bonnie Fite; Chris and Vince Cavaleri; John and Christy Pulsipher; Fawn; and Phuong Steckler and her entire family are indispensable leaders in this campaign to restore America to greatness.
---
| | |
---
| | On June 1, I appeared on the Robert Scott Bell Show to discuss the break the bank Biden budget and the failure of Congress to achieve true debt reduction despite a gargantuan $31 trillion dollar debt.
---

clean_body: The campaign to save Virginia and save America continued this past week with an overwhelming Team Emord victory in the first test of the pri | | Can't see this message? | | | | | | Save Virginia, Save America Weekly Roundup | | | | | | | The campaign to save Virginia and save America continued this past week with an overwhelming Team Emord victory in the first test of the primary season, the LCRC Straw Poll for the U.S. Senate race; with an interview on the Robert Scott Bell Show; with an article for Townhall.com entitled, “Brace for Impact: DOE Is About to Unleash Sexual Assault on Girls and Women;” and with a Team Emord appearance at the Mason Community Arts Academy’s AFYP Advanced Acting Showcase production of Beauty and the Beast at George Mason University in Fairfax, Virginia. | | | | | Straw Poll Results | | | | | | | On June 2, at the Loudoun County Summer Jamboree in Purcellville, the first U.S. Senate Straw Poll for Virginia was conducted by the Loudoun County Republican Committee. Team Emord prevailed, winning by triple digits, over a field of 8 candidates. Team Emord won the straw poll with over 61% of the vote! | | | | Jonathan Emord received 144 votes. The party next in line received only 41 votes and all others were in the low double or single digits. That resounding victory is a testament to the grassroots strength of Team Emord and to its commitment to save Virginia and save America from the ravages of socialism, woke indoctrination, insecure borders, and rampant inflation. We are determined to overcome all obstacles to freedom and progress. Team Emord lieutenants Cheri, Larry, Brett, Jennifer, and Jolie Fox; Marilyn and Ron Heiner; Bonnie Fite; Chris and Vince Cavaleri; John and Christy Pulsipher; Fawn; and Phuong Steckler and her entire family are indispensable leaders in this campaign to restore America to greatness. | | | | | On June 1, I appeared on the Robert Scott Bell Show to discuss the break the bank Biden budget and the failure of Congress to achieve true debt reduction despite a gargantuan $31 trillion dollar debt. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | On a personal note, I want to share with you what we did as a family on June 3 and 4. On those days, we were accompanied by seventy Team Emord lieutenants, and we watched Angelica Emord perform in the lead role of “Belle” in Mason Community Arts Academy’s AFYP production of Beauty and the Beast at George Mason University. She was outstanding! | | | | See you on the campaign trail, Jonathan | | | | | | | | | | | | | PRESS RELEASE Veteran constitutional and administrative attorney Jonathan Emord announced today he is a candidate for the U.S. Senate in 2024. | | | Get our latest updates | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Share on social | | | | You've received this email because you are a subscriber of . name: =?utf-8?Q?James=20O=E2=80=99Keefe?=
subject: Their final attack on me . . .
body:
14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt. | | | | | Support LG! 14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt. | | | | | [](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=4b9904da61&e=84ee529f47)
[](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=21be7d8d95&e=84ee529f47)
Dear Patriot,

Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

You’ve seen my work. Most Americans have.

In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me.

It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I’m unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and **no one to stop me.**

Since I was fired, I’ve chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. **And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned.**

Those 14 years were formative.

When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle.

I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership.

Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan’s quote on leadership: “Winning has a price. **And leadership has a price**.”

I’ve been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, **yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded.**

In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me.

And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That’s why I’m writing you today to **[ask for your support to my legal defense fund.](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=9950ff548c&e=84ee529f47)**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=840738f325&e=84ee529f47)** that will quickly pile up.

As I mentioned, this isn’t my first rodeo so I know that **the cost will exceed $500,000**.

Good attorneys aren’t cheap, and my pockets are not deep.

No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me.

That’s where you come in. **[Will you chip in and help me defend myself](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=87ad2f24da&e=84ee529f47)?**

When you do, I’ll be following up as the case progresses but I’ll also keep you informed of the great work I’m doing at OMG . . . and it’s exciting!

A fresh start, being forced to start over, I’ll admit is thrilling. And I’m starting armed with all of the lessons I’ve learned to avoid the pitfalls I’ve experienced.

Me and my teams are more efficient, we’re more productive, and our work hits like a sledgehammer.

But my work will be silenced if my former employer gets their way. Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming.

Patriot, **[I’m asking you to STAND UP FOR ME, so I can keep working](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=0b6af7a8e9&e=84ee529f47)**. And I’ll commit to you that **I will NOT let you down**.

So please, **[make a donation to my legal defense fund through Liberty Guard](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=25c89a08a1&e=84ee529f47)**. We have a long way to do to hit our goal, so please, donate as much as you can.

Patriot, thank you for your direct or indirect support over the years. Your views, donations or simply talking about my work to friends and family has kept me going for 14 years . . . **and we cannot stop now!**

Respectfully,

James O’Keefe

P.S. I have 20 days to file my response to the lawsuit. I have to raise enough money to pay for a retainer and cover the legal work to defend against this lawsuit. This is unfortunately urgent so please, **[donate today](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=7f215d4220&e=84ee529f47)**.

subject: Beshear’s Immoral Crusade

body:
| | | [](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/5a0070a694040fef/bbf15d686397a684c3d6b838967d376c/40933)
---
Friends, It’s absolutely shocking how out of step Andy Beshear is with Kentucky values. Fox News reported this resurfaced photo of Beshear proudly posing with the “Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence,” an anti-Christian hate group that attacks people based on their faith.
---
[](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/5a0070a694040fef/242f9a07a380068ec3d6b838967d376c/40933)
---
[**CHIP IN FOR A GOVERNOR WITH KENTUCKY VALUES**](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/5a0070a694040fef/bb39e7dd7f209febc3d6b838967d376c/40933)
---
**Read my full statement to Fox News: ** "This is just another example of how out of touch Andy Beshear is with our values. He’s the governor of Kentucky, not California, the fact that he would host an anti-Christian hate group that makes fun of people of faith is disqualifying for public office. And this November, he’s going to have plenty of free time to hang out with those people, but it won’t be in the state capitol."
---
[**RUSH $25 TO FIRE ANDY BESHEAR**](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/5a0070a694040fef/881a44722562c556c3d6b838967d376c/40933)
---
With each passing day, the situation in the governor's office in Frankfort grows more dire. This campaign isn’t about me. It’s about our families, our children, and their future in a Commonwealth that embraces the values we hold dear. **Kentucky cannot afford four more years of Andy Beshear and his support for radical groups like this that hate us for our faith. ** [_**I humbly ask for your support as we fight to restore morality to the governor's office.**_](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/5a0070a694040fef/87758abc930f6997c3d6b838967d376c/40933) For Kentucky, Daniel Cameron

name: Team Beshear
subject: New poll
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
Derek, this is
big. Republican polling firm Cygnal just released a brand new poll
claiming this race for Kentucky governor is TIGHT:

Governor Andy Beshear: 46.8%
Daniel Cameron: 46.7%

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2071?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20230607_FR_Beshear_0_3MO_TeamBeshear_AndyBeshear_NA_Beshear&t=1001&akid=6279%2E1827488%2EAOhMXB ]Donate →

And we should treat it that way.

In Kentucky, governor’s races are often very close. Andy won by just 5,136
votes in 2019. That’s why we are building the largest organizing program
in the state’s history, and we couldn’t be prouder of our key advantage:
YOU.

But they also tipped their hands about their strategy, admitting that

name: American Defense News
subject: How should we elect the President?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdr07j14abtc6g6q5pggco6ltc2jukcu8gogkmr0_rp22sh2s8i66o73chjmaoj2chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztfh0159h65ldq9e7ffp7v0m1avbnpmr4glm3kn8_rp22sh2s8i66o73chjmaoj2chh2bs) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zpreugamstc3n065nqa4u0tu8lr5e2udhr4abi9o_rp22sh2s8i66o73chjmaoj2chh2bs) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

American Defense News

Team, attacks on our reproductive freedom keep coming all across the country.

In just the last few weeks, lawmakers in North Carolina, South Carolina, and Nebraska have implemented new restrictive bans on reproductive care, furthering decimating access for millions more Americans. These bans are just the latest in a long line of attacks on our right to choose after _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned last year, and we can’t sit on the sidelines right now.

Make no mistake – GOP politicians aren’t going to let up on assaults on our reproductive freedom. That’s why it’s imperative that we implement federal protections to protect access to reproductive care, no matter your zip code.

We have to fight back _**now**_ , and Nikki’s doing just that. She’s working every day in the House to ensure that the right to choose is protected nationwide, but she needs a strong team standing with her. name: Your America
subject: Former Home Depot CEO issues dire warning for Americans
body:
Something strange is happening in our financial system.

| Dear Reader, Something strange is happening in our financial system. According to analysts at UBS, more than 50,000 retail locations could shut their doors in the months ahead. Already, Walmart, Foot Locker, Bed Bath & Beyond, and Macy’s are cutting stores. And former Home Depot CEO Bob Nardelli recently issued a grim warning:
> “We’re going to see a lot of bankruptcies. [This is] different than anything I have seen in my 52 years...”
What does it all mean for your family and your money? Dr. Nomi Prins has dug deeper into the research, and she’s found something startling. Amid all the turmoil predicted by Nardeni and UBS, Prins has found a single firm that could be the canary in the coal mine foreshadowing the next major crisis in America. All it takes is one look at this troubling chart to see why - [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25823%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=e22uqzau8QUZQTFmz8xfWQ&sysid=1) Dr. Prins says:
> ** “This chart tells you everything you need to know about the next crisis in America. In short, what we’re about to see is a currency crisis - but not the kind of currency crisis most folks expect. This firm - along with many others - will almost certainly go bankrupt as a result.” **
According to Dr. Prins, our money is about to change forever... and the overhaul is set to happen in just a few weeks. To help folks prepare, she’s recorded a briefing that explains all the details of what she calls a ‘reset’ to our financial system. In it, she lays out all the evidence of this currency crisis, and what you can do to prepare. [Click here now to see her full (and free) presentation.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25824%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1nFFZGAEIRF782lkEoBUUA&sysid=1) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar transformations to our money, folks who failed to prepare were blindsided. But those who moved their money beforehand had the opportunity to multiply their nest-egg as a result. [Click here to see why.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25835%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RQCKsoYSvaSeGS1MYBB%2fGg&sysid=1)

clean_body: Something strange is happening in our financial system. | Dear Reader, Something strange is happening in our financial system. According to analysts at UBS, more than 50,000 retail locations could shut their doors in the months ahead. Already, Walmart, Foot Locker, Bed Bath & Beyond, and Macy’s are cutting stores. And former Home Depot CEO Bob Nardelli recently issued a grim warning: “We’re going to see a lot of bankruptcies. [This is] different than anything I have seen in my 52 years...” What does it all mean for your family and your money? Dr. Nomi Prins has dug deeper into the research, and she’s found something startling. Amid all the turmoil predicted by Nardeni and UBS, Prins has found a single firm that could be the canary in the coal mine foreshadowing the next major crisis in America. All it takes is one look at this troubling chart to see why - Dr. Prins says: “This chart tells you everything you need to know about the next crisis in America. In short, what we’re about to see is a currency crisis - but not the kind of currency crisis most folks expect. This firm - along with many others - will almost certainly go bankrupt as a result.” According to Dr. Prins, our money is about to change forever... and the overhaul is set to happen in just a few weeks. To help folks prepare, she’s recorded a briefing that explains all the details of what she calls a ‘reset’ to our financial system. In it, she lays out all the evidence of this currency crisis, and what you can do to prepare. Regards, Maria Bonaventura Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics P.S. The last time we saw a similar transformations to our money, folks who failed to prepare were blindsided. But those who moved their money beforehand had the opportunity to multiply their nest-egg as a result. Your America News Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: The Expanded Child Tax Credit (CTC), passed as part of President Biden's American Rescue Plan in 2021, lifted 50% of children below the poverty line out of poverty. Let me say that again: 50%.
body:
Republicans wanted to cut this program entirely
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfec6a736-88f3-42b9-81c3-bd1bd0ffd3b1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **The Expanded Child Tax Credit (CTC), passed as part of President Biden's American Rescue Plan in 2021, lifted 50% of children below the poverty line out of poverty. **_Let me say that again: 50%._ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb5b3e3fd-2284-43fe-b9ac-1c394fc470bd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _An incredible anti-poverty, pro-family, pro-child & pro-middle-class policy._ _So what did Republicans--who claim to be the saviors of children and families do as soon as they got the chance? They eliminated it, of course. _ **_Now Democratic Congress members are sponsoring the American Family Act, to make the incredible Child Tax Credit, a permanent tax credit._** [**_A key group that fought for the Child Tax Credit successfully in the past, and will tell the stories of working people to help get it passed again, is More Perfect Union. They ensure that the stories of working people and policies that help working people, such as the CTC, are told in the media. Will you join us in giving More Perfect Union $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to fight to make the Child Tax Cut permanent?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T89db4726-b87f-4ef1-b07f-2bb59fa8e0b1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for standing up for American families._ Cliff

| | |

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T09c56482-efe8-4d77-b7cf-c2b34009d2e5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: We Need Your Input on Ranked Choice Voting
body:
This chaotic and confusing election "reform" is being pushed by mega-liberal donors and activists, threatening to disenfranchise voters and potentially elect marginal candidates without the support of a majority.

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ziglf9hijtl6q7jtg2plft3cpa7ddqjdleejthbo_rp22sh2s8i66o73chjm6p36cdh2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

As the President of The Heritage Foundation, I must urgently ask for your help in fighting against Ranked Choice Voting (RCV). This chaotic and confusing election "reform" is being pushed by mega-liberal donors and activists, threatening to disenfranchise voters and potentially elect marginal candidates without the support of a majority.

It's time to take a stand! We need your voice and input to tackle this dangerous reform that could wreak havoc on our electoral process.

**Please, take just a few minutes to complete our RCV survey by clicking the link below:**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/national-ranked-choice-voting-survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3ttro9j8v4j68c19a7b0fnb39meej6gk9oe3as0_rp22sh2s8i66o73chjm6p36cdh2bs)**

By participating, you'll be joining the battle to protect our democracy and ensure the integrity of our elections. After completing the survey, you'll receive a copy of our exclusive RCV fact sheet that lays out the shocking truth behind this controversial system.

Together, we can make a difference and preserve the democratic process that defines our great nation.

**[Let's take action against Ranked Choice Voting today!](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdp4ret2u7o0vfcuhkvrei0q5b72jemqrkjd9vg0_rp22sh2s8i66o73chjm6p36cdh2bs)**

Thank you for your passion for preserving our democracy.

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

Fellow Democrats,

Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas and his close family received **two decades of lavish trips and gifts** from GOP mega-donor Harlan Crow. Yet Thomas neither disclosed most of these gifts nor recused himself from cases where his “friend’s” interests were before the Court.

Nearly two months after _ProPublica_ brought the first of this corruption to light, Thomas has not resigned, and the GOP still refuses to support holding Thomas accountable or establishing a firm code of conduct for the Court.

**Defending the corrupt is just part of a game to the GOP.**

Yet Thomas neither disclosed most of these gifts nor recused himself from cases where his “friend’s” interests were before the Court. Nearly two months after ProPublica brought the first of this corruption to light, Thomas has not resigned, and the GOP still refuses to support holding Thomas accountable or establishing a firm code of conduct for the Court. All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7c31af5b0dbc4a30abcdf9a42f5581ad&_e=90il3y4CT33dhyZ-OwF3uKi8hXLEiuqxf19ur9PQ64J227i7SPHCog6cYWCZNF586f-xXDi6y3x5UBCid73HvRHWgeyyKg5wS7nlII8tA_Wo4eJ1jlbR18YvvLQQSyCu6vHPvb02wh9nEaMzd1CWRCOUAK48i97tORKwZlmoXonUZxxVJ1OozLHR2wJqWLVI4I8iGV5MGtv4tq7jyFc4hXLw5l2m_LC9qM3K-OvcsWmxS4MjFNBeoht6xtIoma9e_0hc6vDHvACH9DqbTRUVLYHvrQsQ3paXyKF4oryQ5Lc%3D)

_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7c31af5b0dbc4a30abcdf9a42f5581ad&_e=90il3y4CT33dhyZ-OwF3uKi8hXLEiuqxf19ur9PQ64J227i7SPHCog6cYWCZNF586f-xXDi6y3x5UBCid73HvRHWgeyyKg5wS7nlII8tA_Wo4eJ1jlbR18YvvLQQSyCu6vHPvb02wh9nEaMzd1CWRGgzHsUr1kV0YyTlx8tY0ZkHiACa1JTj_n211dYo7j1Saydqgf-xm9Vd-J5te2xfYk_sdhFZ01O_J4tlmK3inb35O2eoee3wYjs7rKg2rMCf16vIeWRKwfM0UID68fzTKpJNCTmmb6GLgndaehghpcA%3D)

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7c31af5b0dbc4a30abcdf9a42f5581ad&_e=90il3y4CT33dhyZ-OwF3uKi8hXLEiuqxf19ur9PQ64J227i7SPHCog6cYWCZNF586f-xXDi6y3x5UBCid73HvRHWgeyyKg5wS7nlII8tA_Wo4eJ1jlbR18YvvLQQSyCu6vHPvb02wh9nEaMzd1CWREl-in9UtWa_TqQiIy18O5BmeeilOOvKaE6xXy65Gc9yi6H5441R5LDK2mFlunbljPirO9hN_3Ow8xSMq4Ga3lMHL4yIRfRo87bVEWkysfHJaVucuLd27njlK9J8ujHtrEP-0WjelzdcX0uR_2q9PwM%3D)

I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7c31af5b0dbc4a30abcdf9a42f5581ad&_e=90il3y4CT33dhyZ-OwF3uKi8hXLEiuqxf19ur9PQ64J227i7SPHCog6cYWCZNF586f-xXDi6y3x5UBCid73HvRHWgeyyKg5wS7nlII8tA_Wo4eJ1jlbR18YvvLQQSyCu6vHPvb02wh9nEaMzd1CWROHEj1PIrcLjZvsVwQJUgWO4YWPaPs3KCSqefgPQ4c7IiFamByWbDXLP1Vp-3If6I8JGIxbNxObMMy5QjJivWjUymVoKcBNwgA-wrr_Cb9B0tpSkKs3ylBdYcKT0Dw1FuMT2tAne8W51L0vryuchzSs%3D) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left's college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7c31af5b0dbc4a30abcdf9a42f5581ad&_e=90il3y4CT33dhyZ-OwF3uKi8hXLEiuqxf19ur9PQ64J227i7SPHCog6cYWCZNF586f-xXDi6y3x5UBCid73HvRHWgeyyKg5wS7nlII8tA_Wo4eJ1jlbR18YvvLQQSyCu6vHPvb02wh9nEaMzd1CWRM0ha04Hxudzqm3QWqT2Erc_RR2DjVETWtYfQS8C7y--A0WhIpr6QrP8kpoK6rgwborPnDZ-uhLbJ0xdUdZQrQkRsFJWMrhoCzkQhkxQ3kv2n-qkld20Rn0y_lFU_kS30uAkmEObqBljSYM85A_jpR8%3D)

name: Nevada Polling Alert (via Bob Casey)
subject: Slipping behind
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=128%2E552475%2Ej673-w)
Peter, this is urgent: **_A new poll shows Jacky 2 points down_****– in a race that everyone from** _FiveThirtyEight_**to** _TIME_**reports could decide Senate control.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230607-1?refcode=em20230607-1&refcode2=128_552475_j673-w&akid=128%2E552475%2Ej673-w)
After Nevada's last Senate race clinched the majority for Democrats and came down to less than 1% of the vote, Mitch McConnell and the GOP are coming after Jacky as a**top target** so they can finally flip this battleground red.
**With Senate control at stake and polling neck and neck, Jacky is one of the most vulnerable senators in the country. She needs your immediate grassroots support to fight back, surge ahead, and win.**

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: Take Action Against Ranked Choice Voting NOW!
body:
This chaotic and confusing election "reform" is being pushed by mega-liberal donors and activists, threatening to disenfranchise voters and potentially elect marginal candidates without the support of a majority.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6615pjendr29r9kgisf3hp4l8oukfd3de1sdlk0_rp22sh2s8i66o73chjmeo32cjh2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

As the President of The Heritage Foundation, I must urgently ask for your help in fighting against Ranked Choice Voting (RCV). This chaotic and confusing election "reform" is being pushed by mega-liberal donors and activists, threatening to disenfranchise voters and potentially elect marginal candidates without the support of a majority.

It's time to take a stand! We need your voice and input to tackle this dangerous reform that could wreak havoc on our electoral process.

**Please, take just a few minutes to complete our RCV survey by clicking the link below:**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/national-ranked-choice-voting-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhodht49ughn19pka3euq1sachaq2j2oarggioe8_rp22sh2s8i66o73chjmeo32cjh2bs)**

By participating, you'll be joining the battle to protect our democracy and ensure the integrity of our elections. After completing the survey, you'll receive a copy of our exclusive RCV fact sheet that lays out the shocking truth behind this controversial system.

Together, we can make a difference and preserve the democratic process that defines our great nation.

**[Let's take action against Ranked Choice Voting today!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4eumh8h2909rlb7088q5dn5muimkn463of87euo_rp22sh2s8i66o73chjmeo32cjh2bs)**

Thank you for your passion for preserving our democracy.

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

American Action News

name: Kash Patel
subject: New J6 Choir song with Donald Trump
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zibl2hr7rstput68ev6iv3kboar83ogt3a45iko0_rp22sh2s8i66o73chjmeo32cjh2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zc31b17i8684a2c8k4b9eoua1v184t9utkt8fk3g_rp22sh2s8i66o73chjmeo32cjh2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4q2eopfc4r28bddejavpv86s3je70ibivrivl3g_rp22sh2s8i66o73chjmeo32cjh2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _“deadly insurrection.”_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It’s time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

Is the America you see today, Peter, the America you envisioned?

Is this the end of faith, patriotism, hard work, and ideals that this great nation was founded on?

_Not if I have anything to say about it._ I am on a mission to save the country that allowed me to achieve the American Dream. I was born and raised in Cincinnati, Ohio, to immigrant parents who came to this country the right way, legally, and with little money. Through hard work, I graduated from Harvard and then earned my JD from Yale Law. I went on to build multi-billion dollar businesses, which created jobs and developed lifesaving medicines. **[Now, I am running for President of the United States.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=efdf66b93c3146c492fb0f673005e461&_e=1YgmuzwDryc3KtivimtF9AIHUMLPDSdupX5x1TBlth-FFTISjP0M5SowLkMihLAKrqw7FkGBmLZg8vr8NVn3q8NxbjhLb3t0DsJkZysb5D_8VVO541oZd2CODHdgTj7ARpFnUmo74WKbZYn-nUrXyvqvhqK3tk_3orchXWw67KG5PViVyu0r_VTJEcdG2Iv449Xi6juG9iahov9_gchqy6m8bCj7V-D6P1Fu0SeN8BVDsggVlsSJC-WoYqkTHR2ZC6tgHm9vdNdxz0xg6j99k01rq2uWsON5ZuV7ZnY7ooqJ2RZwPxjZ6diGj7MR7VRmfgQ6lTxfAaV4G_TGiEYES4Sg9Ns1KKvsK9sGVqku-Ro6Q-pjvt0rC34-Ev05qAPfdNAmiuU_uogj_ZxB2CcXqg%3D%3D)**

The American Dream is still alive. We can still save it. Neighbor to neighbor, ally to ally, and patriot to patriot. **We need to act now.**

**And that's why I am running for President of the United States.**

The past three years under Joe Biden and the liberal left have been a disaster. The left has driven their agenda based on divisive politics, aggressive degradation of our culture, and lack of responsibility for future generations. In response we must:

| [** RESTORE BELIEF IN MERIT **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=efdf66b93c3146c492fb0f673005e461&_e=1YgmuzwDryc3KtivimtF9AIHUMLPDSdupX5x1TBlth-FFTISjP0M5SowLkMihLAKrqw7FkGBmLZg8vr8NVn3q8NxbjhLb3t0DsJkZysb5D_8VVO541oZd2CODHdgTj7ARpFnUmo74WKbZYn-nUrXyvqvhqK3tk_3orchXWw67KG5PViVyu0r_VTJEcdG2Iv449Xi6juG9iahov9_gchqy6m8bCj7V-D6P1Fu0SeN8BVDsggVlsSJC-WoYqkTHR2ZaCFn37Und59ZLrI9DzG65iloK1irkDja-bj0V4o_RhSL-E4cQ0hIchD-2PZ_6tXb1P6IsvAZoDh5qv7T_x9Jd_Z7fvKsf9T-TZJYQ1fHpHHYoMSDCZYbGxIH4DwaFJV_01S6msnltt5AVFPnI1kWog%3D%3D)

Peter, if these ideals resonate with you, you're an American patriot. We're ready to fight for the future of America - because if we don't, we may truly lose our identity. If we can unite through the radicalism of the ideals that bound us together 250 years ago, the Dream for this country isn't over.

**[Will you join me? Please take just a few minutes to watch my launch video- and join Team Vivek by chipping in $1 or even $5 today as I continue my presidential campaign.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=efdf66b93c3146c492fb0f673005e461&_e=1YgmuzwDryc3KtivimtF9AIHUMLPDSdupX5x1TBlth-FFTISjP0M5SowLkMihLAKrqw7FkGBmLZg8vr8NVn3q8NxbjhLb3t0DsJkZysb5D_8VVO541oZd2CODHdgTj7ARpFnUmo74WKbZYn-nUrXyvqvhqK3tk_3orchXWw67KG5PViVyu0r_VTJEcdG2Iv449Xi6juG9iahov9_gchqy6m8bCj7V-D6P1Fu0SeN8BVDsggVlsSJC-WoYqkTHR2Zl1rhSErl6DlrqpGQy6VSG0nevULqyHUd_2RrT9HSGP-CT_7V68LcnA0bzBl0VyTK08AOoiywmiuXTnjeC2C7Yp5ijOZtpIUVShGbD8JyOwoSH1dkbmMBMsQD29JDdUec1r5ENiVVdSg-apVVXFyiwg%3D%3D)**

Peter, it's time to stand up to the ruling party in America. Obsessing over race and group identity will divide us. My presidential campaign is designed to elevate you, not the federal bureaucracies that would otherwise silence you. **[Join me in fighting for and taking back the American Dream.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=efdf66b93c3146c492fb0f673005e461&_e=1YgmuzwDryc3KtivimtF9AIHUMLPDSdupX5x1TBlth-FFTISjP0M5SowLkMihLAKrqw7FkGBmLZg8vr8NVn3q8NxbjhLb3t0DsJkZysb5D_8VVO541oZd2CODHdgTj7ARpFnUmo74WKbZYn-nUrXyvqvhqK3tk_3orchXWw67KG5PViVyu0r_VTJEcdG2Iv449Xi6juG9iahov9_gchqy6m8bCj7V-D6P1Fu0SeN8BVDsggVlsSJC-WoYqkTHR2Z65-LxihU6TjNTSa0D5ic8nLpUR0vvAw5LNHR3B3U4bSaxeFjLXe8xGOCyHR93ik0aGte7_qVyDvVc_46618HpXno2n41uFDPtKDdJE4lgZxm3bL3ggkcMy5PtJbJMN5YhBuRRrgcKklILIJs8L2rqw%3D%3D)**

Thanks,

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: If you're going to stand out, you might as well be outstanding. | | Is the America you see today, Peter, the America you envisioned? Is this the end of faith, patriotism, hard work, and ideals that this great nation was founded on? Not if I have anything to say about it. I am on a mission to save the country that allowed me to achieve the American Dream. I was born and raised in Cincinnati, Ohio, to immigrant parents who came to this country the right way, legally, and with little money. Through hard work, I graduated from Harvard and then earned my JD from Yale Law. I went on to build multi-billion dollar businesses, which created jobs and developed lifesaving medicines. The American Dream is still alive. We can still save it. Neighbor to neighbor, ally to ally, and patriot to patriot. We need to act now. And that's why I am running for President of the United States. The past three years under Joe Biden and the liberal left have been a disaster. The left has driven their agenda based on divisive politics, aggressive degradation of our culture, and lack of responsibility for future generations. In response we must: | Peter, if these ideals resonate with you, you're an American patriot. We're ready to fight for the future of America - because if we don't, we may truly lose our identity. If we can unite through the radicalism of the ideals that bound us together 250 years ago, the Dream for this country isn't over. Peter, it's time to stand up to the ruling party in America. Obsessing over race and group identity will divide us. We are Americans and the ideals that founded this country 250 years ago, still exist today. Your voice deserves to be heard. My presidential campaign is designed to elevate you, not the federal bureaucracies that would otherwise silence you. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Five months, Peter.

We are exactly five months away from Election Day in Mississippi. Not just any Election Day. **It's the most competitive election in recent memory.**

And we’ll need to use every available tool and resource at our disposal to rally people to the polls in November.

**I'm talking phone calls, volunteers, TV ads, digital media, and everything in between.** [Here's where I need your help. Can you donate just $5 right now to get our message out to voters?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64486641/410212475/-1470085607?amount=5&refcode=ea.e6df9e78-6305-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.e6df9e78-6305-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTZkZjllNzgtNjMwNS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=X46dfQ2dYgH5Nqy6Uh4i1KpmVN5Fj_aT2zwwSn4uSgs=) We have the chance to fire one of the most unpopular governors in the nation. Tate Reeves had a head start in this race with a fat war chest thanks to his special interests and wealthy pals. As if that's not enough, he recently announced he’s dropping **over $1 million** on a TV ad campaign throughout the month.

clean_body: Every dollar counts. | = Five months, Peter. We are exactly five months away from Election Day in Mississippi. Not just any Election Day. It's the most competitive election in recent memory. And we’ll need to use every available tool and resource at our disposal to rally people to the polls in November. I'm talking phone calls, volunteers, TV ads, digital media, and everything in between. = We have the chance to fire one of the most unpopular governors in the nation. We also have the chance to finally clean up corruption AND focus on improving the lives of the incredible folks in our state. But we can’t achieve this vision if we don’t outwork our opponent every single day between now and the election. Now, I get it. November seems far off, but trust me, these next five months will fly by. The sooner we can invest in our resources to reach voters, the more impact we'll have. And right now, we need every dollar we can get. Tate Reeves had a head start in this race with a fat war chest thanks to his special interests and wealthy pals. As if that's not enough, he recently announced he’s dropping over $1 million on a TV ad campaign throughout the month. The bottom line is we can't afford to drop the ball, Peter — not during this make-or-break moment for our campaign. = | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = God bless, Brandon Presley = | | = = Follow along: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign Brandon Presley Campaign P.O. Box 208 Nettleton, MS 38858 Click here to _

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: We Need Your Input on Ranked Choice Voting
body:
the impact of Ranked Choice Voting on our democratic process

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcdqomp5f1n7oaett3qccp1c8r4ppjsibk018cko_rp22sh2s8i66o73chjmep72cph2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

The Heritage Foundation is working to understand the impact of Ranked Choice Voting on our democratic process, and we value your input.

**Will you take a few moments to share your thoughts on Ranked Choice Voting and complete the survey by clicking the link below?**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/national-ranked-choice-voting-survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0cpeadon42074r32kk45stcto3oml7a3l6k7n50_rp22sh2s8i66o73chjmep72cph2bs)**

By participating, you'll help contribute to an informed discussion on RCV and its potential effects on our elections. Once you complete the survey, you'll also receive a copy of our RCV fact sheet, which provides valuable insights into this controversial voting system.

Thank you for your time and for helping us create a better-informed America.

Best regards,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

name: Jessica Hamilton, Evergreen Action
subject: FWD: Add Your Name: Cut Climate Pollution from Power Plants
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN COLLABORATIVE
body:
Did you see this?
| | | | | Friend, did you see this message from Charles last week? Over 7,100 people have already sent a comment to EPA on power plant pollution rules, and **our goal is to submit 10,000 this month.**[**Can you help get us there?**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/EPA-clean-up-climate-pollution/?source=ema_2023_06_07_111rules_comments&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=100clean&utm_source=email2023_06_07&t=2&akid=13373%2E53494%2ECM4cvf) We've been preparing for this opportunity to cut climate pollution from power plants for a long time—and now's your chance to speak up!
---
[**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/EPA-clean-up-climate-pollution/?source=ema_2023_06_07_111rules_comments&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=100clean&utm_source=email2023_06_07&t=4&akid=13373%2E53494%2ECM4cvf)
---
Sincerely, Jessica HamiltonDeputy Digital DirectorEvergreen Collaborative \---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Charles Harper, Evergreen Collaborative** Date: Fri, May 26, 2023
Subject: Add Your Name: Cut Climate Pollution from Power Plants
---
| |
---
|
---
| | **The time to cut climate pollution from power plants is now. ****Tell EPA to rapidly finalize the strongest possible limits.**
---
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/EPA-clean-up-climate-pollution/?source=ema_2023_05_26_111rules_comments&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=100clean&utm_source=email2023_05_26&t=6&akid=13373%2E53494%2ECM4cvf)
---
| | Friend, The climate crisis is here, impacting our families and communities, and the U.S. is not on track to cut climate pollution fast enough. But President Biden's long-awaited proposed rules for power plants are out—and if they’re strengthened, they could make a huge difference (think **90 percent reductions** in emissions from certain power plants). Unfortunately, the rules don't cover the majority of fossil fuel power plants, and don’t require the plants that are covered to act fast enough. Science demands these rules go further, faster. [**Call on EPA to strengthen the rules.**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/EPA-clean-up-climate-pollution/?source=ema_2023_05_26_111rules_comments&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=100clean&utm_source=email2023_05_26&t=7&akid=13373%2E53494%2ECM4cvf)
---
[**SEND YOUR COMMENT**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/EPA-clean-up-climate-pollution/?source=ema_2023_05_26_111rules_comments&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=100clean&utm_source=email2023_05_26&t=9&akid=13373%2E53494%2ECM4cvf)
---
We'll deliver your comments directly to the decision makers at EPA. These new climate pollution standards for power plants can be the most effective tool the Biden Administration has to fight the climate crisis, but the rules don’t go far enough—and Big Polluters are going to do all they can to keep spewing carbon pollution into our atmosphere and our communities. No matter where we come from, we all want healthy communities and a climate-safe future for our families, and **these rules are our best chance to tackle climate pollution from power plants before Biden’s first term is over. This is your opportunity to ensure they use it.**
---
[ADD YOUR VOICE NOW](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/EPA-clean-up-climate-pollution/?source=ema_2023_05_26_111rules_comments&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=100clean&utm_source=email2023_05_26&t=11&akid=13373%2E53494%2ECM4cvf)
---
Sincerely, Charles Harper Senior Policy Lead, Power SectorEvergreen Collaborative
---
|
---

name: Team Engel
subject: Help us defend LGBTQ+ rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Friend —
Right now, LGBTQ+ rights are under attack across the country — including here at home in Arizona.
In this year alone, Republicans in the Arizona Senate passed multiple anti-LGBTQ+ bills, attacking drag performers, trans people, and young kids struggling with their identities.
Kirsten Engel believes that no one should be punished for who they love or how they identify. We should celebrate our diversity, not try to destroy it.
https://secure.ngpvan.com/thumxNdITUmxEhdRL24goA2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/thumxNdITUmxEhdRL24goA2]
This Pride Month, we're calling on Congress to introduce and pass the Equality Act, which would prevent discrimination on the basis of sexual orientation or gender identity nationwide. These protections could not be more important or timely.
It's time for Congress to step up and protect LGBTQ+ rights across the country. Will you join us in urging them to take action by adding your name to our petition? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/thumxNdITUmxEhdRL24goA2]
ADD YOUR NAME >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/thumxNdITUmxEhdRL24goA2]
ADD YOUR NAME >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/thumxNdITUmxEhdRL24goA2]
Thank you for helping us make a difference!
— Team Engel
CHIP IN NOW >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_060723_PrideMonth_act]
CHIP IN NOW >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_060723_PrideMonth_act]

She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District.
In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you make sure she can build a winning campaign early by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_060723_PrideMonth_act]

name: Robert Garcia
subject: Happy Pride!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
Happy Pride Month!

Pride has always been a special time of year for myself and many others. It's a time when we can celebrate our love for one another with our community. But it’s also a time for us to pause and remember those who have fought for LGBTQ+ rights for decades, from the fight for marriage equality to the fight now for trans visibility and safety.

In our current political climate, extremist Republicans have made it a priority to spread hatred and fear against the LGBTQ+ community. There have been over 500 anti-LGBTQ+ bills across the country this year ranging from banning drag-shows to prohibiting gender-affirming care for youth.
But as long as I have you by my side, I will continue to fight against the hatred and fear extremist Republicans spread about the LGBTQ+ community and work hard to protect them.

Thank you,

Robert

## Why Chris Christie:

Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America.

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: Take Action Against Ranked Choice Voting NOW!
body:
This chaotic and confusing election "reform" is being pushed by mega-liberal donors and activists, threatening to disenfranchise voters and potentially elect marginal candidates without the support of a majority.

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=444bd679e3814119854e77505c889a5a&_e=QTyinqJ6CbVwT71evaXGNbBYxfu6kN4eY-8LU6m0p_0hbVw0pCrgUZJGNrHTL8sRlXj6iYwjVBYOIOAYm1T65Zavw-UJTt6otPHAGGtvtSFnmfgCILWnjySNYTyB5wSsu0UOUOLQCOOPwXvF1dLvlRAfa1KLkSS9nxUybqKWSvUACcFw75__mDED_WGJRkWTek5_6eY5rNDN5wZQujerhTaaitNU_shbmABQFuzmeONqtPVUmOC0oMfbErm8ijRCCh430tT6IcgTfYqFL3VbhC23Nu5dDRubc5fmNCv3Z5NQSrxWDTtFix1ZVGAOcittoOdUAHZWf2gT7bD8XSICpm8Kx_Kj8UNQSQFevzZ2QVecTmSj-w6hkKmKV6SNRufJ)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

As the President of The Heritage Foundation, I must urgently ask for your help in fighting against Ranked Choice Voting (RCV). This chaotic and confusing election "reform" is being pushed by mega-liberal donors and activists, threatening to disenfranchise voters and potentially elect marginal candidates without the support of a majority.

It's time to take a stand! We need your voice and input to tackle this dangerous reform that could wreak havoc on our electoral process.

**Please, take just a few minutes to complete our RCV survey by clicking the link below:**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/national-ranked-choice-voting-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=444bd679e3814119854e77505c889a5a&_e=QTyinqJ6CbVwT71evaXGNbBYxfu6kN4eY-8LU6m0p_0hbVw0pCrgUZJGNrHTL8sRlXj6iYwjVBYOIOAYm1T65Zavw-UJTt6otPHAGGtvtSFnmfgCILWnjySNYTyB5wSsu0UOUOLQCOOPwXvF1dLvlRAfa1KLkSS9nxUybqKWSvUACcFw75__mDED_WGJRkWTek5_6eY5rNDN5wZQujerhTaaitNU_shbmABQFuzmeOPGeqXyqAAIYlkp8eD9uDZnuLy4vssDoe4Jbp3fCFBQjVuDRgbZrCTMEulGXa2uKJFwkt5i0Xiy1b3UeYgNxGdoFzRlUuYlxWZNKglw2La0J9MAwUbSC_xLa3pvltb1v8ZIfhx2EhgiP5Sf1s8tmV86)**

By participating, you'll be joining the battle to protect our democracy and ensure the integrity of our elections. After completing the survey, you'll receive a copy of our exclusive RCV fact sheet that lays out the shocking truth behind this controversial system.

Together, we can make a difference and preserve the democratic process that defines our great nation.

**[Let's take action against Ranked Choice Voting today!](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=444bd679e3814119854e77505c889a5a&_e=QTyinqJ6CbVwT71evaXGNbBYxfu6kN4eY-8LU6m0p_0hbVw0pCrgUZJGNrHTL8sRlXj6iYwjVBYOIOAYm1T65Zavw-UJTt6otPHAGGtvtSFnmfgCILWnjySNYTyB5wSsu0UOUOLQCOOPwXvF1dLvlRAfa1KLkSS9nxUybqKWSvUACcFw75__mDED_WGJRkWTek5_6eY5rNDN5wZQujerhTaaitNU_shbmABQFuzmeOO1TlnL8L56s-XQIQcWTNv_g9bh9a_voONB1LA7usSNA5hJuuXVizdO-74tDbwR38bqDkAbQ5Maiq3YiAsLrer1Qh3IJxhyJudVju3kf40s8zFaZEOnTclhoaIhONrcFHXx29DQsXI0KWWWQlaLRcI4)**

Thank you for your passion for preserving our democracy.

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

name: Dr. Kim Schrier For Congress
subject: We need to protect women and doctors from unjust prosecution
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
State legislatures across the country are doing everything they can to restrict access to abortion [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64490139/410224737/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDY0YjllZi02ZDA1LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jARA85CIHQDyqNl6r8cu7otqqakOCFPRqt7YTnEUUoU=&emci=a4178235-5505-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=8464b9ef-6d05-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

Since _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned, over 20 states have moved to ban or restrict abortion. Now, state legislatures across the country are trying to go further to restrict access to abortion.

Idaho recently passed a bill banning minors from traveling across state lines to get abortion care. And some states are even considering targeting doctors who practice in states where abortion remains legal.

Kim knows doctors should not face criminal penalties, loss of licensure, or loss of insurance coverage for providing abortion care. **That's why Kim and Senator Patty Murray introduced the Let Doctors Provide Reproductive Health Care Act.**

Kim's legislation would protect doctors in states like Washington from legal action if they provide abortion care for people from states where abortion is illegal.

**[If you agree that anti-abortion policies shouldn't reach states where abortions are legal, add your name now to show your support for Kim's Bill →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64490140/410224738/-1634636452?ms=em23_230607_Reprod_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&refcode=em23_230607_Reprod_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&source=em23_230607_Reprod_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230607_Reprod_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=0ddx6NjZIPHfRqshN+xLZ7oc9qiI+oVUu+Hegm3WSMlbjJ0jps3m+DAMVl8TfbnclXqe93iKNtKiV4KlrHkbSl+x5A8W3qSQymo4xo2S4FIEW61U3grCogL4t3Tb87gz8/QGwR5Ujhb4BPA7GUcIZ5WMD2VdgOoGzooCzDDn9Yg=&refcode2=8464b9ef-6d05-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDY0YjllZi02ZDA1LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jARA85CIHQDyqNl6r8cu7otqqakOCFPRqt7YTnEUUoU=&emci=a4178235-5505-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=8464b9ef-6d05-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)**
