clean_body: State legislatures across the country are doing everything they can to restrict access to abortion Peter, Since Roe v. Wade was overturned, over 20 states have moved to ban or restrict abortion. Now, state legislatures across the country are trying to go further to restrict access to abortion. Idaho recently passed a bill banning minors from traveling across state lines to get abortion care. And some states are even considering targeting doctors who practice in states where abortion remains legal. Kim knows doctors should not face criminal penalties, loss of licensure, or loss of insurance coverage for providing abortion care. That's why Kim and Senator Patty Murray introduced the Let Doctors Provide Reproductive Health Care Act. Kim's legislation would protect doctors in states like Washington from legal action if they provide abortion care for people from states where abortion is illegal. | Thanks, Team Schrier Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat in 2024. = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

name: Replace Sinema
subject: PETITION: Tell Congress to pass the Equality Act
body:
Sinema’s beloved filibuster stands in the way of the rights of millions of Americans | | | Peter – The LGBTQ+ community is under relentless attack, yet we’ve heard nothing but crickets from Kyrsten Sinema. Meanwhile, the main reason the Equality Act isn’t already law is because of the filibuster – the filibuster that Kyrsten Sinema teamed up with Republicans to save, and which also blocked abortion rights and voting rights legislation. LGBTQ+ people face discrimination across the country even with laws in place – but in 29 states there aren’t even anti-discrimination laws on the books to protect them. The Equality Act is needed to fix that – and make sure that no one is discriminated against just because of who they are or who they love. Why does Sinema think the rights of 41 Republicans to filibuster majority-supported legislation is more important than the fundamental human rights of millions of Americans? This is an issue of basic, constitutionally protected freedoms and protection from direct, discriminatory attacks against those freedoms. **Sinema promised to ensure those basic rights were protected–not to do the bidding of rich donors and uphold a racist procedural relic.** **That’s why we’re participating in this joint petition to demand that Congress pass the Equality Act and stop the denial of our freedoms.[_Add your name HERE >>_](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mHQLCfNlixKIGL2gVdtURMawg6H9n2SCjSwBcmUw8rjDdZnbbv8rR3JImj_sxHq92CqQkCfAiObiCZzAuH7H94CmA4TMS6Ej0epxKnzTKoGf9uS00VNqonlXfR8_JfiDQ7AvNSVeQQEs0owaAMh8n7DtXln-uRY1og1nRg_JodCTBImNRMrYaoQ1ERhfp_BUgZqJnur-g-FBMJM9JTON8C-7l2yz4x9QwWoGnGhK7IMKC8oLMUwHABk6H5CuTy3bNtmQMLRVUXPl6j5V1QN46TQmGOe8LJVIxZfJ743UAz77WEoXN45ScG9cTkTGiHMFZLXS2IVxRAFlQPzA8QogAPwHz02iwJrYGEvehNt_GH2gUs7SxzRcdsSTwifms8_icRGwbNTw8HPTDZswPl3e6vvopWoagnbB_R56u9Y4aCn19Snzh2_YNG17ZiYG2YDZYzGhQAl5qswftxItdvzJxOVuBMAa_dnBPHXLeevkwVUk3Xw2EPIItLXWqAB5YqwDp/3wu/N80GyJPCSRu6U-ZtpTM1XA/h0/qcHAAKnHBNPQFbMRe3V0ogQNjDtOjBolAJSvtu9-TUs)**[**__**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mHQLCfNlixKIGL2gVdtURMawg6H9n2SCjSwBcmUw8rjDdZnbbv8rR3JImj_sxHq92CqQkCfAiObiCZzAuH7H94CmA4TMS6Ej0epxKnzTKoGf9uS00VNqonlXfR8_JfiDQgkZpBgzA8o_E0IAW5IDEeVrTGFtx8dR5UMQSEjf9HZyCJfC4ooqnmm0XfJqU5nnobJA2rLkaoVzQ9dDDU6F7_S0iaPii1cOCm1okO937CNRJ_Yx4IIt28xjYMRLEU-kME6aH5eGyBi9mewszIrzagyE8oEaPBTUoin_teAnTgB1zZJNmH3vHLVNw1tv5LnGO-wHx_eEJ9WvRerQkdhKga7QggpEqcF3ewpEWJo331rKWwt7K9QcSTdQvXIwcFdT7/3wu/N80GyJPCSRu6U-ZtpTM1XA/h1/l36u4I146onROMCF4nbZjVQTbBgtJ1nEYbP6HBXQhDY) We’ll be blunt: when Sinema was elected as the first openly bisexual Senator in U.S. history, the LGBT community – including us – were thrilled. We had no idea how quickly she would sell us all out. She prioritized cutting deals with Republicans over her own community – just as she has prioritized her Wall Street donors over her Arizona constituents. Shameful. So the next time Sinema tweets in support of Pride Month or waves the Rainbow Flag, **never forget that she put the filibuster above the basic rights of millions of Americans.** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xHQ9duSIGwb8RMtMdshXN8GWYPfvt3Cy6YX9vUpl7Vh5JpmcdrWscIC-I1UNv0URbeO3yMQjF8xLwu-FqbM2oeh-BLq0_NeY2eVL6tl8ooQTsyfNykGLcWurmP7DUf8ygerg1RZqjauLDo0KYuY2FqxeJtuJXf_Qw9Vb4hyukc-MyjHJKIjpveiNw5c-KOa-Vh9ZBE53ndQt2K0_ZypsI0ISexjfs1vV4JytvLofzYPkS-Ucreogz2qvUqCxxV-O5AWbsqTOy5lg2FEG4xFMeWfhB_kOBE3P89uyVknn0CLlb1HLYtR338GJZRKn7dje98JvM_DTjVoIekVDdco5y6/3wu/N80GyJPCSRu6U-ZtpTM1XA/h2/l5B0-ZUor_MSkXi93g2wGXnBJGmwVwXqi5Gn5Jqjejk) **[Please add your name to our petition to pass the Equality Act and outlaw discrimination against LGBTQ+ Americans.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mHQLCfNlixKIGL2gVdtURMawg6H9n2SCjSwBcmUw8rjDdZnbbv8rR3JImj_sxHq92CqQkCfAiObiCZzAuH7H94CmA4TMS6Ej0epxKnzTKoGf9uS00VNqonlXfR8_JfiDQ7AvNSVeQQEs0owaAMh8n7DtXln-uRY1og1nRg_JodCTBImNRMrYaoQ1ERhfp_BUg7BLvWP_OoDtfEJT12RDg2lfUa4Kb7XFcLUS8yqgnfO1A6AyOpX8mfUll4pYUDribZKuibbYcv9ZfmyR665q6Ircmxy8MzmqgImHFIRJyiCdtnJebI0FPRrnOkCKwq1EDVvfVVEfdfMY5Ji9D9nIRx6i1BK6OcjqRLC45xL7cFF9obkIKhsJIf4YNOatIy8VvS3pCmXxMLJw98EcJ50UdAkP-p6RRc5BdiCsaZ7mhG9xW82bK9NPT6bw8mmAxjp5yPLK5J1G6CqctlKUxpz0y1dujxBBXcY965jZGkbyjxgvxT0VZma9-qHnqAmI8kmh8/3wu/N80GyJPCSRu6U-ZtpTM1XA/h3/j0xStQcOaz4N6oovrIeivS20D5-Ja0M0n8BwTqcjlTY)** Happy Pride 🏳️🌈 -Change for Arizona 2024 PAC

name: DLCC Membership Team
subject: We didn’t expect this:
body:
We certainly didn’t expect our 2023 membership drive to skyrocket in popularity – but grassroots supporters like you are showing what you’re capable of accomplishing. | | |
---
| | After Democrats’ historic victories last November, we had no idea what to expect from our supporters heading into this election cycle. We _certainly_ didn't expect our 2023 membership drive to skyrocket in popularity – but grassroots supporters like you are showing what you're capable of accomplishing. name: Laura Loomer
subject: Confronting Comey: It takes a criminal!
body:
As a crowd of angry liberals shouted me down, saying "You don't belong here!" I just couldn't stop asking former FBI Director James Comey about his criminal activities while overseeing Crossfire Hurricane - also known as the Russian Collusion Hoax to take down President Trump. | | | | [](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FK3KehpIv73RM763OD5lf1lgw%2F2y01QIKDkcPn4y2dBETaYg/1/01000188977a338a-0be84874-ca63-415f-a66a-1d0d1f8c4265-000000/kwmgx9N7MFzBbC94eusSjgZ6SOY=325) | Dear Friend,

As a crowd of angry liberals shouted me down, saying "You don't belong here!" I just couldn't stop asking former FBI Director James Comey about his criminal activities while overseeing Crossfire Hurricane - **also known as the Russian Collusion Hoax to take down President Trump**.

A few days ago, I just happened to be in Naperville, Illinois for a wedding and I noticed that Comey was also in town to promote his new crime novel at a book signing event.

Ironically, his new book is about "high-ranking politicians and the mafia." In his case, Comey was part of the Clinton Mafia that failed to get Hillary elected!

**I don 't know about you, but I find it ironic that a criminal is now writing crime novels.**

**Following the release of the Durham Report,** Comey should be in jail, and I told him just that at his book signing this week!

**[Watch my video here](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FK3KehpIv73RM763OD5lf1lgw%2F2y01QIKDkcPn4y2dBETaYg/2/01000188977a338a-0be84874-ca63-415f-a66a-1d0d1f8c4265-000000/GdJOAxdfer_RnkkvCST8aTaagvI=325)** and PLEASE, after you watch, **[donate to help support my work](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FK3KehpIv73RM763OD5lf1lgw%2F2y01QIKDkcPn4y2dBETaYg/3/01000188977a338a-0be84874-ca63-415f-a66a-1d0d1f8c4265-000000/PaGLeRPymNS6vBH99un0KwF5xRs=325)** so I can keep confronting criminals like Comey.
[](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FK3KehpIv73RM763OD5lf1lgw%2F2y01QIKDkcPn4y2dBETaYg/4/01000188977a338a-0be84874-ca63-415f-a66a-1d0d1f8c4265-000000/m7qI5nEKPZkwy72jcxyvxSPXrks=325)
Thanks again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

P.S. I was detained by police after I confronted Comey, but of course they let Comey, the real-life criminal, walk away scot-free. My work is always risky, but more importantly, it's expensive, and **[I could always use your help to cover the costs of production, travel and video editing](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FK3KehpIv73RM763OD5lf1lgw%2F2y01QIKDkcPn4y2dBETaYg/5/01000188977a338a-0be84874-ca63-415f-a66a-1d0d1f8c4265-000000/DkQwTV7C3daCKuDV3Z6b2SqZe7o=325).**

name: State Freedom Caucus Network
subject: Tax Dollars For Child Sex Changes??
body:
As you all know, one of the most important issues that our state freedom caucuses fight for is protecting the innocence of children. That fight is about to come to Pennsylvania in a BIG way. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_s=cf1a6da8ef1d454d8163c9f0add97311&_t=2ieLKhJ5yb0QysqFQdlu5SnZm6Oyw4uEEP8N4DePRSUzvUlJNHYUcE9VwTrFi391L0BDiIDfP-lsxpZ5KLoOIecAvAGi4ePBtzVZrdx8eJ8%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_s=cf1a6da8ef1d454d8163c9f0add97311&_t=2ieLKhJ5yb0QysqFQdlu5SnZm6Oyw4uEEP8N4DePRSUzvUlJNHYUcE9VwTrFi391L0BDiIDfP-lsxpZ5KLoOIecAvAGi4ePBtzVZrdx8eJ8%3D)

| |
---
Friends, As you all know, one of the most important issues that our state freedom caucuses fight for is protecting the innocence of children. That fight is about to come to Pennsylvania in a BIG way. In 2019, Penn State University Health established a pediatric "gender-affirming care" clinic, aka, a place kids with gender dysphoria go to receive life-altering and irreversible medical services. With budget debates coming up in the PA House, PA Freedom Caucus member Rep. Aaron Bernstine gave Penn State - as well as Temple University and the University of Pittsburg - a deadline of June 2 to provide data on the services being provided to kids by their university health systems. Penn State got back to them and their data shows they have given puberty blockers and other disgusting "gender-affirming" services to hundreds of minors, some as young as five. In response, the PA Freedom Caucus announced they are going to oppose the $882 million in funding the hospitals are set to receive in the 2023-24 state budget unless these policies change. You can read their letter here: [ ](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fe72e6d5b-abe0-42d8-bdfa-44623f0e35c8_828x1559.jpeg) **South Dakota:** One of the biggest attacks on private property rights in American history has come to South Dakota and most of their "Republican" elected officials are doing nothing to stop it. Over 80 landowners are facing eminent domain lawsuits from a company looking to build a "carbon capture" pipeline that runs through their state for ethanol plants in Iowa. The company, Summit Carbon Solutions, has massive ties to influential figures and donors in the Republican Party and were platinum sponsors of Gov. Kristi Noem's inauguration back in January. Unfortunately, multiple bills championed by the South Dakota Freedom Caucus to protect landowners from eminent domain failed in the last legislative session. But the SD Freedom Caucus hasn't stopped fighting. Read SFCN Comms Director Greg Price's [full story](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/u/click?_t=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_m=cf1a6da8ef1d454d8163c9f0add97311&_e=_4ri4ZeqLg06IQG9OlHaGHuWoVBTEGuoLYc9JdzMVIEg8QRq5C9MKg2oKcN2P35t79DacRykg2n0NdtoxVo6V7H-IcyEjOb5tkgFzmip8BDF9UjB2Q4BYjhvQS74rDWMzJAoRjCIJSVgehD0zzkCcick2pBehswiihaw-cbdb6_XgARWeLjqvJI2H80UdfXExukPcac7zBTP6JXD4UXVQRttu-H-RkA7DOIMlZbb_YLhhtc2g-51OWU-nwFo5lvj) about the situation and sign the SDFC's [petition](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/u/click?_t=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_m=cf1a6da8ef1d454d8163c9f0add97311&_e=_4ri4ZeqLg06IQG9OlHaGKXq_o8MdA9SA10pJWIlbprAalhanfbbYbMFEYUEuFJjI-HbR52l0lZjdwUYmw3vcc4253Y8wpeImdp77qQjjXPe0LMYyVPrl6_KXra9UMYZpjvTdSu4-0bqaY-Qnblw5wi6JJqWoTYA-qN9_w47hJxQ8u_80Qv_Ciwol78zDTqVAfOSaFbHXICTo5qiLQ86SAmH0lRcPK24UJU_LUNDAII%3D) to stop the steal of private property for this green energy boondoggle. **Louisiana:** Last week, RINO Louisiana State Sen. Fred Mills made headlines by [voting with Democrats](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/u/click?_t=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_m=cf1a6da8ef1d454d8163c9f0add97311&_e=_4ri4ZeqLg06IQG9OlHaGFrdu8Sfg3yt6fCzmd2PbaxzAURM_xeCMWluCrW1-ZXJfxK9KudH7GmJBFdpiTyIvlT_Cr32fVeeLle9XCcWG_BF9XtiL7C_VBocGLjNWypi6ClaQB8y2V2d_Tc0B1QFojTB-Shb_BaaZZFRpedJ7fUXgWN1bPH_B6MySf_gzsaExhXNVh1mfd7wt-VafaDQ2e0IphJ6u7HEmtXOBqWrJPmC05ZX_HpOg2A-w-Kg-8ay) in the Health & Welfare Committee to kill the bill to ban transgender procedures for minors. Despite this shocking betrayal to Republicans in the state, a motion to recommit the bill to the Judiciary Committee succeeded in the Senate, and the bill passed on a 29-10 vote. In addition, LA Freedom Caucus member Rep. Kathy Edmonston's bill to ban COVID vaccine mandates at all public and private K-12 schools and colleges made it through the full legislature. It was an extremely productive week for conservatives in the Bayou State. **Wyoming:** Speaking of tax dollars funding mutilations of children, the same thing is happening in Wyoming. Yes, not California, but Wyoming. We have written at length about how in the last legislative session, RINO Wyoming House Speaker Albert Sommers singlehandedly [blocked](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/u/click?_t=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_m=cf1a6da8ef1d454d8163c9f0add97311&_e=_4ri4ZeqLg06IQG9OlHaGNOtCd9fo_MgRkJffuqh6HlY09XNBe0_zhjsGobmKn9ji4Fs5VmPKGP71q9rQ9GE9VSDW48Fa3O3m-4N7BX__CrygL55BbrCIMmq8jtjBnYQY7iySw7gR2MUv6DISIR0E119eHzvHEn8FKl_LCrIYPRT6eoPf13PE27OJ5sCS-ubKc1WHmRcKWJMQ7XMtyjbU-XoPaa6Q-hY4EdzyM4Vm9EuotRUMCOZgYpAJWB47LgcKfREVWHXcT9N_6ydf1eeoyrH5cXPQqmZORxyIypullJdve6_ozydR0lvx4PKPnbXJv2QzppBSLgAoKe5bI4JMA%3D%3D) the bill to ban pediatric gender mutilations from coming to the floor. Well, the WY Department of Health recently removed those types of procedures from the list of treatments not covered by Medicaid. The WYFC is demanding answers. Here's their letter: [ ](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fc53d232a-6c89-4721-8b38-99d26383dc48_1210x1118.png) We rely on your generous donations so that we can continue to support our patriotic State Freedom Caucuses. Please consider making a recurring donation of as little as [$10, $50, or even $100 a month](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/u/click?_t=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_m=cf1a6da8ef1d454d8163c9f0add97311&_e=_4ri4ZeqLg06IQG9OlHaGOYzoib7eus_djZcXAS-PV9EUL1R1bWC5VL6FghD-fVtc9ls8yKBA0IjivfDMKf20vCiPIPXHLdpmXUlfHqhvlO5jClgtTpa1AZZC-fduBcSxlXUP5rlMT8L9f9Jc3YeiHvRUBzdLk1CuhkD9d1ltN0J8cKB3GDzJIsa4_qRRfROO11tyZGY3ynhtOcgC-kVTzYqMyUGZ0nLelKw-YoIIEi91j4tPHBZ2qsNsgSfvZOUhJ-pzKKVmRaomwYnHAcruA%3D%3D) so that they get the support they so desperately need. We can't fight without you, so please act now. **Keep fighting,**

**Andy Roth**
_President
State Freedom Caucus Network_ [DONATE](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/u/click?_t=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_m=cf1a6da8ef1d454d8163c9f0add97311&_e=_4ri4ZeqLg06IQG9OlHaGOYzoib7eus_djZcXAS-PV9EUL1R1bWC5VL6FghD-fVtc9ls8yKBA0IjivfDMKf20vCiPIPXHLdpmXUlfHqhvlPz8TIu28LF6hmFLpi6duNyE_vbHMQ4QXrqddNsdEHl-QIPH6r2dNQqlkEB0-XV2pMEBP11KJWXWsF0gvLfBHBqy3JXWCThwIr7XZ3sWLPE46JD5jWmN0X76SDRGc5CR3f72PXQ6ZHlEbJXE7FgI52q-5cv4yR8YaK2KseaA58gJw%3D%3D) P.S. clean_body: As you all know, one of the most important issues that our state freedom caucuses fight for is protecting the innocence of children. That fight is about to come to Pennsylvania in a BIG way. | | | | Friends, As you all know, one of the most important issues that our state freedom caucuses fight for is protecting the innocence of children. That fight is about to come to Pennsylvania in a BIG way. In 2019, Penn State University Health established a pediatric "gender-affirming care" clinic, aka, a place kids with gender dysphoria go to receive life-altering and irreversible medical services. With budget debates coming up in the PA House, PA Freedom Caucus member Rep. Aaron Bernstine gave Penn State - as well as Temple University and the University of Pittsburg - a deadline of June 2 to provide data on the services being provided to kids by their university health systems. Penn State got back to them and their data shows they have given puberty blockers and other disgusting "gender-affirming" services to hundreds of minors, some as young as five. In response, the PA Freedom Caucus announced they are going to oppose the $882 million in funding the hospitals are set to receive in the 2023-24 state budget unless these policies change. You can read their letter here: South Dakota: One of the biggest attacks on private property rights in American history has come to South Dakota and most of their "Republican" elected officials are doing nothing to stop it. Over 80 landowners are facing eminent domain lawsuits from a company looking to build a "carbon capture" pipeline that runs through their state for ethanol plants in Iowa. The company, Summit Carbon Solutions, has massive ties to influential figures and donors in the Republican Party and were platinum sponsors of Gov. Kristi Noem's inauguration back in January. Unfortunately, multiple bills championed by the South Dakota Freedom Caucus to protect landowners from eminent domain failed in the last legislative session. But the SD Freedom Caucus hasn't stopped fighting. Read SFCN Comms Director Greg Price's about the situation and sign the SDFC's to stop the steal of private property for this green energy boondoggle. Louisiana: Last week, RINO Louisiana State Sen. Fred Mills made headlines by in the Health & Welfare Committee to kill the bill to ban transgender procedures for minors. Despite this shocking betrayal to Republicans in the state, a motion to recommit the bill to the Judiciary Committee succeeded in the Senate, and the bill passed on a 29-10 vote. In addition, LA Freedom Caucus member Rep. Kathy Edmonston's bill to ban COVID vaccine mandates at all public and private K-12 schools and colleges made it through the full legislature. name: Working Families Party
subject: What you missed last month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
Here's your inside look at what’s happening in our party, and how we’re organizing towards a world where our elected leaders have working people’s backs. | | | Peter,
**We’re back with the WFP Newsletter — your inside look at what’s happening in our party, and how we’re organizing towards a world where our elected leaders have working people’s backs.** There’s a lot to catch up on since our last roundup, so let's get to it!
* * *
**_HUGE PRIMARY NIGHT IN PENNSYLVANIA_** This month, we celebrated some major primary wins in Pennsylvania. From Philadelphia to Pittsburgh, Working Families Democrats ran incredible and inspirational campaigns, and dozens of our champions running for municipal and judicial seats advanced to the General Election in November. **In Allegheny County** , WFP members helped power primary wins for candidates including progressive champion **Sara Innamorato** for County Executive and **Matt Dugan** for County District Attorney! WFP Mid-Atlantic Elections Director Shoshanna Israel told **[The Intercept](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhlLL3zgi0r5NLBTSkPRqSv8xeCV-UQ15FEfbHJfVqjbJkASMa8Yy5n2125bKpfBqrM5N-Bjv499tGT30kCQHnlr1GwmiVdit5OevMH4cJdla4tdGYilP-Kyqpuo8w-HXVeubmmdnLUoW9SQpPM-0Jd_bm0kYP6ZOfogOI-DchWGfDB8j9hoGfzjFdHCbumNjTdotgr-eMFRVnkHyt770j_N8ok-uogPNMh32bETUE65xGtFqTPC7v93ArEt84Hsngl6S_70AvMNcCdrQhsZ_YKfIopirQfpG5gWngS-2KacjmoAWq3uTiW7W5IfZuUUtHw/3wu/1l5eqTFlSlO9Ci4cP1-0ng/h0/AUlltWHyUOTklT8ajRw1-3xDv-6J4j4OZQL2a_n_ij0)** :
> _“Voters in Allegheny County showed once again that they are hungry for leaders with big ideas who will fight hard for working people. They rejected tough-on-crime fear mongering from a decrepit political establishment and embraced reformers who will invest in and support our communities.”_
> _“This is a victory not just for Sara Innamorato and Matt Dugan, but for the people-powered movement that knocked on tens of thousands of doors to elect them. It’s a victory for those who want an Allegheny County that works for everyone, not just the powerful and politically connected.”_
**In Philadelphia** , we expanded our progressive bloc in the city council. **Rue Landau** won her primary for an at-large seat on the city council and is poised to become Philly’s first openly LGBTQ+ city council member. Councilmember **Isaiah Thomas** also advanced to the General Election in November, receiving the most votes out of any at-large candidate in the Democratic field! WFP champion **Helen Gym** unfortunately came up short in her quest to bring a progressive vision to City Hall as mayor, but we remain immensely proud of the campaign she ran. And finally, we racked up several judicial wins for nominees who will fight for equality and justice under the law: **Timika Lane** for Superior Court, and six candidates for Court of Common Please, including **Caroline Turner** , **Samantha Williams** , **Kay Yu.** If you’d like to read more about WFP’s work in Pennsylvania this cycle, read **[our pre-election post on Medium](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/tTBUZwcBH_2q13Ow12s-jZ9fWzje-2y1VpVJpPT5FwE4MTfatjF-lMr-s2vPdJbhL7-eoW3vAPK6wKuUK8yJ5j7Cikq5emDq86IElFNqg8W094Kz4R2xr5a4XDLfkRVqUYrjHbS7zE7U_9qCgK8z3e-vPSXqtfatyW500otMC1kEzwkJ0rOgGeRw0L_7agIa5HhG038E56F9A3GVAJZdrT9Hrm2MiqVRDoRhlPqAz8K17dfL5bXxlRhac3PlcCeGRK8ohjWc7SfdNFpCLfhVfhD-WTg-zQCOT8yNnClWHcbSEmGGpEFcM4jSlQbNRscv/3wu/1l5eqTFlSlO9Ci4cP1-0ng/h1/1twIbbSbAlUdPCsDHdveSY4eqdN13ojSQRTPdAgWMmU)** that goes into more detail about the extraordinary organizing our entire team did to reach voters in these and other races across the state.
* * *
**_NEW ENDORSEMENTS IN RHODE ISLAND AND VIRGINIA_**
**In Rhode Island** , we endorsed long-time organizer, community leader, and former state representative **Aaron Regunberg** for Congress in RI-01 after Rep. David Cicilline’s surprise resignation left the U.S. House seat open. In a statement to the **[Boston Globe](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDCNOZhR7kw61roBon7xTFMITAGdTizVUQefF2rbG3mA_Ldqu4W-C9vy8l1_mFmo2g-GhCZvQ2VVYi_UMoPihZVOx65ErrdFGlAwmSCmhykIHD8xLQ_GlJBOKq8g03WT83EQNgjSR7O9-UDkG3nXdjYbMroOJy-1gMO6Mif_eiIRZfxvV5QXm7E2jZGNOgtsxr4YjSTBLGF2cN5JEI6YCoPhBWG_K0IA5ze93pvVFtgXrnUvFXvwmJclc_ZgPKwnnEFzZm9EVqHDlFh8adsPfSP9CiQ6hH-uUHPdGJUSvR3ehrAGu44InFBEoDSsj0L44rw/3wu/1l5eqTFlSlO9Ci4cP1-0ng/h2/JUJlv4hiSOkfoHRzupxHfMjWUWQYcEs3Ugk9sOW2OIo)** , WFP New England Regional Director Georgia Hollister Isman said:
> _"Aaron is exactly the type of leader Rhode Islanders need in Congress. He has an unshakeable commitment to progressive values. He’s dogged enough to take on the Republicans and corporate Democrats organizing to block progressive change, and skilled enough to get things done in tough conditions. From winning paid sick days for over 100,000 Rhode Islanders or walking picket lines with striking workers, Aaron is someone who shows up, brings people together and gets results.”_
**In Virginia** , WFP has made endorsements in 12 races ahead of the June 20th primary, including **Laschrecse Aird** who is running to defeat the last anti-abortion Democrat in the state senate and **Sally Hudson** who is standing up to Dominion Energy. **[You can see the rest of our endorsements in Virginia here.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDMdk0Xc5F3XT7oWSkA6eoLltu-r1aK4hmboFs6qLXTqHCvnGvuC8sTaqs67b-9Lq9ygfXjSbWxPnIX6BSvCNhx3o3KuECbRMnPs7jSo3XhB6EaaESOjInNaY5joxsm77lSOxLYR_C8J3vqtY_io13mBvs1AWBPwg0qlXyiRKW518FuQ_mUuNT5BBFoluIVPFMiAd6B-aO4Y3wrLYLiWAuyyfWzn7pEFhzgAt-0MMWfJnfXJobEz5xzo8UsSBBMTJNw/3wu/1l5eqTFlSlO9Ci4cP1-0ng/h3/pyVFLKfWUtp8Nz8SSkfF2o4Ma0ykBOQwN74jseWgd5Q)** This year, every single seat in the Virginia State Legislature is up for election, giving us a huge opportunity to elect champions who will reform our criminal justice system, defend abortion access, and stand up to abusive utility monopolies — **and making Virginia one of the most hotly-contested battlegrounds of the year.**
* * *
**_WATCH: CALIFORNIA WORKING FAMILIES PARTY FORUM WITH SENATE CANDIDATES BARBARA LEE AND KATIE PORTER_** California WFP made waves last month after it held the first forum of the U.S. Senate race, featuring candidates Reps. Barbara Lee and Katie Porter. **[You can watch the full recording of the livestream here.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDMdk0Xc5F3XT7oWSkA6eoLlrcVi5cIcc26YPAdNO7wIAQU9WIskpIqPm3oPsJxmiTBWy6Tt_pEjGbp0nSIvjxAeVQHN88Cn_mXsfwQh4_gujLgCDshi3wNU6ZvS-dORK-rau3YhHbxemL9JmdeZKKQssUf_gRId79B_4Cq-TYLi3y6OplGDCWYuYx4YSsG7kxB_s5eTBD-slXg-KiFgoz1HAjD67FPQ5fIjKIdPv4TSg0ZNPjnCKWPdZaxfuXZLFPQ/3wu/1l5eqTFlSlO9Ci4cP1-0ng/h4/Ro8twMV05hkH8vl0s6gxmSP8JqWFerViIt4t8Y3Xu-8)** The forum offered an opportunity for the CA-WFP and our members across the state to discuss priority issues, share a collective vision for the future, and build momentum for progressive change. WFP members and activists hosted dozens of watch parties across the state, encouraging attendees to join their regional WFP clubs to uplift local efforts happening in their communities. You can read some of the post-forum takeaways watch party attendees had in the **[San Francisco Chronicle](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPpqZjfSnt5MvskoXy7KjglWJwSKvcifNMZlxWhf0ePu77QMN2rkVRhpHQwyhVTdNe8_hETgMOOeHEBg78L8O9ZKioAv7HMX0CTGpro36loAm57MU39Dsqvi2gX8pVAdZZt7ygu_jbMjqN-qB7zDQWrc1rDkso-JQz-2VqjRhOzCji-IsYmfF0ZAKmuoDEaSq2QGBlCbKnspYFhamga7wrqcEdj2u30IwAW7BudTnOY-CDIGEzoDyLwgyuBO2SrPZ8xo-lnthLBA8edx1Nbx82PaYcnbu7Sbjs9PNNg4JaZU8dJM7OsrrN0sRwydqVTqOSPodKwhhDOJgugTRXwLn4PWxrZQnCAqG4IyiQxSkUXw/3wu/1l5eqTFlSlO9Ci4cP1-0ng/h5/gi-I8el-Qwwx37DdPmvOk4QurP1OvZZ9BR0ePAET63c)** and **[Orange County Register.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDMXYuETlasX_S3ZvoIdO_a8aNXbOo-pwAMmEiUkVtr4j_J_-LRO2kPTOpGc3hrN3WHeEq8VjNnv_C5TvW0fdFZ_9CmiiASxfhkyk932_cwiHOjCibxzd4BygBEMB5QY1dGnJq09XFdeES8YiD0legcl0j3P5-gPzkCgylBMPggMGfng7NnzvLpKXPSsc_fV-VDFFBYLxlmKBZIpxXPwIEZ0kfz16_bd12x8cjmjVZfKOtU0YQU9lIxMB5xs5NMFw_RmITURlXgbbpzUmH-Hc7V1NriVhZ4coG4075bMw3vnatNp0jQG2OO2bvZ4206T4UVb44cpd8kUBdD9oKG8WrT2QmNXKGYRmtvatcuNuUYJS/3wu/1l5eqTFlSlO9Ci4cP1-0ng/h6/TV1zmT9E5wdhEaMVGQ1Ex8Y_tg5TOA-yjtEMA4dx944)**
* * *
**_WFP’S SUE ALTMAN ANNOUNCES CANDIDACY FOR CONGRESS IN NJ-07_**
After four years leading WFP’s efforts in New Jersey, State Director **Sue Altman** is taking a step back — to run for Congress in NJ-07! Sue will be running to unseat Republican Rep. Tom Kean Jr. in what will be one of the highest-profile swing district contests in the country. **[The New York Times](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDGlyFEPfIQqTPhAJ7ICxnKHZ9fJzU5C5bMf-0WwRgry3_ZJFI2N-w-A5PXn7hgc0SFc6LJsapqn_q_YqXb6vFEkKHLo8sWg46HnYbmPPaIjwW6k3kXkiUskJ4-8SHDnYP3qzfUItnhKjOw8D1PG5PF7DpN3d4-1NYkzL8i8BBIAMzu2mtBNvOozbunKjQ__wka7mnbXcSKhLgwMzUu_gm274fMLyZEFZtw0jgRNTiEfAzmNSSomeDnP9qVkbxELNvOYEWhvvVfMLIO8JCw5lSZQzlzKWIcsBOkU2LLk9kylk4tsT991DwFmMB0BzUxLa3Q/3wu/1l5eqTFlSlO9Ci4cP1-0ng/h7/GJHINP8yeyl9ZZ5Y-4QsQkR7PO_KzccPARuz2_uANOw)** broke the story, with more coverage in **[The Star-Ledger.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPh_pSacCDtmDc-loJ_sWgrRWjpk69-6G3D9kUyXyAW3aYA50xafFa_IB5kG4FeKStXu3hGbAn7ow7jlpasfIanicHindhet1VuP_RjacENcwPGF3ixkX79xrCNZ0aOTSOreKSePLl9jTbfszQFxQn31rVOibyj1f4o0O4BN9wnw-x6bsmAJQNq8HnJQon-Fy1dmhBhria_dDVkv6foRLDQsDN4TIzKmQw3nYoRPqNIK18F64Seprs1mP3t0cglv_8LmLKwg8W3FizvMgw9bZX0lco8rgaPGtSNOPkv3sxhwhEbfihvSqFaZkLVeLFbD1GUYPcl1LE9Xbb3LsXO1dAd6FPOROdoK_T8sBzamSoceLMyPO_EUM8xAKMq3QtNZag/3wu/1l5eqTFlSlO9Ci4cP1-0ng/h8/hPy0IqPgc0iBO_8yXRYn8RP609jAycg3VyB1HFYduXI)** While Sue is away, we’re proud to announce that **[NJ WFP Political Director Antoinette Miles will serve as Interim State Director and keep our movement moving!](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/c511-KAjM3jU_4OIFtitbbtDmAfA3yS_7prYhECwYAN9N-QAJT85KwOeWI83LamwAFOQCYkYncLUS3ueomiZVzhNw0vMrzPf4ByGx8JsD3o5ntYLBOfdjBuxS-3XKJ50DICc2uS0fvobQhG5OrRRlcr_RoOTWc30QLNdFZi2qcCFshPLWU0oP3gK8q2Ox1ikztjmSfWgzgYphKjDUEXThHSBE2NKezDYOiq8lTEqQgCcqIX2xieBH9HFMGLq7tM4wa3VegSuiZAz95JUUlSxfbSuziWqMp66bYPf6Xi4sq4IGP2aGVJ1jmBySR7M3lbPKTZLm05c6dpzdNUVGfX8N8zuIlhat-mSsHD-hlnhghYutmtDmWV8MKSqQGJJ_aIa/3wu/1l5eqTFlSlO9Ci4cP1-0ng/h9/DPCF7NrBzN8uN3gURYO_7qPQhvsUxv3eQewzcCCRj10)**
* * *
**_ALL HANDS ON DECK TO STOP COP CITY IN ATLANTA, GEORGIA_** The Atlanta political establishment has been dead-set on the construction of a new massive 85-acre military-style police training facility in Atlanta dubbed ‘Cop City,’ since it was first proposed. Georgia WFP has firmly opposed the development from the beginning — and has been educating and engaging Atlantans on public safety and Cop City since the 2021 municipal elections. But on Tuesday, after listening to over 12 hours and 400+ nearly-unanimous testimonies against Cop City, the Georgia City Council voted to fund the center by a vote of 11-4 — with 3 out of the only 4 opposing votes cast by WFP councilmembers. **Georgia WFP and our partners are now calling for a city-wide referendum — a direct vote for the community to decide Atlanta’s fate and defeat Cop City for good.** Over the next two months, WFP organizers will gather tens of thousands of signatures to achieve the 75,000 necessary to qualify for the referendum process. clean_body: Here's your inside look at what’s happening in our party, and how we’re organizing towards a world where our elected leaders have working people’s backs. | | | Peter, We’re back with the WFP Newsletter — your inside look at what’s happening in our party, and how we’re organizing towards a world where our elected leaders have working people’s backs. There’s a lot to catch up on since our last roundup, so let's get to it! HUGE PRIMARY NIGHT IN PENNSYLVANIA This month, we celebrated some major primary wins in Pennsylvania. From Philadelphia to Pittsburgh, Working Families Democrats ran incredible and inspirational campaigns, and dozens of our champions running for municipal and judicial seats advanced to the General Election in November. In Allegheny County , WFP members helped power primary wins for candidates including progressive champion Sara Innamorato for County Executive and Matt Dugan for County District Attorney! WFP Mid-Atlantic Elections Director Shoshanna Israel told : “Voters in Allegheny County showed once again that they are hungry for leaders with big ideas who will fight hard for working people. They rejected tough-on-crime fear mongering from a decrepit political establishment and embraced reformers who will invest in and support our communities.” “This is a victory not just for Sara Innamorato and Matt Dugan, but for the people-powered movement that knocked on tens of thousands of doors to elect them. It’s a victory for those who want an Allegheny County that works for everyone, not just the powerful and politically connected.” In Philadelphia , we expanded our progressive bloc in the city council. Rue Landau won her primary for an at-large seat on the city council and is poised to become Philly’s first openly LGBTQ+ city council member. Councilmember Isaiah Thomas also advanced to the General Election in November, receiving the most votes out of any at-large candidate in the Democratic field! WFP champion Helen Gym unfortunately came up short in her quest to bring a progressive vision to City Hall as mayor, but we remain immensely proud of the campaign she ran. And finally, we racked up several judicial wins for nominees who will fight for equality and justice under the law: Timika Lane for Superior Court, and six candidates for Court of Common Please, including Caroline Turner , Samantha Williams , Kay Yu. If you’d like to read more about WFP’s work in Pennsylvania this cycle, read that goes into more detail about the extraordinary organizing our entire team did to reach voters in these and other races across the state. NEW ENDORSEMENTS IN RHODE ISLAND AND VIRGINIA In Rhode Island , we endorsed long-time organizer, community leader, and former state representative Aaron Regunberg for Congress in RI-01 after Rep. David Cicilline’s surprise resignation left the U.S. House seat open. In a statement to the , WFP New England Regional Director Georgia Hollister Isman said: "Aaron is exactly the type of leader Rhode Islanders need in Congress. He has an unshakeable commitment to progressive values. He’s dogged enough to take on the Republicans and corporate Democrats organizing to block progressive change, and skilled enough to get things done in tough conditions. From winning paid sick days for over 100,000 Rhode Islanders or walking picket lines with striking workers, Aaron is someone who shows up, brings people together and gets results.” In Virginia , WFP has made endorsements in 12 races ahead of the June 20th primary, including Laschrecse Aird who is running to defeat the last anti-abortion Democrat in the state senate and Sally Hudson who is standing up to Dominion Energy. This year, every single seat in the Virginia State Legislature is up for election, giving us a huge opportunity to elect champions who will reform our criminal justice system, defend abortion access, and stand up to abusive utility monopolies — and making Virginia one of the most hotly-contested battlegrounds of the year. WATCH: CALIFORNIA WORKING FAMILIES PARTY FORUM WITH SENATE CANDIDATES BARBARA LEE AND KATIE PORTER California WFP made waves last month after it held the first forum of the U.S. Senate race, featuring candidates Reps. Barbara Lee and Katie Porter. The forum offered an opportunity for the CA-WFP and our members across the state to discuss priority issues, share a collective vision for the future, and build momentum for progressive change. WFP members and activists hosted dozens of watch parties across the state, encouraging attendees to join their regional WFP clubs to uplift local efforts happening in their communities. You can read some of the post-forum takeaways watch party attendees had in the and WFP’S SUE ALTMAN ANNOUNCES CANDIDACY FOR CONGRESS IN NJ-07 After four years leading WFP’s efforts in New Jersey, State Director Sue Altman is taking a step back — to run for Congress in NJ-07! Sue will be running to unseat Republican Rep. Tom Kean Jr. in what will be one of the highest-profile swing district contests in the country. broke the story, with more coverage in While Sue is away, we’re proud to announce that ALL HANDS ON DECK TO STOP COP CITY IN ATLANTA, GEORGIA The Atlanta political establishment has been dead-set on the construction of a new massive 85-acre military-style police training facility in Atlanta dubbed ‘Cop City,’ since it was first proposed. Georgia WFP has firmly opposed the development from the beginning — and has been educating and engaging Atlantans on public safety and Cop City since the 2021 municipal elections. But on Tuesday, after listening to over 12 hours and 400+ nearly-unanimous testimonies against Cop City, the Georgia City Council voted to fund the center by a vote of 11-4 — with 3 out of the only 4 opposing votes cast by WFP councilmembers. Georgia WFP and our partners are now calling for a city-wide referendum — a direct vote for the community to decide Atlanta’s fate and defeat Cop City for good. Over the next two months, WFP organizers will gather tens of thousands of signatures to achieve the 75,000 necessary to qualify for the referendum process. But this work takes resources, and we rely on your support. ABORTION RIGHTS BATTLE IN OHIO Ahead of a likely November vote on an amendment that would enshrine abortion rights in the state, the Ohio GOP is ramming through an on a proposal to make it harder for voters to amend their state constitution. Republicans know abortion bans are massively unpopular among voters everywhere. And they know they can’t win unless they rig our government for GOP corruption. Ohio WFP has joined a coalition of progressive organizing groups to collect the over 400,000 signatures needed to put the amendment to enshrine abortion rights in the Ohio Constitution on the ballot this November, and organize the voters of Ohio in defiance of the legislature's anti-democracy efforts. BRANDON JOHNSON SWORN IN AS MAYOR OF CHICAGO Brandon Johnson was sworn in as mayor of Chicago. Check out this great interview on how United Working Families (UWF) members in Chicago and WFP supporters nationwide were crucial to building the multiracial progressive movement we needed to win this election, and hopes for the future with UWF director Emma Tai in UPCOMING EVENTS Join us at Campaign Camp — a fun-filled and FREE virtual training series we hold on Tuesdays and Thursday nights in the month of June to provide grassroots organizers and activists with the tools they need to win elections and continue fighting for the poor, the working class, and the marginalized in moments like this. Apply now to attend our next session, Targeting and Progressive Election Math , happening tomorrow, June 8th at 7PM ET. Can’t make it? You can still apply and select to attend any of our upcoming modules — whether it’s just one, or a few, or all of them! In less than two weeks, Virginia voters have the opportunity to take a stand against abortion bans and abusive utility monopolies by nominating Lashrecse Aird and Sally Hudson for State Senate. Join our virtual volunteer phone bank TONIGHT, June 7th at 6PM ET to make an impact in two of the most important elections of the year. On Thursday, June 15th at 7PM ET, join WFP members old and new for our monthly Welcome Gathering! On the call, you’ll have the chance to meet people who share your vision of a world where we can thrive, and not just survive — and learn how you can get involved in making that vision a reality. In June’s edition of the WFP Study Group: Reading for the Revolution, we’ll be discussing Becoming Abolitionists by Derecka Purnell. On Saturday, June 24 at 1PM ET we’ll talk as a group about what the book means for our work and how we can apply its lessons to our own advocacy work. Thanks for taking the time to read more about what our party’s been up to, Peter. It’s been a busy cycle, and our work to deliver the transformative change this country needs isn’t slowing down anytime soon. But the policies, leadership, and future(s) we seek requires us to take on some of the world’s most powerful, moneyed interests. This kind of fight takes a lot of resources — and we rely on your support. Thank you, All of us at the Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. ** Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . The NDRC’s movement helped secure what the _New York Times_ called “the fairest House map of the last 40 years.” We also helped elect Democracy Defenders in key states across the country, and we helped defeat dangerous election deniers.

**But just like President Obama said, we’re not slowing down – instead, our plan is to _double down_ on our democracy-saving work in priority states across the country where we’ll fight to:**
✅ **PROTECT** our fair maps victories.

✅ **PREVENT** GOP efforts to gerrymander maps and weaken our democracy.

✅ **PROPEL** toward a fair redistricting process, both now and in the future.
The NDRC counts on this grassroots team to power our work. We know not everyone can give every time we ask, but if even just 20% of the people reading this message pitch in, it will go a long way. As President Obama said, **“While the pace of change can often be slow, a small group of people can still help us take a giant leap forward.”**
**Please, team: Will you support our democracy-saving work with a donation today?**

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: before tomorrow's meeting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friend, tomorrow morning, I'm sitting down with my campaign team to finalize our strategic priorities for the coming quarter.
I'm proud of what we've already accomplished in this session of Congress — from reintroducing the FAMILY Act to keeping Social Security cuts out of the debt ceiling deal. At the same time, I'm proud of the campaign we've been building to defend the Senate in 2024 and flip House seats here in New York back to blue.
But at the end of the day, it's _your_ opinion on all of this that matters so much more than mine. And it's _your_ feedback that's so crucial ahead of big strategic meetings like the one tomorrow. I wish that I could just grab a coffee with you to hear all about your ideas and concerns. **But since that's not possible, I've had my team put together a special June Democratic Priorities Survey for supporters like you.**
_[**Please, will you join my June Democratic Priorities Survey before midnight tonight to share your thoughts on my work in the Senate and our campaign strategy? My team is counting on 5,000 responses before midnight, so please, respond as soon as you can.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64490927/410229311/-416756422?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=10&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4197-su-nd&refcode=jtk4197-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzdiNmQwNi03MDA1LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UfzTNJAq8DNgb94gR-G7AdhU8YFe4s77EEWqz8UbG7Y=&emci=dded6b91-3705-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=237b6d06-7005-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)_

— Kirsten
|
* * *
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64490931/410229315/1575385346?code=jtk4197-su-nd&refcode=jtk4197-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzdiNmQwNi03MDA1LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UfzTNJAq8DNgb94gR-G7AdhU8YFe4s77EEWqz8UbG7Y=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64490932/410229318/1575385346?code=jtk4197-su-nd&refcode=jtk4197-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzdiNmQwNi03MDA1LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UfzTNJAq8DNgb94gR-G7AdhU8YFe4s77EEWqz8UbG7Y=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64490933/410229319/1575385346?code=jtk4197-su-nd&refcode=jtk4197-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzdiNmQwNi03MDA1LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UfzTNJAq8DNgb94gR-G7AdhU8YFe4s77EEWqz8UbG7Y=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Team Swalwell
subject: If You Give an Extremist an Inch…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
They’ll make a laughingstock of Congress. |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64491545/410231448/-662322978?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDdhZWExZi03MjA1LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kzX-3peb0KWhdSWSDkkFFJkhoJu5hkdlW-H-Kxw9UA0=)
**You know that kid’s book,_If You Give a Mouse a Cookie_? Well, friend, we present to you Washington’s sequel: _If You Give an Extremist an Inch_.** To get you up to speed, McCarthy couldn’t whip the votes of the Freedom Caucus (a.k.a. the most extreme of Washington’s MAGA extremists) back in January, so he lost the Speaker vote _14 times_ and held up all action in Congress for days. As a last ditch attempt to get the lingering lunatics on his side, he agreed to a House rule that would allow a single member to call for a vote on removing the House leader. **The no-confidence vote would only need a simple majority to oust him.** That’s why following the debt ceiling vote, members of the Freedom Caucus have flip flopped on their threat to hold a vote and give McCarthy the boot for good. And because the MAGA-right can’t get their act together, they’re holding up House business _again_. **_Come on._** We might as well call this crew for what it really is: _the Failure Caucus._ While the MAGA mob continues to flail, Democrats are standing together to protect our democracy from the MAGA mob. [**Help us bring order back to Washington and get these petulant children out of office in 2024 so we can get back to what’s _really_ important: delivering for the American people.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64491546/410231449/-1733728394?refcode=E21659-20230607-McCarthyFreedomCaucus-SL-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDdhZWExZi03MjA1LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kzX-3peb0KWhdSWSDkkFFJkhoJu5hkdlW-H-Kxw9UA0=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: They’ll make a laughingstock of Congress. | Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. = You know that kid’s book,If You Give a Mouse a Cookie? Well, friend, we present to you Washington’s sequel: If You Give an Extremist an Inch. To get you up to speed, McCarthy couldn’t whip the votes of the Freedom Caucus (a.k.a. the most extreme of Washington’s MAGA extremists) back in January, so he lost the Speaker vote 14 times and held up all action in Congress for days. As a last ditch attempt to get the lingering lunatics on his side, he agreed to a House rule that would allow a single member to call for a vote on removing the House leader. The no-confidence vote would only need a simple majority to oust him. That’s why following the debt ceiling vote, members of the Freedom Caucus have flip flopped on their threat to hold a vote and give McCarthy the boot for good. And because the MAGA-right can’t get their act together, they’re holding up House business again. Come on. We might as well call this crew for what it really is: the Failure Caucus. Friends,

In November 2021, a Jan. 6 insurrectionist showed up to my school board meeting in Tustin. I’ll never forget what he said: “You’re going to have an army attacking you.”

MAGA extremists like these have harassed school board members across the country.

Honestly, I feel bad for these people. They’re misguided by self-serving politicians who are swarming America with culture wars and misleading millions of Americans.

In order for us to be able to stand up to them, we need to win back the House Democratic Majority. And every congressional seat matters. That’s why it’s so important to flip CA-40.

Can you pitch in whatever you’re able to afford to my campaign for Congress and help me flip CA-40 blue? I need 75 donations today. >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_email_2023q2?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.06.07_B1_FlipCA-40

DONATE >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_email_2023q2?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.06.07_B1_FlipCA-40

The reality is we simply can’t afford to be governed by politicians who’ll put their extreme party agenda over what’s best for the country.

MAGA extremists have made it clear that they’re going to continue to wage their culture wars, which is moving our country backwards.

I want to move our country forward, and flipping CA-40 blue is a step in that direction.

Friends, whatever you’re able to afford today will go a long way to help me stand up to MAGA extremists for CA-40. Like I mentioned earlier, I need 75 donations today. >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_email_2023q2?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.06.07_B1_FlipCA-40

I’m grateful for your support, thank you!

– Allyson

subject: What They Are Saying About Chris Christie
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Tell It Like It Is PAC
body:
Latest Headlines | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/acd6293452f0/what-they-are-saying-about-chris-christie-13528773?e=d0a9afa930)

# What They Are Saying About
# Chris Christie
## _“He’s a guy who tells it like it is, can prosecute a case, and has a hell of a knockout punch.”_
|
---

[The Wall Street Journal Editorial Board](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=cd76b4c1db&e=d0a9afa930): “Mr. Christie’s pitch is that _**he can put his prosecutor’s experience to use in telling hard truths about Mr. Trump**_ , among other things... Most of the GOP’s other 2024 contenders, by contrast, continue to treat Mr. Trump as if they’re handling unexploded ordnance.”
**FOX News’** [Brit Hume](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=4929441b3a&e=d0a9afa930): “One thing he will do that some of the other candidates may be hesitant to do, _**he will, as he has, take on Donald Trump directly**_. That can be effective. It was effective when he took on Marco Rubio in the 2016 campaign. And in the end, of course, I think he did real damage there in the 2016 campaign.”
[Judge Andrew Napolitano](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=cd64c238b8&e=d0a9afa930): “Chris is _**one of the toughest guys**_ I have ever met, and also _**one of the smartest**_.”
* “He is one tough SOB who _**will not be cowed by Donald Trump**_.”

[Governor Larry Hogan](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=330bfb46b5&e=d0a9afa930): “Best of luck to my friend Governor Christie. _**He’s a guy who tells it like it is, can prosecute a case, and has a hell of a knockout punch**_.”
[Andrew Yang](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=1ec49fd37e&e=d0a9afa930): “ _**People who want to see someone really go after Trump should be hoping Chris Christie makes the debate stage**_ \- he’s literally spent years gearing up for it and is comfortable in that mode and setting.”
**MSNBC’s** [Steve Kornacki](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=0108763af3&e=d0a9afa930): “Christie’s got a different stage presence, Christie’s got a different style... But, it could l _**and a punch against Trump that nobody in nearly a decade**_ now of watching Trump interact with the Republican Party — that nobody has managed to land.”
[Fox News](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=b4769b1ec1&e=d0a9afa930): “Considered _**one of the best communicators in the GOP**_... has become one of the former president's most vocal GOP critics...Christie, known during his tenure for the kind of in-your-face politics that Trump has also mastered, has argued that he’s got the debate chops to potentially take down Trump should he face off with the former president.”
[National Review](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=d7d3b449bd&e=d0a9afa930): “[Christie’s] willingness to face the elephant in the room — Trump’s lingering influence — could prove catalytic for the GOP. _**His choice to challenge, question, and critique is a stark departure from the echoes in the room**_ ... If nothing else, it may be the spark needed to ignite a new debate about the party’s future and core values, a conversation that may ultimately lead to a stronger, more united GOP.”
[Politico](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=ee130e7c9a&e=d0a9afa930): “As a former federal prosecutor with a sharp tongue, though, Christie’s political acumen gives him perhaps the best chance of anyone to make the case against Trump. _**Unlike other candidates who have avoided directly criticizing Trump, Christie has taken him head on,**_ calling the former president a “puppet of Putin” for his position on the Ukraine war and blaming him for Republican losses the last several years.”
[The New York Times](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=436fd77b86&e=d0a9afa930): “As he enters the race, Mr. Christie has cast himself as t _**he one candidate unafraid to give voice to the frustrations of Republicans who have watched Mr. Trump transform the party and have had enough**_ — either of the ideological direction or the years of compounding electoral losses.”
[Philadelphia Inquirer](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=0690b96ba6&e=d0a9afa930): “Christie’s second bid is all about **unleashing his tell-it-like-it-is Jersey toughness on former President Donald Trump and a growing field of Republicans who thus far have been tepid** about engaging directly with the front-runner.”
[The Hill Headline](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=c8b2f153d7&e=d0a9afa930): “How Chris Christie Could Be A Wild Card In 2024 GOP Race”
* “No Republican gets elected twice as governor of a blue state like New Jersey without political skills. And the former governor can be a _**formidable debater**_. In 2016, he famously embarrassed Sen. Marco Rubio (R-Fla.) so badly in one clash that it was perceived to have ruined Rubio’s chances in the race.”

[Wall Street Journal’s Peggy Noonan](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=d4df79954d&e=d0a9afa930): “When I think of him in debate with Mr. Trump, I think of the old World War II movies in which the captain of the sub is at the periscope and sees the enemy warship. ‘Right full rudder.’ ‘Load torpedo bay.’ ‘Fire torpedo one.’”
* “The other candidates, announced and potential, are leery of Mr. Trump—his pull with their own supporters, his success as the nickname assassin. But _**Mr. Christie would open up a can of Jersey on him.”**_

[New York Times’ Michelle Cottle:](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=bb51fb6090&e=d0a9afa930) _**“This race needs a brawler in the mix...”**_ _**“If he could go bully-a-bully with the former president, things could get interesting for the first time in forever**_. In 2016, no Republicans went hard at Mr. Trump because no one took him seriously. This time, most are too afraid of him.”

-###-
|

|
---

Ron DeSantis and his presidential run. We need your input, Peter:** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64491773/410232150/-2147054774?sourceid=1050167&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzI2NGEzZS03MzA1LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dmpM7ghEl96cz5fkLjz_s5smMyRybmfVOdqEobOJU70=&emci=420f9f37-7305-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=ac264a3e-7305-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Peter,

Before I started as the vice president of Digital at EMILYs List, I worked in Florida politics — so I've seen _firsthand_ the damage done by Gov. Ron DeSantis and his hateful agenda.

You're a supporter of Democratic pro-choice women, so you know as well as anyone that Ron DeSantis is one of the most dangerous forces in American politics today. His anti-choice, anti-democratic attacks on women, children, people of color, and LGBTQ+ folks are ceaseless, heartless, and devastating for Florida's most vulnerable communities.

As the head of the EMILYs List digital team, it's my job to keep you up-to-date on our organization's mission and priorities. And it's also my job to keep our team up-to-date with _you_ : What are _your_ priorities this cycle? What are you most concerned about?

**So, Peter, as we prepare to fight back hard against Republicans like Ron DeSantis and everything they stand for, we want to hear from you. Will you fill out this quick survey — and let us know what you think about the Florida governor and his right-wing extremism?** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64491774/410232151/-2147054774?sourceid=1050167&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzI2NGEzZS03MzA1LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dmpM7ghEl96cz5fkLjz_s5smMyRybmfVOdqEobOJU70=&emci=420f9f37-7305-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=ac264a3e-7305-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Thank you for your input,

Cayana Mackey-Nance (she/her/hers)
Vice President of Digital, EMILYs List

## Why Chris Christie:

Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America.

Did you see this, Friend? Chris Christie has just announced that he is running for President of the United States! | You and I both know that we need Chris Christie on the Republican debate stage because he is unafraid to TELL IT LIKE IT IS. His Tell It Like It Is attitude helped improve the lives of those who lived there. His work shows that he's the leader we need. Thank you, Brian Executive Director Tell It Like It Is PAC | Why Chris Christie: Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Is the America you see today, Fellow American, the America you envisioned?

Is this the end of faith, patriotism, hard work, and ideals that this great nation was founded on?

_Not if I have anything to say about it._ I am on a mission to save the country that allowed me to achieve the American Dream. I was born and raised in Cincinnati, Ohio, to immigrant parents who came to this country the right way, legally, and with little money. Through hard work, I graduated from Harvard and then earned my JD from Yale Law. I went on to build multi-billion dollar businesses, which created jobs and developed lifesaving medicines. **[Now, I am running for President of the United States.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ea2118c1a15a421db18aab840198dab7&_e=g8C7ONVtx-IeMEcKPhz2vIgXDw1LKN36TuaTzQCrHfjD2shG-1Q68bfDRRdVFjoe1lEurPlfeV3CAS8EftAqC-uAFfJm1jMRC4jiMgxKrPgq-LorQUFLfWX_MXTHprjCEgcxfCSMZ0RMEiMd9W09O5zgy4N6cMefzHS7-fAA-4aanegabeWH85e6PV8In343eO3uobOx5-1-XuxXXeagTBtnakshGaWFQ38on5FaMDPlp19GIGK_48RdbZnYwVJsi1aZaaukEvJC5JBz7ZN8jBjgj24Vtpe5ANOzQt_oZ_6CEt-vbmdj8lLgCho1en_nrf6bmN3mjQbniiXWHXrkvWRQXOo_UGgumoi3Vifn9nP_zrbR12sZgoOMJnnERepC01u3UftdYBrsgHVOy39Muw%3D%3D)**

The American Dream is still alive. We can still save it. Neighbor to neighbor, ally to ally, and patriot to patriot. **We need to act now.**

**And that's why I am running for President of the United States.**

The past three years under Joe Biden and the liberal left have been a disaster. The left has driven their agenda based on divisive politics, aggressive degradation of our culture, and lack of responsibility for future generations. In response we must:

| [** RESTORE BELIEF IN MERIT **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ea2118c1a15a421db18aab840198dab7&_e=g8C7ONVtx-IeMEcKPhz2vIgXDw1LKN36TuaTzQCrHfjD2shG-1Q68bfDRRdVFjoe1lEurPlfeV3CAS8EftAqC-uAFfJm1jMRC4jiMgxKrPgq-LorQUFLfWX_MXTHprjCEgcxfCSMZ0RMEiMd9W09O5zgy4N6cMefzHS7-fAA-4aanegabeWH85e6PV8In343eO3uobOx5-1-XuxXXeagTBtnakshGaWFQ38on5FaMDPlp19GIGK_48RdbZnYwVJs6DVkc_mpPfwEovNlQG6KqtuYMUP-HT0ly_kf6_YQ_d1MBotYYDwFqSR9S7vFe1Z5LyWSp60A0qYW7hyQ_umkICq67yuLLqC51SxFEKcdogi2UbHTywoDD-oeKDFYjxCndfJEsAxpmrf0HhDK0b5UxQ%3D%3D)

[** RESTORE BELIEF IN ACCOUNTABILITY **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ea2118c1a15a421db18aab840198dab7&_e=g8C7ONVtx-IeMEcKPhz2vIgXDw1LKN36TuaTzQCrHfjD2shG-1Q68bfDRRdVFjoe1lEurPlfeV3CAS8EftAqC-uAFfJm1jMRC4jiMgxKrPgq-LorQUFLfWX_MXTHprjCEgcxfCSMZ0RMEiMd9W09O5zgy4N6cMefzHS7-fAA-4aanegabeWH85e6PV8In343eO3uobOx5-1-XuxXXeagTBtnakshGaWFQ38on5FaMDPlp19GIGK_48RdbZnYwVJsZ2ZB3J7OYrCQdCOqiatTWNN7520q53g08Mcb-MNjJWRb7v-Ti6JE9hh8mvxPQmEHD2sw_WCqsA0iFPS-3AFgnaSF6mPba8MQlwq30eVtb-b2HyWwO3SFXYYSCHdeM2scBikhaJz_1ZoVCciolp-yHg%3D%3D)

Fellow American, if these ideals resonate with you, you're an American patriot. We're ready to fight for the future of America - because if we don't, we may truly lose our identity. If we can unite through the radicalism of the ideals that bound us together 250 years ago, the Dream for this country isn't over.

**[Will you join me? Please take just a few minutes to watch my launch video- and join Team Vivek by chipping in $1 or even $5 today as I continue my presidential campaign.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ea2118c1a15a421db18aab840198dab7&_e=g8C7ONVtx-IeMEcKPhz2vIgXDw1LKN36TuaTzQCrHfjD2shG-1Q68bfDRRdVFjoe1lEurPlfeV3CAS8EftAqC-uAFfJm1jMRC4jiMgxKrPgq-LorQUFLfWX_MXTHprjCEgcxfCSMZ0RMEiMd9W09O5zgy4N6cMefzHS7-fAA-4aanegabeWH85e6PV8In343eO3uobOx5-1-XuxXXeagTBtnakshGaWFQ38on5FaMDPlp19GIGK_48RdbZnYwVJsb4o90G40_6VTBeDUNyjFMCAvZGPlSKmBdANlMmIPM1eDfrf9QHteeWZp6CSuo2xGj5AclgjMiMqzeQQc0B1Mjja_uaH-BZAtPa8ObPtERS6Z6nHHjOT-gTIAllrO7TqX52cpZ9SLXrjFXoin6B_-GQ%3D%3D)**

Fellow American, it's time to stand up to the ruling party in America. Obsessing over race and group identity will divide us. We are Americans and the ideals that founded this country 250 years ago, still exist today. Your voice deserves to be heard. My presidential campaign is designed to elevate you, not the federal bureaucracies that would otherwise silence you. **[Join me in fighting for and taking back the American Dream.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ea2118c1a15a421db18aab840198dab7&_e=g8C7ONVtx-IeMEcKPhz2vIgXDw1LKN36TuaTzQCrHfjD2shG-1Q68bfDRRdVFjoe1lEurPlfeV3CAS8EftAqC-uAFfJm1jMRC4jiMgxKrPgq-LorQUFLfWX_MXTHprjCEgcxfCSMZ0RMEiMd9W09O5zgy4N6cMefzHS7-fAA-4aanegabeWH85e6PV8In343eO3uobOx5-1-XuxXXeagTBtnakshGaWFQ38on5FaMDPlp19GIGK_48RdbZnYwVJsWHN0lm5fax6jV_XHzs6Pw_891KBx5n8sxOtNnHVCk-W9heWtZ7l5oEmMi2uY4hrAYz8TmvhJCKM3KJfbJ8nazQL82qD71uSarDScYNg2LBXBCHANimQteVDjJmvnuQ80eR6V7lWb6pbEAaEeKwY3zw%3D%3D)**

Thanks,

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ea2118c1a15a421db18aab840198dab7&_e=g8C7ONVtx-IeMEcKPhz2vIgXDw1LKN36TuaTzQCrHfjD2shG-1Q68bfDRRdVFjoe1lEurPlfeV3CAS8EftAqC-uAFfJm1jMRC4jiMgxKrPgq-LorQUFLfWX_MXTHprjCEgcxfCSMZ0RMEiMd9W09O5zgy4N6cMefzHS7-fAA-4aanegabeWH85e6PV8In343eO3uobOx5-1-XuxXXeagTBtnakshGaWFQ38on5FaMDPlp19GIGK_48RdbZnYwVJsX-dDXuIAJCzV38Us05KQW51SCQ8tTRfynT50xBhiMPXFr9RwiQwxaryNkcS1EumOCwCAwr4TTqP0ogCMljxj5Odxz5BtP_2goyNhc8NFbYEC-MdcK_hjKYvKg665tlc4ethSEti-DBPSyf1mXRyujQ%3D%3D)

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: If you're going to stand out, you might as well be outstanding. | | Is the America you see today, Fellow American, the America you envisioned? Is this the end of faith, patriotism, hard work, and ideals that this great nation was founded on? Not if I have anything to say about it. I am on a mission to save the country that allowed me to achieve the American Dream. I was born and raised in Cincinnati, Ohio, to immigrant parents who came to this country the right way, legally, and with little money. Through hard work, I graduated from Harvard and then earned my JD from Yale Law. I went on to build multi-billion dollar businesses, which created jobs and developed lifesaving medicines. The American Dream is still alive. We can still save it. Neighbor to neighbor, ally to ally, and patriot to patriot. We need to act now. And that's why I am running for President of the United States. The past three years under Joe Biden and the liberal left have been a disaster. The left has driven their agenda based on divisive politics, aggressive degradation of our culture, and lack of responsibility for future generations. In response we must: | Fellow American, if these ideals resonate with you, you're an American patriot. We're ready to fight for the future of America - because if we don't, we may truly lose our identity. If we can unite through the radicalism of the ideals that bound us together 250 years ago, the Dream for this country isn't over. Fellow American, it's time to stand up to the ruling party in America. Obsessing over race and group identity will divide us. We are Americans and the ideals that founded this country 250 years ago, still exist today. Your voice deserves to be heard. My presidential campaign is designed to elevate you, not the federal bureaucracies that would otherwise silence you. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. | | Derek, This Alzheimer's and Brain Awareness Month, I’m reaching out to you once again, not only as a concerned advocate but as someone who understands the personal toll Alzheimer's takes on individuals and their loved ones. I lost my mother after a 10-year battle with Alzheimer's and I saw firsthand the challenges of this terrible disease. But I am certainly not alone in experiencing this heartbreaking loss — 6.7 million Americans, including tens of thousands of Virginians, are currently living with Alzheimer’s. And by 2060, barring any major breakthroughs to prevent, slow down, or cure Alzheimer’s, _that number is expected to more than double._ That’s why I’m proud to have worked with my colleagues to introduce a pair of bipartisan bills that will enhance our national plan to tackle the disease. **_[Before I get into exactly why these pieces of legislation are so vital, would you consider donating today to support my work in Congress for Alzheimer’s research and prevention?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64491954/410232821/-1338301352?refcode=mw_em_230607_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWQ4ZDkzOS03NDA1LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lUWnww-N1zCx4V1LPi72BTWtTjHZIV0djJlEZazdXOE=)_** I’ve introduced two bills to extend and modernize the National Alzheimer's Project, the federal program that implements our national Alzheimer’s research strategy. They will cement a long-term federal commitment to curing Alzheimer’s Disease and help the National Alzheimer’s Project explore new areas of research. Our bipartisan bills aim to expedite the national strategy to discover a remedy to support the countless American families affected by this illness. Regardless of political affiliation, Alzheimer's Disease remains indifferent. Its toll on patients and the substantial financial investment in treatment all contribute to the nation's collective burden, which only grows as we delay finding a cure. **_[Pitch in $5 today to join me in the fight to end this terrible disease>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64491955/410232822/-1338301352?refcode=mw_em_230607_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWQ4ZDkzOS03NDA1LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lUWnww-N1zCx4V1LPi72BTWtTjHZIV0djJlEZazdXOE=)_** Thank you for all your support, Mark Warner ******[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64491956/410232823/-1338301352?refcode=mw_em_230607_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWQ4ZDkzOS03NDA1LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lUWnww-N1zCx4V1LPi72BTWtTjHZIV0djJlEZazdXOE=)******

| | Friend, You folks know this is a topic I’m passionate about—and it’s coming into the light once again. A former intelligence official is [blowing the whistle](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=100ffd4c0c8444fc8dec21a01f0a245f&_e=9gYljZG-AM7gEfNb0nYlJzkK_hr9SWFupxbQuuAssvli83MnmykDeYWEICDhzxl91BnOD9DrC70lV27JjZ8p6fevhJ3zGX5O3NHEi3SjKjusEGaQLbMVoEbwy2vhLT4-s4oSCIQO3aTYydW1yn0KDwOXyvSX1vZaeQxowMzcJh9dPCSBc1E8PsL_WNnynqn3BN_WYi8g4eHK_pE4cZ1tC-nV2QW_XrnkmDjBC9v_SQTZKskoe7KSw-WbkVmZlMm5g0iCZz8gFDxL1zkSBMisqw%3D%3D), claiming there is a top-secret military program studying both fully intact and partially intact UFOs. David Grusch, a decorated former combat officer, says the information is being illegally withheld from Congress (not to mention the American people). But he’s not the only one making claims. Other intelligence officials with knowledge of these programs have provided [similar details](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=100ffd4c0c8444fc8dec21a01f0a245f&_e=9gYljZG-AM7gEfNb0nYlJyy7DOVU-l8KcizhfLmWKtgwOnwoN4mKn03pYReumyHGdRdF2BUfl5bgTyi7xb3QChahGCr432tBW8BTgxmJgkYVornXTWvhUEXzNIFC171cya5tcCG6zDg1keHMBant6yOa9_jnXrw_gSTFIZn3o9Ey2uAuGmHG9ok3tE3AByPkRND_e847vtnnzmG_983eLgikHAXlM_AIIXwtaE8Zm_AvZW3xAhSoQBAKJzapSX5yVBxAwjrhCGbkLCyOMUVHfxzqIVOwHT692jvs-21Oiiw%3D). The arrogance of our federal government is on full display here. They have been quiet on the subject for too long, dodging every important probe. We need a fresh start and new answers, not an explanation about one or two encounters. Heck, most new sightings come from our own [Navy and Air Force aviators](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=100ffd4c0c8444fc8dec21a01f0a245f&_e=9gYljZG-AM7gEfNb0nYlJ7tHAwSUsJ696i8taAseVZh3r58ccbN24JiK4qyvXJ1jff_XcXyTbeuijS3FBvB4EkYBRKO-qCnxqB5seidI9j50OYIJZQ3AXYKEaEJUar1xyrsD7h1M8RGm8W5ivSINtN7kfZATXzJTpEi5VN6CDIQX9--NOzACiUXmT88ffRO2EGQ9tsTUnTP2dgNZJgnBPbb7j-9XWfF2OJptlVZ12qduFgpmrQKQbAVb5AquOuqSNApRy98Zjt7eGWC_lLgXB0Kkzs77uuCQskAlN7SnKxQoc0Gi2HncR10hDmsBYr9Q). That makes this a safety issue for our military. **[Our leaders aren’t being transparent—and I won’t pipe down about it. Will you stand with me as I demand answers?](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=100ffd4c0c8444fc8dec21a01f0a245f&_e=9gYljZG-AM7gEfNb0nYlJ34fy-tqnAT-YTWMlM-ZD918Oh3bEP_XxHuUlwmxOq5YFTUyRYJyVJDUjpVi8I3nP5s79FNUfE7LOht0-cN9mvCG2oiKFeCr57Xc5zkpjX3TMoH7b_2PZMP3pwOArcy7TKAfXnQLj3Z9FzqV4JcitaF4K54fNtqwtWJIUUs5Tb1t0RUy4g0txRfDgzMmImS9FYbCFJ0e6G1bKgp40BeHx-Y8mWWf6OPIxSXlOjd1XvpevEwWYpet1K-Eoo0SbgoPwmRxYFPTMHkDlEJV-kmQjhjZf01mMUihKnVfWJI4ANgdiwTSoNS_whVnkATe3vmUs8d-dWXwdH0A3cQRdH-icD0%3D)**

A former intelligence official is , claiming there is a top-secret military program studying both fully intact and partially intact UFOs. David Grusch, a decorated former combat officer, says the information is being illegally withheld from Congress (not to mention the American people). But he’s not the only one making claims. Other intelligence officials with knowledge of these programs have provided . The arrogance of our federal government is on full display here. They have been quiet on the subject for too long, dodging every important probe. We need a fresh start and new answers, not an explanation about one or two encounters. Heck, most new sightings come from our own . That makes this a safety issue for our military. People deserve to know the truth, whatever it may be. Perhaps we’ll get to the bottom of it this time around.
