name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Record Number of Foreigners on FBI Terror Watchlist Caught Crossing into U.S. Via Mexico
body:
While the Biden administration and its media allies highlight that
illegal immigration has dropped considerably since the termination of
a Trump-era restriction, a record number of suspected terrorists have
been caught trying to enter the U.S. through Mexico.

[alt_text]

[*****]
June 07, 2023

[article-image]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63654&L=29649&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZm9yZWlnbmVycy1jYXVnaHQtYXQtYm9yZGVyLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=003b3561a97a14349ca599aced0abe2d83c2f6b992ee926d6c8708c0cac7180c]

While the Biden administration and its media allies highlight that
illegal immigration has dropped considerably since the termination of
a Trump-era restriction, a record number of suspected terrorists have
been caught trying to enter the U.S. through Mexico. Not surprisingly,
mainstream news reports have focused on the positive effect that the
expiration of a COVID-related rule known as Title 42 has had on
migration. One story claims encounters between federal agents and
illegal aliens have dropped by half since the administration nixed the
emergency public health order implemented by Trump to quickly expel
migrants from the country.

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=25d7706aeabf42d89b2865452169e184&_e=Ri4gB_uA6EgqWN-h-AJE2hgMEt64cJ0quju6q8gDr5ja2ybLb4yaoobs__j72vAMFormgBLekO0ek1J45fclS3_3OO4W68Rp4l0dDwMxQa_OAQBxjBxeBwLm8jtdJqyAoGEiMX_Yt0oL9nH0hJGdEYa9YIMXgTr-7LU6N_r0hVj0hznA39J_wJKAUuquXxKEeJg3U9SqNlUIppxsl9bs2jUJg4CXGq1CrBLzr1Mpbz-4G-sOgJZKiFKngg3mvgIzXd_KoM0muTc1PXCmHb0dx_IY1B0NpPZbFdqWjdMs6VixIjopVCqr1800s3k21Fwx95OrkRKRrUYt7vC1LQvd_x4Pv2yFX85zJEcv23D7kFGq4_7E8T_MH3h9drg145ar2HKMVTA3OaRQLv8CQtnGDw%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=25d7706aeabf42d89b2865452169e184&_e=Ri4gB_uA6EgqWN-h-AJE2hgMEt64cJ0quju6q8gDr5ja2ybLb4yaoobs__j72vAMFormgBLekO0ek1J45fclS3_3OO4W68Rp4l0dDwMxQa_OAQBxjBxeBwLm8jtdJqyAoGEiMX_Yt0oL9nH0hJGdEYa9YIMXgTr-7LU6N_r0hVj0hznA39J_wJKAUuquXxKEeJg3U9SqNlUIppxsl9bs2jUJg4CXGq1CrBLzr1Mpbz-4G-sOgJZKiFKngg3mvgIzDbBfm4ht7rBHdEnNx4NjJpyys6r6cCQSJr6_hhKwrxGcwdic-JO5VUqcP_DJQFrVMxDv7MgtjCT0gNaaQkKDWCK3hN1PBvz2_EXhvQkPgPQprpXM7n1C55zDYdNq5ARekSEwXjwozn9jKJ54LLtm5g%3D%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=25d7706aeabf42d89b2865452169e184&_e=Ri4gB_uA6EgqWN-h-AJE2hgMEt64cJ0quju6q8gDr5ja2ybLb4yaoobs__j72vAMFormgBLekO0ek1J45fclS3_3OO4W68Rp4l0dDwMxQa_OAQBxjBxeBwLm8jtdJqyAoGEiMX_Yt0oL9nH0hJGdEYa9YIMXgTr-7LU6N_r0hVj0hznA39J_wJKAUuquXxKEeJg3U9SqNlUIppxsl9bs2jUJg4CXGq1CrBLzr1Mpbz-4G-sOgJZKiFKngg3mvgIzKeKD2XQ20qGZD9Rvr0N3_v8iULMSeu2lVKnokz7D1Zwb9Bg7WH_odv04_Oh3ufytIyWhdvy3VgxtQ_nCouc71Ygc1bRt-7IGLo3Fr5V0KBQ3QPajCvt2B4bC1ts8gm2g5AmbGrsU1Mhyi1dm1-_v9Q%3D%3D) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Conservative Liberty Wire
---

name: Steve Scalise
subject: re: Finance update for fellow patriots
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hudson for Congress
body:
| | | Fellow American, I wanted to take a moment to give you a brief campaign finance update as we prepare to head into 2024.

The Federal Election Commission recently raised contribution limits to 14%, which is giving power-brokers in Silicon Valley and Hollywood even more opportunity to fund Socialist Democrats.

We’re seeing their numbers skyrocket and, as we kick off races across the country, we need your urgent help to keep up.

**There is absolutely NO time to waste, and if we don’t get to work now, we won't be able to make up for lost time in 2024.**

clean_body: | | | Fellow American, I wanted to take a moment to give you a brief campaign finance update as we prepare to head into 2024. The Federal Election Commission recently raised contribution limits to 14%, which is giving power-brokers in Silicon Valley and Hollywood even more opportunity to fund Socialist Democrats. We’re seeing their numbers skyrocket and, as we kick off races across the country, we need your urgent help to keep up. There is absolutely NO time to waste, and if we don’t get to work now, we won't be able to make up for lost time in 2024. The Republican Party is fueled by grassroots patriots like you. Without hardworking conservatives across America, we would never be able to achieve the historic wins we have for our country. And just like when we took back our Majority in 2022, we can’t win on our own. With the new contribution limits, your support is more important than ever, and we’re counting on you. - Thank you, Steve Scalise | | Paid for by Hudson for Congress | | If you no longer wish to receive emails, .

Peter, Republicans across the country, even right here in Indiana, threatened to hold our economy hostage if they didn’t get what they wanted in the most recent negotiations around the debt ceiling. Playing chicken with important social programs that people depend on is not a game, it’s downright dangerous. But from their latest moves, it’s clear that this is just a big game for many Congressional Republicans, and we need to hold them to account. [**Donate to the Indiana Democratic Party today and help us get representatives who will advocate for our needs, not hold them hostage for political gain.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64493159/410237642/1643342139?refcode=230607-BadActors&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjgzNjlkNC03OTA1LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4Q-_3lCNwvDTViN20mr3WR-Xb0-eOlWo4RerdSZI9vA=) The Republicans’ most recent move threatened to cut access to important veteran health care programs unless they were able to get all of their extremist policy wishes passed. | Fellow activist, Pennsylvania is the only state electing a state Supreme Court Justice this November, and we’re taking that responsibility seriously.

The winner of this November’s election for PA Supreme Court will shape the political landscape of our Commonwealth for a decade or more — and potentially impact key national races.

So we’re throwing dedicated community events to share the importance of this election with the members of our centered communities, engaging them to ensure they’re ready to vote and more.

clean_body: We’re connecting with our centered communities across the state to share the importance of the Supreme Court election. = | Fellow activist, Pennsylvania is the only state electing a state Supreme Court Justice this November, and we’re taking that responsibility seriously. The winner of this November’s election for PA Supreme Court will shape the political landscape of our Commonwealth for a decade or more — and potentially impact key national races. So we’re throwing dedicated community events to share the importance of this election with the members of our centered communities, engaging them to ensure they’re ready to vote and more. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = In solidarity, Team NPP = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to : October 23, 2023 Last day to : October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. name: Team Scott
subject: We appreciate you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter, It’s Team Rick Scott. We want to take a moment to tell you how much both Senator Scott and our team appreciate you.

Without you on our team, we wouldn’t be able to achieve _anything_.

And now, we’re fueling the conservative fight in Florida. Florida is home to some of the **BRIGHTEST** conservatives America has seen.

We hope to keep Florida as one of the TOP conservative states in America, but we have one last challenge in 2024.

__Senator Rick Scott’s race will be one of the closest in the country and we have EVERYTHING to lose. Last time we won by less than 1% of the vote._ _

Without you on our team, we wouldn’t be able to achieve anything. And now, we’re fueling the conservative fight in Florida. Florida is home to some of the BRIGHTEST conservatives America has seen. We hope to keep Florida as one of the TOP conservative states in America, but we have one last challenge in 2024. Senator Rick Scott’s race will be one of the closest in the country and we have EVERYTHING to lose. Last time we won by less than 1% of the vote. On day ONE the Biden Administration eliminated Trump-era immigration policies that began our historic border crisis.

_Well, now Americans are paying the economic price of these open-border policies as Joe Biden prioritizes illegals over citizens of this country._

**Our county is facing a real-life humanitarian crisis created by Biden himself.**

body:
We could really use your help!
#
Derek, we’ll keep this *very* quick!
Look, the reality for John + other Senate Dems is that fundraising in a year without federal elections slows way, waaaaay down.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230607-1?refcode=em20230607-1-8401&refcode2=8401_434096_-apAGU&akid=8401%2E434096%2E-apAGU)
_Us waiting for ActBlue notifications_ 😔
But the work we’re doing is NOT slowing down. In fact, it’s actually critical that we sustain a strong base of grassroots support to fuel John’s work in the Senate *and* keep up with our fundraising goals as we look towards elections ahead.
**[Can you help us out by chipping in a donation of $5 or anything you can afford right now? We’re hoping that folks like you can help make today our strongest fundraising day of June so far.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230607-1?refcode=em20230607-1-8401&refcode2=8401_434096_-apAGU&akid=8401%2E434096%2E-apAGU)**

body:
| This election could be Tammy's toughest yet.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=382%2E35263%2EKRpC3c)
Peter — Last night, the Wisconsin GOP tweeted about Tammy’s reelection: [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jun23.CtqEq3&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230607_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=382%2E35263%2EKRpC3c) **We know that Tammy has what it takes to win close races — but this election could be her toughest yet.** A recent poll shows Tammy leading Mitch McConnell’s hand-picked GOP candidate by just _one point_. And after how close last year’s Senate race was, national Republicans are going to place a huge target on Wisconsin. **To respond to the attacks coming Tammy’s way, we need to shore up early support. Can you rush in a contribution to defend this Senate seat and the Democratic majority? name: Lateefah Simon
subject: I've seen this movement growing day by day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LATEEFAH FOR CONGRESS
body:
I've been overwhelmed everywhere this campaign goes by the support we get.
# [](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/39?t=1&akid=36%2E1163%2Et0nm4W)
Since I announced my candidacy, I've been overwhelmed by the support of our community.
At meetings and on picket lines, talking to neighbors on the phone and speaking at the California Democratic Party Convention, I've felt it: **People are coming together one by one to create a real movement.** Take a look at a house party where I spoke to some supporters last week:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230607-1?refcode=em20230607-1&refcode2=36_1163_t0nm4W&akid=36%2E1163%2Et0nm4W)
Check out this house party in Berkeley attended by community lawyers, progressive housing advocates, and transit advocates.
**[This momentum we're building wouldn't be possible without the support of folks like you. What do you say, can you make your first $5 contribution to our campaign today to keep building this movement?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230607-1?refcode=em20230607-1&refcode2=36_1163_t0nm4W&akid=36%2E1163%2Et0nm4W)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230607-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230607-1&refcode2=36_1163_t0nm4W&akid=36%2E1163%2Et0nm4W)**
Your contributions truly matter to this grassroots movement, since my team and I have promised we won't take donations from corporate PACs. If you can't chip in right now but read these messages, we appreciate you being here. **[But if you can make a contribution today, it'd help us kick off this campaign strong.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230607-1?refcode=em20230607-1&refcode2=36_1163_t0nm4W&akid=36%2E1163%2Et0nm4W)**
With gratitude,
Lateefah Simon

subject: The American Dream is still alive.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024

Is the America you see today, Fellow American, the America you envisioned?

Is this the end of faith, patriotism, hard work, and ideals that this great nation was founded on?

_Not if I have anything to say about it._ I am on a mission to save the country that allowed me to achieve the American Dream. I was born and raised in Cincinnati, Ohio, to immigrant parents who came to this country the right way, legally, and with little money. Through hard work, I graduated from Harvard and then earned my JD from Yale Law. I went on to build multi-billion dollar businesses, which created jobs and developed lifesaving medicines. **[Now, I am running for President of the United States.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=acf3142e335d488c9fd3b5acb8c70321&_e=sEQJCGvEWg2UMcFLMGzSszvRvL-rK-1KgB8kpAVoqaLWVAfIcmMzw9n10QbdOzouMgdZdLRyaLRiLYt0Kec5Aur-38rE9-MPTfRfqkmXv2wnFyGr2CQkVTqeY7Y-LNnwVLzY-spk_zXJs5ConTNg4ERBeblijRcux66usHGjXcPX6C8EZOn8JTXm1Y79WpxgOu-Ho-2mJYvMNpiS5Qv3-qN0GYpOg6qZwlEs7_ulhUYKhS5fq545MH3sj-DDI3kiIeRGSxmTiH8i-2H30-sflD7bRr5D0M5b9dmsjZ1LWtei9m1mtgpJnz2COhlET_2H45hR2US3tw_V-SoUMPiMxJfPLOHkT-PnyrqMMLcUIj0AT__-JJfb7MIm_F2xaj8gZqRNUnMVWeyswI_NtouM9g%3D%3D)**

The American Dream is still alive. We can still save it. Neighbor to neighbor, ally to ally, and patriot to patriot. **We need to act now.**

**And that's why I am running for President of the United States.**

The past three years under Joe Biden and the liberal left have been a disaster. The left has driven their agenda based on divisive politics, aggressive degradation of our culture, and lack of responsibility for future generations. In response we must:

| [** RESTORE BELIEF IN MERIT **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=acf3142e335d488c9fd3b5acb8c70321&_e=sEQJCGvEWg2UMcFLMGzSszvRvL-rK-1KgB8kpAVoqaLWVAfIcmMzw9n10QbdOzouMgdZdLRyaLRiLYt0Kec5Aur-38rE9-MPTfRfqkmXv2wnFyGr2CQkVTqeY7Y-LNnwVLzY-spk_zXJs5ConTNg4ERBeblijRcux66usHGjXcPX6C8EZOn8JTXm1Y79WpxgOu-Ho-2mJYvMNpiS5Qv3-qN0GYpOg6qZwlEs7_ulhUYKhS5fq545MH3sj-DDI3kiyKyKR6NSF9yiYWbS3Q9j5TkYJrzyh1bxI0wZhkSkml_FSDnGMOXrdVGmzEoYOorwwNJfXkoaFaHyJzfKgmodT3QdpXu_QCm48sLPxgQKgN97Td4G0tWR5knjdUxUijyaftkQrKHiRIoJDhhLxjKewQ%3D%3D)
---

[** RESTORE BELIEF IN ACCOUNTABILITY **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=acf3142e335d488c9fd3b5acb8c70321&_e=sEQJCGvEWg2UMcFLMGzSszvRvL-rK-1KgB8kpAVoqaLWVAfIcmMzw9n10QbdOzouMgdZdLRyaLRiLYt0Kec5Aur-38rE9-MPTfRfqkmXv2wnFyGr2CQkVTqeY7Y-LNnwVLzY-spk_zXJs5ConTNg4ERBeblijRcux66usHGjXcPX6C8EZOn8JTXm1Y79WpxgOu-Ho-2mJYvMNpiS5Qv3-qN0GYpOg6qZwlEs7_ulhUYKhS5fq545MH3sj-DDI3ki1as-kQ53ui4jrt70_oNfvMxk3RvuNZsR8jTV_vzrAvnyhX-oO8e5eV_OozknIraHuEW2ycTFZaFlUr_3jewyHBwh8mSQUOAM4TVTeVxrPxee4X2e-OUwtwOiTEsgD8F-xtbqioKeG6KBfnufxGXZ7w%3D%3D)

[** RESTORE AMERICAN EXCEPTIONALISM **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=acf3142e335d488c9fd3b5acb8c70321&_e=sEQJCGvEWg2UMcFLMGzSszvRvL-rK-1KgB8kpAVoqaLWVAfIcmMzw9n10QbdOzouMgdZdLRyaLRiLYt0Kec5Aur-38rE9-MPTfRfqkmXv2wnFyGr2CQkVTqeY7Y-LNnwVLzY-spk_zXJs5ConTNg4ERBeblijRcux66usHGjXcPX6C8EZOn8JTXm1Y79WpxgOu-Ho-2mJYvMNpiS5Qv3-qN0GYpOg6qZwlEs7_ulhUYKhS5fq545MH3sj-DDI3kiV5XCVtPypOIx5S7wyQNCqxSNnWnJ8Hv87plyXbfYZE3rExZTQWgqr_FRZzkwErI75IV2s-vm0aNqtf44bZUryltU_6NFLiWtdn8RsDocIlTkAG2IBhbvScUABHyj6z9wqT0t1VTWz42BKURrb1geuw%3D%3D)

Fellow American, if these ideals resonate with you, you're an American patriot. We're ready to fight for the future of America - because if we don't, we may truly lose our identity. If we can unite through the radicalism of the ideals that bound us together 250 years ago, the Dream for this country isn't over.

**[Will you join me? Please take just a few minutes to watch my launch video- and join Team Vivek by chipping in $1 or even $5 today as I continue my presidential campaign.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=acf3142e335d488c9fd3b5acb8c70321&_e=sEQJCGvEWg2UMcFLMGzSszvRvL-rK-1KgB8kpAVoqaLWVAfIcmMzw9n10QbdOzouMgdZdLRyaLRiLYt0Kec5Aur-38rE9-MPTfRfqkmXv2wnFyGr2CQkVTqeY7Y-LNnwVLzY-spk_zXJs5ConTNg4ERBeblijRcux66usHGjXcPX6C8EZOn8JTXm1Y79WpxgOu-Ho-2mJYvMNpiS5Qv3-qN0GYpOg6qZwlEs7_ulhUYKhS5fq545MH3sj-DDI3kiTGufyEIjws2yRE687k1rYJqjFD7EjgNOaweKE2ghlVcIh8kf6sejKD_RgKJFqGBDuuwu7rALVNdxPtVSnnYrE-kNRISgScwSIi1fi-70inzfQYGDVIB8b7aR5PwC2w_Dg4hOCj-y8j0Mia8mInEfkA%3D%3D)**

Fellow American, it's time to stand up to the ruling party in America. Obsessing over race and group identity will divide us. We are Americans and the ideals that founded this country 250 years ago, still exist today. Your voice deserves to be heard. My presidential campaign is designed to elevate you, not the federal bureaucracies that would otherwise silence you. **[Join me in fighting for and taking back the American Dream.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=acf3142e335d488c9fd3b5acb8c70321&_e=sEQJCGvEWg2UMcFLMGzSszvRvL-rK-1KgB8kpAVoqaLWVAfIcmMzw9n10QbdOzouMgdZdLRyaLRiLYt0Kec5Aur-38rE9-MPTfRfqkmXv2wnFyGr2CQkVTqeY7Y-LNnwVLzY-spk_zXJs5ConTNg4ERBeblijRcux66usHGjXcPX6C8EZOn8JTXm1Y79WpxgOu-Ho-2mJYvMNpiS5Qv3-qN0GYpOg6qZwlEs7_ulhUYKhS5fq545MH3sj-DDI3ki_CUe4xC3je299MHvpqBoo_GmrJImLUZJbJKxUQvqV-EDlF9DKUNZaKclZZqRCBYEBIgIspjkxRS5MN6w4ZZawuV8FbshODETu6wfRFI4qDYuDfykKIY3-twGp7RL76O0bfhopJ2y5rEWZid6fg2nCg%3D%3D)**

Thanks,

Vivek Ramaswamy

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=acf3142e335d488c9fd3b5acb8c70321&_e=sEQJCGvEWg2UMcFLMGzSszvRvL-rK-1KgB8kpAVoqaLWVAfIcmMzw9n10QbdOzouMgdZdLRyaLRiLYt0Kec5Aur-38rE9-MPTfRfqkmXv2wnFyGr2CQkVTqeY7Y-LNnwVLzY-spk_zXJs5ConTNg4ERBeblijRcux66usHGjXcPX6C8EZOn8JTXm1Y79WpxgOu-Ho-2mJYvMNpiS5Qv3-qN0GYpOg6qZwlEs7_ulhUYKhS5fq545MH3sj-DDI3kidW9VtTEPQVSeMP4eVsWhe91vWdomv0--CubpI1-DWk0qw5DQUOczmGsffQcJdaUdOv0eSV-YPUd5D6OweeTEbNTXgjXM4_KTJyofywwqeYzx-kM4M-nkUcg5jH09b4i_BnrpDfhB_Gc7TFiQ1a7yfQ%3D%3D)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=acf3142e335d488c9fd3b5acb8c70321&_e=sEQJCGvEWg2UMcFLMGzSszvRvL-rK-1KgB8kpAVoqaLWVAfIcmMzw9n10QbdOzouMgdZdLRyaLRiLYt0Kec5Aur-38rE9-MPTfRfqkmXv2wnFyGr2CQkVTqeY7Y-LNnwVLzY-spk_zXJs5ConTNg4ERBeblijRcux66usHGjXcPX6C8EZOn8JTXm1Y79WpxgOu-Ho-2mJYvMNpiS5Qv3-qN0GYpOg6qZwlEs7_ulhUYKhS5fq545MH3sj-DDI3kiQ1XGxQtn7v2pexaAPyKAOMMdCL0zdFHF7T2uo6oqpnSfehBLNGC6RhzNxBi2Fgd5OcW5vbpAFJZHmzmC1cokSSda-6KFsvuevj8a1lvZIxaZ9eu6wOWGdWr91gFYfIh47CjIpmXV9JjWrPmV_fIA0w%3D%3D)

[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alhuyuy-trhiujldw-j/) **Grow your organization and keep the momentum going with our powerful platform.** [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alhuyuy-trhiujldw-t/) **Biden Allowed Afghanistan Collapse** After months of stalling, Secretary of State Blinken finally allowed lawmakers to view a document that [**shows the Biden administration failed to heed warnings from diplomats** ](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alhuyuy-trhiujldw-i/)with concerns about leaving Afghanistan. **Biden Crime Family** A member of the powerful House Oversight Committee alleged**[the FBI is "afraid" the informant accusing Biden of a bribery scheme could be "killed"](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alhuyuy-trhiujldw-d/) if **unmasked. In other news, the WH says the Biden Crime Family **[doesn't represent a National Security Risk.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alhuyuy-trhiujldw-h/)** **Irony is Lost on This One** The WH Press Secretary [**thinks it's dangerous and unacceptable** ](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alhuyuy-trhiujldw-k/)to send illegals all over the country, but letting them flood the border towns is just fine.

**Trump Will Do Fox Interview** Former President**[Trump is slated to sit for an extensive interview](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alhuyuy-trhiujldw-u/) **with Fox News's Bret Baier on June 19th. **NYC Has a Plan** The Mayor of NYC has a couple of **[interesting plans](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alhuyuy-trhiujldw-o/)** for how to handle the influx of illegals flooding his city. **[This one is insane!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alhuyuy-trhiujldw-x/)** **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alhuyuy-trhiujldw-m/)!**

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: Take Action Against Ranked Choice Voting NOW!
body:
This chaotic and confusing election "reform" is being pushed by mega-liberal donors and activists, threatening to disenfranchise voters and potentially elect marginal candidates without the support of a majority.

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bbd50d250a584769afc7bba8ac6b2509&_e=osqlVyXgn6Rzf8Sg6m5HJK08xpAZGukGPjxabmFRkVNfU4D1pNc8cWDKBq8g9pSxRMp4Fq33x8_6gK0GCyfJeEoAaFZOmICyTtimp7j9w8xQAdaZbkLH2q3ukuyMHov1QIlEZ728sKyUIBf9fCagqrHCsvBrSsfSfhh3h3809ovB9pYiyLZlheL7GCeWSsbDJNg95xIQjccse2fjNNYcm7mo3rHsEJlYqB8zgJH8sP7mSwBM4CVMtyndAnINGb9eAu6GwSpsPHyfByfLJYP63RFd8RRdtCD6ljYe-G8aIbgf-F6FQtXzhjccXSMQY78Ty-KvQRqunXryVeaNIfDT3jctVv-syRDTRB8JX5YpJwdbBLfzFW8AmAPUKmsvsHNg)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

As the President of The Heritage Foundation, I must urgently ask for your help in fighting against Ranked Choice Voting (RCV). This chaotic and confusing election "reform" is being pushed by mega-liberal donors and activists, threatening to disenfranchise voters and potentially elect marginal candidates without the support of a majority.

It's time to take a stand! We need your voice and input to tackle this dangerous reform that could wreak havoc on our electoral process.

**Please, take just a few minutes to complete our RCV survey by clicking the link below:**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/national-ranked-choice-voting-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bbd50d250a584769afc7bba8ac6b2509&_e=osqlVyXgn6Rzf8Sg6m5HJK08xpAZGukGPjxabmFRkVNfU4D1pNc8cWDKBq8g9pSxRMp4Fq33x8_6gK0GCyfJeEoAaFZOmICyTtimp7j9w8xQAdaZbkLH2q3ukuyMHov1QIlEZ728sKyUIBf9fCagqrHCsvBrSsfSfhh3h3809ovB9pYiyLZlheL7GCeWSsbDJNg95xIQjccse2fjNNYcm7mo3rHsEJlYqB8zgJH8sP4w4OXNcpGtKNSR6KpbbfoO5hpHMH2yC_V1DZqjneZmvHqGQEKYVkGuSkukSaMli4bzIJsuUssquwckcDjv4bm_PvM_4IcfpXER7ixYLwHdGP2_Me865l0dbYnMZC4j5psZn-ijVJJy_FaPmY1UGA6c)**

By participating, you'll be joining the battle to protect our democracy and ensure the integrity of our elections. After completing the survey, you'll receive a copy of our exclusive RCV fact sheet that lays out the shocking truth behind this controversial system.

Together, we can make a difference and preserve the democratic process that defines our great nation.

**[Let's take action against Ranked Choice Voting today!](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bbd50d250a584769afc7bba8ac6b2509&_e=osqlVyXgn6Rzf8Sg6m5HJK08xpAZGukGPjxabmFRkVNfU4D1pNc8cWDKBq8g9pSxRMp4Fq33x8_6gK0GCyfJeEoAaFZOmICyTtimp7j9w8xQAdaZbkLH2q3ukuyMHov1QIlEZ728sKyUIBf9fCagqrHCsvBrSsfSfhh3h3809ovB9pYiyLZlheL7GCeWSsbDJNg95xIQjccse2fjNNYcm7mo3rHsEJlYqB8zgJH8sP5FtAjgcgZ9VexDiBaQ1y6Nzqc8wtdNkHVwgZCskyErvjQqlSBIlvVU1EX27H0Ik9IGpCRenlVAGhZN5fvAoYqtKwB7mnRdKpDckGu-8VO1oyD6cVUFd7UqbMNBgC63fITZuGP0wrTNuKIPg-BKhJbQ)**

Thank you for your passion for preserving our democracy.

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

name: Team AOC
subject: Wildfires
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We need a plan to catch up to what’s already here.
#
Last night, NYC had the worst air quality of any major city in the world as smoke from a record number of wildfires in Canada drifted across the northeast U.S.1
Today, 1 million public school children were told they couldn’t play outside due to the risks.
Poor air quality is being recorded in Charlotte, NC — over 1,000 miles away from the fires.
By Friday, we expect the air to have cleared, but these emergencies will only happen more unless we take aggressive action on climate change.
[We need to adapt our food systems, energy grids, infrastructure, and healthcare to prepare for what’s to come and catch up to what is already here. Alexandria has a plan. Will you chip in $3 today to power the movement for a Green New Deal? ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230607.yRfa1P&refcode=em20230607-4443-P_FND_RES_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4443%2E2526796%2EE6F9gb)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230607.yRfa1P&refcode=em20230607-4443-P_FND_RES_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=4443%2E2526796%2EE6F9gb)**
If you are impacted by pollution from wildfires, it's recommended that you stay indoors, and use an indoor air filtration system if possible.
If you must go outside, wear a tight-fitting medical mask (like an N95 or KN95), and limit physical activity.
This guidance is important to observe today — but it cannot be our plan for the future.
[Between wildfire smoke in NYC and record-breaking heat waves in Puerto Rico, it bears repeating how unprepared we are for the climate crisis. Can you chip in $3 today to advance the work of decarbonizing our infrastructure so we can create a better future?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230607.yRfa1P&refcode=em20230607-4443-P_FND_RES_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=4443%2E2526796%2EE6F9gb)
**[Contribute $3 today →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230607.yRfa1P&refcode=em20230607-4443-P_FND_RES_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=4443%2E2526796%2EE6F9gb)**
In solidarity,
Team AOC

1 - [**CNN:** Intense smoke fills NYC and forces a ‘code red’ in Philadelphia as millions from the East Coast to Canada suffer from Quebec’s wildfires](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/19156?t=23&akid=4443%2E2526796%2EE6F9gb)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230607?refcode=em20230607-4443-P_FND_RES_GOL&t=24&refcode2=4443_2526796_E6F9gb&akid=4443%2E2526796%2EE6F9gb)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230607-4443-P_FND_RES_GOL&t=25&akid=4443%2E2526796%2EE6F9gb)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brady=20Batt=2C=20Executive=20Director?=
subject: Join us at our 46th Annual Dinner!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
We have a great evening planned for you!

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .

clean_body: We have a great evening planned for you! Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd! With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms. We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! () State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. () Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press: “We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions. “Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative." Read the full statement. () Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here () . subject: McDonald's
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
We even got McDonald's to print voter registration forms on their tray liners to reach as many eligible voters as possible.
| | |

Friend, I've fought my whole life to protect and expand voting rights, and I'm not stopping anytime soon. When I was Ohio Secretary of State, we even got McDonald's to print voter registration forms on their tray liners to reach as many eligible voters as possible.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64494585/410243506/71430186?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk197-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjk0MDMxYy04MDA1LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BU_LJjpe-YxBub3VwqV3FRLMIUIMQiCm8t9T4C27Qrg=&emci=3df6c97d-9004-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=e294031c-8005-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=18332626)
To this day, if you go to the board of elections, you'll find voter forms with ketchup and mustard stains – a testament to our efforts to make it easier, not harder, to vote.
**Today, this fundamental right is under attack, friend, and I need your help to defend it.** Since the 2020 elections, GOP lawmakers have introduced _hundreds_ of voter suppression bills across the country to silence voices at the ballot box and accumulate power. It's an assault on our very democracy.
**We've got to keep up the pressure to fight back against these shameful laws. That's why I'm looking for 10,000 folks to speak out with me in support of protecting and expanding voting rights – and I'm counting on you to be one of them.[Please tell us now before midnight tonight, do you support strengthening voting rights?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64494587/410243508/71430186?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk197-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjk0MDMxYy04MDA1LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BU_LJjpe-YxBub3VwqV3FRLMIUIMQiCm8t9T4C27Qrg=&emci=3df6c97d-9004-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=e294031c-8005-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=18332626)**

name: Arizona Dems
subject: Can you help us protect Arizona?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64494692/410243938/-1799580378?refcode=EM_FR_230607climate_AZD_AD_90D_5_NG_A_LOGO&amount=25.00&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzYxMWYyZmEtODAwNS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wqqjK8xcaNuZGFVSt1yRMzcodsQ0RseAcbpjYgpx9Mw=)
---
| Team – we must highlight an important issue affecting us here in Arizona: **_climate change_**.

Arizona has been facing numerous challenges recently, particularly with our water supply. Our rivers are running dry, reservoirs are shrinking, and our groundwater levels are low. **These issues demand immediate attention from our leaders.** That’s why it is so crucial to elect Democrats up and down the ballot who will fight to protect Arizona.

Arizona Democrats have long recognized the significance of protecting our resources for future generations of Arizonans. And we’re proud to advocate for policies and initiatives that preserve our natural resources and prioritize the long-term future of our state.

**_But we can’t achieve these goals alone._** We need individuals – _like you_ – to stand with us as we work to shape a better future for Arizona. **[By supporting our party with a contribution of $10, you’re helping to elect Democrats dedicated to securing a sustainable future. clean_body: = | Team – we must highlight an important issue affecting us here in Arizona: climate change. Arizona has been facing numerous challenges recently, particularly with our water supply. Our rivers are running dry, reservoirs are shrinking, and our groundwater levels are low. These issues demand immediate attention from our leaders. That’s why it is so crucial to elect Democrats up and down the ballot who will fight to protect Arizona. Arizona Democrats have long recognized the significance of protecting our resources for future generations of Arizonans. And we’re proud to advocate for policies and initiatives that preserve our natural resources and prioritize the long-term future of our state. But we can’t achieve these goals alone. We need individuals – like you – to stand with us as we work to shape a better future for Arizona. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = – Arizona Dems Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Mary Thomas
subject: A quick update from America First Legal...
body:
| | [](http://xykkk.mjt.lu/lnk/AWIAABlQV2oAAAANrjoAAEcY2LAAAAABL9MAAGV0ABg1MgBkgQH_18GRrfcKTwG8zT9dEF3bmAAXqZI/1/nR-TMTRWcSl9-YLlexYOPA/aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9hbWVyaWNhLWZpcnN0LWxlZ2FsLWZvdW5kYXRpb24vd2Vla2x5LWRvbm9yLWVtYWlsLXBhZ2U)
---
Fellow Patriot, AFL just released a brand new video exposing the radical and dangerous Biden illegal immigration scheme. Watch now:
| [](http://xykkk.mjt.lu/lnk/AWIAABlQV2oAAAANrjoAAEcY2LAAAAABL9MAAGV0ABg1MgBkgQH_18GRrfcKTwG8zT9dEF3bmAAXqZI/2/8CSiKesM91yQWwMHDE3Gsw/aHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9BbWVyaWNhMXN0TGVnYWwvc3RhdHVzLzE2NjY0NzUzNTE3MzA0Mjk5NTI)
---
Here are a couple other exciting new developments from the past week: **#1 -** Yesterday, AFL, on behalf of its client, the National Center for Public Policy Research (NCPPR), served the Target Corporation with a formal demand for the production of corporate books and records, seeking transparency regarding its management’s radical LGBT political agenda that has apparently cost the corporation over $12 billion in market valuation since mid-May 2023. NCPPR is a Target shareholder. More here: [_https://aflegal.org/america-first-legal-demands-target-corporation-produce-its-books-and-records-regarding-its-reckless-lgbt-political-agenda-and-the-corporations-12-billion-loss-in-market-valuation/_](http://xykkk.mjt.lu/lnk/AWIAABlQV2oAAAANrjoAAEcY2LAAAAABL9MAAGV0ABg1MgBkgQH_18GRrfcKTwG8zT9dEF3bmAAXqZI/3/u2yC3hUWE7ANm9_rNzDZ3Q/aHR0cHM6Ly9hZmxlZ2FsLm9yZy9hbWVyaWNhLWZpcnN0LWxlZ2FsLWRlbWFuZHMtdGFyZ2V0LWNvcnBvcmF0aW9uLXByb2R1Y2UtaXRzLWJvb2tzLWFuZC1yZWNvcmRzLXJlZ2FyZGluZy1pdHMtcmVja2xlc3MtbGdidC1wb2xpdGljYWwtYWdlbmRhLWFuZC10aGUtY29ycG9yYXRpb25zLTEyLWJpbGxpb24tbG9zcy1pbi1tYXJrZXQtdmFsdWF0aW9uLw) **#2 -** AFL filed a brief in the Supreme Court of the United States on behalf of Senators Ted Cruz (TX), Mike Lee (UT), Tom Cotton (AR), Mike Braun (IN), and Katie Boyd Britt (AL) in the case Washington Alliance of Technology Workers v. Department of Homeland Security, et al. urging the Court to overturn a Department of Homeland Security (DHS) policy that benefits corporate employers and foreign nationals, while harming American workers. More here: [_https://aflegal.org/america-first-legal-files-supreme-court-brief-on-behalf-of-senators-cruz-lee-cotton-braun-and-britt-urging-the-court-to-prevent-the-biden-administration-from-continuing-to-harm-american-workers/_](http://xykkk.mjt.lu/lnk/AWIAABlQV2oAAAANrjoAAEcY2LAAAAABL9MAAGV0ABg1MgBkgQH_18GRrfcKTwG8zT9dEF3bmAAXqZI/4/PQ1I1N_x2pOC9bPHz8K_sg/aHR0cHM6Ly9hZmxlZ2FsLm9yZy9hbWVyaWNhLWZpcnN0LWxlZ2FsLWZpbGVzLXN1cHJlbWUtY291cnQtYnJpZWYtb24tYmVoYWxmLW9mLXNlbmF0b3JzLWNydXotbGVlLWNvdHRvbi1icmF1bi1hbmQtYnJpdHQtdXJnaW5nLXRoZS1jb3VydC10by1wcmV2ZW50LXRoZS1iaWRlbi1hZG1pbmlzdHJhdGlvbi1mcm9tLWNvbnRpbnVpbmctdG8taGFybS1hbWVyaWNhbi13b3JrZXJzLw) Please let me know if you have any questions or would like to talk through any of these efforts with our team. I thank you again for your patriotism and for your continued support of our mission. Sincerely,Mary Thomas _Exec. Dir. of Strategic Development_ _America First Legal_
| [**DONATE >>**](http://xykkk.mjt.lu/lnk/AWIAABlQV2oAAAANrjoAAEcY2LAAAAABL9MAAGV0ABg1MgBkgQH_18GRrfcKTwG8zT9dEF3bmAAXqZI/5/jZMER9iYOQE-TQQnGHQ9Cg/aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9hbWVyaWNhLWZpcnN0LWxlZ2FsLWZvdW5kYXRpb24vd2Vla2x5LWRvbm9yLWVtYWlsLXBhZ2U)

body:

| | Peter —

During National Gun Violence Awareness Month, reading headlines like this is especially disturbing:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64494853/410244415/1404158791?refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20230607_PT_1.1_12MO_campaign_NA_NA_gunviolencemonthrs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjQ1OGJhYi04MTA1LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=byYZKyYS1xVKxEAMlSKM0-w1RT9OC3Afq_YjLvliSOc=&emci=fbb9aba4-8105-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=6b458bab-8105-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5260669)
Just last week, we witnessed more gun violence on Memorial Day in Hollywood Beach, Florida. Gun violence is constant and heart-breaking.

Last weekend, we wore orange to remind people—especially Republicans in government who continue to ignore the problem—of how critical it is that we curb the impact of senseless gun violence

**_[That’s why we’re asking you to recommit by signing our petition TODAY to show that our supporters are sticking with us in this fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64494854/410244416/1404158791?refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20230607_PT_1.1_12MO_campaign_NA_NA_gunviolencemonthrs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjQ1OGJhYi04MTA1LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=byYZKyYS1xVKxEAMlSKM0-w1RT9OC3Afq_YjLvliSOc=&emci=fbb9aba4-8105-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=6b458bab-8105-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5260669)_** | | ****_******[Sign On](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64494855/410244417/1404158791?refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20230607_PT_1.1_12MO_campaign_NA_NA_gunviolencemonthrs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjQ1OGJhYi04MTA1LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=byYZKyYS1xVKxEAMlSKM0-w1RT9OC3Afq_YjLvliSOc=&emci=fbb9aba4-8105-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=6b458bab-8105-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5260669)******_****
---
When Democrats had a slim majority in the House, they passed the first meaningful gun violence prevention measures _in years_. Now that the GOP is controlling the House, the many bills Democrats introduce on the subject, including the banning of assault weapons, are being ignored while Republicans continue to bow to the gun lobby.

Our communities, our families, our children... they are all in danger by their inaction. The best way to protect our safety is by electing more Democrats in 2024, period!

Will you join us in committing to action so we don’t have another Hollywood Beach, Uvalde, Parkland, or countless other shootings?

clean_body: | | | Peter — During National Gun Violence Awareness Month, reading headlines like this is especially disturbing: Just last week, we witnessed more gun violence on Memorial Day in Hollywood Beach, Florida. Gun violence is constant and heart-breaking. Last weekend, we wore orange to remind people—especially Republicans in government who continue to ignore the problem—of how critical it is that we curb the impact of senseless gun violence | | ****** When Democrats had a slim majority in the House, they passed the first meaningful gun violence prevention measures in years. Now that the GOP is controlling the House, the many bills Democrats introduce on the subject, including the banning of assault weapons, are being ignored while Republicans continue to bow to the gun lobby. Our communities, our families, our children... they are all in danger by their inaction. The best way to protect our safety is by electing more Democrats in 2024, period! Will you join us in committing to action so we don’t have another Hollywood Beach, Uvalde, Parkland, or countless other shootings? ** | PAID FOR BY DEMOCRATS WIN SEATS PAC 315 INSPIRATION LANE GAITHERSBURG, MD 20878. clean_body: It's nice to meet you. | We're eager to share our vision for America - we need new leadership for our changing economy. Friend, Hey, Doug Burgum here. We just announced our campaign for President of the United States. We're eager to share our vision for America - we need new leadership for our changing economy. As we launch our campaign, we first want to introduce our story: Now, we're ready to take our conservative business leader's perspective to Washington and fight for the best of America. This race won't be easy. In addition to outperforming my fellow Republican candidates, we are also going up against Joe Biden and the media. The first debate is coming up very soon, and we're going to need a surge in support to make it onto that stage. We hope we can count on you, Friend, which is why we're asking YOU to do us the honor of becoming an of this campaign. We have a long road ahead of us, and it will not be easy. Yet, with you on the team, we know we can do this and deliver new leadership for our changing economy. | | | | | | With gratitude, Doug Burgum Candidate for President of the United States Paid for by Doug Burgum for America Doug Burgum for America PO Box 2945 Fargo, North Dakota 58103 Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Tallahassee, FL 32315

body:
Tell Doug what YOU think | Doug Burgum is running to be the 47th PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES.

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0f6f5ec1da094a0ea9012ef1487982eb&_e=Wlf05X5XAUQW9O9kKGMGH0S6my-AzZh4Op1CLiSdrO7jYpAqURc8y7vaPPt9yzcNJTIfqZ-U1TlYanm3V6p4ECX7DdHSloRw7-6Z6ZVVxnjwrV_pcAlMwNp9srASM70nkQ7_zwAhJLMpo3eZ11JC4aPF0RNaV6ydgofS4_M0KgF8nrYQN-595-DDADnNd8fPBWmgbE9iBVxg7OQ4tpZsooTDoSlI1MlW5F6GMg2AkhNjNmm3R0yw3Gd4QalEAQObc2DjuBlgknR3JUFEG6iX63Mjlub3Jzi-WDcmCVO5WQrtkS1xEZUQ1JPP8W52uwb47jROfqnH_xYvm2TxoGdWGc8o7Ox7hTNmA-spj2eHVMI_l9YzLBNM8KMbddQS2yQGldA201nGfiRZ_MQ3N9uV-_34N0c_R9P6Dr70o8W0J9kL22g31BGuhSYw0JzxnPTidk0lkelbP7-RZeZkffsnuR3kxwULKM4watyGu0Vy6Xwf5uuQxbfKcNwHUDKIZ1T4b2W94MDUzWWiliASQ0wVzwi8CMimf_nRv3xIogLgDtRMkmsNlv53g2vc57-ECzlKGEhePVVO8nxzt6Ka-zD4pg%3D%3D)

Friend,

Did you hear the news?

Doug Burgum is running to be the 47th PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES.

There are already several Republican candidates in the race, not to mention _Joe Biden._ Fortunately, Doug Burgum has something that all of these candidates don't... **he's the only governor AND business leader.**

He knows what it takes to do the job because _he's DONE the job._ North Dakota has been thriving under his leadership, and we're ready to bring his outsider knowledge to Washington.

We know the election is still a year and a half away, yet your dedicated support NOW is what will keep our movement going full steam ahead. _Can you take a few seconds to answer the urgent poll below?_

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0f6f5ec1da094a0ea9012ef1487982eb&_e=Wlf05X5XAUQW9O9kKGMGH0S6my-AzZh4Op1CLiSdrO7jYpAqURc8y7vaPPt9yzcNJTIfqZ-U1TlYanm3V6p4ECX7DdHSloRw7-6Z6ZVVxnjwrV_pcAlMwNp9srASM70nkQ7_zwAhJLMpo3eZ11JC4aPF0RNaV6ydgofS4_M0KgF8nrYQN-595-DDADnNd8fPBWmgbE9iBVxg7OQ4tpZsooTDoSlI1MlW5F6GMg2AkhNjNmm3R0yw3Gd4QalEAQObc2DjuBlgknR3JUFEG6iX63Mjlub3Jzi-WDcmCVO5WQrtkS1xEZUQ1JPP8W52uwb47jROfqnH_xYvm2TxoGdWGc8o7Ox7hTNmA-spj2eHVMI_l9YzLBNM8KMbddQS2yQGldA201nGfiRZ_MQ3N9uV-_34N0c_R9P6Dr70o8W0J9kL22g31BGuhSYw0JzxnPTidMEKJrtqHAOlibR1v-ftcquVmdwIuD-2p94yx4GN3dfFiVxjegPDCf9eoOOKMZdbisDma5Cen69U0AehKoW24NU3wROvSd-wgwHN2MCXp2anKFDQ8EmXqsVR1LAp3dSN1hGxRkxCs56oDvYRNNeN7A%3D%3D)

You'll see other campaigns using their emails to brag about what they're going to do with your donation - _will they 1,000%-match it? Will they not 1,000%-match it?..._

Well, we think those folks are focused on the WRONG things. **Right now, all our emails will focus on is connecting with YOU, the best of America, and winning in 2024.**

Doug Burgum is ready to take on the Washington and political elites in order to create a better, stronger America, yet we can't do it alone. We need YOUR help, Friend.

**We're going to send Doug every single response to this poll TONIGHT.** Make sure you get the chance to tell us what YOU think.

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0f6f5ec1da094a0ea9012ef1487982eb&_e=Wlf05X5XAUQW9O9kKGMGH0S6my-AzZh4Op1CLiSdrO7jYpAqURc8y7vaPPt9yzcNJTIfqZ-U1TlYanm3V6p4ECX7DdHSloRw7-6Z6ZVVxnjwrV_pcAlMwNp9srASM70nkQ7_zwAhJLMpo3eZ11JC4aPF0RNaV6ydgofS4_M0KgF8nrYQN-595-DDADnNd8fPBWmgbE9iBVxg7OQ4tpZsooTDoSlI1MlW5F6GMg2AkhNjNmm3R0yw3Gd4QalEAQObc2DjuBlgknR3JUFEG6iX63Mjlub3Jzi-WDcmCVO5WQrtkS1xEZUQ1JPP8W52uwb47jROfqnH_xYvm2TxoGdWGc8o7Ox7hTNmA-spj2eHVMI_l9YzLBNM8KMbddQS2yQGldA201nGfiRZ_MQ3N9uV-_34N0c_R9P6Dr70o8W0J9kL22g31BGuhSYw0JzxnPTi2lK0wwylqgCuIQGQD8oARfZfA7Att6v_RdtpuA96yL7D_2wdw3v6ztBGixn4ILAooHSezcZ2y7h9NvreDquZZTPbzde9lE4eAJjTrV8RYqPEXIvlHzhbZD5X-hzRBIplt7RGErKc6kAt-Dv1QMb9qA%3D%3D)

clean_body: Tell Doug what YOU think | Doug Burgum is running to be the 47th PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES. Friend, Did you hear the news? Doug Burgum is running to be the 47th PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES. There are already several Republican candidates in the race, not to mention Joe Biden. Fortunately, Doug Burgum has something that all of these candidates don't... he's the only governor AND business leader. He knows what it takes to do the job because he's DONE the job. North Dakota has been thriving under his leadership, and we're ready to bring his outsider knowledge to Washington. We know the election is still a year and a half away, yet your dedicated support NOW is what will keep our movement going full steam ahead. Can you take a few seconds to answer the urgent poll below? You'll see other campaigns using their emails to brag about what they're going to do with your donation - will they 1,000%-match it? Will they not 1,000%-match it?... Well, we think those folks are focused on the WRONG things. Right now, all our emails will focus on is connecting with YOU, the best of America, and winning in 2024. Doug Burgum is ready to take on the Washington and political elites in order to create a better, stronger America, yet we can't do it alone. We need YOUR help, Friend. We're going to send Doug every single response to this poll TONIGHT. Make sure you get the chance to tell us what YOU think. Thank you, Doug Burgum for America Paid for by Doug Burgum for America Doug Burgum for America PO Box 2945 Fargo, North Dakota 58103 Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

subject: I won’t tolerate homophobia in our schools.

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64495481/410246908/62647395?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWUwZWRiY2ItODUwNS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=1SytTtHrNlntAcKfNDc5b3cJNWeCDfvM6gjzNpLhxrs=) Friend,

Yesterday, the Glendale School Board meeting was interrupted by violence. Anti‐LGBTQ+ protesters assembled outside the meeting while the board was hearing public comments about recognizing June as Pride Month.

**Hatred and intolerance have zero place in our communities — especially not in our schools.** All students deserve a welcoming atmosphere in their schools, where they can learn and experience a rich diversity of backgrounds.

It’s dangerous to exclude LGBTQ+ students and stories. As the mother of a nine‐year‐old attending a Glendale public school I believe my daughter and her peers are best served through a curriculum that exposes them to the very real, diverse lived experiences of our communities.

**I’m horrified by the outbursts of violence in Glendale, but I’m heartened by the strength of our LGBTQ+ students and supporters. I won’t stand for the homophobia witnessed, and I know you’re with me.**

**[So please, will you sign on my petition standing against homophobia in our communities? At this difficult time for our LGBTQ+ peers, it’s critical that we stand with them against homophobia and violence >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64495482/410246909/-562322546?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWUwZWRiY2ItODUwNS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=1SytTtHrNlntAcKfNDc5b3cJNWeCDfvM6gjzNpLhxrs=&emci=84ea1a1b-8405-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=5e0edbcb-8505-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=8447100)**

clean_body: | | = We’re proud to have earned the support of Ohioans across the district. From small business owners to workers to seniors, people are lining up to support Marcy Kaptur because they know she will always fight for us. The truth is: Kevin McCarthy is laser-focused on flipping this seat. He’s made it clear, and he’s already spending big money to make it happen. It’s no secret that he’ll throw millions of dollars to support Marcy’s eventual opponent in this race – no matter how extreme they are. Marcy Kaptur has spent her time in office fighting for the people of Ohio. She is the right candidate for Northwest Ohio, and she’s the only candidate who will continue to work for us. Thank you, Team Kaptur | | Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur is a champion for the Midwest in Congress. She is focused on getting big money out of politics, holding Wall Street accountable, fighting against bad trade deals that harm workers, ensuring access to health care for all, and restoring our Great Lakes. name: Mark Mullet
subject: the values I’m leading with
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Mark Mullet
body:
| | Last week, I officially launched my campaign for Governor of Washington. I’m running to make Washington a more affordable, safer place where small businesses and families are able to thrive.

As the Democratic State Senator from Issaquah over the last 10 years, I’ve proudly voted again and again to:

✅ Defend reproductive freedom
✅ Protect LGBTQ+ rights
✅ Support collective bargaining and unionization rights
✅ Combat climate change
✅ Improve retirement security

[These are the values I plan to lead with as Governor, and I need to know if you’re with me. We need 5,000 Citizen Endorsers to join our movement this week – will you be one of them?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64495606/410247495/454924670?source=MM_EM_PT_WL_230607_1_1&refcode2=70f20689-8605-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&contactdata=koURS6NMmpi+VmJxY5JoBjpd0kx67ocsQRPfMWCICUGuePfekYUk/monkYIrGCoM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGYyMDY4OS04NjA1LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jrOBWRyzcfnqHYgmxKYEzSpp_oDpkTjcps9Zs0AOMXs=&emci=9505e9cb-7c05-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=70f20689-8605-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=45626167) | | **[ENDORSE MARK](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64495608/410247497/454924670?source=MM_EM_PT_WL_230607_1_1&refcode2=70f20689-8605-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&contactdata=koURS6NMmpi+VmJxY5JoBjpd0kx67ocsQRPfMWCICUGuePfekYUk/monkYIrGCoM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGYyMDY4OS04NjA1LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jrOBWRyzcfnqHYgmxKYEzSpp_oDpkTjcps9Zs0AOMXs=&emci=9505e9cb-7c05-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=70f20689-8605-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=45626167)**

Already, I’ve had the honor of receiving the endorsement of over 30 Mayors, State Senators, State Representatives, City and County Councilmembers, business leaders, and local unions.

Across Washington, folks are joining our campaign because they know we need new leadership in order to make Washington safe, affordable and prosperous.

[I’m proud to have them on my team, but I need your endorsement, too, in order to build a true grassroots movement. Will you sign on as a Citizen Endorser today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64495610/410247499/454924670?source=MM_EM_PT_WL_230607_1_1&refcode2=70f20689-8605-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&contactdata=koURS6NMmpi+VmJxY5JoBjpd0kx67ocsQRPfMWCICUGuePfekYUk/monkYIrGCoM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGYyMDY4OS04NjA1LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jrOBWRyzcfnqHYgmxKYEzSpp_oDpkTjcps9Zs0AOMXs=&emci=9505e9cb-7c05-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=70f20689-8605-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=45626167)

Mark

name: Jayapal HQ
subject: Our average donation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We’ve already seen what the right is willing to do to win — that means it’s on us to build up our grassroots power to protect our progressive values and keep fighting for change.
#
Peter,
Now that we're racing towards the end of Q2, our movement is doubling down on building grassroots support for Pramila in Congress.
We've already seen what the right is willing to do to win — **that means it's on us to build up our grassroots power to protect our progressive values and keep fighting for change.**
**Our movement's average donation is $11.85, and while that number might not seem like a lot — to us, it resembles the true power of our movement.**
**This campaign is entirely powered by thousands of people across the country, chipping in what they can to help propel our momentum. So imagine how powerful $11.85 is when our entire movement chips in that amount.**
**In order for us to continue fighting along side Pramila and working towards our goal to build a more compassionate, inclusive, and loving community — we're going to need you with us.**[**If you are able, please chip in $11.85 or anything you're able to give to help us grow our movement.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42361?refcode=em20230607-2577&t=1&akid=2577%2E420207%2EELUoqa)
**[Donate](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42361?refcode=em20230607-2577&t=20&akid=2577%2E420207%2EELUoqa)**
Whether you are able to donate today or not, please know that our entire movement is beyond grateful that you continue to have faith in our movement. And we can't wait to see what things we can accomplish together.
Together,
Jayapal HQ

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230607-2577-footer&t=21&refcode2=2577_420207_ELUoqa&akid=2577%2E420207%2EELUoqa)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=22&akid=2577%2E420207%2EELUoqa)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=2577%2E420207%2EELUoqa)

subject: Republicans are racing to the bottom

body:
|

| | The choice is very, very clear [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64496050/410249194/-1524463920?sourceid=1050168&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDdkNTYyNi04NzA1LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HDo0pSzueoDIa5wPNkbIU_79mE8yZkZlXn5KnGh5sw0=&emci=217d5626-8705-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=247d5626-8705-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Former Vice President Mike Pence formally entered the race for the Republican presidential nomination on Monday, and I have to tell you — he'll fit right in.

The Republican presidential primary is a race to the bottom on abortion, and Pence is no exception. The GOP's position couldn't be more clear, from Pence's stated desire for a national ban to Donald Trump being 'proud' to have overseen the end of _Roe v. Wade_ to Tim Scott's promise to sign anti-abortion legislation to Ron DeSantis signing multiple abortion bans in Florida. Anti-choice extremism is the consensus.

Do not let their attempt to hide their positions fool you: **Republicans want to end abortion, and any one of them will use the White House to do so if they win it back.** Period.

At EMILYs List, we are working to make sure voters understand the stakes in this election. For the sake of our freedom and our reproductive rights, we cannot let one of these anti-choice Republicans take the White House. **Will you donate today to support our work education voters and electing Democratic pro-choice women?**

subject: Keeping momentum strong all the way to the finish line
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Dr. Brian Williams for Congress

Peter,

We launched our campaign to elect Dr. Williams and create life-saving change less than a month ago, and the word is getting out across the country. Outlets like _The Washington Post_ and _The Dallas Morning News_ have written about Dr. Williams’ leadership, breadth of experience, and robust campaign.

But Peter, these pieces also highlight that this is going to be one of the most competitive races in the country, which means that we have to keep our momentum going strong all the way to the finish line. Building solid support today is how we win on Election Day. This team is up to the task, but we can’t waste any time.

As the good news on our campaign keeps coming, we need to ensure the financial support of Dr. Williams’ campaign keeps pace. As of the time I’m writing this note to you, NO ONE has told me that I’m being indicted. I am watching everything unfold in real time just as you are. But I’ve also read LEAKED REPORTS that the Biden-appointed special counsel is asking a Washington, D.C. grand jury to indict me... “The Department of Justice is preparing to ask a Washington, DC grand jury to indict former president Donald Trump...as he campaigns for his party’s nomination in next year’s presidential election...” The same people who SPIED on my campaign and tried to FRAME me as a Russian asset are now trying to pursue FEDERAL CHARGES against me in the “Documents Hoax.” As we possibly await another dark moment in our country’s history, I ask that you keep me, my family, and our country in your prayers. I’m not afraid in the slightest, because I know that millions of Americans like YOU have my back. YOU are the source of my courage, my resolve, and my hope for America. | | Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.
