Hello,
Every day, a member of my campaign staff goes to check the mail, and you never know what they’re going to find.
I couldn’t resist sharing this one with you: A donation to my campaign against Lauren Boebert – mailed with a Nancy Reagan stamp on the envelope.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64496135/410249625/1610638071?refcode=em20230607pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=dff697c8-8705-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmY2OTdjOC04NzA1LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JMXYYAEHIZjGb3FR3ZKra1TEyfb0OVaEtc8hJx1J5mc=)
Lauren Boebert represents everything that is wrong with Washington.
It’s no wonder I receive messages of support every day not just from Democrats and Independents, but even Republicans who are fed up and want their party – and their country – back from the extremists.
**When I ran against Lauren Boebert in 2022, no one gave me a chance.** Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight said I had a 3% chance of winning – and that I’d lose by 45,000 votes.
But I knew that it was still possible to meet voters, talk about issues like conservation, abortion, and good-paying jobs – and win. So my son Felix and I packed up our red pickup truck and drove 24,000 miles across the entire district doing just that.
**Ultimately, we came just 546 votes short.** **It was the closest race in the country.** And while it felt like a moral victory, Lauren Boebert and her angertainment circus continue on in Washington.
**Now, I’m running against Lauren Boebert again, but I’m not taking corporate PAC money like she is. If I’m going to go up against her Super PAC lies and win, I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give every dollar you can afford to my campaign now:**
[**Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now – or whatever amount you can spare – to help me finally defeat Lauren Boebert in 2024? This campaign is funded entirely by people like you, so I have nowhere else to turn.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64496136/410249626/1610638071?refcode=em20230607pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=dff697c8-8705-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmY2OTdjOC04NzA1LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JMXYYAEHIZjGb3FR3ZKra1TEyfb0OVaEtc8hJx1J5mc=)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Russ=20Vought?=
subject: There WILL be a reckoning
body:
We’re now learning the full extent of the rank hypocrisy that resulted in the McCarthy betrayal. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/citizensrenewingamerica.com/were-on-the-offensive-10360243?e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | |
---
| | |
#
Friends,

If you were bewildered by the disgraceful debt limit explosion deal in Washington last week, you were not alone. **Rest assured, there will be a reckoning. **

Kevin McCarthy squandered historic leverage at the negotiating table after conservatives passed a bill that raised the debt limit in exchange for cutting nearly $5 trillion to the woke and weaponized bureaucracy.

But I'm sad to say, we’re now learning the _full extent of the rank hypocrisy_ that resulted in the McCarthy betrayal.

Rep. Thomas Massie, a member of the Rules Committee and at one time a reliable conservative, had the ability to send this deal back to the negotiating table. Instead, Massie caved to the D.C. cartel, paving the way for nearly $4 trillion in new debt and emboldened the woke bureaucracy.

Read my full breakdown of the **Biden-McCarthy-Massie debt deal[here](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=e1b96e949b&e=17913c7d6d).**

I’ve been on a media blitz to expose just how terrible this deal is for the American people.
---
| [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=acc151a543&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| Friends, I won’t sugarcoat it. Speaker McCarthy sold out conservatives and was joined by members of Congress like Rep. Thomas Massie who should know better.

But if you think conservatives in the House have lost the fight, you would be mistaken. There are still America First stalwarts in Congress that refuse to cave to the D.C. cartel no matter the cost.
---
| [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=0d7f5a90f4&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| Mark my words. There will be a reckoning for Kevin McCarthy and his enablers in Congress.

As long as [you’re behind us](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=56873cc3cb&e=17913c7d6d), we’ll keep fighting.
---
| Sincerely,

Russ Vought
President
Citizens for Renewing America
---
| | |
---
| | | | | | [](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=d9ec7438ff&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | [](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=dc5eae628a&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | [](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=381a43873f&e=17913c7d6d)

|

300 Independence Ave. SE
Washington, DC 20003

You can [update your preferences](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=340a9f3c7d&e=17913c7d6d&c=b1b33da91c) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=340a9f3c7d&e=17913c7d6d&c=b1b33da91c).

name: Dr. Brian Williams
subject: A night that changes your DNA
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
July 2016 was a turning point for me – that’s why I’m running for Congress.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64496222/410250027/1633369994?refcode=EM_FR_230607WilsonOnboard2_DBW_8_logo&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWI5NjlkNzYtODkwNS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YdUP_ZeQK-zeKVdlICFfQvyUxUfzR9n6CsblPKxTx9Q=)
_**NOTE: This is a longer email about why I’m running for Congress as a Democrat in TX-32. If you don’t have time to read this message, here’s a link you can use to contribute now:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bw-fr](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64496223/410250028/1633369994?refcode=EM_FR_230607WilsonOnboard2_DBW_8_l1&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWI5NjlkNzYtODkwNS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YdUP_ZeQK-zeKVdlICFfQvyUxUfzR9n6CsblPKxTx9Q=)**_

July 7, 2016, was a night that changed my life.

Initially, it was not my shift to work, but a change in the schedule made me the on-call trauma surgeon that evening. A few miles from my trauma center, hundreds of Dallas residents had gathered to peacefully protest the recent deaths of Black men at the hands of law enforcement officers. What should have been a night of unity for our community turned into tragedy when a sniper targeted law enforcement officers providing security for the event. Seven wounded officers were transported to my trauma center – three in critical condition.

The hours that followed were the hardest of my career. Crisis moments are routine in a trauma center, but that particular night created a complexity of emotions I had never before experienced as a trauma surgeon. Our nation was already mourning from a mass shooting in Orlando, then more violence brought that anguish to more families. Our nation was in crisis– a crisis that I was only beginning to understand and one that spurred my decision to pursue change and healing beyond my profession of medicine.

I was unable to save three of the officers brought to our trauma center that night. It is impossible for me to put into words the full weight of the grief, anger, and pain I felt. I was at a crossroads but I chose not to remain resigned to this reality of violence and death. I chose to fight back.

Peter – I have told too many families that they would not see their loved ones alive again as a result of preventable violence. That July 7th, I realized I had the ability to affect change and save lives outside of the walls of the hospital. That was my call to action.

The mayor asked me to Chair the Dallas Citizens Police Review Board to help bridge the gap in trust between our communities and law enforcement. The County Judge asked me to serve as his Special Advisor for Health Equity during the pandemic. Inspired by our success, I went on to work for Speaker Nancy Pelosi and Senator Chris Murphy advising on groundbreaking legislation to promote gun safety, reduce healthcare costs, and bolster our healthcare workforce. From these experiences, I learned the power our lawmakers hold to create life-saving change when we choose action over apathy.

Gun safety, access to affordable healthcare, equitable community resources – these are all factors that we can directly address to save lives. But right now, we have too many leaders in Congress who lack the courage to stand up to special interests and big money and take action. That, too, we can change.

Throughout my career on the frontlines of medicine, I’ve seen too much needless death and suffering. Treating my patients, listening to their stories, and feeling their pain, is my motivation for this journey. My unique perspective on the problems our communities face is what Washington needs, and I’m ready to bring a crucially needed voice to Congress.

[Will you stand with me in this mission to become the newest Texas Democrat and first trauma surgeon in Congress by contributing to my campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64496224/410250029/1633369994?refcode=EM_FR_230607WilsonOnboard2_DBW_8_l2&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWI5NjlkNzYtODkwNS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YdUP_ZeQK-zeKVdlICFfQvyUxUfzR9n6CsblPKxTx9Q=)
| [DONATE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64496225/410250030/1633369994?refcode=EM_FR_230607WilsonOnboard2_DBW_8_b1&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWI5NjlkNzYtODkwNS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YdUP_ZeQK-zeKVdlICFfQvyUxUfzR9n6CsblPKxTx9Q=)
---

Together, we can create life-saving change.

Onward,
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64496226/410250031/1633369994?refcode=EM_FR_230607WilsonOnboard2_DBW_8_signoff&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWI5NjlkNzYtODkwNS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YdUP_ZeQK-zeKVdlICFfQvyUxUfzR9n6CsblPKxTx9Q=)
Dr. Brian Williams
Dr. Brian Williams is an Air Force Academy graduate, a Harvard-trained surgeon, a former congressional health policy advisor, and a nationally recognized leader at the intersection of public policy and structural racism, gun violence, and health equity. Dr. Williams is ready to bring his years of experience to Congress to fix our broken systems and save lives.

You can support Dr. Williams’ campaign for Texas’ 32nd Congressional District by making a one-time contribution here:

clean_body: July 2016 was a turning point for me – that’s why I’m running for Congress. = NOTE: This is a longer email about why I’m running for Congress as a Democrat in TX-32. If you don’t have time to read this message, here’s a link you can use to contribute now:= July 7, 2016, was a night that changed my life. Initially, it was not my shift to work, but a change in the schedule made me the on-call trauma surgeon that evening. A few miles from my trauma center, hundreds of Dallas residents had gathered to peacefully protest the recent deaths of Black men at the hands of law enforcement officers. What should have been a night of unity for our community turned into tragedy when a sniper targeted law enforcement officers providing security for the event. Seven wounded officers were transported to my trauma center – three in critical condition. The hours that followed were the hardest of my career. Crisis moments are routine in a trauma center, but that particular night created a complexity of emotions I had never before experienced as a trauma surgeon. Our nation was already mourning from a mass shooting in Orlando, then more violence brought that anguish to more families. Our nation was in crisis– a crisis that I was only beginning to understand and one that spurred my decision to pursue change and healing beyond my profession of medicine. I was unable to save three of the officers brought to our trauma center that night. It is impossible for me to put into words the full weight of the grief, anger, and pain I felt. I was at a crossroads but I chose not to remain resigned to this reality of violence and death. I chose to fight back. Peter – I have told too many families that they would not see their loved ones alive again as a result of preventable violence. That July 7th, I realized I had the ability to affect change and save lives outside of the walls of the hospital. That was my call to action. The mayor asked me to Chair the Dallas Citizens Police Review Board to help bridge the gap in trust between our communities and law enforcement. The County Judge asked me to serve as his Special Advisor for Health Equity during the pandemic. Inspired by our success, I went on to work for Speaker Nancy Pelosi and Senator Chris Murphy advising on groundbreaking legislation to promote gun safety, reduce healthcare costs, and bolster our healthcare workforce. From these experiences, I learned the power our lawmakers hold to create life-saving change when we choose action over apathy. Gun safety, access to affordable healthcare, equitable community resources – these are all factors that we can directly address to save lives. But right now, we have too many leaders in Congress who lack the courage to stand up to special interests and big money and take action. That, too, we can change. Throughout my career on the frontlines of medicine, I’ve seen too much needless death and suffering. Treating my patients, listening to their stories, and feeling their pain, is my motivation for this journey. My unique perspective on the problems our communities face is what Washington needs, and I’m ready to bring a crucially needed voice to Congress. = | = Together, we can create life-saving change. Onward, = Dr. Brian Williams Dr. Brian Williams is an Air Force Academy graduate, a Harvard-trained surgeon, a former congressional health policy advisor, and a nationally recognized leader at the intersection of public policy and structural racism, gun violence, and health equity. Dr. Williams is ready to bring his years of experience to Congress to fix our broken systems and save lives. You can support Dr. Williams’ campaign for Texas’ 32nd Congressional District by making a one-time contribution here: = Paid for By Dr. Brian Williams for Congress Dr. Brian Williams for Congress PO Box 180725 Dallas, TX 75218 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

Folks – Now that I’ve officially launched my re-election campaign for U.S. Senate, my campaign team is running on all cylinders. That means we are making major budget decisions, outlining strategies for voter outreach, and determining how we can best dedicate resources to defending the Democratic Senate Majority. I know that may not sound all that exciting, but this kind of work is the nuts and bolts of a successful Senate campaign. You’re probably wondering where you come in. Well, you’re part of this grassroots team because you share our New Mexico values and are committed to building a brighter future for the Land of Enchantment. One important step you can take today to make that vision a reality is becoming a monthly recurring donor. **By pitching in on the 7th of each month, you’ll help our finance team plan the course for the months ahead and set up Democrats at every level of government — including me! — for victory in November 2024.** **[So, will you commit to a monthly recurring donation of $5, $10, or any amount today to power our campaign each month?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64496408/410250702/-358405457?recurring=true&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230607_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDFiNzAxNS04YjA1LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rEY50yUDdqMW_430gxupE_CJ2BiBXYu0A-gxsoqZeVw=)** | [CHIP IN MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64496409/410250703/-358405457?recurring=true&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230607_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDFiNzAxNS04YjA1LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rEY50yUDdqMW_430gxupE_CJ2BiBXYu0A-gxsoqZeVw=)

Thank you — your support will make a lasting difference.
— Martin

subject: Mark Kelly has joined the team.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terán for Congress
body:
On Monday, Senator Mark Kelly endorsed our campaign for Congress! I was so thrilled to hear this news and couldn’t be more grateful to have him on our side.
I wanted to make sure you saw Mark’s message from yesterday below. He made the decision to endorse us because he knows just how important early support is for campaigns like ours. A contribution in June 2023 goes much further than one in August 2024.
But our most vital support comes from our grassroots supporters like you. If you’re able, will you join Mark Kelly and chip in $10 or more to our campaign today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_060723_MarkKellyre&amount=10]
Thank you for your support. And thank you, Senator Kelly! Welcome to the team.
A ganar,
Raquel
---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mark Kelly <info@raquelteran.com>
Date: Mon, Jun 5, 2023 at 10:00 AM
Subject: Raquel is my pick
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_060723_MarkKellyre&amount=10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_060723_MarkKellyre&amount=10]
Friend,
Senator Mark Kelly here. Today, I am reaching out to you to express my wholehearted endorsement of Raquel Terán as she seeks election for Arizona's 3rd Congressional district. Raquel has proven time and again that she’s got the experience, passion, and unwavering commitment to make a positive impact on our communities. That’s why I’m on Team Terán.
If you’re ready to join me on Team Terán, can you chip in $20 or whatever you can afford to give Raquel and our campaign the resources we need to send Raquel to Congress? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_060723_MarkKellyre&amount=20]
One of the most important lessons I’ve learned in my life is the value of teamwork. And I know Arizonans need Raquel on our team in Washington. Her tireless advocacy for working families has been a driving force behind her accomplishments. And together, we can fight for policies that uplift our communities, create opportunities, and protect the most vulnerable among us.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_060723_MarkKellyre&amount=20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_060723_MarkKellyre&amount=20]
Raquel knows how to win – she was an integral part of our winning campaign last year! And the secret to winning campaigns is you. Without your support, your encouragement, and, yes, your contributions, none of this would be possible.
So, friend, will you join me on Team Terán and chip in $20 today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_060723_MarkKellyre&amount=20]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Together, we can shape a future where every Arizonan has the opportunity to thrive, where our environment is protected, and where everyone is treated with dignity and respect.
Thank you,
Mark Kelly

[] Raquel knows how to win – she was an integral part of our winning campaign last year! And the secret to winning campaigns is you. Without your support, your encouragement, and, yes, your contributions, none of this would be possible. So, friend, will you join me on Team Terán and chip in $20 today? [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: EXPRESS DONATE $10 [] EXPRESS DONATE $20 [] EXPRESS DONATE $50 [] EXPRESS DONATE MORE [] Together, we can shape a future where every Arizonan has the opportunity to thrive, where our environment is protected, and where everyone is treated with dignity and respect. Thank you, Mark Kelly DONATE [] Terán for Congress PO Box 1041 Glendale, AZ 85311 United States Paid for by Terán for Congress If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

Friend,

**Hey, Doug Burgum here. We just announced our campaign for President of the United States.**

We're eager to share our vision for America - we need new leadership for our changing economy. As we launch our campaign, we first want to introduce our story:

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=bfb573e5495141ef84e2fd4dae4c980f&_e=dRBNQpHfc25E2p7gIGAbawiHX5L8jnOXH-xQtUs9aIamGxmw6Ps3SeeEllpz6uForEeDsw9qw4QorEtK_UHlbxHEYAMSrVpZFi5JY9tzSCyb1-qmRjfe0DA3LAdmlEx9ujgvmE-EnYSLHYdz6xZkufSUxLwpMfBXkyKUkhrZ2YqR1m7SFbZNflDW4Y8jCxZwo7mt5b7ytvP0rl214UCAyccFCav0Vt2ruao-jcIoUkyoGoAU7vpakay1YbQUaBz5p9cb2erMkJGu4lgV16GOgAFay89eaHhiOzEDvjR_xTksahsgepWu5QHsZUnXyKjjOzo4_xjaQuPZ0sUr9TLRx44OHeWfX_McTiOC3ieJUF8Xg0Pxbl0wUtJb-HT6mrQst6InLhOAUjqAN4At0_TJvnNWQnoQS6hZhSTVo6dIwnSE2LqZovDj0f4HxxK_66CvcEotpAgN2BdBjo7rShh1kEMHj9H1yq3VRMV2Ec0Xz_I6SnZZ-BCHs4h3dYyhXdnsftuTIbdbRhIGsMqY9k9PnHgvYat5Lau1WfTTcPjoNH2iyvPtXDuTqoUyPrzrQeV8AjJRRMk1S-dPxUHjQ1fHbQ%3D%3D)

Now, we're ready to take our conservative business leader's perspective to Washington and fight for the best of America.

This race won't be easy. In addition to outperforming my fellow Republican candidates, we are also going up against Joe Biden and the media.

The first debate is coming up very soon, and we're going to need a surge in support to make it onto that stage. We hope we can count on you, Friend, which is why we're asking YOU to do us the honor of becoming an **[Inaugural Member](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=bfb573e5495141ef84e2fd4dae4c980f&_e=dRBNQpHfc25E2p7gIGAbawiHX5L8jnOXH-xQtUs9aIamGxmw6Ps3SeeEllpz6uForEeDsw9qw4QorEtK_UHlbxHEYAMSrVpZFi5JY9tzSCyb1-qmRjfe0DA3LAdmlEx9ujgvmE-EnYSLHYdz6xZkufSUxLwpMfBXkyKUkhrZ2YqR1m7SFbZNflDW4Y8jCxZwo7mt5b7ytvP0rl214UCAyccFCav0Vt2ruao-jcIoUkyoGoAU7vpakay1YbQUaBz5p9cb2erMkJGu4lgV16GOgAFay89eaHhiOzEDvjR_xTksahsgepWu5QHsZUnXyKjjOzo4_xjaQuPZ0sUr9TLRx44OHeWfX_McTiOC3ieJUF8Xg0Pxbl0wUtJb-HT6mrQst6InLhOAUjqAN4At0_TJvnNWQnoQS6hZhSTVo6dIwnSE2LqZovDj0f4HxxK_66Cvq_fq1m5xhngkygpCPuAo53vDXxWT3SncMxvmOPaVS-8jibRjnLrgHlvxDsVR4doifoVtzjh741_WoK7YSmVElYJ9tTo6SJHbImjx7ce_fhvKH03pq2UeVNOv3vjEM63r8GPZuyg45S7wUXTksgsbcw%3D%3D)** of this campaign.

We have a long road ahead of us, and it will not be easy. Yet, with you on the team, we know we can do this and _**deliver new leadership for our changing economy.**_

**[We would be grateful for a contribution of ANY AMOUNT TODAY to stand with us and become an Official Inaugural Member of our campaign.>>](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=bfb573e5495141ef84e2fd4dae4c980f&_e=dRBNQpHfc25E2p7gIGAbawiHX5L8jnOXH-xQtUs9aIamGxmw6Ps3SeeEllpz6uForEeDsw9qw4QorEtK_UHlbxHEYAMSrVpZFi5JY9tzSCyb1-qmRjfe0DA3LAdmlEx9ujgvmE-EnYSLHYdz6xZkufSUxLwpMfBXkyKUkhrZ2YqR1m7SFbZNflDW4Y8jCxZwo7mt5b7ytvP0rl214UCAyccFCav0Vt2ruao-jcIoUkyoGoAU7vpakay1YbQUaBz5p9cb2erMkJGu4lgV16GOgAFay89eaHhiOzEDvjR_xTksahsgepWu5QHsZUnXyKjjOzo4_xjaQuPZ0sUr9TLRx44OHeWfX_McTiOC3ieJUF8Xg0Pxbl0wUtJb-HT6mrQst6InLhOAUjqAN4At0_TJvnNWQnoQS6hZhSTVo6dIwnSE2LqZovDj0f4HxxK_66CvsgJdjEbqqIWG32r158mqh_ewK9ltc6G84bKOZ1ApYDo90yDDiUEVIWCxo1_HF4B7AjTwUBxpWWpyTtVZhYLVS8gEtriAo-gqX5lGDSzK8vEg3qgGLn5cKjrIBpdCFNL-d2CTya_etEdDZ79W8CO-EQ%3D%3D)**

clean_body: It’s nice to meet you. | We’re eager to share our vision for America – we need new leadership for our changing economy. | Friend, Hey, Doug Burgum here. We just announced our campaign for President of the United States. We're eager to share our vision for America - we need new leadership for our changing economy. As we launch our campaign, we first want to introduce our story: Now, we're ready to take our conservative business leader's perspective to Washington and fight for the best of America. This race won't be easy. In addition to outperforming my fellow Republican candidates, we are also going up against Joe Biden and the media. The first debate is coming up very soon, and we're going to need a surge in support to make it onto that stage. We hope we can count on you, Friend, which is why we're asking YOU to do us the honor of becoming an of this campaign. We have a long road ahead of us, and it will not be easy.
